spells.name: Shadow Wall I
spells.description: Creates a black, insubstantial wall up to 20'x20'x1" that light cannot pass into or through (i.e., it does not hinder movement, but it blocks vision). Note that this provides Full Soft Cover (see RMCL, Section 9.6). This will not block Darkvision, which does not require light to function.

spells.name: Airwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of dense churning air up to 10'x10'x3'. This wall requires 1 AP to cross, the pace of anyone moving through it at more than a Walk comes out with his pace reduced by one (e.g, a Run going in would be a Jog coming out), and attacks through the wall suffer a -50 penalty.

spells.name: Shadow Wall II
spells.description: As Shadow Wall I, except for duration.

spells.name: Waterwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of water up to 10'x10'x1'. This wall requires 2 AP to cross, the pace of anyone moving through it at more than a Walk comes out with his pace reduced by two (e.g, a Run going in would be a Walk pace coming out) to a minimum of a Walk, and attacks through the wall suffer a -80 penalty. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Woodwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of wood up to 10'x20'x2". It can UNIFIED  be burned through or chopped through or toppled if one end is Spell Law not against a wall.

spells.name: Enhance Lock
spells.description: Target lock becomes harder to pick or to force, giving a -20 penalty to any attempt to do so. Note that this will give a lock an RR against Heaven’s Key.

spells.name: Earthwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of packed earth up to 10'x10'x (3' 60 at base, 1' at top); it can be dug through only (20 man-rounds at top).

spells.name: Icewall I
spells.description: Creates a wall of ice up to 10'x10'x (2' at base, 1' at top); it can be melted through or chipped through or toppled if not against a wall.

spells.name: Sacred Gate I
spells.description: Creates a sanctified entryway that will attempt to prevent “unholy” things from passing through the gate. The gate is defined by a closed loop that is either freestanding or at an entrance/exit point. A pair of pillars does not define a gate, because the top is open. Putting a crosspiece that connects that pair of pillars would close the loop and allow that to become a Sacred Gate. The gate does not need to have straight sides; a cave mouth could become a Sacred Gate. There is no size limit; the Gateway Arch in St. Louis could be made into a Sacred Gate. When an unholy being tries to pass through the Sacred Gate, it must make an RR. If it fails, then it takes an A Holy critical and is unable to pass through. If it succeeds, it passes through the gateway and the Sacred Gate spell is dispelled. If the Sacred Gate ever ceases to be a closed loop (e.g., the crosspiece falls off the pillars, leaving the top unconnected), the spell ends. It may also be canceled or dispelled normally.

spells.name: Barrier Pit
spells.description: Opens a pit (up to 500 cubic feet in stone; 1000 cubic feet in earth or ice). The entire pit must be within 50' of caster and the pit can only be opened on a horizontal surface with an incline of less than 45°.

spells.name: Airwall True
spells.description: As Airwall, except has a set duration of 1 min/level and does not require concentration.

spells.name: Stonewall
spells.description: Creates a wall of non-precious stone up to 10'x10'x1'; it can be chipped through or toppled if not against a wall.

spells.name: Waterwall True
spells.description: As Waterwall, except caster need not concentrate and the duration is 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Sacred Gate II
spells.description: As Sacred Gate I, except for duration and it does a B Holy critical.

spells.name: Woodwall True
spells.description: As Woodwall, except duration is permanent.

spells.name: Heaven's Key
spells.description: Unlocks one lock without triggering any associated traps. There is no chance of failure (other than normal spell failure), unless the lock has an RR.

spells.name: Earthwall True
spells.description: As Earthwall, except duration is permanent.

spells.name: Icewall II
spells.description: As Icewall I, except size is up to 20'x20'x(4' at base, 2' at top).

spells.name: Sacred Gate III
spells.description: As Sacred Gate I, except for duration and it does a C Holy critical.

spells.name: Stonewall True
spells.description: As Stonewall, except duration is permanent and dimensions may be up to 20'x20'x1'.

spells.name: Meld Walls
spells.description: Fuses touching walls (seam can be up to 20' long) or fuses a section of stone blocks (up to 100 cubic feet).

spells.name: Curved Wall
spells.description: As any one of the lower level “wall” Spells on this list, except the wall can be curved up to a semicircle.

spells.name: Sacred Gate IV
spells.description: As Sacred Gate I, except for duration and it does a D Holy critical.

spells.name: Sacred Gate True
spells.description: As Sacred Gate I, except for duration and it does an E Holy critical.

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.description: Creates a transparent wall of “force” that is absolutely impassable by anyone or anything. It is up to 10'x20'x1". 6.1 - Open Channeling CONCUSSION’S WAY

spells.name: Remove Irritant
spells.description: Any foreign matter causing an irritation (e.g., itching powder, poison ivy chemical, a splinter, allergen, or the like) is removed from the skin and exposed minor wounds of the target.

spells.name: Heal I
spells.description: Target is healed 5 concussion hits.

spells.name: Light Exposure
spells.description: An injury from burns, chemical burns, scalding, or frostbite incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, and the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll.

spells.name: Heal III
spells.description: Target is healed 15 concussion hits.

spells.name: Stun Relief *
spells.description: Target is relieved of 1 round of accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Medium Exposure
spells.description: As Light Exposure Relief, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Regeneration I *
spells.description: Reduces target’s concussion hit damage by 2 hits every round as long as caster concentrates; if caster is unconscious, this spell will operate on the caster without concentration.

spells.name: Heal V
spells.description: Target is healed 25 concussion hits. 6.1 Open

spells.name: Severe Exposure
spells.description: As Light Exposure ReChanneling lief, except an injury incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Awakening *
spells.description: Target is instantly awake.

spells.name: Heal VII
spells.description: Target is healed 35 concussion hits.

spells.name: Regeneration II *
spells.description: As Regeneration I, except 4 hits per round.

spells.name: Light Exposure
spells.description: As Light Exposure Relief, except the recovery time is reduced from days to hours.

spells.name: Fatigue Removal
spells.description: Removes all penalties from fatigue.

spells.name: Heal X
spells.description: Target is healed 50 concussion hits.

spells.name: Medium Exposure Healing
spells.description: As Medium Exposure Relief, except the recovery time is reduced from days to hours.

spells.name: Long Stun Relief
spells.description: As Stun Relief, except the range is 200'.

spells.name: Regeneration III *
spells.description: As Regeneration I, except 6 hits per round.

spells.name: Severe Exposure
spells.description: As Severe Exposure Relief, except the recovery time is reduced from days to hours.

spells.name: Heal XV
spells.description: Target is healed 75 concussion hits.

spells.name: Regeneration V *
spells.description: As Regeneration I, except 10 hits per round.

spells.name: True Heal
spells.description: Target is healed of all concussion hit damage.

spells.name: Mass Stun Relief
spells.description: Up to one target per caster level is relieved of 1 round of stun effects.

spells.name: Severe Exposure Healing True
spells.description: As Severe Exposure Relief, except the recovery time is reduced from days to rounds.

spells.name: Mass True Heal
spells.description: Allows caster to heal all concussion hits in a number of targets equal to the level of the caster. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 61 6.1 - Open Channeling DETECTION MASTERY

spells.name: Detect Channeling
spells.description: Detects any active spell or active magical item from the Channeling realm; caster can concentrate on a different 5'R area each round.

spells.name: Detect Essence
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except realm is Essence.

spells.name: Detect Mentalism
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except realm is Mentalism.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects magic of any realm.

spells.name: Detect Life
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects living beings.

spells.name: Detect Curse
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects curses on people or things.

spells.name: Detect Undead
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects the presence of Undead.

spells.name: Life Typing
spells.description: Analyzes one living being, giving race, age, and current state of health.

spells.name: Detect Invisible
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects invisible things; all attacks against something so detected are at -50. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Perceive Power
spells.description: Gives the power (level) of the person UNIFIED or item or spell examined; caster can concentrate on a dif-  ferent target each round. Spell Law

spells.name: Poison Analysis
spells.description: Caster may analyze a poison to determine the exact effects and what antidotes are necessary. Poison may be on an item or in a being. 62

spells.name: Detect Mechanical
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except it detects mechanical traps (but not unintentional hazards of any kind or magical protections).

spells.name: Power Typing
spells.description: Detects any active magic on a target person or item. It also analyzes general spell type (in item or cast) and what profession cast or created it; in case of a person, it gives an exact profession.

spells.name: Detect Sacred
spells.description: As Detect Channeling, except detects any holy or unholy creature/item, any items (including sacred texts) of religious significance, hallowed ground, and exceptionally pious individuals.

spells.name: Detect Spell
spells.description: As Detect Power, except detects any spell that has been cast in the area examined going back 1 day/level of caster. Caster learns approximate time (within an hour) that a detected spell was cast.

spells.name: Perceive Pregnancy
spells.description: Identifies any woman or animal that is with child, at any stage of pregnancy. Caster learns the developmental stage, number, and sex(es) of the preborn. Caster can scan a different area each round.

spells.name: Perceive Power
spells.description: As Perceive Power, except range is 500' and everyone/everything in a five foot radius can be “perceived” at once, with a different area targeted each round.

spells.name: Location III
spells.description: Gives the direction and distance to any specific object or place that the caster is familiar with or has had described in detail. The caster must have the dimensions of the object exact within 10% of actual size and know at least two other attributes that make the item unique (e.g., color, texture, weight, etc.) within range of the spell. Note that sometimes the caster must know more than two other attributes to make the item unique.

spells.name: Reveal Undead
spells.description: As Detect Undead, except caster learns exact numbers, types, and levels of Undead, as well as whether or not each Undead is functioning independently or is currently controlled (including “mastered”) by another.

spells.name: Curse Analysis
spells.description: As Detect Curse, except any curse may be analyzed for approximate level, effect, and required cure.

spells.name: Life Analysis
spells.description: As Life Typing, except also gives exact profession, degree of religious feeling, religious affiliation, experience level, and other pertinent details.

spells.name: Detect True
spells.description: Detects as any one of the lower level Detect spells. Thing detected and area of effect can both be changed each round.

spells.name: Perceive Power
spells.description: As Perceive Power, except every single item, spell, or individual within 500' of the caster that has “power” (a level) is “perceived” in an instant.

spells.name: Mass Life Analysis
spells.description: As Life Analysis, except applies to 1 target/level within a range of 100'.

spells.name: Location True
spells.description: As Location III, except range is 1 mile/ level. 6.1 - Open Channeling LIGHT’S WAY

spells.name: Projected Light
spells.description: Beam of light (like a flashlight) springs from the caster’s palm; it has a 50' effective range. If the caster’s hand is closed into a fist, the light will “turn off”. If the caster’s fist is reopened before the end of the duration, the light will turn on again.

spells.name: Light I
spells.description: Lights a 10'R area about the point touched. This spell may be cast onto a target as explained in Section 10.17.

spells.name: Aura
spells.description: Causes a bright aura about the target, providing a more powerful appearance and subtracting 10 from all attacks on the target.

spells.name: Lights II
spells.description: As Light I, except 1 or 2 areas can be created with a total radius of 20' (e.g., one area of 20'R or two areas of 10’R) and the location(s) for the light(s) need not be touched.

spells.name: Sudden Light
spells.description: Causes a 10'R burst of intense light, all within are stunned (-50) for 1 round per 10 failure.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.description: As Aura, except it produces an extremely powerful appearance and subtracts 15 from all attacks.

spells.name: Shock Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of intense, charged light is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Lightning Bolt attack table, as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Lights III
spells.description: As Lights II, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'. 6.1 Open

spells.name: Utterlight I
spells.description: Nullifies all magically created darkChanneling ness in a 10'R, and lights that area as full daylight.

spells.name: Waiting Light
spells.description: As Light I, except caster can delay the spell up to 24 hours; it can be triggered by one of the following (decided by caster): elapsed time, specific movements, specific sounds, touch, etc.

spells.name: Flare
spells.description: A ball of light one foot in diameter is shot from the palm of the caster: it will travel to the limit of Long range, explode (as a flare), burn with a bright light (as a flare), drift slowly to earth, and go out. An area equal to the range is lit if the flare can rise to its full range; drops 10'/round. It can be fired at a target as a Small Fire Bolt.

spells.name: Illumination II
spells.description: As Lights II, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Lights V
spells.description: As Lights II, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'.

spells.name: Utterlight III
spells.description: As Utterlight I, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'

spells.name: Lights X
spells.description: As Lights II, except up to ten areas can be created with a total radius of 100'.

spells.name: Illumination III
spells.description: As Lights III, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Utterlight V
spells.description: As Utterlight I, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'

spells.name: Mass Lights
spells.description: As Lights II, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Illumination V
spells.description: As Lights V, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Aura
spells.description: As Aura, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Shock Ball
spells.description: Caster extends a finger and a 1" globe of blue-white light shoots out to the target location, then erupts in arcs of electricity in a 40' sphere. Attack is resolved on the Lightning Ball table as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Alkar
spells.description: As Aura, except target seems like a minor god and the subtraction is 25.

spells.name: Mass True Aura
spells.description: As True Aura, except as many ROLEMASTER targets as the caster’s level can be affected. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Mass Illumination
spells.description: As Mass Lights, except duSpell Law ration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Utterlights
spells.description: As Utterlight I, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level. 63 6.1 - Open Channeling LOFTY MOVEMENTS

spells.name: Stamina
spells.description: Target gains a bonus of +30 for any Endurance rolls due to movement.

spells.name: Edgewalking
spells.description: Target can walk along narrow edges (down to 2" wide) that can support his weight. Maneuver rolls are not normally required.

spells.name: Icewalking
spells.description: Target can walk along slick and/or wet surfaces as if on dry, secure footing.

spells.name: Limbwalking
spells.description: Target can walk along tree limbs as if on level ground.

spells.name: Stonewalking
spells.description: Target can walk on stone surfaces angled up to 60° as if on level ground.

spells.name: Waterwalking
spells.description: Target can walk on water as if on level dry ground. Water need not be perfectly still, but must be fairly calm.

spells.name: Merging Organic
spells.description: Target can merge into any organic material (alive or dead). While merged, target cannot move, perceive, or cast spells. When the target emerges from the material, it is possible to emerge from any side or face of the material, although this is limited to moving “through” no more than the target’s own body size plus two feet worth of material. The target can exit at any time up to the end of spell duration (at which time the target automatically emerges at the entrance point). ROLEMASTER UNIFIED

spells.name: Store Sanctuary
spells.description: Caster “stores” a location for use with spells lat-  er on this list. While casting this spell, the caster must meditate for one Spell Law hour in the location that will be stored. The caster can only have one sanctuary stored at a time. As long as this location remains “stored”, it will detect as a magical (i.e., “holy”) place.

spells.name: Limbrunning
spells.description: As Limbwalking, except target can move at up to a running pace (three times walking speed), without it being any more fatiguing than walking. 64

spells.name: Stonerunning
spells.description: Target can walk or run on stone surfaces angled up to 60° as if on level ground.

spells.name: Waterrunning
spells.description: As Waterwalking, except target can move at up to a running pace (three times walking speed), without it being any more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Airwalking
spells.description: Target can walk on calm air. This spell only allows for horizontal movement. Vertical movement must be achieved by other means.

spells.name: Returning I
spells.description: Caster may return (as a teleport) to the caster’s stored sanctuary (from Store Sanctuary) so long as the sanctuary is no more than 1 mile away.

spells.name: Icerunning
spells.description: Target can walk or run along slick and/or wet surfaces as if on dry, secure footing.

spells.name: Great Merging Organic
spells.description: As Merging Organic, except target can turn within the material and can perceive the outside world if within 6" of the surface.

spells.name: Returning V
spells.description: As Returning I, except the sanctuary can be up to 5 miles away.

spells.name: Skywalking
spells.description: As Airwalking, except target can walk when winds do not exceed twice the caster’s level in miles per hour (i.e., when cast by a 20th level character, the target can walk in winds up to 40 mph). Wind does affect the target’s movement.

spells.name: Airrunning
spells.description: As Airwalking, except target can run.

spells.name: Returning X
spells.description: As Returning I, except the sanctuary can be up to 10 miles away.

spells.name: Merging Organic True
spells.description: As Great Merging Organic, except target may use self-targeted spells while merged.

spells.name: Airrunning True
spells.description: As Airrunning, except target can run up to thrice the normal speed (Running pace) on calm air without expending energy. This pace may be retained without any danger of Endurance checks related to movement during the duration.

spells.name: Word of Return
spells.description: As Returning, except spell is instantaneous and the sanctuary can be up to 10 miles per level away.

spells.name: Skyrunning
spells.description: As Skywalking, except target can move at up to a running pace (three times walking speed), without it being any more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Returning True
spells.description: As Returning, except there is no distance limit.

spells.name: Rereturning *
spells.description: Caster may return to the caster’s stored sanctuary (from Store Sanctuary) , stay up to 1 round per level, and then return to the point where he cast his spell (thus making it a round trip). Distance limit is 10 miles per level. 6.1 - Open Channeling NATURE’S LAW

spells.name: Beast Lore
spells.description: Caster learns nature, value, and history of one animal.

spells.name: Plant Lore
spells.description: Caster learns nature, value, and history of one plant (that is not a magical herb).

spells.name: Herb Lore
spells.description: Caster can understand the nature, origin, value, and use of any magical herb. If the plant is not a magical herb, no information will be related.

spells.name: Fungal Lore
spells.description: Caster learns nature, value, and history of one fungus.

spells.name: Stone Lore
spells.description: Caster learns the nature, history, and origin of any one stone.

spells.name: Speed Growth
spells.description: Caster can increase speed of growth for any one species of plant within a 10' radius by ten times normal growth rate.

spells.name: Animal Tongues
spells.description: Allows caster to understand and “speak” the language of any one animal species.

spells.name: Water Lore
spells.description: Caster learns the nature, value, origin, and eventual destination or outflow of one body of fresh water.

spells.name: Animal Mastery
spells.description: Allows caster to control the actions of any 1 animal.

spells.name: Nature’s Awareness I
spells.description: Allows caster to monitor animate activity in the area (e.g., the caster will be aware of movements, subtle and overt). Caster cannot move while concentrating. Caster does not receive a picture of what is moving, just an awareness of the movement. This will allow distinguishing general size and shape of a moving object. Someone staying still, but breathing, will be detected, but only a very general idea of size would be determinable. 6.1 Open

spells.name: Plant Tongues
spells.description: Allows caster to understand and Channeling “speak” the language of one plant species.

spells.name: Animal Mastery III
spells.description: As Animal Mastery I, except caster can control up to three animals.

spells.name: Animal Empathy
spells.description: Caster can understand and/or visualize the thoughts and emotions of any one animal.

spells.name: Plant Control I
spells.description: Caster can control the automatic and/ or mental processes of any one plant. Caster can also control the plant’s movements; this does not allow movement beyond normal allowances. If cast daily, this can be used to direct a plant’s growth into specific unusual shapes, so long as these would be naturally possible.

spells.name: Stonespeech
spells.description: Caster can communicate with any one stone if it possesses any mental qualities (e.g., caster could speak to a holy stone which possesses some sort of intelligence).

spells.name: Herb Production
spells.description: Caster can grow an herb to sudden maturity by planting the proper seed; the herb is sterile and the growth takes 1-10 rnds.

spells.name: Fungal Tongues
spells.description: Allows caster to understand and “speak” the language of one species of fungus.

spells.name: Animal Mastery
spells.description: As Animal Mastery I, except caster can control up to five animals.

spells.name: Plant Control III
spells.description: As Plant Control I, except caster can control any three plants.

spells.name: Nature’s Awareness V
spells.description: As Nature’s Awareness I, except that the radius is 500'.

spells.name: Earth Empathy
spells.description: Caster can understand and/or visualize the thoughts and emotions of any one animal, plant, fungus, stone, or dead organic object. The caster can change target each round.

spells.name: Species Mastery
spells.description: As Animal Mastery I, except caster can control all animals of a given species within 10'R per level.

spells.name: Control Fungus
spells.description: Caster can control the actions of up to five fungal life forms.

spells.name: Commune with Nature
spells.description: Caster is made aware of the ecological health of the area and anything that is causing significant ecological impact on the area (e.g., the water from the magic spring makes everything here grow fast, poison is leaching out from the pile of mine tailings, or the unicorns prevent disease from spreading through the wildlife). ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Animal Mastery True
spells.description: As Animal Mastery I, except UNIFIED  duration is permanent and concentration is not required. Spell Law At a given time, the total number of levels of animals controlled by caster through use of this spell cannot exceed the caster’s own level. 65 6.1 - Open Channeling PURIFICATIONS

spells.name: Sustenance
spells.description: This spell neutralizes abnormal diseases, poison, and other similar substances in one day’s worth of food and/or water. It will not neutralize a poison or similar substance that is a natural part of the food (e.g., it will not neutralize the natural poison in poisonous mushrooms).

spells.name: Disease Purification
spells.description: Stops infection and/or spread of a non-magical disease in one target that has acquired the disease. Infected areas may continue to worsen. Thus, no further damage will occur in uninfected areas of the body, and healing may begin.

spells.name: Food Preservation
spells.description: This spell perfectly preserves ROLEMASTER UNIFIED one day’s worth of food (by the caster’s dietary require-  ments) for one week, after which it will spoil normally. Spell Law

spells.name: Poison Purification
spells.description: Neutralizes any one non-magical poison in the system of one target. Damage already sustained is not cured.

spells.name: Disease Resistance
spells.description: Target gets an additional RR 66 against any disease(s).

spells.name: Poison Resistance
spells.description: Target gets an additional RR against any poison(s).

spells.name: Mass Food Preservation
spells.description: As Food Preservation, except preserves one day’s worth of food per level of the caster.

spells.name: Disease Resistance
spells.description: As Disease Resistance I, except target gets 2 additional RRs.

spells.name: Poison Resistance
spells.description: As Poison Resistance I, except target gets 2 additional RRs.

spells.name: Mind Disease
spells.description: Target is cured of one mental illness or malady. This will require a 1-10 day recovery period to take effect.

spells.name: Disease Resistance
spells.description: As Disease Resistance I, except target gets 3 additional RRs.

spells.name: Poison Resistance
spells.description: As Poison Resistance I, except target gets 3 additional RRs.

spells.name: Extended Food Preservation
spells.description: As Food Preservation, except preserves one day’s worth of food for one month.

spells.name: Undisease
spells.description: Caster can remove any one disease from a target.

spells.name: Unpoison
spells.description: Caster can remove any one poison from a target.

spells.name: Mass Mind Disease Cures
spells.description: As Mind Disease Cures, except cures one mental illness or malady in a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Extreme Food Preservation
spells.description: As Food Preservation, except preserves one day’s worth of food for a year.

spells.name: Mass Undisease
spells.description: Caster can remove any one disease from a number of targets up to the caster’s level (e.g., an 18th level caster could remove leprosy from 18 targets).

spells.name: Mass Unpoison
spells.description: Caster can remove any one poison from the systems of a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mind Disease Cures True
spells.description: Target is instantly cured of one mental illness or malady.

spells.name: Greater Disease Purification
spells.description: Any disease in the area is eliminated.

spells.name: Greater Poison Purification
spells.description: Any poison in the area is neutralized.

spells.name: Food Preservation
spells.description: As Food Preservation, except preserves one day’s worth of food per level of the caster for a period of one year/level.

spells.name: Mass Mind Disease Cures True
spells.description: As Mind Disease Cures True, except cures one mental illness or malady in a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Purification True
spells.description: Eliminates all poisons and/or diseases in the area. 6.1 - Open Channeling SOUND’S WAY

spells.name: Speech I
spells.description: Target is able to communicate basic ideas in a specific language (e.g., hungry, thirsty, bathroom, peace, etc.); equivalent to skill rank 2.

spells.name: Quiet I
spells.description: Creates a 1'R area into and out of which sound cannot travel. As discussed in Section 10.17, this spell can be cast on an individual target, which the spell will then follow; this target gains +25 to Stalking attempts, but likewise automatically fails any Perception attempts based on hearing alone and suffers a -50 to Perception rolls where hearing is a factor (e.g., to detect someone Stalking the target). Note that this does not interfere with spell-casting (the target can still speak, even yell, the sound is simply unable to leave the radius of the Quiet - certain spells like Ultrasonics may have their range limited to the interior of the Quiet radius, however).

spells.name: Tongues I
spells.description: Caster is able to communicate basic ideas in a specific language (e.g., hungry, thirsty, bathroom, peace, etc.); equivalent to skill rank 2.

spells.name: Sound Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the origin and significance of any one sound that the caster has heard in the last minute.

spells.name: Soundwall I
spells.description: Creates a plane (up to 20'x20') through which sound will not pass.

spells.name: Speech II
spells.description: As Speech I, except target can communicate more complex concepts, although there is a good chance of misinterpretations; equivalent to skill rank 4.

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Quiet I, except radius is 10'.

spells.name: Quiet III
spells.description: As Quiet I, except 3 targets can be affected.

spells.name: Tongues II
spells.description: As Tongues I, except caster can communicate more complex concepts, although there is a good chance of misinterpretations; equivalent to skill rank 4.

spells.name: Soundwall VI
spells.description: As Soundwall I, except six such walls 6.1 Open are created; each Soundwall must be connected to at least Channeling one other Soundwall.

spells.name: Quiet V
spells.description: As Quiet I, except 5 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Prayer Call
spells.description: Creates a wordless sound (may resemble a human voice, it just cannot transmit words) that can be heard only by members of the caster’s faith. Sound will not have any direct effects, but may serve as a signal and as the spell name implies, it is often used as a signal to assemble for religious services.

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Sphere of Silence I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Golden Voice
spells.description: Caster’s voice is made more pleasant and suitable for whatever task it is put to. The caster gains a +20 bonus to any vocal tasks (singing, oratory, etc.).

spells.name: Speech III
spells.description: As Speech I, except target is reasonably fluent in the language. Target’s accent is imperfect, but there is only a slight chance of misinterpretation; equivalent to skill rank 6.

spells.name: Dialect
spells.description: Caster can speak a language he already knows in any regional or subcultural dialect, accent, and/or slang as if that form was his normal way of speaking.

spells.name: Sounding V
spells.description: Target’s voice carries five times as far as normal.

spells.name: Babel
spells.description: Anyone speaking within the area of effect has his words scrabbled into nonsense; anyone hearing speech within the area of effect hears the words as nonsense. The only way two individuals within the area of effect can communicate through speech is if they both make their RRs.

spells.name: Tongues III
spells.description: As Tongues I, except caster is reasonably fluent in the language. Caster’s accent is imperfect, but there is only a slight chance of misinterpretation; equivalent to skill rank 6.

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Sphere of Silence I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Mass Soundwalls
spells.description: As Soundwall V, except as many Soundwalls as the caster’s level can be created.

spells.name: Mass Quiet
spells.description: As Quiet I, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Speech True
spells.description: As Speech III, except target speaks the specified language like a native and the caster does not need to concentrate (duration is 1 min/level). Skill is equivalent to skill rank 8. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: True Silence
spells.description: No sound can exist within the area of UNIFIED effect. It may be targeted on one being as its center, and if  that being fails an RR, the radius of effect will travel with Spell Law that being.

spells.name: Tongues True
spells.description: As Tongues I, except caster speaks the specified language like a native (equivalent to skill rank 8) and the duration is 10 minutes/level. 67 6.1 - Open Channeling SPELL DEFENSE

spells.name: Protection I
spells.description: Target gains a bonus of +5 to RRs against spells and a bonus of +5 to DB against elemental attacks.

spells.name: Cancel Channeling
spells.description: When the caster is a target of a spell from the Realm of Channeling, the “incoming” spell must first make an RR before the caster makes an RR. If the “incoming” spell passes the RR, it may target the caster of this spell normally; otherwise the incoming spell has no effect on this target. Being a “willing target” does not eliminate this effect, but the caster’s own spells do not need to make an RR. Note that the caster is considered to be a target of any spell which includes him in its area of effect or would “detect” him.

spells.name: Protection Sphere
spells.description: As Protection I, except all beings within 10'R of target (sphere moves with target) get the benefits.

spells.name: Cancel Essence *
spells.description: As Cancel Channeling, except affects spells from the realm of Essence.

spells.name: Protection II
spells.description: As Protection I , except bonuses are +10.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism
spells.description: As Cancel Channeling, except affects spells from the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Protection Sphere
spells.description: As Protection Sphere I, except bonuses ROLEMASTER are +10. UNIFIED

spells.name: Dispel Channeling
spells.description: Any active spell from the realm of Chan-  neling that is on the target must make an RR. If the spell fails its Spell Law RR, it is dispelled.

spells.name: Channeling Shield
spells.description: Creates a shimmering shield in front of the caster: it provides a bonus to the caster’s RR or DB of +10 against all frontal Channeling spell attacks on the caster (force and elemental). If the caster takes an instantaneous action to do so, he 68 can “deflect” one spell attack. This results in adding the caster’s ranks in this list to his RR or, for spells that use an attack table, to his DB (in addition to the basic bonus of 10 for having the Shield). Multiple deflections can be done in a single round, but each is a separate instantaneous action (costing 1 AP for every instantaneous action after the first).

spells.name: Protection III
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +15.

spells.name: Essence Shield
spells.description: As Channeling Shield, except it is effective only against Essence spells.

spells.name: Dispel Essence I
spells.description: As Dispel Channeling I, except it affects spells of the realm of Essence.

spells.name: Mentalism Shield
spells.description: As Channeling Shield, except it is effective only against Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Protection IV
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +20.

spells.name: Spell Shield II
spells.description: As Channeling Shield, except it is effective against any two of the three realms.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism
spells.description: As Dispel Channeling I, except it affects spells of the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Protection V
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +25.

spells.name: Uncurse
spells.description: Dispels a curse if the curse fails an RR. The curse’s level is the level of the caster of the curse. If the curse is not dispelled, the caster cannot try again until he has gone up another level of experience.

spells.name: Spell Shield True
spells.description: As Channeling Shield, except it is effective against all three realms.

spells.name: Channeling
spells.description: Target gets +50 to all RRs against Channeling spells.

spells.name: Essence Resistance
spells.description: Target gets +50 to all RRs against Essence spells.

spells.name: Mentalism Resistance
spells.description: Target gets +50 to all RRs against Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Holy Protection
spells.description: As Channeling Resistance, except for duration.

spells.name: Joint Resistance
spells.description: As Channeling Resistance, except is effective against spells from two realms of the caster’s choice.

spells.name: Resistance True
spells.description: As Channeling Resistance, except is effective against all three realms. 6.1 - Open Channeling WEATHER WAYS

spells.name: Living Gauge
spells.description: Caster may determine air temperature, humidity, barometric pressure, and wind speed. One round of concentration is required per piece of information.

spells.name: Rain Prediction
spells.description: Gives caster a 95% chance of predicting the time and type of rain (or other precipitation) by ±15 minutes over the next 24 hours.

spells.name: Frost Prediction
spells.description: Gives caster a 95% chance of predicting the high and low temperatures over the next 24 hours.

spells.name: Weather Prediction
spells.description: Caster has a 95% chance of correctly predicting time, type, and severity of weather over the next 24 hr period.

spells.name: Rain Deflection *
spells.description: No rain, snow, sleet, hail, or fog will come closer than an inch from the caster or what the caster is wearing, allowing the caster to pass through a downpour and come out completely dry.

spells.name: Breeze Call
spells.description: Caster causes a breeze to come forth which will drive out any gaseous matter (clouds, fog, poison gasses, etc.) and subtracts from all missile attacks (-10). Once set, the direction of the breeze will not change.

spells.name: Fog Call
spells.description: Caster causes fog to arise that obscures nearly all vision in and through the radius; treat as a heavy fog as described in RMCL, Section 15.7.

spells.name: Unfog
spells.description: Disperses fog within the area of effect. If not all of a fog is dispersed (i.e., the fog covers a greater area than the area of effect for this spell), fog will refill the area of effect, reducing the cleared radius by 10' every 1-5 minutes (depending on the heaviness of the fog and ambient humidity).

spells.name: Calm Water
spells.description: All water within a 100'R is calmed; waves are cut by 20' in the center and less towards the perimeter. This will negate the effects of currents in the area of effect.

spells.name: Weather Prediction
spells.description: As Weather Prediction I, except that caster has a 95% chance of predicting weather over a 3-day period.

spells.name: Precipitation Call
spells.description: Caster causes rain or snow to fall (depending on temperature). The precipitation obscures vision into the radius (-25 to Perception) and modifies all missile attacks passing through part of the radius by -25.

spells.name: Weather Watch
spells.description: Alerts the caster any time that the weather within 6.1 Open the area of effect is altered by supernatural means. Channeling

spells.name: Weather Prediction
spells.description: As Weather Prediction I, except that caster has a 95% chance of predicting weather over a 5-day period.

spells.name: Temperature Control
spells.description: Caster can adjust the temperature up or down by 18°F (10°C). Once the duration of the spell is over, the temperature will slowly adjust back to the ambient temperature (over the course of an hour).

spells.name: Wind Control
spells.description: Caster can control the speed and direction of the wind. Caster can increase or decrease wind speed by 1 mph per caster level (e.g., if the wind speed is normally 20 mph, a 15th level caster could alter the wind speed to between 5 and 35 mph). By directing the wind against missile attacks the caster can cause a -1 modification for each mph of wind speed. Note that caster can also control the direction of the flow of gases and/or clouds.

spells.name: Dew Call
spells.description: Caster can summon a dew (or frost, should the temperature be below freezing) the following morning.

spells.name: Water Control
spells.description: Caster can control water movement. Caster can create magical barriers blocking water flow, but intangible to all else, within the limits of the spell. Caster can also control the flow of surface currents on a large body of water, providing up to 1 mph per caster level of current, which can carry boats or ships along.

spells.name: Clear Skies
spells.description: Caster can make the skies clear of haze, precipitation, clouds, etc. This spell will not affect the wind.

spells.name: Weather Prediction
spells.description: As Weather Prediction I, except that caster has a 95% chance of predicting weather over a 30-day period.

spells.name: Rain Call
spells.description: Caster can summon rain of moderate intensity; the rain will obscure short-range vision (-25 to Perception and missile attack out to 100', -75 beyond 100').

spells.name: Sky Call
spells.description: Caster may use any of the lower level spells on this list, but with the effects covering a one mile radius.

spells.name: Storm Call
spells.description: Caster may call forth a storm of any type with maximum wind speeds equal to twice caster’s level in miles per hour, and intensity according to the caster’s desires. Effects will vary according to circumstance (and the GM’s discretion). For example, a 30th level caster could summon a lightning storm with intense rain and constant wind speeds of up to 60 mph: the GM may wish to have random rolls to determine possible lightning strikes vs. exposed targets.

spells.name: Thunderstorm
spells.description: Caster can cause lightning bolts to strike a region within range, with anyone in the area subject to a 25% chance of being targeted by a lightning bolt during any given round. The results are determined on the Lightning Bolt Attack Table, with the OB equal to the caster’s ranks in this list. This spell requires that there already be clouds in the sky. Any fumbles are resolved based on the clouds launching the lightning, not the caster.

spells.name: Tornado
spells.description: Caster creates a tornado. This spell requires a cloudy sky and at least 20 mph winds. The tornado will be 15' in radius and will move 100' randomly each round that the caster does not concentrate. If the caster concentrates, he can control the movement of the tornado (up to 100' per round). The tornado is resolved on living things and structures as a Large Ram Attack with an OB equal to the caster’s ranks in this list, with an additional Grapple critical. If the tornado ever gets a 100% “grapple” on someone, it will pick him up and drop him from a height of 1-100'. The tornado will pick up and toss around small objects, raise dust and water, ROLEMASTER and the GM should call for breakage checks on any items he thinks may be UNIFIED threatened. Note that range is for initial formation only; tornado may travel  any distance from caster once formed. Spell Law

spells.name: Weather Mastery
spells.description: Caster may dictate the weather conditions in the area, modifying wind speeds by ±1 mph x level, and setting the level of precipitation, fog, cloud cover etc. Caster may call for shifts in the patterns as he concentrates, but the change will take at least 1 minute. 69 6.2 - Closed Channeling BLOOD LAW

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: Reduces target’s blood loss by up to 1 hit per round. Until the injury is actually treated by some means (e.g., Medicine maneuver or a Flesh Relief spell), the target cannot move or be moved without the bleeding resuming. Multiple Staunch Wound, Flowstop, Clotting, or Cut Repair spells may not be cast upon the same wound.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound I, except the caster may choose one option: reduce the bleeding by an additional 2 hits/round, or cause the wound to clot so that it is only at risk of reopening during the first hour and only if ROLEMASTER the target engages in activity more vigorous than walking. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Poison/Disease
spells.description: One poison or disease afflictSpell Law ing the target is reduced by one level of severity (e.g. from Extreme to Severe, or from Mild to cured), and, in the case of disease, anyone subsequently infected by the target gains a bonus of +20 on their RR. 70

spells.name: Light Flesh Relief
spells.description: A flesh wound or skin/tissue injury that incurs a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, and the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll.

spells.name: Limb Preservation
spells.description: Prevents the deterioration of 1 limb (even while severed); also requires the use of Limb Preservation from the Bone, Muscle, and Nerve spell lists.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound II, except two options may be chosen, including multiple reductions in the amount of bleeding. If the clotting option is selected twice, bleeding is instantly stopped with no danger of reopening. In addition, one option may be spent to split the effect of the spell between multiple bleeding injuries (e.g., if the reduction will be 3 hits per round, it may be applied to reduce bleeding of one wound by 1 hit per round and another by 2 hits per round).

spells.name: Poison/Disease Resistance
spells.description: Target receives an additional RR vs either poison or disease, as specified by the caster at the time of casting.

spells.name: Medium Flesh
spells.description: As Light Flesh Relief, except a wound incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound III, except three options may be chosen.

spells.name: Severe Flesh Relief
spells.description: As Medium Flesh Relief, except a wound incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Light Flesh Healing
spells.description: A flesh wound or skin/tissue injury that incurs a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll, and the recovery period is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Joining ‡ *
spells.description: Caster may reattach one severed limb. The Joining spells from the Bone, Muscle, and Nerve spell lists must be cast for the limb to be functional. The recovery time is 1-10 days.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound III, except four options may be chosen.

spells.name: Medium Flesh
spells.description: As Light Flesh Healing, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound III, except five options may be chosen.

spells.name: Undisease
spells.description: Removes any one disease from the target.

spells.name: Severe Flesh
spells.description: As Light Flesh Healing, except an injury incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Unpoison
spells.description: Removes any one poison from the target.

spells.name: Staunch Wound
spells.description: As Staunch Wound III, except seven options may be chosen.

spells.name: Mass Undisease
spells.description: Removes all disease from one target/level.

spells.name: Joining True ‡ *
spells.description: As Joining, except recovery is instantaneous.

spells.name: Light Flesh Healing True
spells.description: As Light Flesh Healing, except the recovery period is reduced to rounds.

spells.name: Mass Unpoison
spells.description: Removes all poison from one target/ level.

spells.name: Medium Flesh Healing True
spells.description: As Medium Flesh Healing, except the recovery period is reduced to rounds.

spells.name: Severe Flesh Healing True
spells.description: As Severe Flesh Healing, except the recovery period is reduced to rounds. 6.2 - Closed Channeling BONE LAW

spells.name: Light Cartilage
spells.description: An injury to cartilage incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, and the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll.

spells.name: Bone Lore
spells.description: Caster acquires complete understanding of any bone damage, including the tools and methods required for healing. Caster does not receive the skill or power necessary to perform the cure, but this diagnostic does provide a +20 bonus to treatment if supervised by the caster. Alternatively, this spell can be used to identify bones, including the approximate age, species, sex, and in some cases cause of death.

spells.name: Light Bone Relief
spells.description: As Light Cartilage Relief, except a bone injury.

spells.name: Contraction
spells.description: Target’s bones become flexible, granting +50 to escape maneuvers.

spells.name: Limb Preservation
spells.description: Allows caster to prevent deterioration of one limb (even while severed); requires use of the Blood, Muscle, and Nerve Limb Preservation spells as well.

spells.name: Medium Cartilage
spells.description: As Light Cartilage Relief, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Medium Bone
spells.description: As Medium Cartilage Relief, except a bone injury.

spells.name: Strong Bones I
spells.description: Target’s bones are strengthened, and 6.2 Closed the injury penalty incurred by any bone injury sustained Channeling within the duration is halved. Injuries suffered before the spell was cast are not affected.

spells.name: Severe Cartilage
spells.description: As Medium Cartilage Relief, except an injury incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Severe Bone Relief
spells.description: As Medium Cartilage Relief, except a bone injury incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Living Splint
spells.description: A bone injury is temporarily braced and immobilized such that the injury penalty from that injury is halved for the duration.

spells.name: Joining ‡ *
spells.description: Caster may reattach one severed limb. The Joining spell from the Blood, Muscle, and Nerve spell lists must be cast for the limb to be functional. The recovery time is 1-10 days.

spells.name: Light Cartilage
spells.description: An injury to cartilage incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll and the recovery period is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Light Bone Healing
spells.description: As Light Cartilage Healing, except for a bone injury.

spells.name: Med. Cartilage
spells.description: As Light Cartilage Healing, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Medium Bone
spells.description: As Medium Cartilage Healing, except for a bone injury.

spells.name: Strong Bones II
spells.description: As Strong Bones I, except the duration is 10 minutes per level.

spells.name: Severe Cartilage
spells.description: As Light Cartilage Healing, except an injury incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Severe Bone Healing
spells.description: As Severe Cartilage Healing, except for a bone injury.

spells.name: Iron Bones
spells.description: Target’s bones are greatly strengthened, granting a physical RR to prevent any new injury penalties incurred from bone injuries.

spells.name: Joining True ‡ *
spells.description: As Joining, except recovery is instantaneous.

spells.name: Medium Cartilage Healing True
spells.description: As Medium Cartilage Healing, except the recovery time is reduced to rounds.

spells.name: Medium Bone Healing True
spells.description: As Medium Bone Healing, except the recovery time is reduced to rounds. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Unbreakable
spells.description: Any new bone injury suffered by the UNIFIED  target will not result in any injury penalty. Other effects of Spell Law the attack (hits, stun, etc.) are not prevented by this spell.

spells.name: Skeletal Healing
spells.description: Caster can use any lower level spell (on this list) once per round. 71 6.2 - Closed Channeling CALM SPIRITS

spells.name: Calm Self
spells.description: Caster is placed in a state of calm. This provides a +25 RR bonus against Fear or any spells that provoke an emotional response, a +10 bonus to any maneuvers that benefit from calm (including the use of missile weapons), while giving a -15 penalty to any activity to which calm is detrimental (e.g., most moving maneuvers above a walking pace, melee combat, thrown weapons)

spells.name: Calm I
spells.description: Target will take no aggressive/offensive action and will fight only if attacked.

spells.name: Restful Spirit I
spells.description: Target will not be able to rise as undead or house any animating spirit or otherwise be made to occupy a state other than peaceful death or true resurrection that returns the body to life and rehouses the soul.

spells.name: Calm II
spells.description: As Calm I, except 2 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Hold Kind I
spells.description: Humanoid target has its Action Points per round reduced by 3 (i.e., normally, the target will have 1 AP each round).

spells.name: Calm III
spells.description: As Calm I, except 3 targets may be affected. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED

spells.name: Restful Spirit II
spells.description: As Restful Spirit I, except for duration. 

spells.name: Calm IV
spells.description: As Calm I, except 4 targets may be affected. Spell Law

spells.name: Calm V
spells.description: As Calm l, except 5 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Animal
spells.description: Caster can calm (as Calm I) a number of animals equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: True Hold I
spells.description: Any target has its Action Points per round reduced by 3 (i.e., normally, the target will have 1 AP each round). 72

spells.name: Calm X
spells.description: As Calm I, except that 10 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Hold Kind III
spells.description: As Hold Kind I, except 3 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Meditation
spells.description: The caster enters a deep relaxing meditation from which he cannot be woken until a specified time has passed (up to the duration of the spell). While meditating the caster regains Hits and PP at twice the normal rate and receives +50 to any Meditation maneuvers.

spells.name: Whisper of Calming
spells.description: All targets in radius must resist or they are calmed (as Calm I).

spells.name: True Hold II
spells.description: As True Hold I, except 2 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Restful Spirit True
spells.description: As Restful Spirit I, except for duration.

spells.name: Mass Animal
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -20] As Mass Animal Calm I, except RRs are modified by -20 and the range is 10'/lvl.

spells.name: Hold Kind V
spells.description: As Hold Kind I, except 5 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Lord Calm
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -20] As Calm I, except that 20 targets may be affected.

spells.name: Long Calm
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -20] As Calm I, except that calmness lasts for 1 day/level.

spells.name: Mass Calm
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -20] As Calm I, except that caster can calm a number of targets equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Hold Kind
spells.description: As Hold Kind I, except that caster can affect a number of targets equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass True Hold
spells.description: As True Hold I, except that caster can affect a number of targets equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Calm True
spells.description: As Calm I, except that calmness is permanent. 6.2 - Closed Channeling CREATIONS

spells.name: Weave Air
spells.description: Creates (out of thin air) a cloth up to 3'x6' in area, the cloth is made of typical local textile materials (of an inexpensive kind), suitable for use as either a blanket or as a simple garment.

spells.name: Sustain Self
spells.description: Allows caster to go without food or water and not suffer damage (i.e., provides nutrition and water for 1 day).

spells.name: Water Production I
spells.description: Caster can produce sufficient water in any available receptacle to supply a being for one day.

spells.name: Food Production I
spells.description: Caster can produce sufficient food from the surrounding area to feed one hearty appetite for one day.

spells.name: Fire Starting
spells.description: Allows caster to set a fire of 1'R; fire will then last as long as there is fuel. A target in the 1'R will take an A Heat critical. Caster may only target a specific location, not an individual, with this spell.

spells.name: Nutrient Conjures
spells.description: Caster can produce a loaf of blessed bread that weighs half a pound and will support one being for one day; the loaf will lose potency in one month.

spells.name: Water Production
spells.description: As Water Production I, except caster can produce three days of water.

spells.name: Food Production III
spells.description: As Food Production I, except caster can produce sufficient food to feed three beings for one day.

spells.name: Herb Enhancement
spells.description: Allows caster to enhance the efficacy of any one herb (growing or dead) with healing or durational effects. For healing herbs, recovery rolls receive an extra +25 bonus. For herbs with a durational effect, the duration is doubled. This spell may be employed only once per herb.

spells.name: Water Production
spells.description: As Water Production I, except caster can produce five days supply of water.

spells.name: Food Production V
spells.description: As Food Production I, except caster can produce sufficient food to feed five beings for one day.

spells.name: Nutrient Conjures
spells.description: As Nutrient Conjure I, except caster can produce three loaves of blessed bread. 6.2 Closed

spells.name: Herb Mastery
spells.description: Caster can double the potency of any one Channeling herb (growing or dead). This has the effect of halving the quantity of herb needed for a full dose, i.e. if a normal dose requires one full leaf to be effective, following this spell, only half a leaf would be required. This spell may be employed only once/herb, and may not be combined with Herb Enhancement.

spells.name: Tent of the Gods
spells.description: Caster creates a plain tent, capable of sheltering up to four persons comfortably (or six uncomfortably) against local weather conditions. At the end of this spell, the tent simply disappears.

spells.name: Lesser Plant Production
spells.description: Caster can produce a plant up to 10' in height and/or width; plant must be representative of the region.

spells.name: Mass Water Production
spells.description: As Water Production I, except caster can create one day of water per level (e.g., a 17th level Cleric could create 17 days of water).

spells.name: Food Production
spells.description: As Food Production I, except caster can produce sufficient food to feed a number of beings equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Batch Herb Mastery
spells.description: As Herb Mastery, except caster may enhance one herb per level. Herbs must all be of the same type.

spells.name: Cabin of the Gods
spells.description: As Tent of the Gods, except creates a log cabin suitable for 12 persons in comfort or 20 persons uncomfortably.

spells.name: Lesser Animal
spells.description: Caster can create an animal representative of the surrounding region and weighing no more than 10 lbs; animal will be friendly to caster.

spells.name: Nutrient Conjures
spells.description: As Nutrient Conjure I, except caster can produce a number of loaves of blessed bread equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Greater Plant
spells.description: As Lesser Plant Production, except that caster can create one plant with a height and/or width of one foot per caster level (e.g., a 30th level could produce a 30' high tree with a 30' maximum width); plant must be representative of the local area.

spells.name: Heavenly Tower
spells.description: As Tent of the Gods, except creates a stone tower suitable for 16 persons in comfort or 30 uncomfortably. This is a defensive structure, with a barred door and whatever standard structural design the caster’s culture would use for a fortified stone tower.

spells.name: Plant Production
spells.description: As Greater Plant Production, except plant need not be native to the local area.

spells.name: Greater Animal
spells.description: As Lesser Animal Production, except that caster can produce an animal with a maximum weight of one pound per caster level. The animal must be a native of the area. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 73 6.2 - Closed Channeling LOCATING WAYS

spells.name: Orientation *
spells.description: Caster knows which way is up and where the cardinal directions (north, east, south, and west) lie.

spells.name: Guess *
spells.description: When faced with a choice about which the caster has little or no information (e.g., which corridor leads to the wine cellar), the caster may cast this spell and the Gamemaster will determine which choice the caster actually makes, biasing the choice favorably by 25% (e.g., if there are two choices, roll 1-100: correct on 26-100, incorrect on 01-25). The caster must have a limited number of options (i.e., finite and countable). After the spell is cast, the caster may not cast another Guess for the same information until his experience level has increased.

spells.name: Pathfinding I
spells.description: Caster learns the location(s) of any “path(s)” within 100'; gives the nearest point on each path, but not the path’s course.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: Caster is subtly directed (by hints and clues) towards a specific destination (within 100'/lvl) by guidance from the caster’s deity. The exact form of the guidance may vary from deity to deity (e.g., a deity of water might leave hints in the rocks of a stream, etc.). For ROLEMASTER UNIFIED the duration of this spell, the caster must concentrate on  following the guidance to perceive the clues. Spell Law

spells.name: Location I
spells.description: Gives the direction and distance to any specific object or place with which the caster is familiar or has had described in detail. The caster must have the dimensions of the object exact within 10% of actual size and know at least two other attributes that make the item 74 unique (e.g., color, texture, weight, etc.) within range of the spell. Note that sometimes the caster must know more than two other attributes to make the item unique, although the Tag spells allow one to shortcut this process.

spells.name: Pathfinding III
spells.description: As Pathfinding I, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Tag I
spells.description: Caster places a distinctive “tag” on the aura of a person or item, which will qualify as a unique descriptive marker for purposes of Location (e.g., the caster could cast Tag I on a common coin and Location would be able to pick it out amongst all the various similar coins).

spells.name: Location III
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Pathfinding V
spells.description: As Pathfinding I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Location V
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Memory’s Path
spells.description: Caster can remember an exact route that the caster has previously traveled regardless of whether or not the original journey was made with the caster’s normal sensory abilities active (e.g., a 12th level caster could remember the course of 12 hours of a trip even if blindfolded during that time). To be effective, this spell must be cast within one month of the journey.

spells.name: Far Pathfinding
spells.description: As Pathfinding I, except range is 1 mile.

spells.name: Divine Guidance
spells.description: As Guidance, except the form of the guidance is that of an animal companion sent by the deity. The caster can follow the animal to a specific destination.

spells.name: Tag II
spells.description: As Tag I, except for duration.

spells.name: Find Item I
spells.description: Caster can locate any 1 object the caster can describe, if indeed it exists and is in range (e.g., caster could describe a type of mace he had never seen or heard of). Description does not need to be unique. If item description is not unique, the spell locates the nearest item matching the description.

spells.name: Far Location
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 1 mile.

spells.name: Far Pathfinding
spells.description: As Pathfinding I, except range is 10 miles.

spells.name: Find Item III
spells.description: As Find Item I, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Tag III
spells.description: As Tag I, except for duration.

spells.name: Lord Location
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 20 miles.

spells.name: Pathfinding
spells.description: As Pathfinding I, except range is 1 mile/level and exact routes within the range are ascertained.

spells.name: Location True
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 1 mile/level.

spells.name: Tag IV
spells.description: As Tag I, except for duration.

spells.name: Find Person
spells.description: As Location True, except it locates a person. Caster must still be able to provide a unique description.

spells.name: Find Item True
spells.description: As Find Item I, except range is 100'/level. 6.2 - Closed Channeling LORE

spells.name: Afterthoughts
spells.description: Allows caster virtually total recall of any conversation or writing encountered within a period of days equal to caster’s level.

spells.name: Detect Evil
spells.description: Detects any evil being or any item created by evil or long used by a very evil person; caster can concentrate on a different 5'R area each round.

spells.name: Detect Curse
spells.description: As Detect Evil, except detects curses on people or things.

spells.name: Detect Hate
spells.description: As Detect Evil, except caster can detect the emotion of hatred, in the living mind or in an object forged with great malice. Any object or being “Of Slaying” will show as being filled with hate.

spells.name: Light Lore I
spells.description: Caster can ascertain the origin point and nature of any one “holy item” that is not “of darkness” or “of evil”. This will not give specific capabilities.

spells.name: Poison Analysis
spells.description: Caster may analyze a poison to determine the exact effects and what antidotes are necessary. Poison may be on an item or in a being.

spells.name: Determine
spells.description: Caster can detect any extreme emotion (e.g., hatred, love, sadness, fear, etc.). In addition, the caster learns which emotion(s) the target is feeling. If there are no extremes of emotion (i.e., only normal feelings), nothing is detected. Caster may change the spell’s target each round.

spells.name: Life Lore
spells.description: Caster can determine the nature and type of any one living target. This will not ascertain the target’s personal traits or capabilities, but the caster will know the normal abilities associated with the target’s species.

spells.name: Citation
spells.description: Caster can recall appropriate quotations (from the caster’s own memory) which will both help make the caster’s 6.2 Closed point and be relevant to the target audience. This adds +15 to Channeling any maneuver involving persuasive speaking or writing and +10 to any maneuver involving artistic speaking or writing, but only applies if the caster has at least one rank in a Lore skill relevant to the audience.

spells.name: Curse Tales
spells.description: Caster can determine nature and origin of any one curse, including the name of the one who bequeathed it.

spells.name: Dark Lore I
spells.description: As Light Lore I, except caster can ascertain the origin point and nature of any one item “of darkness” or “of evil.”

spells.name: Light Lore II
spells.description: As Light Lore I, except that caster can ascertain the origin point and nature of any two “holy items” or caster can determine the nature, origin point, and the exact significance of any one “holy item.”

spells.name: Hate Analysis
spells.description: Caster can determine the nature and origin of active hatred found within any 1 target (inanimate or animate); the degree and other details of such hatred can also be acquired. Any objects or beings “Of Slaying” will show as hating their target type.

spells.name: Gray Lore I
spells.description: As Light Lore I, except caster can ascertain the origin point and nature of any one item that is neither holy nor unholy in nature.

spells.name: Emotion Analysis
spells.description: As Hate Analysis, except caster can determine the nature and origin of any extreme emotion(s) in the target.

spells.name: Decipher Text
spells.description: Caster can read any text (as if possessing eight ranks in the appropriate written language), although this spell does not assist in understanding cultural context, cultural references, implications, etc.

spells.name: Light Lore III
spells.description: As Light Lore I, except that caster can ascertain the origin point and nature of any three “holy items” or caster can determine the age, origin point, name of the creator, and nature of any one “holy item.” Caster also learns item’s specific capabilities.

spells.name: Dark Lore II
spells.description: As Light Lore II, except that it can only be used on items “of darkness” or “of evil.”

spells.name: White Lore
spells.description: Caster can ascertain exact nature, origin, purpose, history, and specific capabilities of any one “holy item”; this allows caster to visualize all who have possessed the item.

spells.name: Dark Lore III
spells.description: As Light Lore III, except that it can be used only on items “of evil” or “of darkness.”

spells.name: Life Lore True
spells.description: As Life Lore, except caster can determine personal traits and capabilities of any one target.

spells.name: Black Lore
spells.description: As White Lore, except it can only be used on an item “of darkness” or “of evil.”

spells.name: Gray Lore III
spells.description: As Light Lore III, except it can only be used on items that are neither holy nor unholy in nature.

spells.name: Life Lore Mastery
spells.description: As Life Lore True, except caster deterROLEMASTER mines the personal traits and capabilities of one target per caster UNIFIED  level. Spell Law

spells.name: White Lore
spells.description: As White Lore, except caster can acquire the information on all “holy items” within 100'. 75 6.2 - Closed Channeling MOUNTED WAYS

spells.name: Select Mount
spells.description: Creates a bond between the caster and an animal, making the animal the caster’s “mount” for the purposes of other spells on this list. It is only possible to have one “mount” at a time. The target of this spell must be a typical mount of the caster’s culture (usually a horse or camel).

spells.name: Call Mount
spells.description: Caster telepathically summons his mount, which will come to him as quickly as possible.

spells.name: Riding I
spells.description: Caster gains a +5 bonus to his Riding skill.

spells.name: Augment Mount
spells.description: The next maneuver by the mount receives a +20 bonus.

spells.name: One Spirit
spells.description: Caster and mount make RRs using the higher of their two levels and the higher of their RR bonuses (e.g., if the mount has the higher level and the caster has the better RR bonus, they get the benefit of both).

spells.name: Riding II
spells.description: As Riding I, except bonus is +10.

spells.name: Armor Mount I
spells.description: Mount gains the benefits of AT 4, but without any encumbrance or armor penalties ROLEMASTER UNIFIED since no armor is actually worn. This provides full suit  coverage (i.e., treat the mount as having limb armor Spell Law and a helm). 76

spells.name: Select Exotic
spells.description: As Select Mount, except that the target may be any rideable animal or other creature that the GM considers a suitable mount (e.g., the GM may wish to allow use of this list with a hippogriff mount).

spells.name: Riding III
spells.description: As Riding I, except bonus is +15.

spells.name: Call Mount True
spells.description: As Call Mount, except for range.

spells.name: Augment Mount
spells.description: As Augment Mount I, except bonus is +40.

spells.name: Riding IV
spells.description: As Riding I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Heal Mount I
spells.description: Restores all lost hits and treats any Light injuries (penalties up to -20) suffered by the mount. Recovery time for injuries takes normal time as described in RMCL Chapter 13.

spells.name: Armor Mount II
spells.description: As Armor Mount I, except AT is

spells.name: One Soul
spells.description: As One Spirit, except it also has the effect that any spells the caster casts during the duration of this spell that are “self” spells also affect the mount.

spells.name: Riding V
spells.description: As Riding I, except bonus is +25.

spells.name: Augment Mount
spells.description: As Augment Mount I, except bonus is +60.

spells.name: Heal Mount II
spells.description: As Heal Mount I, except treats Medium injuries (penalties up to -40) as well. Recovery time is as described in RMCL, but convert days to hours.

spells.name: Armor Mount III
spells.description: As Armor Mount I, except AT is 10.

spells.name: Riding VI
spells.description: As Riding I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: One Soul True
spells.description: As One Soul, except it also has the effect that any Utility spells cast on the caster of this spell also affect the mount.

spells.name: Augment Mount
spells.description: As Augment Mount I, except bonus is +100.

spells.name: Heal Mount True
spells.description: As Heal Mount I, except treats all injury short of death (will heal fatal damage so long as mount is still alive). Recovery time is as described in RMCL, but convert days to minutes.

spells.name: One Body
spells.description: Caster and mount move as one, giving them both a +25 OB to all physical attacks (i.e., not spell) and +10 DB to attacks of which they are aware. This bonus does not apply if one of the duo is no longer fully aware and active (e.g., when one of them is stunned).

spells.name: Tireless Mount
spells.description: During the duration of this spell, the mount needs no rest, sleep, food, or water. Its hunger and thirst do not grow, nor can it experience fatigue (i.e., it automatically makes any Endurance rolls). Hunger, thirst, and tiredness will begin to increase normally after the end of this spell. 6.2 - Closed Channeling MUSCLE LAW

spells.name: Muscle Boost
spells.description: Target receives a +10 bonus to all Jumping and Climbing maneuvers.

spells.name: Light Muscle Relief
spells.description: An injury to muscle or tendons incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, and the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll.

spells.name: Untiring March
spells.description: Target is not fatigued by moving at a walk or jog pace.

spells.name: Medium Muscle
spells.description: As Light Muscle Relief, except injuries incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Limb Preservation
spells.description: Allows caster to prevent deterioration of one limb (even while severed); requires use of the Blood, Bone, and Nerve Limb Preservation spells as well.

spells.name: Strength I
spells.description: Target gains a +5 Strength bonus, granting +5 to most skills involving strength (+10 melee OB).

spells.name: Severe Muscle
spells.description: As Light Muscle Relief, except injuries incurring any penalty.

spells.name: Endurance
spells.description: Target is not fatigued by moving on the ground or in water up to a run pace.

spells.name: Light Muscle
spells.description: An injury to muscle or tendons incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine ma6.2 Closed neuver was performed, the target receives a +50 bonus Channeling on their recovery roll and the recovery period is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Spasm
spells.description: Target drops anything currently held and takes a -20 to any maneuver attempted this round.

spells.name: Mass Muscle Relief
spells.description: As Severe Muscle relief, except it treats every muscle and tendon injury in the target.

spells.name: Joining ‡ *
spells.description: Caster may reattach one severed limb. The Joining spell from the Bone, Blood, and Nerve spell lists must be cast for the limb to be functional. The recovery time is 1-10 days.

spells.name: Lock Joint
spells.description: A random limb is in intense pain and the joint locks, rendering the limb unusable. A moving bipedal target afflicted with a leg lock will fall down; a target with an arm lock will drop anything in that hand.

spells.name: Medium Muscle
spells.description: As Light Muscle Healing, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Regenerate Tendon
spells.description: Target regenerates any one tendon. The recovery time is 1-10 hours.

spells.name: Endurance True
spells.description: Target will not accumulate any additional fatigue penalties for the duration.

spells.name: Severe Muscle
