spells.description: Caster learns the current location of the caster of a given curse, so long as the caster is within range. Location is direction plus distance. The curse must have been previously analyzed with Curse Tales.

spells.name: Neutralize Curse
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -20] As Neutralize Curse I, except curse is nullified for one hour per level.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling Sphere I
spells.description: As Dispel Evil Sphere I, except affects spells from the realm of Channeling.

spells.name: Dispel Essence
spells.description: As Dispel Evil Sphere I, except affects spells from the realm of Essence.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism Sphere I
spells.description: As Dispel Evil Sphere I, except affects spells from the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Find Curser II
spells.description: As Find Curser I, except range is 10 miles per level.

spells.name: Spellproof
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Holy Cancellation Evil, except affects all spells, “incoming” spells make their RR at -20, and duration is 10 minutes per level.

spells.name: Dispel Evil Sphere
spells.description: As Dispel Evil Sphere I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Uncurse
spells.description: Dispels a curse if the curse fails an RR. The curse’s level is the level of the caster of the curse. If the curse is not dispelled, the caster cannot try again until he has gone up another level of experience.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling Sphere V
spells.description: As Dispel Channeling Sphere I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Uncurse True
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -50] As Uncurse, except curse makes its RR with a -50 penalty.

spells.name: Dispel Essence
spells.description: As Dispel Essence Sphere I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism Sphere V
spells.description: As Dispel Mentalism Sphere I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Magic Bane
spells.description: As Dispel Evil Sphere V, except affects all spells and duration is one minute per level. Any given spell need only resist this spell once, but any spell coming into the area of effect while this spell is active must make its RR or be dispelled. Sphere moves with the caster. 6.5 - Paladin Base HOLY ARMS

spells.name: Holy Attack I *
spells.description: Adds +5 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Righteous Blow I
spells.description: After casting this spell, the caster’s next melee or missile attack will, if made against a foe who receives a critical reduction due to size or other factors, have the critical reduction reduced by one. For example, a Medium combatant attacking a Large foe would normally have a C critical done against that foe reduced to an A critical. If that Medium combatant benefited from this spell, that critical would only be reduced to a B.

spells.name: Holy Strength I
spells.description: Caster gains a +5 to his Strength stat bonus.

spells.name: Holy Attack II *
spells.description: Adds +10 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Righteous Blow II
spells.description: As Righteous Blow I, except two steps of critical reduction are negated.

spells.name: Blessed Weapon
spells.description: Weapon becomes indestructable for spell duration. This includes not only normal breakage, but also magical effects that would break or otherwise damage the weapon. It is still possible to disarm the wielder of the weapon. Once the weapon has spent three consecutive rounds outside the caster’s possession, it can be broken normally.

spells.name: Holy Attack III *
spells.description: Adds +15 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Righteous Blow
spells.description: As Righteous Blow I, except three steps of critical reduction are negated.

spells.name: Holy Aura I
spells.description: A bright, shimmering aura surrounds the caster. All creatures “of darkness” who are in the area of effect must make an RR each round or receive an A severity Holy critical.

spells.name: Holy Attack IV *
spells.description: Adds +20 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Righteous Blow
spells.description: As Righteous Blow I, except four steps of critical reduction are negated.

spells.name: Holy Strength II
spells.description: Caster gains a +10 to his Strength stat bonus.

spells.name: Holy Attack V *
spells.description: Adds +25 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Faithful Arms
spells.description: Caster will not fumble. Caster cannot be disarmed nor his weapon(s) broken while the spell lasts.

spells.name: Holy Aura II
spells.description: A bright, shimmering aura surrounds the caster. All creatures “of darkness” who are in the area of effect must 6.5 Paladin make an RR each round or receive a B severity Holy critical. Base

spells.name: Holy Attack VI *
spells.description: Adds +30 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Holy Strength III
spells.description: Caster gains a +15 to his Strength stat bonus.

spells.name: Holy Throw *
spells.description: Caster immediately hurls a (melee) weapon, which attacks using his normal throwing OB with the weapon or his melee OB with the weapon, whichever is higher. This spell allows this attack to use the ranges for a short bow.

spells.name: Holy Attack VII *
spells.description: Adds +35 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Holy Aura III
spells.description: A bright, shimmering aura surrounds the caster. All creatures “of darkness” who are in the area of effect must make an RR each round or receive a C severity Holy critical.

spells.name: Holy Attack VIII
spells.description: Adds +40 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Holy Aura IV
spells.description: A bright, shimmering aura surrounds the caster. All creatures “of darkness” who are in the area of effect must make an RR each round or receive a D severity Holy critical.

spells.name: Holy Attack X *
spells.description: Adds +50 to the caster’s melee or missile OB for the current round.

spells.name: Holy Aura True
spells.description: A bright, shimmering aura surrounds the caster. All creatures “of darkness” who are in the area of effect must make an RR each round or receive an E severity Holy critical.

spells.name: Martyrdom
spells.description: Caster exposes all within the area of effect to the raw power of his deity. This has an effect equal to a Fire Ball attack with an OB equal to twice the caster’s level (i.e., a 50th level caster results in a +100 OB), with concussion damage doubled, Fire criticals replaced with Holy criticals, and all criticals being treated as Slaying III. The caster acts as the center-point for the blast and is not immune to any of the damage. For the caster, no objects, spells, etc. will protect him from the blast. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 93 6.5 - Paladin Base HOLY HEALING

spells.name: Flowstop I *
spells.description: Reduces target’s blood loss by up to 1 hit per round. Until the injury is actually treated by some means (e.g., Medicine maneuver or appropriate Relief spell), the target cannot move or be moved without the bleeding resuming. Multiple Flowstop spells may not be cast upon the same wound.

spells.name: Heal I
spells.description: Target is healed 5 concussion hits.

spells.name: Fatigue Relief
spells.description: Removes up to -30 in penalties from fatigue.

spells.name: Light Wound Relief
spells.description: An injury of any type other than nerve or brain injury incurring a penalty up to -20 is cleaned, protected, and bound as effectively as if a successful Medicine maneuver was performed, and the target receives a +50 bonus on their recovery roll. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Heal IV
spells.description: Target is healed 20 concussion hits. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Stun Relief I *
spells.description: Target is relieved of 1 round worth of Spell Law accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Flowstop V *
spells.description: As Flowstop I, except up to 5 hits per round.

spells.name: Cut Repair I *
spells.description: Instantly stops bleeding from one wound that bleeds at a rate of 1 hit/round. 94

spells.name: Medium Wound
spells.description: As Light Wound Relief, except an injury incurring a penalty up to -40.

spells.name: Awakening *
spells.description: Target is instantly awake.

spells.name: Heal X
spells.description: Target is healed 50 concussion hits.

spells.name: Severe Wound
spells.description: As Light Wound Relief, except an injury incurring a penalty of any amount.

spells.name: Cut Repair III *
spells.description: Instantly stops bleeding from one wound that bleeds at a rate of up to 3 hits/round.

spells.name: Stun Relief III *
spells.description: Target is relieved of 3 rounds worth of accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Paralysis Cures
spells.description: Caster can cure any paralysis problem. The recovery time is 1-10 days. Treat as -100 injury for progress of recovery.

spells.name: Heal XX
spells.description: Target is healed 100 concussion hits.

spells.name: Sense Restoration
spells.description: Target regains function in one sensory organ, so long as that sensory organ has not been completely destroyed (in which case Organ Regeneration is required). The recovery time is 1-10 hours.

spells.name: Coma Recovery
spells.description: Target comes out of a coma or unconsciousness caused by injury, disease, poison, spell, or spell failure. Process takes 1-10 hours and target is at -50 to Endurance rolls for 1-10 days.

spells.name: Clotting True *
spells.description: Stops bleeding on a wound that is bleeding at any rate. For one hour, the target can engage in no activity more vigorous than walking or bleeding will resume at the prior rate.

spells.name: Stun Relief True
spells.description: Target is relieved of all accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: True Heal
spells.description: Target is healed of all concussion hit damage.

spells.name: Light Wound
spells.description: As Light Wound Relief, except the recovery time is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Medium Wound
spells.description: As Medium Wound Relief, except the recovery time is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Severe Wound
spells.description: As Severe Wound Relief, except the recovery time is reduced to hours rather than days.

spells.name: Laying on Hands
spells.description: Caster can use one of the lower level spells on this list of 25th level or below once per round. 6.5 - Paladin Base HOLY SHIELDS

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: Everyone in the area of effect who is aligned with the caster (see above) subtracts 5 from all elemental attacks against them. They may also add 5 to all RRs versus spells. These bonuses are not conferred to the caster.

spells.name: Aura
spells.description: Causes a bright aura about the caster, providing a more powerful appearance and subtracting 10 from all attacks on the caster.

spells.name: Shield of Faith *
spells.description: Creates a golden full shield emblazoned with the holy symbol of the caster’s faith. If the caster has a free arm, it functions in all ways as a physical shield, but it does not count for encumbrance, and lasts for 1 minute per level. If the caster does not have a free arm, it moves of its own accord to defend the caster, providing +25 DB against up to 3 frontal attacks per round, but cannot benefit from Shield skill and cannot be combined with any other shield, and the duration is only 1 round per level. In either case, it is unbreakable.

spells.name: Guardianship *
spells.description: Caster may employ the Protecting Others rules (see RMCL Section 9.7) to defend two other individuals at the same time with only the normal penalty for protecting one individual. 6.5 Paladin

spells.name: Unpain I *
spells.description: Caster is able to sustain an additional 25% of his Base total concussion hits (round off fractional hits) before passing out. Hits are still taken and remain when the spell lapses.

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: As Protection Prayer I, except bonuses are 10.

spells.name: Deflections I *
spells.description: Caster can deflect any one missile that the caster can see and which passes within the 100' range of this spell; this causes 50 to be subtracted from the missile’s attack.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.description: As Aura, except it produces an extremely powerful appearance and subtracts 15 from all attacks.

spells.name: Bladeturn I *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except its effect is against 1 melee attack.

spells.name: Unpain II *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except an additional 50% of hits can be sustained.

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: As Protection Prayer I, except bonuses are 15.

spells.name: Deflections II *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except 2 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Aim Untrue I *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except missile automatically misses.

spells.name: Bladeturn II *
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except 2 melee attacks may be affected.

spells.name: Unpain III *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except an additional 75% of hits can be sustained.

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: As Protection Prayer I, except bonuses are 20.

spells.name: Deflections III *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except 3 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Aim Untrue II *
spells.description: As Aim Untrue I, except 2 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Bladeturn III *
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except 3 melee attacks may be affected.

spells.name: Unpain IV *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except an additional 100% of hits can be sustained.

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: As Protection Prayer I, except bonuses are 25.

spells.name: Mass Deflections
spells.description: As Deflections I, except as many missiles as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Bladeturn *
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except as many melee attacks as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Armor of Faith*
spells.description: Creates a golden suit of plate armor around the caster. This armor does not interfere with spell-casting, but otherwise acts as a normal suit of armor with Armor Type 10 including arm and leg armor and helmet. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Protection Prayer
spells.description: As Protection Prayer V, except UNIFIED radius of effect is 100' and duration is 10 minutes per level.  Spell Law 95 6.5 - Paladin Base HOLY WAR

spells.name: Detect Undead
spells.description: Detects the presence of Undead in the area of effect. Caster can concentrate on a different area each round. (See Section 10.4 for more about detection spells.)

spells.name: Reveal Enemies
spells.description: Detects the total number of “enemies” (giving approximate direction and distance). This spell also reveals the most heavily represented type of enemy (by total levels). Caster can concentrate on a different 50'R each round.

spells.name: Smite Undead I
spells.description: Caster’s next melee attack (within one minute of casting this spell) which scores a critical on an undead will do an additional A Holy critical.

spells.name: Smite Demon I
spells.description: Caster’s next melee attack (within one minute of casting this spell) which scores a critical on a demon will do an additional A Holy critical.

spells.name: Resist Undead
spells.description: The caster gains a +10 bonus to his RRs against Life Drain by the undead.

spells.name: Enemy Speech
spells.description: For the duration of this spell, the caster ROLEMASTER can read and speak one “enemy” language with skill rank 8. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Smite Undead
spells.description: As Smite Undead I, except the adSpell Law ditional Holy critical is severity B.

spells.name: Smite Demon II
spells.description: As Smite Demon I, except the additional Holy critical is severity B. 96

spells.name: Smite Enemy I
spells.description: Caster’s next melee attack (within one minute of casting this spell) which scores a critical on an ‘enemy’ will do an additional A Holy critical.

spells.name: Resist Undead
spells.description: As Resist Undead I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: Smite Undead
spells.description: As Smite Undead I, except the additional Holy critical is severity C.

spells.name: Smite Demon
spells.description: As Smite Demon I, except the additional Holy critical is severity C.

spells.name: Resist Undead
spells.description: As Resist Undead I, except protects everyone within 20' of the caster.

spells.name: Smite Enemy II
spells.description: As Smite Enemy I, except the additional Holy critical is severity B.

spells.name: Undead Detection
spells.description: Detects the presence of Undead in the area of affect. Caster can examine a different 50'R each round. The caster gains a general notion of the most prominent undead type in the radius (by total levels). “General” means that the caster could learn that the undead were mainly skeletons, but not which type(s) of skeletons.

spells.name: Smite Undead
spells.description: As Smite Undead I, except the additional Holy critical is severity D.

spells.name: Smite Demon
spells.description: As Smite Demon I, except the additional Holy critical is severity D.

spells.name: Undead Smiting
spells.description: As Smite Undead I, except effect applies to every melee attack while duration lasts.

spells.name: Smite Enemy III
spells.description: As Smite Enemy I, except the additional Holy critical is severity C.

spells.name: Reveal Enemies
spells.description: As Reveal Enemies, except for range and area of effect.

spells.name: Smite Abomination
spells.description: Caster’s next melee attack (within one minute of casting this spell) which scores a critical on an undead or a demon will do an additional E Holy critical.

spells.name: Demon Smiting
spells.description: As Smite Demon II, except effect applies to every melee attack while duration lasts.

spells.name: Smite Enemy
spells.description: Caster’s next melee attack (within one minute of casting this spell) which scores a critical on an ‘enemy’ will do an additional E Holy critical.

spells.name: Undead Smiting
spells.description: As Smite Undead III, except effect applies to every melee attack while duration lasts.

spells.name: Abomination
spells.description: As Smite Abomination, except effect applies to every melee attack while duration lasts. 6.5 - Paladin Base INSPIRING WAYS

spells.name: Courage
spells.description: For the duration of this spell, all within the area of effect (including the caster) may make a second RR versus any fear or panic effect. This second RR is made with an additional +10 modifier.

spells.name: Inspirations I *
spells.description: Caster inspires all allies who are within the area of effect (they must be aware of the caster). All allies gain +5 to melee attacks and Endurance rolls for the duration of the spell. This spell will only work during combat or highly religious moments (e.g., an oratory presentation prior to a large battle). These bonuses do not apply to the caster.

spells.name: Voice of Friendship
spells.description: For as long as they speak together, the target of this spell will believe that the caster is a good friend and is acting in the target’s best interests.

spells.name: Inspirations II *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +10.

spells.name: Voice of Reason *
spells.description: For as long as the caster speaks, the target will believe that the reasoning and ideas that the caster expresses are correct and valid.

spells.name: Inspirations III *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +15.

spells.name: Voice of Caution
spells.description: For as long as the caster speaks, the target will become more cautious (less rash) and will tend to obey the caster’s warnings without hesitation or doubt. 6.5 Paladin

spells.name: Command I *
spells.description: Target must obey the caster. However, Base he will not perform any act that is completely alien to him or is self-destructive.

spells.name: Inspirations IV *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +20.

spells.name: Words of Friendship
spells.description: As Voice of Friendship, except spell will affect all who can hear the caster.

spells.name: Leadership
spells.description: The caster gains a +25 bonus to his Leadership skill and +5 to any Influence maneuvers.

spells.name: Inspirations V *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +25.

spells.name: Command II *
spells.description: As Command I, except spell affects two targets.

spells.name: Words of Reason
spells.description: As Voice of Reason, except spell will affect all who can hear the caster.

spells.name: Inspirations VI *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +30.

spells.name: Courage True
spells.description: As Courage, except the second RR automatically succeeds.

spells.name: Inspirations VII *
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +35.

spells.name: Words of Caution
spells.description: As Voice of Caution, except spell will affect all who can hear the caster.

spells.name: Inspirations VIII
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +40.

spells.name: Voice of Conviction
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -50] After casting this spell, the caster must tell the truth (as he knows it). The target will believe that the caster is speaking the absolute truth.

spells.name: Inspirations True
spells.description: As Inspirations I, except bonuses are +50.

spells.name: Words of Conviction
spells.description: As Voice of Conviction, except spell will affect all who can hear the caster.

spells.name: Leadership True
spells.description: The caster gains a +50 bonus to his Leadership skill and +15 to any Influence maneuvers.

spells.name: Mass Inspirations
spells.description: As Inspirations True, except radius of effect is 100'.

spells.name: Inspirations Mastery
spells.description: Caster can use any lower level spell from this list once per round. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 97 6.6 - Ranger Base BEASTLY WAYS

spells.name: Cat Eyes
spells.description: Caster’s vision in low light is as a cat. In near darkness (e.g., a dark night - but not in situations with no light), caster sees with normal clarity and over normal distance, but cannot see color.

spells.name: Grasshopper’s
spells.description: Caster gains a +40 bonus to any maneuvers primarily involving jumping.

spells.name: Wolf Senses
spells.description: Caster gains an increased sense of smell and hearing (subtle smells and higher sonic ranges included). Adds +50 to Perception maneuvers using only these senses or +20 to Perception maneuvers using these senses combined with others.

spells.name: Rabbit Reflexes
spells.description: Caster gains a +5 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Bat Sense
spells.description: Caster gains improved ability to maneuver without his sight. When blinded or otherwise without sight, this spell adds +50 to maneuver rolls in the dark. Note that this spell does not negate penalties for blindness; it simply decreases them.

spells.name: Otterlungs
spells.description: Caster can safely hold his breath for the duration of this spell.

spells.name: Glide I
spells.description: Caster can “glide” through the air. The product of caster’s altitude and horizontal speed cannot exceed 100 (with altitude in feet and speed in feet per round). For example, a caster can glide along at a rate of 5' per round if he were 20' off the ground, or he could glide at the rate of 50' per round if he were 2' off the ground. Note that the product must equal 100 (i.e., the caster cannot choose ROLEMASTER UNIFIED to have a result less than or more than 100). Elevation may be in-  creased up to 5' or decreased up to 10' each round, with the highest Spell Law elevation being used to calculate the horizontal speed. There is a minimum elevation of 2'.

spells.name: Hawk Sense
spells.description: Caster gains the visual acuity of a hawk. Adds +50 to all Perceptions involving only sight; +20 to all Perceptions involving this sense combined with others. 98

spells.name: Tiger Skin
spells.description: Caster’s skin has the resilience of a large cat (effective AT of 3).

spells.name: Boar Strength
spells.description: Caster gains the ferocity of a wild boar. He gains +20 to his melee OB and does double concussion hit damage in melee, but cannot parry or use missiles for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Lion Claws
spells.description: Caster gains the ability to make claw attacks as a lion. He may attack using the Claw Attack Table (size of attack is caster’s own size). The caster must develop skill with these claws as an Unarmed combat skill, but does gain a special bonus equal to his ranks in this list.

spells.name: Bear Skin
spells.description: Caster’s skin has the resilience of a bear (effective AT of 4).

spells.name: Cobra Reflexes
spells.description: Caster gains an extra 1 AP each round and a +10 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Bear Arms
spells.description: Caster gains the ability to make a grappling attack with the strength of a bear. When the caster makes a Grappling/Wrestling attack, it does double normal concussion hit damage and any attempt to break free from a hold the caster has established is done with a -30 penalty. His Grapple attack also gains a special bonus to OB equal to the caster’s ranks in this list.

spells.name: Rhino Hide
spells.description: Caster’s skin has the resilience of a rhinoceros (effective AT of 6).

spells.name: Glide III
spells.description: As Glide I, except product is 300.

spells.name: Shark Bite
spells.description: Caster gains the ability to make bite attacks like a shark. He may attack using the Bite Attack Table (size of attack is caster’s own size). The caster must develop skill with this bite as an Unarmed combat skill, but does gain a special bonus equal to his ranks in this list.

spells.name: Wyvern Skin
spells.description: Caster’s skin takes on the resilience of a minor drake (providing the protection of Armor Type 8).

spells.name: Mongoose Reflexes
spells.description: Caster gains an extra 2 AP each round and a +15 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Ox Strength
spells.description: Caster gains the strength of an ox. He gains +40 to his melee OB and does triple concussion hit damage in melee, but cannot parry or use missiles for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Glide True
spells.description: As Glide I, except product is 500.

spells.name: Hummingbird
spells.description: Caster gains an extra 3 AP each round and a +20 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Wasp’s Sting
spells.description: For the duration of this spell, all of the caster’s physical attacks (whether ranged or melee) deliver a poison upon achieving a critical. An RR is made against poison based on the caster’s level and the effects are felt in 1-5 rounds. The poison may be of any type of the caster’s choosing (the same poison for the duration of any given casting of this spell). While fast-acting, the poison is not powerful and can achieve no more than Moderate effect.

spells.name: Spider’s Ambush
spells.description: Caster gains a +40 bonus to all Ambush rolls and gains an extra five effective ranks in Ambush in order to determine how much he can modify the roll for any critical done.

spells.name: Dragon Skin
spells.description: Caster’s skin takes on the resilience of a lesser drake (providing the protection of Armor Type 10). 6.6 - Ranger Base INNER WALLS

spells.name: Heat Resistance *
spells.description: Target is protected from natural heat up to 80°C (treat as if target were in 20°C temperature). For temperatures above 80°C, subtract 60°C to determine the effective temperature for the target. Target also receives +20 to all RRs vs. heat spells/attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental fire/heat attacks. The duration of this spell is 10 minutes per level if cast on a non-mobile target. If cast on a mobile target, the spell will last as long as the caster concentrates. If cast on a non-mobile target that is moved, the spell is dispelled. If the caster is the target, duration is one minute/level and concentration is not required.

spells.name: Cold Resistance *
spells.description: Target is protected from natural cold down to -10°C (treat as if target were in 20°C temperature). For temperatures below 20°C, add 30°C to determine the effective temperature for the target. Target also receives +20 to all RRs vs. cold spells/attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental cold/ice attacks. Duration is as for Heat Resistance.

spells.name: Light Resistance *
spells.description: Target is protected from natural light and light changes (instantly adjusting vision to changing light intensity to never be blinded by glare, sudden light, or sudden darkness. Target also receives +20 to all RRs vs. light or electricity spells/attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental light/ electricity attacks. Duration is as for Heat Resistance.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds I *
spells.description: Caster can ignore a penalty due to injury of up to -10 or subtract that amount from a more severe penalty (e.g., if the caster was suffering wounds causing a -45 penalty, he would only experience a -35 penalty). Movement while this spell is active will not aggravate the injury.

spells.name: Resistance Wall I
spells.description: Caster gains a +10 bonus to all RRs.

spells.name: Sterilization
spells.description: Caster can sterilize 1 cubic foot per level of any solid or liquid. This will not affect inert poisons or harm creatures larger than 1/4" in length.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds III
spells.description: As Ignore Wounds I, except caster ignores up to -30 in penalties.

spells.name: Martial Wall I
spells.description: Caster gains a +10 bonus to his DB.

spells.name: Resistance Wall II
spells.description: As Resistance Wall I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds V *
spells.description: As Ignore Wounds I, except caster 6.6 Ranger ignores up to -50 in penalties. Base

spells.name: Protection from
spells.description: Caster is protected from any natural cold, heat, light, or electricity (treat as if target were in 20°C temperature). Caster also receives a +40 to all RRs vs. heat, fire, cold, ice, light, and electricity; +40 DB vs. elemental cold/ice, fire/heat, and electricity attacks.

spells.name: Stun Resistance
spells.description: If the caster receives any form of Stun result, the caster may make a Hard Body Development maneuver (which does not require any AP). If this maneuver is successful, the caster does not suffer the Stun result.

spells.name: Martial Wall II
spells.description: As Martial Wall I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds VIII
spells.description: As Ignore Wounds I, except caster ignores up to -80 in penalties.

spells.name: Resistance Wall III
spells.description: As Resistance Wall I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: Expel Contamination
spells.description: Allows caster to attempt to throw off the effects of any poison or disease by making an RR with a special +25 modification. This spell may only be cast once per incident of poisoning or disease until the caster gains another level.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds X *
spells.description: As Ignore Wounds I, except caster ignores up to -100 in penalties.

spells.name: Martial Wall III
spells.description: As Martial Wall I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: Resistance Wall IV
spells.description: As Resistance Wall I, except bonus is +40.

spells.name: Purge Disease
spells.description: Allows target to attempt to throw off any 1 disease by making an RR with a special +50 modification. This spell may only be cast once per target per disease until the caster gains another level.

spells.name: Purge Curse
spells.description: An RR is made for the curse (using the curse’s level as the defending level). If the RR fails, the curse is removed. This spell may only be cast once per target per curse until the caster gains another level.

spells.name: Purge Poison
spells.description: Allows target to attempt to throw off the effects of any poison by making an RR with a special +50 modification. This spell may only be cast once per target per poison until the caster gains another level.

spells.name: Elemental Resistance
spells.description: As Heat Resistance, Cold Resistance, and Light Resistance, plus caster is immune to natural heat, cold, and light/electricity, and is treated as one Size larger when taking damage from spells using these elements.

spells.name: Ignore Wounds True
spells.description: As Ignore Wounds I, except caster ignores all penalties from wounds and duration is 10 ROLEMASTER minutes per level. UNIFIED

spells.name: Inner Wall
spells.description: Caster gets +25 to his DB, RRs, and ma-  neuver rolls. Spell Law 99 6.6 - Ranger Base MOVING WAYS

spells.name: Rockrunning *
spells.description: Caster can walk or run on any nearly horizontal rocky or earthen surfaces as if on level ground. Running using this spell is no more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Limbwalking *
spells.description: Caster can walk along tree limbs as if on level ground.

spells.name: Swimming
spells.description: Target may swim at a “walking” pace without any chance of fatigue, using the normal swimming rules (RMCL Sections 5.3 & 3.17). This will allow someone without Swimming skill to tread water in place and avoid drowning without the need for a maneuver.

spells.name: Waterwalking *
spells.description: Caster can walk on water as if on level dry ground. Water need not be perfectly still, but must be fairly calm.

spells.name: Sandrunning *
spells.description: Caster can walk or run on any sandy surfaces as if on level solid ground. Running using this spell is no more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Merging Organic
spells.description: Caster can merge into any organic material (alive or dead). While merged caster cannot move, perceive, or cast spells. When the caster emerges from the material, it is possible to emerge from any side or face of the material, although this is limited to moving “through” no more than the caster’s own body size plus two feet worth of material. The caster can exit at any time up to the end of spell duration (at which time the caster automatically ROLEMASTER UNIFIED emerges at the entrance point).  – Caster can walk without leaving 7. Traceless Passing * Spell Law tracks or other visible signs of his passing.

spells.name: Traceless Passing *
spells.description: Caster can walk without leaving tracks or other visible signs of his passing.

spells.name: Limbrunning *
spells.description: As Limbwalking, except caster can move at a running pace (three times walking speed), without it being any more fatiguing than walking. 100

spells.name: Waterrunning *
spells.description: As Waterwalking, except caster can move at a running pace (three times walking speed), without it being any more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Hide Tracks II
spells.description: As Traceless Passing, except caster can hide the tracks of any 2 beings (not necessarily including the caster).

spells.name: Swimming True
spells.description: As Swimming, except caster may swim at up to a “Dash” pace with no chance of fatigue.

spells.name: Great Merging
spells.description: As Merging Organic, except caster can turn within the material and can perceive the outside world if within 6" of the surface.

spells.name: Hide Tracks V
spells.description: As Hide Tracks I, except it hides 5 beings’ tracks.

spells.name: Running True *
spells.description: As the Running spells above, except any one of the spell effects can be used as needed (e.g., the caster could run on sand, then on water, then on limbs, etc.).

spells.name: Traceless Passing
spells.description: As Traceless Passing, except the duration is 10 minutes per level.

spells.name: Hide Tracks X
spells.description: As Hide Tracks I, except it hides 10 beings’ tracks.

spells.name: Traceless Running
spells.description: As Traceless Passing, except caster can move at three times normal pace (i.e., at a Run pace) with no more fatigue than walking.

spells.name: Merging Organic
spells.description: As Great Merging Organic, except caster may use self-targeted spells while merged.

spells.name: Traceless Running True *
spells.description: As Traceless Passing True, except caster can move at three times normal pace (i.e., at a Run pace) with no more fatigue than walking.

spells.name: Hide Tracks XX
spells.description: As Hide Tracks I, except it hides 20 beings’ tracks.

spells.name: Sprinting True *
spells.description: As Running True, except caster can move at Sprint speed (four times walking pace) with it being no more fatiguing than walking.

spells.name: Mass Running *
spells.description: As Running True, except caster can affect one target per level (one target must be the caster).

spells.name: Distance Running
spells.description: As Running True, except caster can run with no chance of fatigue.

spells.name: Hide Tracks True
spells.description: As Hide Tracks I, except caster can either absolutely hide his own tracks (preventing discovery via any spell, etc.) or he can hide the tracks of a number of beings equal to his level as long as they remain within 100'.

spells.name: Dolphin Speed
spells.description: Caster can swim a mile per minute without fatigue and has a +100 bonus to any Swimming maneuvers. 6.6 - Ranger Base NATURE’S GUISES

spells.name: Hues
spells.description: Allows caster to take on the physical coloration of any 1 organic object. The caster must be in contact with the object when the spell is cast. In many situations, this will give a +10 to +50 bonus (GM’s discretion) to Stalking attempts.

spells.name: Shade
spells.description: All shadows and darkness within the area of effect deepen, giving all Perception maneuvers involving seeing anything hidden/hiding in the area a penalty of -20. Area is not mobile.

spells.name: Mask Scent
spells.description: Caster’s odor becomes greatly reduced, providing a -50 penalty for the caster to be detected or tracked using the sense of smell.

spells.name: Silent Moves
spells.description: Caster can move silently, so long as he does not create a sound originating more than 1' from his body. This typically provides a +10 to +50 bonus (GM’s discretion) to Stalking maneuvers.

spells.name: Blending
spells.description: Caster blends into surrounding terrain, providing a +75 bonus to Stalking attempts. Caster may not move (appreciably) without destroying this effect. This bonus is not cumulative with Hues or Shadow.

spells.name: Shadow
spells.description: Caster and objects on his person appear to be a shadow and are almost invisible in dark areas (e.g., in many situations this could be handled with a Stalking bonus between +25 and +75).

spells.name: Study Form
spells.description: Caster studies and memorizes the form of one type of animal or plant for use with spells later on this list. The caster can only have as many forms of each kingdom studied as he has ranks in this list. Thus, a Ranger with 8 ranks in Nature’s Guises may have studied 8 types of animal and 8 types of plant. Caster may choose to forget a studied form at any time to make room for replacements.

spells.name: Plant Façade
spells.description: Allows caster to appear as any one type of plant that he has studied. This is purely a visual illusion: caster will still sound, smell, and feel the same, and the caster undergoes no physical change.

spells.name: Animal Thoughts
spells.description: For the duration of this spell, the caster’s mental patterns will appear to be those of any animal he has studied. 6.6 Ranger The caster cannot move while this spell is active. Base

spells.name: Study Form True
spells.description: As Study Form, except a particular animal or plant form may be studied. For example, the woodsman’s dog (as opposed to just a dog) may be studied. The caster may only have as many of these particular forms studied as he has ranks in this list. These are in addition to the general forms learned by Study Form.

spells.name: Animal Façade
spells.description: Allows caster to appear as any one type of animal that he has studied. This is purely a visual illusion: caster will still sound, smell, and feel the same, and the caster undergoes no physical change.

spells.name: Terrible Form *
spells.description: Caster momentarily takes on a fearsome appearance that requires all within a 20' radius to resist versus Fear (attack level is that of the caster) or flee for 1 round per 5 fail. Targets must be able to see the caster in order to be affected.

spells.name: Animal Thoughts
spells.description: As Animal Thoughts I, except caster can move (though he must still maintain concentration).

spells.name: Friendly Form
spells.description: Caster appears to be friendly and pleasant so long as he does not make any overtly hostile action. This adds +20 to his social interactions with all living things.

spells.name: Plant Form I
spells.description: Allows caster to take the form of any one plant he has studied. The caster will look and feel like the plant. The caster’s size can change by up to one size increment. Caster does not gain the physical abilities of the plant other than Size category.

spells.name: Mass Blending
spells.description: As Blending, except affects 1 target/level.

spells.name: Animal Form I
spells.description: Allows caster to take the form of any one animal he has studied. The caster will look and feel like the animal. The caster’s size can be varied up to one size increment. Caster does not gain the physical abilities of the animal, other than Size category.

spells.name: Nightmare Form
spells.description: As Terrible Form, except dreadful appearance lasts for 1 round per level, during which any person in the radius of effect must make an RR against Fear each round (with a +10 bonus for each RR after the first) or flee for 1 round per 5 fail. Targets must be able to see the caster in order to be affected. Those who flee in terror will afterwards not be able to recollect clearly what the caster looked like.

spells.name: Plant Form II
spells.description: As Plant Form I, except caster may also assume the scent and physical abilities of the plant.

spells.name: Animal Form II
spells.description: As Animal Form I, except caster may also assume the movement abilities of the animal.

spells.name: Animal Form III
spells.description: As Animal Form II, except caster also gains the physical attacks of the animal. Caster can vary his size up to two Size increments. Caster gains normal OB of the animal with its natural attacks, gaining the instincts to use them properly.

spells.name: Plant Form True
spells.description: As Plant Form II, except caster can change his form to any other plant he has studied at any time during the duration of the spell and he can vary his size by up to 2 size increments.

spells.name: Animal Thoughts
spells.description: As Animal Thoughts II, except caster ROLEMASTER does not need to concentrate, and duration is 1 minute per level. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Animal Form True
spells.description: As Animal Form III, except caster can change his form to any other animal he has studied at any time Spell Law during the duration of the spell and caster has all physical abilities of the animal.

spells.name: Nature’s Form
spells.description: As Plant Form True and Animal Form True operating at the same time. 101 6.6 - Ranger Base PATHMASTERY

spells.name: Pathlore
spells.description: Caster learns the origin and nearest “destination” of any path within the area of effect.

spells.name: Orient Self *
spells.description: Caster knows which way is north, which way is up, and his distance above or below the ground’s surface.

spells.name: Tracking II
spells.description: Caster gets a +50 bonus to all Tracking maneuvers.

spells.name: Path Tale
spells.description: Caster acquires a visual image of any user(s) of a given path, up to 1 hour in the past per level of the caster.

spells.name: Far Pathfinding
spells.description: Caster learns the location(s) of any path(s) within 1 mile. This spell reveals the nearest point of each path, but not the path’s course.

spells.name: Tracks Lore
spells.description: Caster learns the origin of one set of tracks, and acquires a visual image of the one who left them. Caster will gain a +25 bonus when tracking this particular being or animal.

spells.name: Sense Ambush I
spells.description: Caster is aware of any being within the area of effect that has hostile intentions towards him (i.e., he knows their number and locations). The hostility must be directed specifically at the caster (or the group he is in) or the spell reveals nothing. The being’s hostility must be active (i.e., driving the being to perform aggressive actions), not passive (i.e., hate exists, but no action is planned).

spells.name: Passing Lore
spells.description: Caster acquires visual and aural (sound) images ROLEMASTER of any being or animal that has passed within a 50'R of a specific UNIFIED object. The being or animal can have passed up to 1 hour per level  earlier. If more than one being or animal has passed, the caster will Spell Law see them one image at a time, one image per round (starting with the oldest image).

spells.name: Far Pathfinding
spells.description: As Far Pathfinding I, except range is 5 miles. 102

spells.name: Nature’s Tongues
spells.description: Allows caster to understand and “speak” the language of any one animal or plant species.

spells.name: Tracks Analysis
spells.description: Caster acquires a visual image of all beings or animals who left tracks in the area. This provides a +50 bonus when later tracking any of these beings or animals. If more than one being or animal has left tracks, the caster will see them one image at a time, one image per round (starting with the oldest image).

spells.name: Stonespeech
spells.description: Caster can communicate with any one stone if it possesses any mental qualities (e.g., caster could speak to a holy stone which possesses some sort of intelligence).

spells.name: Far Pathfinding
spells.description: As Far Pathfinding I, except range is 20 miles.

spells.name: Sense Ambush
spells.description: As Sense Ambush I, except area of effect is 100'R.

spells.name: Monster Tongues
spells.description: Allows caster to understand and “speak” the language of any one species of “natural” monster. This excludes the undead, artificial creations (e.g., constructs), and entities from another plane (e.g., demons).

spells.name: Tracking III
spells.description: Caster gets a +75 bonus to all Tracking maneuvers.

spells.name: Sense Ambush
spells.description: As Sense Ambush I, except area of effect is 150'R.

spells.name: Underwater
spells.description: Caster can track individuals through an underwater environment without penalty.

spells.name: Paths True
spells.description: As Far Pathfinding I, except range is 1 mile per level and exact routes within the range are ascertained.

spells.name: Sense Ambush
spells.description: As Sense Ambush I, except area of effect is 10'R/lvl.

spells.name: Know Path
spells.description: Allows caster to ascertain the proper path to what he seeks (includes the course along that path). For example, he could know the quickest way to the city or the safest way to the city, depending on his goals.

spells.name: Tracking True
spells.description: Negates any Hide Tracks spell (except for Hide Tracks True) and provides a +100 Tracking bonus.

spells.name: Aerial Tracking
spells.description: Caster can track individuals through the air (i.e., track a flying being, object) without penalty.

spells.name: Life Path Lore
spells.description: Caster learns of one being: where it originated (was born/created), where it began its current journey, and where it is currently bound, both its next destination and ultimate destination, if these are not the same. This will detect the largest, most important journey that the target is on. For example, if cast on two individuals going out to fetch water from the local well, that is what the spell would reveal if cast on the innkeeper’s daughter who is not planning on going anywhere in particular other than back to the inn with the water, but if the other person was a pilgrim traveling to a holy city, just getting some water at a stopover point, then that pilgrimage would be the journey revealed.

spells.name: Tracks Ahead
spells.description: Allows caster to know entire course of the tracks in the area of effect (i.e., exactly where and how they go). This will not negate Hide Tracks True. 6.6 - Ranger Base SURVIVAL’S WAY

spells.name: Survival I
spells.description: Caster receives a +25 bonus to all Survival maneuvers.

spells.name: Fire Starting
spells.description: Allows caster to set a fire of 1'R; fire will then last as long as there is fuel. A target in the 1'R will take an A Heat critical. Caster may only target a specific location, not an individual, with this spell.

spells.name: Wound Tending
spells.description: Caster gains a +20 bonus to all Medicine or Herbalism maneuvers.

spells.name: Eye for Traps
spells.description: Caster gains a +50 bonus to any roll to notice a trap.

spells.name: Survival II
spells.description: As Survival I, except the bonus is +50.

spells.name: Water Purification
spells.description: Allows caster to purify a number of gallons of water equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Common Nature
spells.description: Any skill similarity penalty for using Survival in a different biome or any animal skill for a different animal is reduced by -25. This spell may be combined with Survival I or II.

spells.name: Lesser Trap
spells.description: This spell creates a minor, normal trap (constructed magically). The trap can deliver up to a B critical strike (must be either a Slash, Krush or a Puncture; specified by the caster at time of casting) to any one target. The size of the trap may vary from 1'R to 10'R. The time to construct this trap is 1 round per 1'R.

spells.name: Traceless Encampment
spells.description: All traces of an encampment vanish. No trace is left of the fire pit, tracks in the area of the encampment are erased, etc. One casting covers the traces of 10 people or animals; additional castings can be used to cover larger camps. This spell does not prevent new traces from being created if the group is still present, it only erases traces that have already accumulated.

spells.name: Nature’s Awareness
spells.description: Allows caster to monitor animate activity in the area (e.g., the caster will be aware of movements, subtle and overt). Caster cannot move while concentrating. Caster does not receive a picture of what is moving, just an awareness of the movement. This will allow distinguishing general size and shape of a moving object. Someone staying still, but breathing, will be detected, but only a very general idea of size would be determinable.

spells.name: Locate Natural
spells.description: Caster may locate the nearest natural object of a specified type, e.g. a specified type of animal or 6.6 Ranger plant, a natural spring, a cave, etc. The object can be a specific Base item if the caster is personally familiar with that item (e.g. the ranger can find his own horse, or the nearest horse, but not a specific horse that has only been described to him). Caster continues to sense the direction and distance for the duration.

spells.name: Waiting Awareness
spells.description: Allows caster to set up a natural “alarm system” in the area of effect; any disturbing activity will cause caster to be alerted. This alert will wake the caster, if he is in a natural sleep.

spells.name: Common Nature
spells.description: As Common Nature I, except penalties are reduced by -50.

spells.name: Major Trap
spells.description: As Lesser Trap, except trap can deliver an E critical hit.

spells.name: Concealed
spells.description: As Traceless Encampment, except that it will actively hide an encampment still in use. Sleeping areas are shrouded by plants or become recessed into the ground, any fire casts light only visible in a 10'R area and produces no smoke, no tracks are left by those staying in the encampment, etc. Hides 1 person/animal per caster level. Any Awareness maneuver to locate the camp suffers a -100 penalty.

spells.name: Weather Prediction
spells.description: Caster has a 95% chance of predicting weather over a 30-day period.

spells.name: Create Spring
spells.description: Creates a natural spring producing enough water to supply 1 person/animal per caster level. The spring is created in the most appropriate location within 500' (must be in a natural setting at ground level), and the caster immediately knows its location. If in a location which would not normally support a spring (e.g. in the desert), the spring will last 10 min/lvl. In a suitable location, it may last days or become permanent.

spells.name: Common Nature
spells.description: As Common Nature I, except penalties are reduced to zero.

spells.name: Locate Natural Object True
spells.description: As Locate Natural Object, except the range is 10 miles.

spells.name: Nature’s Awareness
spells.description: As Nature’s Awareness I, except detecting activity up to 500' away.

spells.name: Waiting Awareness
spells.description: As Waiting Awareness I, except over a 100' radius.

spells.name: Ambush Awareness
spells.description: Caster becomes aware of the presence, general location, general type, and number of any actively hostile beings in the area of effect. These beings do not have to be specifically hostile to the caster, but may simply be generally hostile.

spells.name: Adaptation
spells.description: Caster’s body adapts to survive in any natural environment. This can involve submersion in freezing water at depths with crushing pressure, traversing molten lava, or enduring exposure to a raging sandstorm. This does not cover any form of deliberate attack (even while comfortable naked in a blizzard, the ROLEMASTER caster will still suffer normal damage from a Cold Ball). The GM UNIFIED must determine what conditions qualify as “natural.” 

spells.name: Nature’s Awareness
spells.description: As Nature’s Awareness I, except Spell Law detecting activity up to 100' per level away from the caster.

spells.name: Survivor
spells.description: Caster can use one lower level spell on this list each round. 103 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling CURSES

spells.name: Curse Detection
spells.description: Detects a curse on an item or person.

spells.name: Nightvision Curse
spells.description: Target can see at night as if it were day, but he can only see in the day as if it were the darkest night.

spells.name: Sky Curse
spells.description: Target will never voluntarily fly by any means, nor climb any greater height than 100'.

spells.name: Ulcer Curse
spells.description: Target can only eat bread or dairy products. Anything else will aggravate his ulcer (unless he makes a physical RR vs 4th level) and he will be incapacitated for 1-10 hours.

spells.name: Curse of Dake
spells.description: Target cannot move faster than a walking pace on his own (he may be carried or ride at a faster pace).

spells.name: Green Tongue
spells.description: Target can only eat green leaves. Eating other food incapacitates him (if he fails a physical RR vs 6 th level) for 1-10 hours.

spells.name: Sea Curse
spells.description: Target will never voluntarily swim, enter any water (even a bath), or get into a boat.

spells.name: Curse of Furd
spells.description: All of target’s fumble numbers (before any reduction due to skill) when attacking are doubled (e.g., a fumble number of 4 becomes 8). When rolling absolute maneuvers, any result of 50 or less is absolute failure. When rolling percentage maneuvers, an “F” result always results in some additional problem arising.

spells.name: Excommunication
spells.description: Target loses all Power Points if target is a Channeling spell user. He cannot cast any spells from the Channeling realm, even by use of magic items, including Runes. A hybrid user of Channeling will only lose half of his Power Points, but cannot cast his Base lists as well as those which are pure Channeling. ROLEMASTER These PP cannot be regained until the duration of the spell ends or UNIFIED  the curse is removed. Spell Law

spells.name: Learning of Mins
spells.description: Target can only speak and write in his native language.

spells.name: Curse of Shar Bu
spells.description: Target is sterile and impotent.

spells.name: Power Leech
spells.description: Target loses 1 Power Point every 10 minutes. Power Points are recovered in a normal fashion, but begin to leak 104 away as soon as they are regained.

spells.name: Beauty of Arraer
spells.description: Target’s appearance becomes extremely attractive. If anyone sees the uncovered face of the target or gets within 3' (and is of an appropriate sexual orientation and fails an RR), that person will attempt to possess and carry off the target (fighting if necessary). Certain persons will get modifications to their RRs (positive or negative) based on outlook (a hedonist from a tribe that routinely kidnaps brides would be at a large penalty, an ascetic who had taken an oath of celibacy would have a bonus).

spells.name: Clotting Curse
spells.description: Target’s blood will coagulate and create a blood clot around the area of any cut wound (bleeding at least one hit per round). The clot will cut off circulation to the area fed by the given vessel and target will lose the affected body section after 2-20 minutes due to system damage (e.g., a thigh wound might ultimately mean loss of leg; a neck wound would be fatal). An Extremely Hard (-30) Medicine maneuver, taking 1d10 rounds, will prevent loss of the body part, as will a Joining spell from Blood Law, Blood Mastery, or Blood Ways.

spells.name: Ugliness of Orn
spells.description: Target’s appearance becomes hideous and horrifying. If a person sees the uncovered face of the target or gets within 3' of the target, he must make an RR. If he fails by more than 50, he attacks the target. If he fails by 50 or less, he will make every effort short of endangering his own safety to get away from the target. Even if he makes his RR, the viewer will experience extreme distaste for the target. Friends and family will gain bonuses to their RRs, but even they will regard the target with pity and disgust.

spells.name: Curse of Oli
spells.description: Target will lie 50% of the time, regardless of the topic.

spells.name: Curse of Blarm
spells.description: Any time that the target rolls doubles (e.g., a natural roll of 44), the equipment he is using must check for breakage.

spells.name: Curse of Penth
spells.description: Target may only speak the truth.

spells.name: Rewounding
spells.description: Once per day (at a random time), the target will experience the pain from an old wound. For new characters, treat this as an A Krush critical strike (rerolling a lethal result) 50% of the time and d10 concussion hits the other 50% of the time. Alternatively, the GM can re-open a specific old wound.

spells.name: Running Curse
spells.description: Target will move at fastest possible pace until he collapses of exhaustion (-100 total penalties). He may be restrained, but whenever freed, or he rests enough to recover from penalties to below -50 he will begin to run again.

spells.name: Friendslayer
spells.description: Every time the target is in a combat situation near friends who are within 10', there is a 10% chance each round (non-cumulative) that he will attack one of his friends (randomly determine which one if there are multiple possible targets) and attempt to kill that friend. For these purposes, a “friend” includes any companion, ally, or associate.

spells.name: Excommunication
spells.description: As Excommunication, except effect is permanent until removed.

spells.name: Curse of Larfi
spells.description: Target becomes unable to tolerate magical herbs or oral medicines, vomiting them up without benefit. Healing times for all injuries are doubled.

spells.name: Curse of Refusal
spells.description: Target can never be a willing target of any spell cast by another.

spells.name: Dark Thoughts
spells.description: Target may not attack any “evil” creature. The target will obey the commands of any evil being who is 10 or more levels higher than himself, but can command (+30 to Influence and +60 Leadership) any “Evil” creature whose level is at least 10 below the target’s level. See Section 10.8 for definition of “Evil”. 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling DARK CHANNELS

spells.name: Detect Evil Power
spells.description: Detects any active spell or active magical item from an Evil source, or any entity capable of casting Evil spells; caster can concentrate on a different 5'R area each round. (See Section 10.4 for more about detection spells.)

spells.name: Dark Stunning
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Caster points his arm (elbow locked and fist clenched) at the target and channels raw power. The target is stunned (-50).

spells.name: Channels I *
spells.description: When this spell is cast, the 1st level spell that the caster begins to cast (or prepare) the next round will be “channeled” to another spell user of the Channeling realm. The “channeled” spell is transmitted to the other spell user when it would normally take effect, and must be used by the receiving spell user immediately or delayed as described in Section 4.8 (treating the receiving spell user as the caster of the spell). All normal restrictions on the transmitted spell apply. The caster of the Channels spell must be able to see the receiver or know exactly where the receiver is (direction and distance or specific place). The receiver must know exactly when the spell is coming (but need not know what the spell sent is). For example, if a Cleric was at a certain altar at a certain time (midnight of full moon) ready to receive a spell; then another spell user (or deity) who knew this could use Channels I to send a spell to that Cleric. Because the spell is passed through the aura of the receiving character, the spell is cast at the level of the receiving character (including any level-based parameters).

spells.name: Repel Holy I
spells.description: Causes a “holy” being or a Channeler of a “good” power to be unable to approach closer than 100' to the caster and to retreat, if possible, to maintain that distance. If the target fails its RR by more than 30, it must flee (if of this plane) or be banished back to its home plane of existance (in which case duration is “permanent”). This spell will affect entities of “Type I” or of up to 5th level for beings without a “Type”.

spells.name: Dark Sleep
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Caster points his arm (elbow locked and fist clenched) at the target and channels raw power. The target falls into a deep, magical sleep.

spells.name: Channels III *
spells.description: As Channels I, except a 1st-3rd level spell 6.7 Evil may be transmitted. Channeling

spells.name: Channel Opening
spells.description: Caster can open a channel with any 1 known being the caster is acquainted with. This spell will enable the caster to learn the specific location (direction and distance only) of the other being, making it possible for the caster to use a Channels spell. Note that this spell does not allow any sort of communication, although the target will know that a Channel has been opened to him.

spells.name: Dark Blinding
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Caster points his arm (elbow locked and fist clenched) at the target and channels raw power. The target is blinded.

spells.name: Repel Holy III
spells.description: As Repel Holy I, except affects up to Type III or 15th level targets.

spells.name: Black Channel
spells.description: Caster may cast one of the Black Channel I spells (see Section 10.7).

spells.name: Channels V *
spells.description: As Channels I, except a 1st-5th level spell may be transmitted.

spells.name: Repel Holy IV
spells.description: As Repel Holy I, except affects up to Type IV or 20th level targets.

spells.name: Absolution
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] Target’s “soul” is torn from the target’s body (or other physical location if the soul is otherwise housed); it remains in whatever place “souls” go for 1 week/10 failure. The soul can be returned early only through Lifegiving or Reuniting. Target is unconscious until soul is restored; even subconscious activity (i.e., healing, etc.) suffers a -75 penalty.

spells.name: Dark Channel *
spells.description: The next Channels spell cast by the caster of this spell may be sent to anyone, regardless of the realm of the other individual. However, the spell channeled must be from an Evil spell list.

spells.name: Black Channel
spells.description: Caster may cast one of the Black Channel II spells (see Section 10.7).

spells.name: Channel Opening
spells.description: As Channel Opening I, except range is 10 miles per level.

spells.name: Channels VII *
spells.description: As Channels I, except a 1st-7th level spell may be transmitted.

spells.name: Repel Holy VI
spells.description: As Repel Holy I, except affects up to Type VI or 30th level targets.

spells.name: Channels X *
spells.description: As Channels I, except a 1st-10th level spell may be transmitted.

spells.name: Absolution Pure
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Absolution, except the “soul” can only be brought back through Lifegiving.

spells.name: Black Channel
spells.description: Caster may cast one of the Black Channel III spells (see Section 10.7).

spells.name: Dark Absolution
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Absolution, except the “soul” is utterly destroyed. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Lord Channels
spells.description: As Channels I, except a 1st-20th level UNIFIED  spell may be transmitted. Spell Law

spells.name: Channel Opening
spells.description: As Channel Opening I, except range is 100 miles per level.

spells.name: Unholy Bridge
spells.description: Opens a direct channel to the caster’s deity (or other power source); results depend on the deity’s personality, motives, and powers. Any spell the deity can cast may be transmitted through the gate. 105 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling DEMONIC PACTS

spells.name: Demonic Lore
spells.description: Caster’s mind is filled with dark secrets tugging at his subconscious mind. Any Lore or Science maneuvers on a demon-related topic are made by the caster with a +25 bonus.

spells.name: Oath of Binding
spells.description: Caster and one demon seal an agreement whereby this spell binds both of them to keep the bargain they have made. The spell will last until the bargain expires due to a time limit agreed upon or simply no longer applies. It is extremely hard to break this spell; it receives a +100 to its RR to resist any form of Dispel or other magic to remove or nullify it. The two parties to the agreement cannot attempt to circumvent the Oath without triggering the punishment for violation of the bargain. Upon any violation of the bargain, the offending party takes an E Holy critical, then on the following round takes a D Holy critical and so on until taking an A Holy critical on the fifth round. These criticals are not modified by size.

spells.name: Demonic Mission
spells.description: Allows a demon to stay on this plane while it perROLEMASTER forms a mission for the caster. Caster and demon must have already made UNIFIED the Oath of Binding. Duration is until the demon fulfills its mission (and  returns to the caster if it has not yet received its reward and the mission has Spell Law left it away from the caster), its mission ends in failure (e.g., the item it was sent to fetch is destroyed), or the maximum duration of 1 hour per caster level has elapsed. While this spell is active, the demon can only pursue its mission (or return to the caster once the mission is completed). When this spell ends, unless some other spell allows the demon to stay, it will return to its home plane after a grace period of 1 minute per level of the demon. 106

spells.name: Familiar Spirit I
spells.description: For a period of one week, the caster must cast this spell and spill some of his own blood (taking 1-10 hits of damage in the process) each day. At the end of that week, the caster will have attracted a Stage I familiar spirit into this world and established a bond to it. See Section 10.3 for details on the familiar spirit and its relationship to the caster.

spells.name: Diabolical Skill
spells.description: Caster gains a +25 bonus to his choice of any one Composition, Crafting, Lore, Medical, Performance Art, or Vocation skill. This bonus lasts until the caster casts another Diabolical Skill spell (only one Diabolical Skill spell may be active at one time), the caster touches or is touched by a Holy object (includes Unholy object if the Unholiness is associated with a dark god rather than a demon), is on sacred ground, or is affected by any non-Informational spells from a non-Evil user of Channeling.

spells.name: Demonic Vision
spells.description: Allows caster to observe any location on the same plane in a pool of blood (blood must not have congealed; spell will prevent congealing during spell duration). This spell has no limits on distance and can focus in on any known place, being, or object that the caster is personally familiar with or can describe well enough to uniquely identify. It is subject to magical protections against information spells and such protections are automatically successful. This spell is also unable to reveal anything on holy ground, though it can spy upon holy objects.

spells.name: Demonic Mission
spells.description: As Demonic Mission I, except maximum duration is 1 day per caster level.

spells.name: Familiar Spirit II
spells.description: This spell must be cast on the caster’s Stage I familiar spirit every day for two weeks. At the end of that time, more of the spirit’s strength will have been drawn from its own plane, allowing it to manifest as a Stage II familiar spirit. See Section 10.3 for the various Stages of the familiar spirit.

spells.name: Diabolical Skill
spells.description: As Diabolical Skill I, except bonus is +50.

spells.name: Unleash Demon
spells.description: Frees a demon from any constraining Conjuring Circle and allows it to remain for 10 minutes per caster level until it returns to its home plane.

spells.name: Demonic Vision
spells.description: As Demonic Vision I, except allows the caster to hear what is going on at the site looked upon.

spells.name: Familiar Spirit
spells.description: As Familiar Spirit II, except the caster’s Stage II familiar becomes Stage III in a three week process.

spells.name: Demonic Mission
spells.description: As Demonic Mission I, except maximum duration is 1 week per caster level.

spells.name: Diabolical Skill
spells.description: As Diabolical Skill I, except bonus is +75.

spells.name: Demonic Vision
spells.description: As Demonic Vision II, except caster sees the scene as if it were well lit, even if it is in total darkness.

spells.name: Familiar Spirit
spells.description: As Familiar Spirit II, except the caster’s Stage III familiar becomes Stage IV in a four week process.

spells.name: Unleash Demon
spells.description: As Unleash Demon I, except duration is 1 hour per caster level.

spells.name: Demonic Mission
spells.description: As Demonic Mission I, except maximum duration is 1 year per caster level.

spells.name: Diabolical Skill
spells.description: As Diabolical Skill I, except bonus is +100.

spells.name: Familiar Spirit V
spells.description: As Familiar Spirit II, except the caster’s Stage IV familiar becomes Stage V in a five week process.

spells.name: Unleash Demon
spells.description: As Unleash Demon I, except duration is 1 day per caster level.

spells.name: Familiar Spirit
spells.description: As Familiar Spirit II, except the caster’s Stage V familiar becomes Stage VI in a six week process.

spells.name: Cheat Death
spells.description: This spell is used only once, if ever. Using it, the caster transforms himself into a Lich, one of the most feared of the undead. If the caster fails when attempting this spell, he will simply die. With success, the caster becomes one of the undead without ever actually dying. At this point, the caster is sustained by magic and dwells in a place between life and death.

spells.name: Unleash Demon
spells.description: As Unleash Demon I, except duration is 1 week per caster level.

spells.name: Cheat Death True
spells.description: As Cheat Death, except caster’s organs are transferred into a ready container (jar, box, chest, etc.). The caster then becomes a somewhat more powerful Classic Lich and can only be truly destroyed if the container with his organs is destroyed. 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling DEMONIC SUMMONS

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: Caster empowers a circular diagram (a simple pentacle will suffice, but many prefer something more elaborate) of between five and ten feet in radius to confine a demon within its borders. This conjuring circle will prevent any Type I demon from leaving or attacking (including casting any spells or using other magical abilities) across this circle. If a demon is left in the circle until the duration expires, the demon is freed and may spend 1 minute per demon level on this plane before returning to its home plane.

spells.name: Banish Demon I
spells.description: One Type I demon is instantly banished back to the plane whence it came. If the demon is currently confined to a Conjuring Circle, it makes its RR with a penalty of -25.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: Summons a Type I demon which appears at a point within range designated by the caster (within a Conjuring Circle is usually a good idea). It takes the demon two rounds to materialize, during which it is possible to identify the kind of demon appearing (using Creature Lore: Demon). If the demon is not within a Conjuring Circle, it may do as it wishes and can remain for 1 minute per demon level before vanishing back to its home plane. If it is within a Conjuring Circle it remains there until something causes it to be released or banished. When casting this spell, the caster must roll a Spell Mastery maneuver (difficulty Easy). If the Spell Mastery is a Success, the kind of demon that appears is up to the caster; in the case of Absolute Success, the caster may select what level the demon is from the possible range of levels for that kind of demon (or specify a particular demon, if one is known). Partial Success means that the caster knows what kind of demon he is getting (does not need to attempt Creature Lore: Demon). Failure means a random demon of the correct Type is summoned. Absolute Failure means that the caster has summoned a random demon of the next higher Type (in the case of Demon Summoning I, this would be a Type II demon).

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: Demon obeys the caster for the duration of this spell. The demon vanishes back to its home plane at the end of this spell. If the demon is trapped within a Conjuring Circle, it makes its RR with a -25 penalty. However, if the demon succeeds in its RR, it is freed from any confinement and may stay in this world for 1 minute per level of the demon. A failed control attempt will usually anger a demon. This spell affects demons of Type I only. 6.7 Evil

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: As Conjuring Circle I, except will confine a Channeling demon of Type II or lower.

spells.name: Banish Demon II
spells.description: As Banish Demon I, except a demon of Type II or lower may be banished.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons a demon of Type II and the required Spell Mastery roll is of Light difficulty.

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: As Control Demon I, except a demon of Type II or lower may be controlled.

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: As Conjuring Circle I, except will confine a demon of Type III or lower.

spells.name: Banish Demon
spells.description: As Banish Demon I, except a demon of Type III or lower may be banished.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons a demon of Type III and the required Spell Mastery roll is of Medium difficulty.

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: As Control Demon I, except a demon of Type III or lower may be controlled.

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: As Conjuring Circle I, except will confine a demon of Type IV or lower.

spells.name: Banish Demon
spells.description: As Banish Demon I, except a demon of Type IV or lower may be banished.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons a demon of Type IV and the required Spell Mastery roll is of Hard difficulty.

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: As Control Demon I, except a demon of Type IV or lower may be controlled.

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: As Conjuring Circle I, except will confine a demon of Type V or lower.

spells.name: Banish Demon V
spells.description: As Banish Demon I, except a demon of Type V or lower may be banished.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons a demon of Type V and the required Spell Mastery roll is of Very Hard difficulty.

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: As Control Demon I, except a demon of Type V or lower may be controlled.

spells.name: Conjuring Circle
spells.description: As Conjuring Circle I, except will confine a demon of Type VI or lower.

spells.name: Banish Demon
spells.description: As Banish Demon I, except a demon of Type VI or lower may be banished.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons a demon of Type VI and the required Spell Mastery roll is of Extremely Hard difficulty.

spells.name: Control Demon
spells.description: As Control Demon I, except a demon of Type VI or lower may be controlled.

spells.name: Summon Demon
spells.description: As Summon Demon I, except summons ROLEMASTER a demon of greater than Type VI and the required Spell Mastery roll UNIFIED  is of Sheer Folly difficulty, but since this is the most powerful class of Spell Law demons, an Absolute Failure is the same as a normal failure. Note that demons this powerful cannot be controlled like those of lesser power, so this is a spell to consider carefully before using. 107 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling DISEASE

spells.name: Chills
spells.description: Target gets a cold. Treat as a mild Pneumonic disease that does not go away. (See RMCL, Section 15.6.)

spells.name: Gray Vision
spells.description: Target is color blind.

spells.name: Smelling Loss
spells.description: Target has no sense of smell. Target never perceives by smell alone and suffers a -25 modifier to all Awareness maneuvers involving smell and other senses.

spells.name: Hearing Loss
spells.description: Target has no sense of hearing. Target never perceives by hearing alone and suffers a -25 modifier to all Awareness maneuvers involving hearing and other senses.

spells.name: Tongue Rot
spells.description: Over the course of one week, the target’s tongue will rot away. When the tongue is fully gone, the target will be unable to speak.

spells.name: Asthma
