spells.description: Target gets severe asthma. For every round of physical exersion (e.g., running or melee combat), the target must make an Endurance roll. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Leprosy
spells.description: Target gets leprosy. This causes a gradual loss of feeling UNIFIED (and blood flow) in the extremities. Every day, the target suffers a cu-  mulative -1 penalty to all perceptions involving touch to a maximum Spell Law of -25. There is similarly a cumulative -1 penalty added each day to any roll depending on the target’s appearance (e.g., Charm maneuvers), but the maximum for this penalty is -50. After one week of leprosy, all concussion hit damage against the target is halved due to loss of feeling.

spells.name: Minor Allergy
spells.description: Target becomes slightly allergic to a substance of the caster’s choosing. When in the presence of this substance, the target 108 loses 1 AP each round due to the distraction of runny nose, sneezing, etc.

spells.name: Root Rot
spells.description: The roots of any one plant wither and die and no new roots can be grown. The plant will eventually die.

spells.name: Hemophilia
spells.description: The target becomes a hemophiliac. All concussion hits taken by the target are doubled and hits heal at half the normal rate. All attempts to stop bleeding by the target are made with a -30 penalty and even magical healing stops one less hit/round of bleeding than would normally be the case.

spells.name: Malaria
spells.description: The target contracts malaria; after the initial bout of high fever, delerium, coma, and incapacitation (lasting 1 + 2d10 days), the target will be subject to random “relapses” similar to the initial bout (5% chance each month of a relapse). If the target receives no care during the initial bout, there is a 99% chance of death during this time (only 1% chance if given competent medical attention).

spells.name: Withering Hand
spells.description: Caster may instantly kill any one plant he touches.

spells.name: Epilepsy
spells.description: Target becomes an epileptic; in a tense situation, there is a 5% chance that he will go into an epileptic fit for 2d10 rounds. If someone is able to provide care (anyone with a rank in Medicine may do so), there is a 1% chance that the target will do an A Krush critical to himself by hitting some object; if there is nobody to do so, there is a 20% chance of taking a critical. In any case, he is treated as stunned (-75).

spells.name: Pneumonia
spells.description: Target gets pneumonia; if the target is kept warm and completely immobile for 2 weeks, he will have only a 25% chance of dying (50% chance if not treated). The chance of dying is modified by the target’s Constitution stat bonus (e.g., if the target has a +7 Constitution stat bonus, his chance of dying if untreated is 43%). If the target survives this two week period, the lingering symptoms are as a mild Pneumonic disease (RMCL, Section 15.6).

spells.name: Major Allergy
spells.description: As Minor Allergy, except 2 AP are lost each round.

spells.name: Carrier I
spells.description: The target suffers any one of the diseases from this list of up to 5th level (caster’s choice). In addition, the target is contagious. All who come into contact (5'R) of the target must make an RR (with a +25 modifier if only close to target, +0 if touching target, and at -25 if the individual has intimate contact with the target). If the original target makes his RR, he does not suffer the effects, but must make a second RR or will still be a carrier of the disease. All people who catch the disease from the target are not themselves contagious.

spells.name: Elephantiasis
spells.description: Target gets elephantiasis; one of his extremities (not his head) swells and grows up to five times normal size. Exact effect should be determined by the GM (but the extremity should be completely useless).

spells.name: Lycanthropy
spells.description: At the rise of the next full moon, the target becomes a Lesser Werewolf (see Creature Law).

spells.name: Carrier II
spells.description: As Carrier I, except disease may be chosen from spells up to 10th level.

spells.name: Leukemia
spells.description: Target gets leukemia; he will weaken at a rate of 2% per day (-2/day, cumulative, to all activities). When the total reachs 100% (-100 penalty), the target dies.

spells.name: Carrier III
spells.description: As Carrier I, except disease may be chosen from spells up to 15th level.

spells.name: Rabies
spells.description: Target gets rabies; after 21 days of no visible effect, the disease sets in. The target’s organs contract; he foams at the mouth, becomes very thirsty and violent; and any one he bites or scratches must resist or contract the disease. The target dies 5-7 days after the disease’s onset.

spells.name: Crippling Allergy
spells.description: As Minor Allergy, except 3 AP are lost each round.

spells.name: Lycanthropy True
spells.description: At the rise of the next full moon, the target becomes a Greater Werewolf (see Creature Law).

spells.name: Plague
spells.description: Target gets a “plague”. If he fails his RR, he will die 95% of the time (after 10 minutes). The other 5% of the time, he believes that he resisted (and suffers no effects), but becomes a carrier instead. Anyone coming within 5' of the carrier must resist (+25 RR; +0 RR if touching the target; -25 RR if in intimate contact with the target) or face the same chances as the original target. Only the original target is contagious. 6.7 6.7 - - Evil Evil Channeling Channeling WOUNDING

spells.name: Wounding I *
spells.description: Target suffers 1d10 concussion hits of damage.

spells.name: Weariness *

spells.name: Bleeding I *

spells.name: Wounding III *
spells.description: Target suffers 3d10 concussion hits of damage.

spells.name: Sensory Damage
spells.description: One of the target’s external sensory organs (eye, ear, nose, etc.) is damaged. Target will operate without that organ until healed. In addition, the target will have a -10 modification per 10 failure for all actions that partially use that organ (-100 for all actions involving that organ specifically).

spells.name: Fracture I *
spells.description: Target suffers a hairline fracture in a limb, penalty is -20.

spells.name: Bleeding III *

spells.name: Wounding V *
spells.description: Target suffers 5d10 concussion hits of damage.

spells.name: Sensory Damage

spells.name: Stagger *
spells.description: Target is Staggered.

spells.name: Wounding VII *
spells.description: Target suffers 7d10 concussion hits of damage.

spells.name: Life Drain I *
spells.description: Target suffers a -1 penalty to his Constitution bonus.

spells.name: Fracture II *
spells.description: Target suffers a simple fracture in a 6.7 Evil limb, penalty is -40. Channeling

spells.name: Bleeding V *

spells.name: Wounding X *

spells.name: Life Drain II *
spells.description: Target suffers a -2 penalty to his Constitution bonus.

spells.name: Fracture III *

spells.name: Muscle Spasm *
spells.description: Target suffers a spasm in his arms, causing him to drop anything he is holding.

spells.name: Life Drain III *
spells.description: Target suffers a -3 penalty to his Constitution bonus.

spells.name: Wounding XV *

spells.name: Life Drain True

spells.name: Bleeding True *
spells.description: Target will bleed at the rate of 1 hit per round per every 5 levels of the caster (e.g., if the caster is 30th level, then the target bleeds at a rate of six hits per round).

spells.name: Fracture True *
spells.description: Target suffers multiple fractures in a limb, total penalty is -100.

spells.name: Paralysis *
spells.description: Target suffers spinal injury, resulting in paralysis below the waist (if RR failed by 25 or less) or from the neck down (if RR is failed by 26 or more). Target immediately drops to ground and is at -50 for any activity that is still possible.

spells.name: Wounding True
spells.description: Target loses all his hits, then takes an additional 1 hit per level of the caster. spells.name: Measure
spells.description: Caster can measure a distance or length so long as both ends are within sight or caster can measure either the weight or the volume of one item by touching it or the caster can know both the temperature and barometric pressure.

spells.name: Text Analysis I
spells.description: Caster can read text written in an unknown language, but only understands basic concepts of it.

spells.name: Stone Analysis
spells.description: Gives nature and origin of natural stone, and when and how worked stone was obtained and worked.

spells.name: Metal Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, except metal may be examined.

spells.name: Gas Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, except a gas may be examined.

spells.name: Wood Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, except wood or other plant materials may be examined.

spells.name: Text Analysis II
spells.description: As Text Analysis I, except gives a complete technical analysis (vocabulary and syntax) but not an understanding of idioms, jargon, implications, or cultural references.

spells.name: Liquid Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, except a liquid may be examined.

spells.name: Organics Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, except items composed of organic materials of animal origins (e.g., bone, leather, ivory) may be examined. This will identify ROLEMASTER UNIFIED rune paper. 

spells.name: Delving
spells.description: Gives significant details about an item’s conSpell Law struction and purpose (not specific powers).

spells.name: Spell Analysis
spells.description: Provides analysis of an active spell, giving its duration and the profession of its caster and its type (not its level or exactly what spell it is). 112

spells.name: Quantitative
spells.description: Caster gains a knowledge of any non-magical bonus possessed by the target object.

spells.name: Internal Abacus
spells.description: Caster gains a +30 bonus to any maneuvers involving mathematical calculations.

spells.name: Death Analysis
spells.description: Gives information concerning a being’s death (weapon, spell, time since, etc.); must be cast in place of death (within 24 hr) or in the presence of body (no time limit).

spells.name: Text Analysis III
spells.description: As Text Analysis II, except everything but implications is known (e.g., answers to riddles are not known automatically).

spells.name: Power Analysis
spells.description: One item, person, or place may be examined to see if it has magical power, which realm the power is from, a general idea of its origin, and its basic configuration.

spells.name: Conveyance
spells.description: Caster’s awareness leaves the caster’s body (which is inactive) and may travel at 1 mile/min; however it can only travel 10'/rnd when in solid material or when observing the world. If the caster overstays the duration, he must make an RR (against Essence) modified by -50 or die (attack level is equal to the number of rounds overstayed). Caster’s awareness can see and hear normally.

spells.name: Death’s Delving
spells.description: As Death Analysis, except gives a visual image of the killer (if any) and a vague reason for death (e.g., revenge, robbery, accident, etc.).

spells.name: Art Analysis
spells.description: Gives nature and origin of a work of art, including who the (primary) artist was, what materials and tools were used, when and where the work was done, and the intended purpose and message of the work.

spells.name: Analysis
spells.description: Any of the lower level spells may be used together on one item, person, or place (Conveyance is not included).

spells.name: Mass Analysis
spells.description: As Analysis, except one item per round may be examined.

spells.name: Power Analysis
spells.description: As Power Analysis, except exact origin, creator, and detailed purpose are given.

spells.name: Death’s Deep
spells.description: As Death’s Delving, except caster can sense direction and distance to the killer, the body, and to the killing weapon (if any) so long as the distance does not exceed 1 mile per level of the caster.

spells.name: Item Analysis
spells.description: The caster gains complete information on the item’s construction, purpose, magical abilities, and any non-magical bonuses.

spells.name: Conveyance True
spells.description: As Conveyance, except rate is 10 mile/min (50'/rnd through solids or while observing). 7.1 - Open Essence DETECTING WAYS

spells.name: Detect Essence
spells.description: Detects any active spell or active magical item from the Essence realm; caster can concentrate on a different 5'R area each round.

spells.name: Detect Mentalism
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except realm is Mentalism.

spells.name: Detect Channeling
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except realm is Channeling.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects magic of any realm (does not reveal which realm is detected).

spells.name: Detect Invisible
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects invisible things; all attacks against something so detected are modified by -50.

spells.name: Detect Traps
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except it gives a 75% chance of detecting a trap (modified by half the bonus or penalty difficulty of finding the trap through a Perception maneuver). If a trap is missed, the spell will not find it no matter how many times the caster scans the same area.

spells.name: Detect Evil
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects any evil being or any item created by evil or long used by a very evil person.

spells.name: Location I
spells.description: Gives the direction and distance to any specific object or place that the caster is familiar with or has had described in detail. The caster must have the dimensions of the object exact within 10% of actual size and know at least two other attributes that make the item unique (e.g., color, texture, weight, etc.) within range of the spell. Note that sometimes the caster must know more than two other attributes to make the item unique.

spells.name: Detect Toxin
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects poisonous substances.

spells.name: Perceive Power
spells.description: Gives the power (level) of the person or item or spell examined; caster can concentrate on a different target each round. 7.1 Open

spells.name: Detect Death
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects dead Essence bodies and whether anything has died in the radius in the last 24 hours. Lists

spells.name: Location III
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Detect Herb
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects one herb of the caster’s choice.

spells.name: Detect Species
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects one species of life chosen by the caster.

spells.name: Discover Spell
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects any active or latent (awaiting a trigger event) spell that has been cast in the area examined. Realm(s) of spell(s) are revealed, as well as general type (Force, Elemental, etc.); also revealed is whether spell is active or awaiting a triggering event.

spells.name: Location V
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Detect Anomaly
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects any area where magic does not act normally or where there is an abnormal structure to the local space and/or time (as with the presence of an interdimensional Gate).

spells.name: Long Perceive
spells.description: As Perceive Power, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Detect Metal
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects one metal of the caster’s choice.

spells.name: Greater Location
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 1 mile.

spells.name: Discover Detections
spells.description: As Detect Essence, except detects any type of detection spell that is operating in the area examined and gives exact spell detected as well as the location of that spell’s caster if he is within 100'.

spells.name: Detect True
spells.description: Detects as any one of the lower level Detect spells. Thing detected and area of effect can both be changed each round.

spells.name: Power Perception
spells.description: As Perceive Power I, except range is 100'/level and everything within a 5' radius can be “perceived” at once.

spells.name: Enhanced Detection
spells.description: As any of the lower level Detect or Discover spells, except entire 100' radius around the caster is scanned instantly and the locations of any detected things are learned to within 1'.

spells.name: Location True
spells.description: As Location I, except range is 1 mile/ level. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 113 7.1 - Open Essence ELEMENTAL SHIELDS

spells.name: Resist Light
spells.description: Target is totally protected from all natural light (not lightning); +10 to all RRs or DBs vs. elemental light (electricity) attacks.

spells.name: Resist Heat
spells.description: Target is totally protected from all natural heat to 200° F; +10 to all RRs or DBs vs. elemental heat/ fire attacks.

spells.name: Resist Cold
spells.description: Target is totally protected from all natural cold to -20° F; +10 to all RRs or DBs vs. elemental cold/ ice attacks.

spells.name: Resist Light
spells.description: As Resist Light, except all beings within 10'R of target are protected.

spells.name: Resist Heat Sphere
spells.description: As Resist Heat, except all beings within 10'R of target are protected.

spells.name: Resist Cold Sphere
spells.description: As Resist Cold, except all beings within 10'R of target are protected.

spells.name: Resist Temperature
spells.description: As Resist Heat and Resist Cold, except for duration, and only natural temperature extremes are protected against.

spells.name: Lightarmor
spells.description: As Resist Light, except protects against all ROLEMASTER natural light and lightning; +20 to all RRs vs light (electricUNIFIED ity); -20 to elemental electricity attacks.  Spell Law

spells.name: Heatarmor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, except protects against heat.

spells.name: Coldarmor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, except protects against cold. 114

spells.name: Lightarmor Sphere
spells.description: As Lightarmor, except protects all beings within 10'R centered on target.

spells.name: Heatarmor Sphere
spells.description: As Heatarmor, except protects all beings within 10'R centered on target.

spells.name: Coldarmor Sphere
spells.description: As Coldarmor, except protects all beings within 10'R centered on target.

spells.name: Mass Resist Light
spells.description: As Resist Light, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Lightning Armor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, except it also reduces the effective Size of any electrical attack on the target by 1 (e.g., a Medium Lightning Bolt becomes a Small Lightning Bolt).

spells.name: Mass Resist Heat
spells.description: As Resist Heat, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Fire Armor
spells.description: As Lightning Armor, except fire and heat spells are affected (e.g., fire bolts and fire balls).

spells.name: Mass Resist Cold
spells.description: As Resist Cold, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Ice Armor
spells.description: As Lightning Armor, except cold and ice spells are affected (e.g., ice bolts and cold balls).

spells.name: Mass Lightarmor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Mass Heatarmor
spells.description: As Heatarmor, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Mass Coldarmor
spells.description: As Coldarmor, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Fire Armor Sphere
spells.description: As Fire Armor, except protects all beings within 10'R centered on target.

spells.name: Ice Armor Sphere
spells.description: As Ice Armor, except protects all beings within 10'R centered on target.

spells.name: True Armor
spells.description: Acts as Lightning Armor, Fire Armor, and Ice Armor all at the same time. 7.1 - Open Essence ESSENCE HAND

spells.name: Vibrations I
spells.description: Causes an object of up to 1 lb. weight to vibrate rapidly; if the item is fragile, make a breakage check. If it is an object held by a being, the being must make an RR or fumble it (each round).

spells.name: Staying I *
spells.description: Exerts 5 pound of counterforce on a person or object. Object cannot be moved by Staying alone, which can only be used to counter another force, such as gravity, and it can only exert force in one direction. A person (or other animate target) must win a feat of strength based on their weight vs. the weight capacity of the spell in order to move against the force.

spells.name: Telekinesis I
spells.description: Caster can move one object at a distance, weighing up to 1 pound, up to 1'/second with no acceleration. If the caster stops concentration before the duration is up, the object remains stationary as if it had Staying I thrown on it. If the object is held, resolve any attempt to grab it as a feat of strength based on the weight capacity of the spell vs. the weight of the target holding the object.

spells.name: Vibrations II
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except weight limit is 5 lbs.

spells.name: Staying II *
spells.description: As Staying I, except force limit is 25 lbs.

spells.name: Telekinesis II
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, except weight limit is 5 lbs.

spells.name: Vibrations III
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except weight limit is 25 lbs.

spells.name: Staying III *
spells.description: As Staying I, except force limit is 125 lbs.

spells.name: Vibrations IV
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except weight limit is 50 lbs.

spells.name: Aiming
spells.description: Causes +50 to be added to the attack roll of the missile. The caster must touch the firer and see the missile for the entire round that the missile is fired.

spells.name: Telekinesis III
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, except the weight limit is 25 lbs. 7.1 Open

spells.name: Staying IV *
spells.description: As Staying I, except the force limit is Essence 250 lbs. Lists

spells.name: Mass Vibrations
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except as many 5 lb. objects as the caster’s level can be vibrated (they must all be within the field of vision of the caster). 14 Telekinesis IV – As Telekinesis I, except weight limit is 50 lbs.

spells.name: Telekinesis IV
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, except weight limit is 50 lbs.

spells.name: Staying V *
spells.description: As Staying I, except force limit is 500 lbs.

spells.name: Hurling I
spells.description: Caster may “hurl” one object (that starts within 10' of the caster) of 1 lb. or less with sufficient force to deliver an attack on the Sling Attack Table with the ranges of a Short Bow. Base the caster’s OB on his directed spell skill with this spell. If a weapon is “hurled”, a medium Spell Mastery maneuver will allow use of the weapon’s normal attack table, retaining the Short Bow range penalties. If this is done, the weapon gets any normal OB bonuses (e.g., from superior materials).

spells.name: Telekinesis V
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, except weight limit is 100 lbs.

spells.name: True Vibrations
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except weight limit is 10 lbs./level.

spells.name: Mass Vibrations
spells.description: As Vibrations I, except as many 25 lb. objects as the caster’s level can be vibrated (they must all be within the field of vision of the caster).

spells.name: Lord Aim
spells.description: As Aiming, except missile attack bonus is +100.

spells.name: True Staying *
spells.description: As Staying I, except force limit is 50 lbs./level.

spells.name: True Telekinesis
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, except weight limit is 10 lbs./level.

spells.name: Mass True Vibrations
spells.description: As Mass Vibrations I, except objects may be up to 10 lbs./level in weight.

spells.name: Mass Telekinesis
spells.description: As True Telekinesis, except within the weight limit, the caster may simultaneously manipulate up to one object for every five caster levels (i.e., a 40th level caster could control eight objects at once).

spells.name: Aim True
spells.description: As Aiming, except missile attack automatically does maximum damage (roll the critical normally, except that it is treated as Slaying II). ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 115 7.1 - Open Essence ESSENCE’S PERCEPTIONS

spells.name: Touchless Feel
spells.description: Caster can pick a point up to 10' away and experience tactile sensations as if their hand was in that place, able to move as their hand might. The point may be on the other side of a barrier (e.g., in a chest, behind a door), but cannot move through solid objects from that starting point. Sensations of intense heat or cold will not cause pain, nor will touching something painful to the touch produce more than a dull ache (i.e., painful sensation is muted). Target cannot be moved and cannot feel the “touch”.

spells.name: Presence *
spells.description: Caster is aware of the presence of all sentient/thinking beings within 20'.

spells.name: Listen I
spells.description: Caster can pick a point up to 10' away and will hear as if physically at that point (there can be intervening objects such as walls). Note that this means ROLEMASTER that the caster does not have hearing at his own location. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Smell I
spells.description: As Listen I, except the caster’s sense of Spell Law smell functions from the fixed point.

spells.name: Long Ear I
spells.description: Caster’s point of hearing may be moved independently up to 100' away (moves at 10'/md); the caster must be physically able to go there (e.g., the caster could not send this point of hearing through walls or 116 closed doors). Note that this means that the caster does not have hearing at his own location.

spells.name: Watch I
spells.description: As Listen I, except the caster sees from the fixed point (it can rotate).

spells.name: Long Eye I
spells.description: As Long Ear I, except the caster sees from the moving point (it can rotate).

spells.name: Listen II
spells.description: As Listen I, except the range is 100'.

spells.name: Long Nose I
spells.description: As Long Ear I, except the caster’s sense of smell functions from the moving point.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: Caster can read the surface thoughts of one target.

spells.name: Watch II
spells.description: As Watch I, except the range is 100'.

spells.name: Long Ear II
spells.description: As Long Ear I, except the range is 300'.

spells.name: Smell II
spells.description: As Smell I, except the range is 100'.

spells.name: Listen III
spells.description: As Listen I, except the range is 500'.

spells.name: Long Eye II
spells.description: As Long Eye I, except the range is 300'.

spells.name: Broaden Sense
spells.description: One of the caster’s senses has an extended spectrum of sensitivity. Vision may be extended into infrared or ultraviolet light or hearing extended into infrasonic or ultrasonic frequencies. Applicability to any other sense is up the Gamemaster.

spells.name: Long Nose II
spells.description: As Long Nose I, except the range is 300'.

spells.name: Watch III
spells.description: As Watch I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Smell III
spells.description: As Smell I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Listen IV
spells.description: As Listen I, except the range is 1 mile/ level.

spells.name: Watch IV
spells.description: As Watch I, except the range is 1 mile/ level.

spells.name: Listen True
spells.description: As Listen I, except the range is unlimited (the caster must be able to locate the desired point in terms of direction and distance).

spells.name: Smell IV
spells.description: As Smell I, except the range is 1 mile/ level.

spells.name: Long Sight
spells.description: When making a ranged attack, including any form of spell, all range penalties are reduced to one-tenth rounded down (e.g., a -25 penalty would be reduced to -2). Any Perception maneuver penalties based on sight should be made as if the caster were at one-tenth the actual distance from what is being observed.

spells.name: Watch True
spells.description: As Listen True, except the caster sees instead of hears. 7.1 - Open Essence LESSER ILLUSIONS

spells.name: Ventriloquism
spells.description: Caster can speak and the caster’s voice will appear to come from any point desired within 100' (point must be in the caster’s field of vision).

spells.name: Sound/Light
spells.description: Creates any simple, immobile image/scene in an area of up to 10'R, or creates a set of immobile sounds in an area of up to 10'R.

spells.name: Taste/Smell Mirage
spells.description: As Sound/Light Mirage, except it creates a set of immobile smells/scents in the area of effect, or a set of immobile tastes in the area of effect.

spells.name: Illusion II
spells.description: Creates a simple, immobile image or scene up to an area of 10'R. One of the following options may also be chosen: a) an extra sense can be added (not the tactile or Presence senses), b) the duration can be doubled, c) the range can be doubled, d) the radius of the area of effect can be doubled, or e) the illusion can cast light. All parts of the area of effect must be in the caster’s field of vision at the time of casting.

spells.name: Phantasms I
spells.description: Creates the image of one object or being that will move however the caster wants (as long as the caster concentrates). When the caster stops concentrating, the image remains but stops moving. The caster may resume concentration again later, and make the image move again (presuming that the duration has not expired). The image can be of any size that would fit in a 10'R.

spells.name: Light Glamour
spells.description: One object (up to 10 pounds per level) has its visual appearance altered for the duration of the spell. Note that no other aspect of the object changes. This spell cannot make an object cast light (although it may alter the appearance of light given off, whether naturally or from another spell).

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Illusion II, except it can be delayed 7.1 Open by up to 24 hours. At the time of casting, the caster must decide Essence upon the trigger for the spell. The caster can chose one of the Lists following: a) time period, b) specified movements, c) specified sounds, d) specified smells, or e) specified tastes. If a sense is used to trigger the spell, that sense must be included in the illusion.

spells.name: Illusion III
spells.description: As Illusion II, except two options can be chosen. See notes above for guidelines on how to combine the options.

spells.name: Phantasms II
spells.description: As Phantasms I, except one of the following options may also be chosen: a) an extra sense can be added (not the tactile or Presence senses), b) the duration can be doubled, c) the range can be doubled, d) the radius of the area of effect can be doubled, e) another image can be created and moved independently of the first (all separate images must be within the caster’s field of vision and within range of the spell), f) the phantasm can cast light, or g) limited repetitious sounds, movements, etc., can be added that do not require concentration of the caster (the proper senses involved must also be included within the illusion).

spells.name: Waiting Phantasms
spells.description: As Phantasms II, except it can be delayed as in Waiting Illusion II. The phantasm will move and act if given a simple command (at the time of casting) or it can deliver a short speech (if sound was one of the included senses).

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Waiting Illusion II, except two options can be chosen. See notes above for guidelines on how to combine the options.

spells.name: Phantasms III
spells.description: As Phantasms II, except two options can be chosen.

spells.name: Illusion V
spells.description: As Illusion III, except four options.

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Waiting Illusion III, except three options can be chosen.

spells.name: Waiting Phantasms
spells.description: As Phantasms III, except it can be delayed as in Waiting Phantasms II.

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Waiting Illusion III, except four options can be chosen.

spells.name: Phantasms IV
spells.description: As Phantasms II, except three options can be chosen.

spells.name: Waiting Phantasms
spells.description: As Phantasms IV, except it can be delayed as in Waiting Phantasms II.

spells.name: Illusion VII
spells.description: As Illusion III, except six options.

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Waiting Illusion III, except five options can be chosen.

spells.name: Phantasms V
spells.description: As Phantasms II, except four options.

spells.name: Illusion X
spells.description: As Illusion III, except nine options. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Waiting Illusion
spells.description: As Waiting Illusion III, except nine UNIFIED options can be chosen. 

spells.name: Illusion XV
spells.description: As Illusion III, except fourteen options. Spell Law

spells.description: As Phantasms II, except nine options. 117 7.1 - Open Essence PHYSICAL ENHANCEMENT

spells.name: Mannish Scale *
spells.description: Caster can tell the exact mass and/or weight of one object per caster level.

spells.name: Sly Ears
spells.description: Target gains an extremely acute sense of hearing. This results in +50 to Perception rolls involving only hearing, +25 to Perception involving hearing and other senses.

spells.name: Balance *
spells.description: Adds +50 to any rolls for any moving maneuvers performed at a walking pace or less (e.g., walking a 3" beam).

spells.name: Nightvision
spells.description: Target can see up to 100' as if it were daylight, so long as there is some light.

spells.name: Sidevision
spells.description: Target has a 300° field of vision. The flank bonus for attacks against the target is lowered to +5 and the rear bonus is lowered to +15.

spells.name: Sounding III
spells.description: Target’s voice carries three times as far as normal.

spells.name: Watervision
spells.description: Target can see 100' in any water (including murky water) as if through air in daylight.

spells.name: Waterlungs
spells.description: Target can breathe water but not air.

spells.name: Heatvision
spells.description: Target can see varying degrees of heat on ROLEMASTER the surfaces of objects. This spell does not allow the castUNIFIED  er to see “through” things. While this vision is sufficient Spell Law for moving around, it is not sufficient at all for reading or mapping.

spells.name: Gaslungs
spells.description: Target can breathe any gas as normal air. 118

spells.name: Resist Poison *
spells.description: Delays the effect of a poison on a target. If the poison is not eliminated before the spell expires, the poison will affect the target at that time.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: As Nightvision, except any darkness can be seen through. No light at all is needed for this spell to work.

spells.name: Waterears
spells.description: Target can hear normally underwater or in any other medium that distorts sound.

spells.name: Burrowing
spells.description: Target can dig through earth at a rate of 10'/round. Target cannot dig through solid stone or metal.

spells.name: Changing Lungs
spells.description: Target can breathe water, air, and any gas at will.

spells.name: Mass Balance *
spells.description: As Balance, except can affect one target/level of caster.

spells.name: Global Vision
spells.description: Target has a 360° field of vision. The flank bonus for attacks against the target is lowered to zero and the rear bonus is lowered to +5.

spells.name: Mass Nightvision
spells.description: As Nightvision, except affects a number of targets equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Watervision
spells.description: As Watervision, except can affect one target/level of caster.

spells.name: Vision *
spells.description: As Nightvision, Sidevision, Watervision, Heatvision, and Darkvision all functioning at the same time.

spells.name: Mass Waterlungs
spells.description: As Waterlungs, except can affect 1 target/level of caster.

spells.name: Mass Gaslungs
spells.description: As Gaslungs, except can affect 1 target/level of caster.

spells.name: Mass Darkvision
spells.description: As Darkvision, except affects a number of targets equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Changing
spells.description: As Changing Lungs, except can affect 1 target/level of caster.

spells.name: Mass Vision
spells.description: As Vision, except can affect 1 target/level of caster. 7.1 - Open Essence RUNE MASTERY

spells.name: Spell Store
spells.description: Caster may cast this spell with another spell in order to store that second spell. The spell to be stored must be cast within one minute after the Spell Store spell is cast. The stored spell may then be cast later as an instantaneous spell. The Spell Store spell costs the same number of PP as the spell that is stored. No other spell may be cast while a spell is stored.

spells.name: Rune Erasure
spells.description: This spell attempts to remove an existing rune. The rune will resist at its own level, but if the caster knows what the rune is, the rune suffers a -20 penalty to its RR.

spells.name: Rune I
spells.description: This spell inscribes another spell on a specially prepared piece of paper. The rune can then be used to cast the inscribed spell once (although the paper can be reused). The spell to be inscribed must be cast within one minute after the Rune spell is cast. Rune I can only inscribe 1st level spells. The rune can be set to affect the reader. The spell to be inscribed in the rune must be cast with that intent, but the caster of the Rune spell need not be the caster of the spell to be inscribed. The caster of the Rune spell and the caster of the inscribed spell must both touch the Rune Paper, that is to hold the rune.

spells.name: Rune Literacy II
spells.description: Any Runes maneuver made by the caster has a +10 bonus.

spells.name: Runic Lock
spells.description: Any attempt to read the affected rune by someone other than the caster will suffer a penalty of -50 to the Runes maneuver.

spells.name: Rune II
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-2nd level spells.

spells.name: Runic Unlock
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -30] Attempts to remove a Runic Lock from a rune. If this spell fails, the caster must gain a level before he can attempt to unlock this rune again. 7.1 Open

spells.name: Rune III
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-3rd Essence level spells. Lists

spells.name: Rune Literacy V
spells.description: Any Runes maneuver made by the caster has a +25 bonus.

spells.name: Rune V
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-5th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Shock
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] A Sign can be inscribed on any “non-mobile” surface and targets the triggering being. A Sign can be triggered by one of the following (decided by caster): a) certain movements within 20’, b) certain sounds within 20’, c) touch, or d) reading. The Sign is erased when a being fails an RR against it. Sign of Shock puts the target in a state of shock for 1 min/1 failure – treat as if the target is stunned (-50).

spells.name: Rune VI
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-6th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Fear
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Shock, except target will flee the sign’s location for 1 min/5 failure. Note that the target’s RR is made against Essence, not against Fear.

spells.name: Rune VII
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-7th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Sleep
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Shock, except target falls into a sleep from which he cannot be awakened for 10 min/10 failure.

spells.name: Rune VIII
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st8th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Blinding
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Shock, except target is blind for 1 hour/10 failure.

spells.name: Rune IX
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster may inscribe 1st-9th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Paralysis
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Shock, except target is paralyzed and can take no action for 1 hour/10 failure.

spells.name: Rune X
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-10th level spells.

spells.name: Lord Research
spells.description: This spell allows for the random creation of magic items. See Treasure Law Section 5.3.

spells.name: Lord Rune
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st20th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Woe
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Shock, except target takes one C critical of any type specified by the caster ROLEMASTER per 10 failure. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Rune True
spells.description: As Rune I, except it may be used to inSpell Law scribe a spell up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Sign
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As any Sign spell from this list, except that it can affect a number of targets up to the level of the caster before disappearing. 119 7.1 - Open Essence SPELL WALL

spells.name: Protection I
spells.description: Target gains a bonus of +5 to RRs against spells and a bonus of +5 to DB against elemental attacks.

spells.name: Cancel Essence *
spells.description: When the caster of this spell is the target of a spell from the realm of Essence, the “incoming” spell must first make an RR before the caster makes an RR. If the “incoming” spell passes the RR, it may target the caster of this spell normally; otherwise the incoming spell has no effect on this target. Being a “willing target” does not eliminate this effect, but the caster’s own spells do not need to make an RR. Note that the caster is considered to be a target of any spell which includes him in its area of effect or would “detect” him.

spells.name: Protection Sphere I
spells.description: As Protection I, except all beings within 10'R of target (sphere moves with target) get the benefits.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except it affects spells from the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Protection II
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +10.

spells.name: Cancel Channeling
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except it affects spells from the realm of Channeling. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED

spells.name: Protection Sphere II
spells.description: As Protection Sphere I, except  bonuses are +10. Spell Law

spells.name: Cancel Essence
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except for the area of effect (centered on and moving with the caster). Any spell targeting inside the area of effect may be canceled. If the radius encounters an already existing spell, that spell must make an RR (with a +30 modifier) or be neu120 tralized within the sphere (so long as it is within the sphere).

spells.name: Essence Shield
spells.description: Creates a shimmering shield in front of the caster: it provides a bonus to the caster’s RR or DB of 10 against all frontal Essence spell attacks on the caster (force and elemental). If the caster takes an instantaneous action to do so, he can “deflect” one spell attack. This results in adding the caster’s ranks in this list to his RR or, for spells that use an attack table, to his DB (in addition to the basic bonus of 10 for having the Shield). Multiple deflections can be done in a single round, but each is a separate instantaneous action (costing 1 AP for every instantaneous action after the first).

spells.name: Mentalism Shield
spells.description: As Essence Shield, except it is effective only against Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Protection III
spells.description: As Protection I except bonuses are +15.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism
spells.description: As Cancel Essence Sphere I, except it affects spells from the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Channeling Shield
spells.description: As Essence Shield, except it is effective only against Channeling spells.

spells.name: Spell Shield II
spells.description: As Essence Shield, except it is effective against any two of the three realms.

spells.name: Protection IV
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +20.

spells.name: Cancel Channeling
spells.description: As Cancel Essence Sphere I, except it affects spells from the realm of Channeling.

spells.name: Cancel Essence
spells.description: As Cancel Essence Sphere I, except for radius.

spells.name: Spell Shield True
spells.description: As Essence Shield, except it is effective against all three realms.

spells.name: Protection V
spells.description: As Protection I, except bonuses are +25.

spells.name: Essence Resistance
spells.description: Target gets a +50 bonus for all RRs vs. Essence spells.

spells.name: Mentalism Resistance
spells.description: Target gets a +50 bonus for all RRs vs. Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Channeling Resistance
spells.description: Target gets a +50 bonus for all RRs vs. Channeling spells.

spells.name: Cancel Magic Sphere
spells.description: As Cancel Essence Sphere I, except that it affects spells from any realm of magic, and has an enhanced radius.

spells.name: Cancel Magic Sphere
spells.description: As Cancel Magic Sphere II, except for radius.

spells.name: Resistance True
spells.description: As Essence Resistance, except all three realms are affected. 7.1 - Open Essence UNBARRING WAYS

spells.name: Lock *
spells.description: Caster can cause any lock visible within 100' to be locked (the lock is just normally locked and can be opened normally).

spells.name: Magic Lock
spells.description: A door (or container) can be magically “locked”. The door can be broken normally or the spell can be dispelled; otherwise, the door cannot be opened.

spells.name: Locklore
spells.description: Gives the caster a +20 bonus for picking the lock analyzed. If the caster takes a round to explain the lock to someone else, that person gets a +10 bonus to pick the lock.

spells.name: Opening I
spells.description: When cast on a lock there is a 20% chance a normal lock will open, and a 45% chance that a Magic Lock will open (failure means there is a 10% chance of setting off attached traps). Rolls are open-ended, and the quality of the lock may modify the roll (given percentage assumes a “Medium” quality lock).

spells.name: Traplore
spells.description: As Locklore, except applies to disarming traps.

spells.name: Disarm I
spells.description: As Opening I, except its chances concern disarming traps.

spells.name: Jamming
spells.description: Causes a door to expand and jam into its frame (roll 1-100: severity ranges from slightly stuck to unopenable).

spells.name: Weakening
spells.description: Reduces the inherent strength of a door. All attempts to force or break through the door get a +50 bonus; Breakage Rolls for the door are made at -50.

spells.name: Open Prison I
spells.description: As Opening I, except that every lock within the radius of effect has a chance of opening. Roll separately for each lock.

spells.name: Opening II
spells.description: As Opening I, except chances are 40% for normal locks and 90% for a Magic Lock. 7.1 Open

spells.name: Undoor I
spells.description: Will vaporize a non-magical door up to 6" Essence thick, 10' high and 10' wide (if the door is thicker than 6" it will vaporize the closest 6 inches). Lists

spells.name: Disarm II
spells.description: As Opening II, except its chances concern disarming traps. 13, Greater Magic Lock – As Magic Lock, except duration is 1 hr/lvl and the chance that an Opening spell (or Open Prison) will work is reduced by 20%.

spells.name: Greater Magic Lock
spells.description: As Magic Lock, except duration is 1 hr/lvl and the chance that an Opening spell (or Open Prison) will work is reduced by 20%.

spells.name: True Lock
spells.description: As Magic Lock, except door is unbreakable by normal means (lasts 1 hour/level).

spells.name: Undoor II
spells.description: As Undoor I, except door can be up to 20'x20'x2'.

spells.name: Open Prison II
spells.description: As Open Prison I, except chances are 40% for normal locks and 90% for Magic Locks.

spells.name: Undoor III
spells.description: As Undoor I, except door can be up to 50'x50'x3'.

spells.name: Magic Lock True
spells.description: As Magic Lock, except duration is 1 day/level and the chance that an Opening spell (or Open Prison) will work is reduced by 40%.

spells.name: Undoor True
spells.description: As Undoor I, except any single door is vaporized.

spells.name: New Gate
spells.description: A doorway (8'x5') is created in any wall up to 6"/level deep.

spells.name: Lock Mastery
spells.description: Gives the caster a 90% chance of opening a lock. The roll is open-ended and the quality of the lock may modify the roll.

spells.name: Trap Mastery
spells.description: As Lock Mastery, except its chances concern disarming traps.

spells.name: Bypass Traps
spells.description: All traps in the radius of effect have a 95% chance of failing to operate. Once the spell duration is over or the trap is outside the effect radius, the trap will function normally. This does require that the trap have some mechanism involved. A pit trap with a trap door opening will fail, but a pit simply covered over with some branches will still not support any more weight than normal.

spells.name: Open Prison True
spells.description: As Lock Mastery and Trap Mastery, except applies to every lock and trap within the radius of effect.

spells.name: Gate Cleaver
spells.description: Caster can utilize any one of the lower level spells on this list each round. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 121 7.2 - Closed Essence DISPELLING WAYS

spells.name: Cancel Essence *
spells.description: When the caster (of Cancel Essence) is the target of a spell from the Essence realm, the “incoming” spell must first make a successful RR before the caster needs to make an RR. If the “incoming” spell passes the RR, it may target the caster normally; otherwise, the incoming spell has no effect on this target. Being a “willing target” does not eliminate this effect, but the caster’s own spells do not need to make an RR. Note that the caster is considered to be a target of any spell which includes him in its area of effect or would “detect” him.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism *
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except it affects spells from the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Cancel Channeling *
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except it affects spells from the realm of Channeling.

spells.name: Dispel Essence I
spells.description: Any active spell from the realm of ROLEMASTER Essence that is on the target must make an RR. If the spell UNIFIED fails its RR, it is dispelled.  Spell Law

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism I
spells.description: As Dispel Essence, except affects spells of the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling I
spells.description: As Dispel Essence, except affects spells of the realm of Channeling. 122

spells.name: Dispel Essence Sphere
spells.description: Any active spell from the realm of Essence that is (at least partly) within the radius of effect must make an RR. If the spell fails its RR, it is dispelled.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism
spells.description: As Dispel Essence Sphere I, except affects spells of the realm of Mentalism.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling

spells.name: Cancel True *
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, except affects spells from any realm.

spells.name: Dispel Essence Sphere
spells.description: As Dispel Essence Sphere I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism
spells.description: As Dispel Mentalism Sphere I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling
spells.description: As Dispel Channeling Sphere I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Unessence
spells.description: Target has no Essence Power Points and can cast no Essence spells for 24 hours (includes spells cast using power enhancers). This can also be cast against items that could normally cast spells.

spells.name: Unmentalism
spells.description: As Unessence, except Mentalism is affected.

spells.name: Unchanneling
spells.description: As Unessence, except Channeling is affected.

spells.name: Dispel Essence Sphere
spells.description: As Dispel Essence Sphere I, except radius is 300'.

spells.name: Dispel Mentalism
spells.description: As Dispel Mentalism Sphere I, except radius is 300'.

spells.name: Dispel Channeling
spells.description: As Dispel Channeling Sphere I, except radius is 300'.

spells.name: Dispel Sphere True
spells.description: As Dispel Essence Sphere V, except all 3 realms are affected.

spells.name: Dispel Sphere True
spells.description: As Dispel Sphere True V, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Dispel Sphere True
spells.description: As Dispel Sphere True V, except radius is 200'. 7.2 - Closed Essence FLUID ELEMENTS

spells.name: Whispering Wind
spells.description: Caster can whisper and the air will carry his words to one person within range.

spells.name: Path of Calm *
spells.description: A missile within 10' of the caster is given calm air around it throughout its flight, allowing it to ignore all penalties due to wind, including magical air movement (e.g., an Airwall).

spells.name: Fog Making
spells.description: Creates a dense fog within the area of effect. Treat as a heavy fog as described in RMCL Section 15.7.

spells.name: Airwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of dense churning air up to 10'x10'x3'. This wall requires 1 AP to cross, the pace of anyone moving through it at more than a Walk comes out with his pace reduced by one (e.g, a Run going in would be a Jog coming out), and attacks through the wall suffer a -50 penalty.

spells.name: Waterwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of water up to 10'x10'x1'. This wall requires 2 AP to cross, the pace of anyone moving through it at more than a Walk comes out with his pace reduced by two (e.g, a Run going in would be a Walk pace coming out) to a minimum of a Walk, and attacks through the wall suffer a -80 penalty.

spells.name: Guiding Wind I
spells.description: A missile launched from within 10' of the caster is aided by a wind that leads it towards its intended target. This provides a +10 bonus to the missile attack. This cannot be combined with Path of Calm.

spells.name: Unfog
spells.description: Disperses fog within the area of effect. If not all of a fog is dispersed (i.e., the fog covers a greater area than the area of effect for this spell), the fog will refill the area of effect, reducing the cleared radius by 10' every 1-5 minutes (varying depending on the heaviness of the fog and ambient humidity).

spells.name: Water Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of water is shot from the caster’s palm; 7.2 Closed results are determined on the Water Bolt Table. Essence

spells.name: Quench
spells.description: Target’s fluids are immediately replenished, eliminatLists ing any dehydration that the target may have been suffering. This spell also meets the target’s water needs for the next 24 hours, not including losses directly due to magic (i.e., it will not defend against a Dessication spell, but will cure its effects if cast after).

spells.name: Vacuum I
spells.description: Creates a 5' radius of near vacuum; all within the radius take a B Impact critical as the air leaves and rushes back in (if they fail an RR).

spells.name: Guiding Wind II
spells.description: As Guiding Wind I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Waterwall True
spells.description: As Waterwall, except caster need not concentrate and the duration is 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Calm Water
spells.description: All water within a 100'R is calmed; waves are cut by 20' in the center and less towards the perimeter. This will negate the effects of currents in the area of effect.

spells.name: Purify Fluid
spells.description: By concentrating, the caster can convert a liquid that is mostly water into pure water or a gas that is mainly breathable air into fresh air. If purifying a liquid, the caster can purity a cubic foot per round of concentration. If purifying a gas, the caster can purify 10' cubed (i.e., 1000 cubic feet) each round. The purification has a permanent effect; the duration of Concentration is purely a matter of continuing purification.

spells.name: Water Bolt III
spells.description: As Water Bolt I, except range increment is 75'.

spells.name: Vacuum II
spells.description: As Vacuum I, except radius is 10'.

spells.name: Guiding Wind III
spells.description: As Guiding Wind I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: Wind Control
spells.description: Caster can control the speed and direction of the wind. Caster can increase or decrease wind speed by 1 mph per caster level (e.g., if the wind speed is normally 20 mph, a 15th level caster could alter the wind speed to between 5 and 35 mph). By directing the wind against missile attacks the caster can cause a -1 modification for each mph of wind speed. Note that caster can also control the direction of the flow of gases and/or clouds.

spells.name: Water Bolt V
spells.description: As Water Bolt I, except range increment is 125'.

spells.name: Vacuum III
spells.description: As Vacuum I, except radius is 15'.

spells.name: Guiding Wind
spells.description: As Guiding Wind I, except bonus is +50 and any range penalties are halved.

spells.name: Command Current
spells.description: The area of effect for this spell is the water immediately surrounding the boat that the caster is on (where “boat” should be interpreted loosely; a log is a “boat” for purposes of this spell if the caster is riding it on water). For as long as the caster concentrates, the speed of the boat will be increased by 25' per round (approximately 3 miles per hour).

spells.name: Whirlpool
spells.description: Creates a whirlpool with a 50 foot radius in any liquid body that will draw in any objects in the liquid up to 500' ROLEMASTER away. Objects capable of moving under their own power may UNIFIED  make a Very Hard Swimming maneuver to resist the pull of the Spell Law whirlpool.

spells.name: Vacuum VI
spells.description: As Vacuum I, except radius is 30'.

spells.name: Summon Storm
spells.description: Summons forces of nature in a fierce thunderstorm which includes heavy rain, 25-60 mph winds, lightning (random) and a blizzard (if correct climate). Can be delayed up to 123 1 hour/level after casting. 7.2 - Closed Essence GATE MASTERY

spells.name: Familiar
spells.description: The caster can attune himself to a small creature of animal intelligence (i.e., with the Animalistic flaw) to serve as his familiar. The caster must obtain the creature (which can be no more than 10% of caster’s own mass) through normal means and cast the spell on the animal daily for 1 week (associating with the animal for 2 hours each day). The caster can then control the familiar and view the world through its senses by concentrating on it (must be within 50' per caster level). If the animal is killed, the caster will have a -25 modification to all actions for 2 weeks.

spells.name: Summons I
spells.description: Caster can instantly summon a first level non-intelligent (i.e., possessing the Animalistic or Mindless flaw) living creature, which appears somewhere within the spell’s range. The caster can specify the general type of creature, but exactly what the ROLEMASTER creature is should be determined randomly (e.g., the caster could UNIFIED specify “four-legged, hoofed” and could get a zebra, horse, camel,  etc.). If the creature can understand the caster’s communication, Spell Law the creature can be controlled by normal communication. Otherwise, control is maintained through concentration of the caster. If the creature summoned is used for a task that is not dangerous (in its own perception), the duration for this spell is 10 minutes per level. However, if the creature is ever put into a dangerous situa124 tion, the duration immediately drops to 1 round per level. At the end of the spell’s duration, the summoned creature will disappear back whence it came.

spells.name: Familiar's Bond
spells.description: While this spell is active, any spell targeting the caster (including “self” spells) for which the caster is a willing target will also affect the familiar. Note that a familiar may not benefit from every possible spell (e.g., even though familiars tend to be smarter than normal for their kind, a familiar would not know what to do with the benefits of Fire Mastery).

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: [RR Mod.: Special, see text] By concentrating, the caster can control one Grade I elemental. If this spell fails, the elemental will act normally unless it is a spell-caster, in which case it will become hostile (i.e., only a spell-casting elemental will recognize a control attempt as a hostile act). If the caster of this spell knows the Magician Base list corresponding to the elemental’s element, then the caster’s ranks in that list are subtracted from the RR. If the caster knows the Closed Essence elemental list corresponding to the elemental’s element (e.g. Fluid Elements for Water or Air elements), then the subtraction is half the number of the caster’s ranks in that list. Once free of control, the elemental will be hostile to the caster if the elemental was placed in danger. A controlled elemental may be commanded to return to its origin; this will take the elemental two rounds. Thus, this spell doubles as a means of banishing elementals.

spells.name: Summons II
spells.description: As Summons I, except the caster chooses one of the following options: a) the level of the summoned creature is increased by one, b) an extra 1st level creature can be summoned, or c) the duration can be doubled. When applying options to the higher level Summons spells, option “a” can only be applied to one creature at a time (i.e., two 2nd level creatures takes three options: one for the second creature and one each to raise the creatures to 2nd level).

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: Allows the caster to summon a Grade I elemental. This elemental will appear over the course of two rounds. If uncontrolled after those two rounds are complete, it will act normally according to its nature. Uncontrolled elementals can return to their place of origin at any time, taking two rounds to do so. If the elemental is in a region that is particularly suitable for it (e.g., an Ice elemental summoned to a glacier), it will not return for 1d10 days. If the region is not particularly suitable for it (e.g., an Ice elemental summoned to a temperate forest), it will stay for 1d10 hours. If the region is unsuitable for the elemental (e.g., an Ice elemental summoned to a desert), it will stay for 1d10 minutes. This is normal behavior and if a method of communication exists, or if there is an obvious motive to act otherwise, behavior may vary.

spells.name: Summons III
spells.description: As Summons II, except two options can be chosen.

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: As Elemental Control I, except that a Grade I or II elemental can be controlled.

spells.name: Summons V
spells.description: As Summons III, except four options can be chosen.

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: As Elemental Summons I, except a Grade I or II elemental can be summoned.

spells.name: Summons X
spells.description: As Summons III, except 9 options can be chosen.

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: As Elemental Control I, except that a Grade I-III elemental can be controlled.

spells.name: Familiar True
spells.description: As Familiar, except that there is no limit on the mass of the familiar, and the caster suffers a -50 penalty for two weeks if the familiar is killed.

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: As Elemental Summons I, except an elemental of Grade III or lower can be summoned.

spells.name: Waiting Summons
spells.description: As Summons X, except it can be delayed up to 1 day/level or until triggered by one of the following (decided by the caster at the time of casting): specified movements, sounds, touch, or actions. Trigger must be such as the caster would be able to sense it if still at the location of the spell effect. At the time of casting, the caster may specify a single task for the creature(s) to perform when it/they arrive(s).

spells.name: Lord Summons
spells.description: As Summons III, except 19 options can be chosen.

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: As Elemental Control I, except that Grade I-IV elemental can be controlled.

spells.name: Lesser Elemental Mastery *
spells.description: Cast on a Grade I, II, or III elemental that the caster currently controls (through an Elemental Control spell), this spell places the elemental under the caster’s permanent control. By concentrating, the caster can issue orders to mastered elementals, which will continue to follow an order without the caster’s concentration. A mastered elemental receives a +40 to all RRs against attempts to control it by a different caster. However, any elemental will become hostile if this spell is cast on it and the spell does not succeed (and the elemental is no longer under the caster’s control and has a +40 bonus to resist new controls). A mastered elemental can be sent away by its master the same way as a controlled elemental; this banishment terminates the Mastery spell. A caster can never have more levels of elementals mastered than his number of ranks in this list (e.g., caster with 20 ranks in Gate Mastery may be Master of 10 level 2 elementals or 5 level 4 elementals or 2 level 6 elementals and level 2 elementals or some other combination whose total levels do not exceed 20). The range given is only for initial mastery; once mastery is achieved, the caster and the mastered elemental may part without breaking the bond.

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: As Elemental Summons I, except an elemental of Grade IV or lower can be summoned.

spells.name: Mass Summons
spells.description: As Summons III, except one option per caster level is chosen.

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: As Elemental Control I, except that Grade I-V elemental can be controlled.

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: As Elemental Summons I, except an elemental of Grade V or lower can be summoned.

spells.name: Elemental Control
spells.description: As Elemental Control I, except that Grade I-VI elemental can be controlled.

spells.name: Elemental Summons
spells.description: As Elemental Summons I, except an elemental of Grade VI or lower can be summoned.

spells.name: Greater Elemental Mastery *
spells.description: As Lesser Elemental Mastery, except Grade I through VI elementals can be mastered. 7.2 Closed Essence Lists a in a 4 a a ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 125 7.2 - Closed Essence INVISIBLE WAYS

spells.name: Transparency
spells.description: A single inanimate object is made nearly invisible, allowing it to be seen through. Object cannot be larger than 10'x10'x3'.

spells.name: Unseen I
spells.description: A single object is made invisible (1 garment, 1 naked body, etc.); until 24 hrs pass or the object is struck by a violent blow (being hit by a weapon, falling, etc.) or the object makes a violent move (i.e., an attack) or casts a spell of type E or F.

spells.name: Lingering Transparency
spells.description: As Transparency, except duration is one minute/level.

spells.name: Invisibility I
spells.description: As Unseen I, except everything within 1' of the target is invisible as long as it is within the 1'R and none of the Unseen I termination conditions occur.

spells.name: Long Unseen I
spells.description: As Unseen I, except range is 100'.

spells.name: Invisibility II
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except the caster can vary the radius up to 1'. This makes the invisible target harder to see by reducing the “fringe effect”.

spells.name: Unseen Blow *
spells.description: One melee attack (armed or unarmed) is covered by a moment of invisibility. Unless the target of that attack has the power to see the invisible, the target’s parry is subject to a -100 penalty (down to a minimum of 0 parry DB). ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Invisibility Sphere
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except the constant radius is UNIFIED 10'. Note that anything that exits the radius will become visible again. 

spells.name: See Invisible I
spells.description: Caster can see all invisible things anywhere that he Spell Law can normally see. In addition, he suffers no penalties against invisible targets (as they are not invisible to him).

spells.name: Unseen III
spells.description: As Unseen I, except 3 objects can be affected.

spells.name: Invisibility Sphere
spells.description: As Invisibility Sphere I, except caster can vary the radius up to 10', determined at time of casting. 126

spells.name: Long Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except range is 100'.

spells.name: Unseen V
spells.description: As Unseen I, except 5 objects can be affected.

spells.name: Long Unseen III
spells.description: As Unseen III, except range is 100'.

spells.name: Split Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I except two targets can be the center of two separate radii of invisibility.

spells.name: See Invisible II
spells.description: As See Invisible I, except it allows a target to see invisible things.

spells.name: Unseen X
spells.description: As Unseen I, except 10 objects can be affected.

spells.name: Split Invisibility
spells.description: As Split Invisibility, except the caster can vary the two radii by up to 10'.

spells.name: Unseen Weapon
spells.description: As Unseen Blow, except affects all melee attacks by the target during the spell’s duration.

spells.name: Invisibility Sphere
spells.description: As Invisibility Sphere II, except caster can vary the radius by up to 20'.

spells.name: Mass Unseen
spells.description: As Unseen I, except as many objects as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be the centers of constant 1' radii of invisibility.

spells.name: Mass Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility II, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be the centers of variable radii of invisibility.

spells.name: Mass See Invisible
spells.description: As See Invisible II, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be given the power to see invisible objects.

spells.name: True Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except the caster can vary the radius of invisibility up to 1' and if the caster attacks he is only visible for the 5 seconds immediately following the attack (two instances). Likewise, he may cast a type E or F spell and become visible for the following 5 seconds. Violent blows do not affect this spell. 7.2 - Closed Essence LIVING CHANGE

spells.name: Change Lore
spells.description: Allows caster to analyze the form of another being for future use with Exact Change or Change Self Exact. The caster can only have as many forms analyzed as he has ranks in this list. Caster may choose to forget a form at any time to make room for replacements.

spells.name: Beautify
spells.description: Caster enhances the target’s appearance. The target still looks like himself or herself, but in an idealized way, such as seen in a flattering portrait.

spells.name: Resize Self
spells.description: Allows caster to grow or shrink within the limits of his Size category.

spells.name: Changing to Kind
spells.description: Alters the caster’s entire body to the form of another humanoid race. The form cannot be that of a particular individual form. For example, a human caster could take the form of a Dwarf, but not the Dwarven High Chancellor. Only the physical form is gained (e.g., a target who becomes a Dwarf would not receive the Dwarves’ ability to see in the dark). This spell does not allow the caster to change his Size category, but size may be changed as desired within that limit.

spells.name: Resize Self True
spells.description: As Resize Self, except that non-magical organic objects held or carried by the caster will change size in the same proportion as does the caster.

spells.name: Change to Kind
spells.description: As Changing to Kind, except target to be changed need not be the caster.

spells.name: Change Self
spells.description: As Changing to Kind, except alteration can be to any organic form within the caster’s Size category. No special abilities of the form are gained. 7.2 Closed

spells.name: Resize
spells.description: Allows caster to grow or shrink the target within the Essence limits of the target’s Size category. Lists

spells.name: Change Self True
spells.description: As Change Self, except that non-magical organic objects held or carried by the caster will refit to the caster’s new form or merge into his body for the duration, depend on whether the item can readily be adapted to the new form.

spells.name: Change Self Exact
spells.description: As Change Self, except altered form can be that of a specific being analyzed by Change Lore.

spells.name: Change
spells.description: As Change to Kind, except alteration can be to any organic form within the target’s Size category. No special abilities of the form are gained.

spells.name: Shrink Self
spells.description: Caster can shrink down to within the limits of one Size category smaller than his own.

spells.name: Exact Change
spells.description: As Change, except altered form can be that of a specific being analyzed by Change Lore.

spells.name: Enlarge Self
spells.description: Caster can grow to within the limits of one Size category larger than his own.

spells.name: Changing Self
spells.description: As Change Self Exact, except caster may assume a different form anytime during the spell, by concentrating for one round/change.

spells.name: Shrink
spells.description: Target can shrink down to within the limits of one Size category smaller than his own.

spells.name: Merging
spells.description: Target can merge into any solid, inanimate material. While merged, target cannot move, perceive, or cast spells. When the target emerges from the material, it is possible to emerge from any side or face of the material, although this is limited to moving “through” no more than the target’s own body size plus two feet worth of material. The target can exit at any time up to the end of spell duration (at which time the target automatically emerges at the entrance point).

spells.name: Changing
spells.description: As Exact Change, except target may assume a different form anytime during the spell, by concentrating for one round/change.

spells.name: Enlarge
spells.description: Target can grow to within the limits of one Size category larger than his own.

spells.name: Passing
spells.description: Target may pass through any inanimate material up to 1 foot/level. It takes 1 round to pass through 2 feet of material.

spells.name: Mass Resize
spells.description: As Resize, except it simultaneously enlarges or shrinks as many targets (can be beings or objects) as the caster’s level. All targets must change size by the same percentage amount.

spells.name: Mass Change
spells.description: As Change, except affects up to the caster’s level in targets (all targets must take the same type of form).

spells.name: Greater Size Change
spells.description: Target can shrink or grow within the limits of two Size categories above or below his own.

spells.name: Mass Merging
spells.description: As Merging, except affects up to the caster’s ROLEMASTER level in targets; all targets exit after a set time or with caster. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Mass Passing
spells.description: As Passing, except affects up to the caster’s Spell Law level in targets. 127 7.2 - Closed Essence LOFTY BRIDGE

spells.name: Leaping *
spells.description: Allows the target to make one leap up to 50' laterally or 20' vertically (as a separate 1 AP action, with no Pace penalty for the leaping movement) in the round that the spell was cast.

spells.name: Landing *
spells.description: This spell is cast on a target who is falling and takes effect immediately, allowing the target to land safely in a fall up to 20' per level of the caster and to take that distance off the severity of any longer fall.

spells.name: Leaving I
spells.description: Caster teleports target to a point up to 100' away, but there can be no intervening “barriers” in a direct line between the target and the point. A “barrier” is anything the target could not physically go through; a closed door is a barrier, a pit is not.

spells.name: Levitation
spells.description: Allows target to move up and down vertically 10' per round. This spell does not confer any ability to control horiROLEMASTER zontal movement, which must be accomplished by other means. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Fly I
spells.description: Allows target to fly at a rate of up to 35'/round (apSpell Law proximately 5 mph). This spell allows free movement in all three dimensions and allows hovering.

spells.name: Portal
spells.description: Opens a portal 3'x6'x3' in any solid surface, through which anyone can pass. At the end of the duration, the surface is returned to its previous state. Anyone in the area of effect when the spell ends will be forced back out to the point of entry. 128

spells.name: Fly II
spells.description: As Fly I, except maximum rate is 75'/round (approximately 10 mph).

spells.name: Long Door I
spells.description: As Leaving I, except target can pass through barriers by specifying exact distances. If the arrival point coincides with solid material, the target does not move, instead being stunned (-50) 1-10 rounds, and the PP for this spell are expended.

spells.name: Leaving III
spells.description: As Leaving I, except target can be moved 300'.

spells.name: Teleport I
spells.description: As Long Door I, except movement range is 10 miles per level. Making a precise appearance is difficult, especially if unfamiliar with the destination. The following chances for error exist: Never seen place (only described) = 50%; been briefly (1 hr) = 25%; Studied (24 hr) = 10%; Studied carefully (1 week) = 1%; Lived in (1 yr) = .01 %. In case of failure: first determine direction of error (randomly), then determine amount of error (make an open-ended d100 roll for the number of feet).

spells.name: Fly III
spells.description: As Fly I, except rate is 150'/round (approximately 20 mph).

spells.name: Long Door III
spells.description: As Long Door I, except movement range is 300'.

spells.name: Teleport III
spells.description: As Teleport I, except up to 3 targets may be moved to same place.

spells.name: Portal True
spells.description: As Portal, except portal is 3'x6' and up to 5'/ level deep.

spells.name: Long Door V
spells.description: As Long Door I, except movement range is 500'.

spells.name: Teleport V
spells.description: As Teleport III, except 5 targets may be moved.

spells.name: Fly True
spells.description: As Fly I, except rate is 225'/round (approximately 30 mph).
