spells.name: Teleport X
spells.description: As Teleport III, except 10 targets may be moved.

spells.name: Mass Leaving
spells.description: As Leaving I, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be moved.

spells.name: Lord Teleport
spells.description: As Teleport III, except 20 targets can be moved.

spells.name: Mass Long Door
spells.description: As Long Door III, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be moved up to 300'.

spells.name: Mass Teleport
spells.description: As Teleport III, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be moved.

spells.name: Mass Fly
spells.description: As Fly III, except as many targets as the caster’s level may fly at 150' per round.

spells.name: Mass Fly True
spells.description: As Fly True, except as many targets as the caster’s level may fly at 225' per round.

spells.name: Teleport True
spells.description: As Teleport I, except with no movement range limit. 7.2 - Closed Essence LUMINOUS ELEMENTS

spells.name: Light Analysis
spells.description: Gives nature and origin of natural light, and when and how magical light (including visual illusions, if the caster knows it is an illusion) was created (list and specific spell).

spells.name: Projected Light
spells.description: Beam of light (like a flashlight) springs from the caster’s palm; it has a 50' effective range. If the caster’s hand is closed into a fist, the light will “turn off”. If the caster’s fist is reopened before the end of the duration, the light will turn on again.

spells.name: Woodfires
spells.description: Causes any wood to ignite and burn. All wood ignited must be within 1' of caster’s palm.

spells.name: Light I
spells.description: Lights a 10'R area about the point touched. This spell may be cast onto a target as explained in Section 10.17.

spells.name: Extinguish Fire
spells.description: Causes all non-magical flames in a 5'R to die down and cools the area to where it will not reignite on its own.

spells.name: Shock Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of intense, charged light is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Lightning Bolt attack table, as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Flaming Blade
spells.description: Target weapon, which must remain in the caster’s possession or the spell is cancelled, bursts into magical flame. Neither weapon nor wielder is harmed, but any time the weapon delivers a critical an additional Heat critical with a severity one less than the regular critical (e.g., a ‘C’ crit produces an additional ‘B’ Heat crit) is also inflicted.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: Creates an opaque wall of fire (up to 10'x10'x6"). Anyone passing through it takes an A Heat critical (no RR).

spells.name: Light V
spells.description: As Light I, except radius can be up to 50' (can be changed by concentrating 1 round).

spells.name: Shocking Blade
spells.description: Target weapon, which must remain in the caster’s possession or the spell is cancelled, crackles with electical arcs. Neither weapon nor wielder is harmed, but any time the weapon delivers a critical an additional Electricity critical of equal severity is also inflicted.

spells.name: Shock Bolt III
spells.description: As Shock Bolt I, except range increment is 7.2 Closed 75'. Essence

spells.name: Fire Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of fire is shot from the palm of the caster; Lists results are determined on the Fire Bolt Table.

spells.name: Light X
spells.description: As Light I, except radius can be up to 100' (can be changed by concentrating 1 round).

spells.name: Great Wall of Fire
spells.description: As Wall of Fire, except it is up to 30' long and does a B Heat critical.

spells.name: Fire Ball
spells.description: A 1' diameter ball of fire is shot from the palm of the caster. Upon reaching the selected target/location, it expands to affect a 10'R area. Resolve attack on the Fire Ball Table.

spells.name: Shock Bolt V
spells.description: As Shock Bolt I, except range increment is 125'.

spells.name: Light XV
spells.description: As Light I, except radius can be up to 150' (can be changed by concentrating 1 round).

spells.name: Beacon III
spells.description: Ray of light of any color springs from caster’s palm; can be up to 3 miles long.

spells.name: Utterlight
spells.description: Nullifies all magically created darkness in a 100'R, and lights that area as full daylight. This spell may be cast onto a target, as explained in Section 10.17.

spells.name: Fire Bolt V
spells.description: As Fire Bolt I, except range increment is 125'.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of lightning is shot from the caster’s palm; the results are determined on the Lighting Bolt Table as a Medium-sized attack.

spells.name: Mass Flaming
spells.description: As Flaming Blade, except can affect 1 target/level of caster and each weapon functions while held by the person holding it when the spell is cast.

spells.name: Mass Shocking
spells.description: As Shocking Blade, except can affect 1 target/level of caster and each weapon functions while held by the person holding it when the spell is cast.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt III
spells.description: As Lightning Bolt I, except range increment is 75'.

spells.name: Utterlight True
spells.description: As Utterlight, except that duration is 10 minutes per level and the radius illuminated is 10' per level. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 129 7.2 - Closed Essence RAPID WAYS

spells.name: Ready Weapon *
spells.description: Caster draws or changes weapon “instantly” (i.e., without expending AP; the action is included as part of this spell). This includes readying ammunition, but not long actions like readying a crossbow.

spells.name: Rapid Steps *
spells.description: Target gains a +20 bonus to any Movement maneuver done at a Jog (x2) pace or faster. If no Movement maneuver is required, the pace penalty can be reduced by 20 for any simultaneous action.

spells.name: Speed I
spells.description: Target gains an additional 1 AP to use each round this spell is in effect (i.e., target normally gets 5 AP to use during the round).

spells.name: Swiftness I
spells.description: Target gains a +5 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Instant Spell Prep
spells.description: The round in which this spell is cast counts as a round of spell preparation for the caster.

spells.name: Haste I
spells.description: Target gains an additional 1 AP to use each round this spell is in effect (i.e., target normally gets 5 AP to use during the round).

spells.name: Swiftness II
spells.description: Target gains a +10 bonus to initiative rolls.

spells.name: Fast Casting I
spells.description: Caster requires 2-3 AP to cast a spell (i.e., he may cast a spell taking 3 AP at no penalty or taking 2 AP at a -25 penalty).

spells.name: Mass Speed I
spells.description: As Speed I, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Swiftness III
spells.description: Target gains a +15 bonus to initiative UNIFIED rolls. 

spells.name: Speed II
spells.description: As Speed I, except target gains an additional Spell Law 2 AP.

spells.name: Mass Swiftness I
spells.description: As Swiftness I, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Swiftness IV
spells.description: Target gains a +20 bonus to initiative 130 rolls.

spells.name: Fast Casting II
spells.description: Caster requires 2 AP to cast a spell (i.e., he casts taking 2 AP at no penalty).

spells.name: Haste II
spells.description: As Haste I, except target gains an additional 2 AP.

spells.name: Mass Speed II
spells.description: As Speed II, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Speed III
spells.description: As Speed I, except target gains an additional 3 AP.

spells.name: Mass Haste I
spells.description: As Haste I, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Swiftness II
spells.description: As Swiftness II, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Haste III
spells.description: As Haste I, except target gains an additional 3 AP.

spells.name: Mass Swiftness III
spells.description: As Swiftness III, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Speed IV
spells.description: As Speed I, except target gains an additional 4 AP.

spells.name: Mass Haste II
spells.description: As Haste II, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Speed IV
spells.description: As Speed IV, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Haste IV
spells.description: As Haste I, except target gains an additional 4 AP. 7.2 - Closed Essence SHIELD MASTERY

spells.name: Enchanted Shield
spells.description: Gives a +10 magical bonus to a non-magical shield, enhancing the wielder’s Shield skill.

spells.name: Shield *
spells.description: Creates an invisible force shield in front of the caster; it subtracts 25 from up to 3 attacks per round from the caster’s front. This does not occupy a hand, but is not usable with a physical shield (nor does it benefit from the Shield skill).

spells.name: Blur *
spells.description: Causes target to appear blurred to attackers, granting a +10 to the target’s DB.

spells.name: Enchanted Clothes
spells.description: Caster temporarily enchants one non-magical set of clothes (not armor) to confer a +10 DB. Wearer must be at his natural AT to gain the bonus.

spells.name: Deflections I *
spells.description: Caster can deflect any one missile that the caster can see and which passes within the 100' range of this spell; this causes 50 to be subtracted from the missile’s attack.

spells.name: Enchanted Organic
spells.description: Caster temporarily enchants one non-magical organic armor to confer a +10 DB. Wearer’s AT must come from this armor to gain the bonus.

spells.name: Bladeturn I *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except its effect is against 1 melee attack.

spells.name: Mass Enchanted
spells.description: As Enchanted Shield, accept range is 50' and one shield per caster’s level can be enchanted.

spells.name: Deflections II *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except 2 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Aim Untrue I *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except missile automatically misses.

spells.name: Bladeturn II *
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except 2 melee attacks may be affected.

spells.name: Enchanted Inorganic
spells.description: Caster temporarily enchants one non-magical inorganic (usually metal) armor to confer a +10 DB. Wearer’s AT must come from this armor to gain the bonus.

spells.name: Deflections III *
spells.description: As Deflections I, except 3 missiles may be affected. 7.2 Closed

spells.name: Greater Shield *
spells.description: As Shield, except bonus is 40 against up to Essence 4 attacks per round and duration is 10 minutes per level. Lists

spells.name: Aim Untrue II *
spells.description: As Aim Untrue I, except 2 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Blur *
spells.description: As Blur, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Bladeturn III *
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except 3 melee attacks may be affected.

spells.name: Re-aiming *
spells.description: One missile passing within 100' of caster is reversed and makes an attack on its source (use caster’s ranks in this list as OB, no DB except from magic or armor material bonus).

spells.name: Aim Untrue III *
spells.description: As Aim Untrue I, except 3 missiles may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Deflections
spells.description: As Deflections I, except as many missiles as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Bladeturn
spells.description: As Bladeturn I, except as many melee attacks as the caster’s level may be affected.

spells.name: Mass Aim Untrue
spells.description: As Mass Deflections, except missiles automatically miss.

spells.name: Mass Defenses *
spells.description: As Mass Deflections or Mass Bladeturn, except caster may mix defending against melee or missile attacks, to a combined total up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Mass Armoring
spells.description: As Enchanted Shield, Enchanted Clothes, Enchanted Organic, and/or Enchanted Inorganic except as many targets as the caster’s level may be affected. An individual may have both clothing/armor and shield enchanted for double protection, although this counts as two targets.

spells.name: Re-aiming True
spells.description: As Re-aiming, except the caster may reverse any number of missiles passing within 100'. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 131 7.2 - Closed Essence SOLID ELEMENTS

spells.name: Bake Clay
spells.description: Caster transforms up to one cubic foot per level of clay into baked pottery. Firing clay in this manner will always be successful. This can also cook glazes onto earthenware. Quality of product depends on the skill of whomever shapes the clay.

spells.name: Block of Ice
spells.description: Creates a cube of ice, 1' along each edge. It can be formed around an inanimate object, so long as that object cannot resist or fails its RR.

spells.name: Sculpting I
spells.description: Caster may add +15 to all maneuvers to work ice or stone.

spells.name: Freeze Liquid
spells.description: The caster may decrease the temperature of any inanimate body of liquid of up to 1 cubic foot per level by 50°F [28°C] per round of concentration. Once the liquid freezes, it will not continue to grow colder, but will begin to warm naturally if the caster stops concentrating. Caster is immune to the cold thus generated.

spells.name: Strengthen Solid
spells.description: A single inanimate solid object of no more than 1 pound/level weight is made stronger. It will take only half as many hits if damaged and if checked for breakage, it receives a +50 bonus to its roll. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Earthwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of packed earth up to 10'x10'x UNIFIED (3' at base, 1' at top); it can be dug through only (20 man-  rounds at top). Spell Law

spells.name: Cracks Call
spells.description: Any previous cracks or flaws in material up to 10'x10'x10' section will extend to their limit.

spells.name: Sculpting II
spells.description: Caster may add +30 to all maneuvers to work ice or stone. 132

spells.name: Stonewall
spells.description: Creates a wall of non-precious stone up to 10'x10'x1'; it can be chipped through or toppled if not against a wall.

spells.name: Ice Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of ice is shot from the palm of the caster. Results are resolved on the Ice Bolt Table.

spells.name: Frosty Blade
spells.description: Target weapon, which must remain in the caster’s possession or the spell is cancelled, glitters with frost. Neither weapon nor wielder is harmed, but any time the weapon delivers a critical an additional Cold critical of equal severity is also inflicted.

spells.name: Icewall I
spells.description: Creates a wall of ice up to 10'x10'x (2' at base, 1' at top); it can be melted through or chipped through or toppled if not against a wall.

spells.name: Earthwall True
spells.description: As Earthwall, except duration is permanent.

spells.name: Sculpting III
spells.description: Caster may add +45 to all maneuvers to work ice or stone.

spells.name: Icewall II
spells.description: As Icewall I, except size is up to 20'x20'x (4' at base, 2' at top).

spells.name: Ice Bolt III
spells.description: As Ice Bolt I, except range increment is 75'.

spells.name: Stonewall True
spells.description: As Stonewall, except duration is permanent and dimensions may be up to 20'x20'x1'.

spells.name: Cold Metal
spells.description: Chills metal to the point that it becomes extremely brittle (1 object only), giving it a -50 penalty to its strength and the object will be subject to a breakage check if it strikes another object or is struck. Anyone in direct skin-to-metal contact with the chilled metal will take a B Cold Critical each round contact is maintained.

spells.name: Sculpting IV
spells.description: Caster may add +60 to all maneuvers to work ice or stone.

spells.name: Ice Bolt V
spells.description: As Ice Bolt I, except range increment is 125'.

spells.name: Sculpting True
spells.description: Caster may add +75 to all maneuvers to work ice or stone.

spells.name: Unstone
spells.description: Disintegrates 100 cubic feet of stone.

spells.name: Unmetal
spells.description: Disintegrates 1 cubic foot of metal.

spells.name: Bronzewall True
spells.description: Creates a wall of bronze up to 20'x10'x (4' at base, 2' at top).

spells.name: Ice Bolt Barrage
spells.description: Caster can hurl an Ice Bolt (as Ice Bolt V) each round (as an instantaneous action) for up to one round for every five levels of the caster. 7.2 - Closed Essence SPELL ENHANCEMENT

spells.name: Spell Control*
spells.description: Caster adds +25 to his next Spell Mastery maneuver within 1 minute of casting this spell.

spells.name: Extension II
spells.description: Causes the caster’s next spell cast within 1 minute to have double the normal duration. This is not cumulative with any other Extension spell. Only spells with a defined duration can have their duration changed with an Extension spell. This does not include spells with a duration of concentration (C) or —.

spells.name: Enhance Skill *
spells.description: The caster’s next spell (cast within 1 minute of this spell) gains a +25 bonus to the spell-casting roll and to any associated Spell Mastery maneuver.

spells.name: Lesser Ranging
spells.description: Causes the caster’s next spell cast within 1 minute to have its range increased by 50'. This is not cumulative with any other Ranging spell. Only spells with a range greater than touch/self can have their range extended with a Ranging spell. For spells with a range increment (directed spells), divide the increase by 5 to get the change to the increment (e.g., for Lesser Ranging, the increase to a range increment would be 10').

spells.name: Extension III
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is three times normal.

spells.name: Instant Lesser
spells.description: As Lesser Ranging, except casting time is instantaneous.

spells.name: Increased Radius I
spells.description: Causes the caster’s next spell cast within 1 minute to have its area of effect increase by 5'R. Obviously, this applies only to spells with a radius effect. This is not cumulative with any other Increased Radius spell.

spells.name: Ranging I
spells.description: As Lesser Ranging, except range is increased by 100' (or +20' range increment).

spells.name: Extension IV
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is four times normal.

spells.name: Instant Ranging I*
spells.description: As Instant Lesser Ranging, except range is increased by 100' (or +20' range increment).

spells.name: Increased Radius
spells.description: As Increased Radius I, except radius is increased by 10'.

spells.name: Ranging II
spells.description: As Ranging I, except range is increased 7.2 Closed by 200' (or +40' range increment). Essence

spells.name: Extension V
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is five Lists times normal.

spells.name: Instant Ranging II*
spells.description: As Instant Ranging I, except range is increased by 200' (or +40' range increment).

spells.name: Increased Radius
spells.description: As Increased Radius I, except radius is increased by 15'.

spells.name: Increased Size I
spells.description: Causes the caster’s next applicable spell (directed spells and those that do a critical) cast within 1 minute of casting this spell to have its Size increased by one size category (typically Medium to Big).

spells.name: Ranging III
spells.description: As Ranging I, except range is increased by 300' (or +60' range increment).

spells.name: Extension X
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is ten times normal.

spells.name: Instant Ranging
spells.description: As Instant Ranging I, except range is increased by 300' (or +60' range increment).

spells.name: Increased Radius
spells.description: As Increased Radius I, except radius is increased by 20'.

spells.name: Ranging V
spells.description: As Ranging I, except range is increased by 500' (or +100' range increment).

spells.name: Greater Extension
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is increased by 12 hrs.

spells.name: Extension True
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is increased by 24 hrs.

spells.name: Multienhancement
spells.description: As Extension X, Ranging III, and Increased Radius II combined.

spells.name: Permanent
spells.description: As Extension II, except duration is permanent. This spell may only be cast once per month. The caster has a random temporary stat decreased by one. This loss may only be recovered by normal stat gain upon gaining a level. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 133 7.2 - Closed Essence SPELL REINS

spells.name: Spell Store
spells.description: Caster may cast this spell with another spell in order to store that second spell. The spell to be stored must be cast within one minute after the Spell Store spell is cast. The stored spell may then be cast later as an instantaneous spell. The Spell Store spell costs the same number of PP as the spell that is stored. No other spell may be cast while a spell is stored.

spells.name: Identify Casting *
spells.description: If the target of this spell is casting a spell, the caster will know what realm the spell is from and what Type of spell the target is casting.

spells.name: Spell Hold I *
spells.description: The attack spell that is targeted with this spell must make an RR. If the RR succeeds, it will attack its original target as intended; otherwise the effects of the spell are delayed for the duration of this spell. At the end of the duration, if the target of the held spell has moved more than 20', the held spell may randomly affect another target within 10' of the original target point. If a spell is not cast on the original target, the new target gets a +15 RR bonus. Elemental attack spells suffer a -30 modification if not cast upon the original target. An attack spell for purposes of this spell is any spell having a target.

spells.name: Allied Spell Store
spells.description: As Spell Store, except the spell to be stored may be cast by someone (or something if the spell is cast by an item) other than the caster storing the spell. The PP cost of this spell is three more than that of the spell to be stored (with a minimum cost of 4 PP).

spells.name: Spell Bending I *
spells.description: Caster can deflect one Bolt, Ball, or Cone of magical origin. The incoming spell must make an RR. If the RR succeeds, it will attack its target normally; otherwise, the attack roll is modified by a penalty equal to the amount by which the RR was failed.

spells.name: Spell Hold II *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spells can be held up to 2 rounds. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Bypassable Spell
spells.description: As Spell Store, except other spells may be UNIFIED cast while the stored spell remains in storage. However, such casting  requires an additional PP and the spell-casting roll suffers a -10 penalty. Spell Law The PP cost of this spell is five more than that of the spell to be stored (with a minimum cost of 7 PP).

spells.name: Spell Bending II *
spells.description: As Spell Bending I, except attack roll is modified by twice the amount of RR failure.

spells.name: Spell Hold III *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spells can be held 3 rounds. 134

spells.name: Reverse Spell I *
spells.description: The target elemental attack spell must make an RR with a modification of +20 (in favor of the elemental attack spell). If the RR succeeds, the attack is made as normal; otherwise, the elemental attack spell is reversed back on its caster with a +0 OB.

spells.name: Spell Bending III
spells.description: As Spell Bending I, except attack roll is modified by three times the amount of RR failure.

spells.name: Spell Hold IV *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spells can be held 4 rounds.

spells.name: Power Loan
spells.description: The caster may “borrow” Power Points from the days to come. When this spell is cast, the caster regains all Power Points to the caster’s normal maximum. Every time the caster casts this spell, he loses all PP for the next two days (the normal duration of the spell). The caster also suffers concussion hit damage equal to 10% of the caster’s normal maximum hits. In addition, for the duration of this spell, he will cast spells as if he were one level lower than he actually is. This spell may be cast multiple times (borrowing PP from many days to come), but all effects are cumulative. For example, if cast twice, the caster will lose all PP for the next four days, take 20% of maximum hits in damage, and cast spells at two levels lower than normal. All penalties will remain in effect until the duration of the spell lapses. The next time the caster sleeps, that rest period will be extended by six hours for each casting of this spell and if this sleep is interrupted, the days of no PP will not begin to count down until after the caster has slept for the full required period of normal sleep requirement plus six hours per casting of Power Loan.

spells.name: Spell Bending IV
spells.description: As Spell Bending I, except attack roll is modified by four times the amount of RR failure.

spells.name: Spell Hold V *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spells can be held 5 rounds.

spells.name: Reverse Spell II *
spells.description: As Reverse Spell I, except a successfully reversed spell rebounds with an OB equal to half of the original OB.

spells.name: Spell Bending V
spells.description: As Spell Bending I, except attack roll is modified by five times the amount of RR failure.

spells.name: Spell Hold X *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spell is held 10 rounds.

spells.name: Spell Transfer *
spells.description: By using this spell, the caster can transfer the maintenance and control of one spell with a duration of Concentration (C) to a target. The target must then concentrate to maintain the spell (while the original caster is now free of this requirement) and controls any aspects of the spell effects subject to change. Target must have better than animal intelligence (i.e., no Mindless or Animalistic flaw).

spells.name: Lord Spell Hold *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spell is held for 20 rounds.

spells.name: Spell Bending True
spells.description: As Spell Bending I, except spell can be totally deflected up to 90° in any direction. Caster of this spell may chose to designate another target for the “bent” spell – use half of the original OB.

spells.name: Spell Hold True *
spells.description: As Spell Hold I, except attack spell is held up to 1 round/level.

spells.name: Complex Spell
spells.description: As Spell Store, except any number of spells may be stored up to a total number of spell levels equal to the caster’s level. When the stored spell complex is released, all the spells are cast as one instantaneous spell. Each of the component spells may be individually targeted, although only one may have a Directed Spell bonus added to the attack. Spell failure is rolled on the Force spell column, with triple the number of spells added to the spell failure roll (i.e., spell failure when casting five spells in a complex would result in a +15 to the spell failure roll). The PP cost of this spell is equal to the total PP cost of the spells stored plus ten (with a minimum cost of 35).

spells.name: Spell Store True
spells.description: As Complex Spell Store, except any or all of the stored spells may be cast by someone (or something) other than the caster storing the spell complex. The PP cost of this spell is equal to the total PP cost of the spells stored plus ten plus the number of stored spells cast by someone else (with a minimum cost of 40).

spells.name: Reversal True *
spells.description: As Reverse Spell I, except all spells within a 100'R of the caster are reversed. 7.2 - Closed Essence SPIRIT MASTERY

spells.name: Sleep III
spells.description: Causes target(s) to fall into a natural sleep; the total number of levels that can be affected is 3 (e.g., 3 of level 1; 1 of level 2 and 1 of level 1; 1 of level 3.). All targets must be in caster’s field of vision. Caster should assign target priority, i.e., which is the 1st potential target, the 2nd, etc. The first round of sleep is magical (the target cannot be awakened through normal means). Falling asleep is rapid, but not so instantaneous that the victim cannot slump gently to the ground (no injuries under normal circumstances from falling to the ground).

spells.name: Charm Kind
spells.description: Humanoid target believes the caster is a good friend.

spells.name: Sleep V
spells.description: As Sleep III, except a total of five levels can be affected.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: Target is incapable of making decisions or initiating action, but may continue to fight current foes or in self-defense. The target may also follow orders from the target’s leader (if any), but will only be able to follow them so long as no ambiguities arise.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: Target will perform a single suggested act that is not self-destructive or diametrically opposed to the target’s personality (e.g., no suicide suggestions, no blinding himself suggestions, no suggestions that a priest pray to an enemy god, etc.).

spells.name: Sleep X
spells.description: As Sleep III, except a total of 10 levels may be affected.

spells.name: Hold Kind
spells.description: Humanoid target has its Action Points per round reduced by 3 (i.e., normally, the target will have 1 AP each round).

spells.name: Master of Kind
spells.description: Humanoid target must obey the caster as specified in Suggestion.

spells.name: Lord Sleep
spells.description: As Sleep III, except a total of 20 levels may be affected.

spells.name: True Charm
spells.description: As Charm Kind, except any sentient creature may be affected.

spells.name: Quest
spells.description: Target is given one task; failure results in a penalty determined by the Gamemaster (task must be within capabilities 7.2 Closed of target). If the target ignores the quest, this incurs the same efEssence fects as for failure. Lists

spells.name: Word of Stunning
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target is stunned (-50) for 1 round/10 failure.

spells.name: Word of Pain *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target takes 50% of remaining concussion hits upon failure.

spells.name: Hold
spells.description: As Hold Kind, except any sentient being can be affected.

spells.name: Word of Sleep
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target falls into a natural sleep as Sleep III, but there is no level limit.

spells.name: Word of Discord
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target will not cooperate or agree with anyone for 1 day/10 failure.

spells.name: Word of Calling
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target is forced to come and face the caster (fighting if necessary) and then remain immobile for 1 rnd/10 failure. Caster must remain immobile, or control lapses.

spells.name: Waiting Word*
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Any of the “Words” above can be set to go off at a specified time or if there is movement within a designated 10' radius. Listed duration is maximum wait time. Duration of effect on eventual target is normal for the selected “Word”. The target of the Word is the individual whose movement triggered it, or the closest target in the case of a specified time.

spells.name: Word of Death
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Target suffers the results of an E critical strike on the table of the caster’s choice.

spells.name: True Quest
spells.description: As Quest, except the target is punished for failure (or refusal) by suffering 5 randomly selected E criticals.

spells.name: Phrase *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Any three different “Words” are cast on one target in the same round (a separate RR roll must be made for each one).

spells.name: Mass Word *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Any “Word” may be used and it will affect a number of levels equal to the level of the caster (assign target priority as described in Sleep III).

spells.name: Master of All
spells.description: As Master of Kind, except any sentient being can be affected.

spells.name: Waiting Phrase*
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] As Waiting Word, except instead of a “Word” spell, the effect is as the Phrase spell.

spells.name: Spirit Mastery
spells.description: Caster can use one spell/round on this list (10th level or lower) with range improved to 100' where the original range is less. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 135 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base CONTROLLING SONGS

spells.name: Safety Song
spells.description: Targets will not take aggressive (offensive) action towards the caster.

spells.name: Calming Song
spells.description: Targets are calmed and cannot take aggressive (offensive) action during the performance. This spell also soothes pain and can offset up to -10 in penalties due to injury (until the spell ends).

spells.name: Dancing Song
spells.description: Targets must dance (to the best of their ability). This requires Concentration and the dancers cannot choose to leave the area of effect unless a second RR is made. All dance-related maneuvers by the targets have a +25 bonus.

spells.name: Stunning Song
spells.description: Targets are stunned (-50) while song lasts.

spells.name: Luring Song
spells.description: As Calming Song, except targets are only non-aggressive with respect to the caster and targets will be drawn to the caster. They will approach the caster as close as possible without touching the caster or having to fight for position, and they will follow the caster if he is moving.

spells.name: Lullaby
spells.description: Targets fall into a light sleep. Targets get another RR ROLEMASTER if someone attempts to wake them while this spell is still active. UNIFIED  When the duration is up, the target can be awakened normally. Spell Law

spells.name: Charming Song
spells.description: Targets regard the caster as a good friend.

spells.name: Fear's Song
spells.description: Targets must make an RR versus Essence magic, but the results are treated as an RR versus Fear (see RMCL Section 14.3). Normal modifications against Fear do not apply. 136

spells.name: Seduction's Song
spells.description: Targets become emotionally open and regard the caster favorably. This adds +10 to any maneuver made to seduce a target of this spell by someone other than the caster and adds +10 to any Influence skill maneuver or +30 to any seduction attempt made by the caster to affect a target of this spell.

spells.name: Greater Calming
spells.description: As Calming Song, except for area of effect, and it can offset up to -20 in injury-related penalties.

spells.name: Dancing Song True
spells.description: As Dancing Song, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Haunting Lullaby
spells.description: As Lullaby, except targets experience a sleep troubled by nightmares. For 24 hours after awakening, they will have a -40 penalty to any RR against fear or fear-inducing magic.

spells.name: Panic’s Song
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -25] As Fear’s Song, except targets suffer a -25 modification to their RRs.

spells.name: Stunning Song True
spells.description: As Stunning Song, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Luring Song True
spells.description: As Luring Song, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Fight Song
spells.description: Targets will attack nearest individual other than the caster. If two or more individuals are equidistant, the target will attack the one he would normally be most inclined to fight. If a target injures (inflicts a critical on) a loved one, a close friend, or a longtime comrade in arms, he may make a new RR.

spells.name: Lullaby True
spells.description: As Lullaby, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Charming Song
spells.description: As Charming Song, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Terror’s Song
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -25] As Panic’s Song, except for area of effect.

spells.name: Song of Command
spells.description: Targets will obey the caster’s commands, unless the action commanded is totally alien to the target’s nature (e.g., no suicidal or self-mutilating commands unless the target is already self-destructive). If a target cannot understand the command, it will simply take no action.

spells.name: Panic’s Song True
spells.description: [RR Mod: -50] As Panic’s Song, except for area of effect and RR modifier.

spells.name: Calming Song True
spells.description: [RR Mod: -10] As Calming Song, except for area of effect, RR modifier, and a maximum of -30 in offset penalties.

spells.name: Seduction's Song
spells.description: [RR Mod: -10] As Seduction’s Song, except for area of effect, RR modifier, and the caster’s bonuses are +50 to seduction attempts and +25 to other Influence maneuvers, while those other than the caster gain a +25 to seduction attempts where the object of the seduction is under the influence of this spell.

spells.name: Song of Command
spells.description: [RR Mod: -10] As Song of Command, except for area of effect and RR modifier.

spells.name: Fight Song True
spells.description: [RR Mod: -10] As Fight Song, except for area of effect and RR modifier. 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base ENTERTAINING WAYS

spells.name: Spotlight *
spells.description: Caster is lit by a bright circle of light (between 5' and 10' diameter as desired). At the time of casting, the caster designates his “front” and the light will shine from that direction. The caster can change his “front” by concentrating (the light will blink off and another will blink on). The diameter and color of the light can also be changed and the light dimmed down to a soft mood light. All adjustable features can be changed at once.

spells.name: Dim Lights *
spells.description: All non-magical light sources in the area of effect are dimmed to the luminosity of soft candle light.

spells.name: Lightshow *
spells.description: Caster can create colored lights that will shine in the area of effect. The caster can change the colors and forms of the light by concentrating. The light can take any form the caster desires, but the light will not illuminate more than the area of effect. For example, several small spheres of various colors can float around the caster’s feet, or five red beams can flash back and forth across the caster’s body.

spells.name: Showman I
spells.description: Caster receives a +5 bonus to all Performance Art maneuvers for the duration of this spell.

spells.name: Legerdemain
spells.description: Caster can make any one target (up to 1 pound per level of the caster) vanish. The caster must designate a location for the target to “reappear” in (the location must be within the caster’s line of sight and within 100' per level of the caster). The object is teleported to the designated location at the time of casting, where it may remain invisibly until the duration expires or the caster chooses for it to appear. When the item is teleported, it makes a sound only where it disappears.

spells.name: Enthrall I
spells.description: The target of this spell is enthralled with the caster (for as long as the caster is performing or for the duration of this spell, whichever is shorter). While enthralled, the target is considered to be Concentrating on the performance and has a -75 to Perception regarding anything else. Enthrallment is broken if the target is attacked. 7.3 Bard

spells.name: Hidden Pocket
spells.description: The caster can place any one inanimate object Base Lists (up to 1 pound per level of the caster) into any available container. The container opening must be large enough to fit at least one dimension of the object. When the container is examined, it will appear empty to all normal perception (including feeling). The caster may pluck the item from the container at any time (up to the duration of the spell). If the object is not taken from the container before duration is up, the object appears in the container as if it were there all along.

spells.name: Pratfall *
spells.description: When the caster has experienced a fumble/failure result with an attack or physical maneuver, this spell allows the caster to turn tragedy into comedy. The caster suffers no negative effects beyond losing the opportunity to act as desired; the caster’s antics also bolster allied morale and the next friendly morale/fear RR made in the current situation receives a +20 bonus.

spells.name: Showman II
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus is +10.

spells.name: Quick Study
spells.description: Caster can read at three times the normal rate; this material is retained unusually well, granting a +10 bonus to any attempt to recall the information later.

spells.name: Enthrall V
spells.description: As Enthrall I, except affects up to five targets.

spells.name: Volunteer from the Audience
spells.description: Target will perform any actions that the caster dictates for the duration of this spell. If the target of this spell has previously been a “volunteer” for the caster, he suffers an RR modification of -1 for each previous time he was a successful target. If an action is commanded which is completely alien to the target, the target receives a new RR with a +50 bonus.

spells.name: Lovely Assistant
spells.description: Target of this spell (which may be the caster) gains an enhanced appearance. This spell enhances facial appearance, body appearance, and clothing appearance (roughly equivalent to a modern make-over, including fashion). Target gains a +10 to all rolls where personal appearance is a factor or +20 if appearance is a major factor.

spells.name: Showman III
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus is +15.

spells.name: Enthrall X
spells.description: As Enthrall I, except affects up to ten targets.

spells.name: Disappear
spells.description: As Legerdemain, except affects any target up to the caster’s own mass.

spells.name: Master of Ceremonies
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus applies to a number of target up the caster’s level.

spells.name: Showman IV
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Quick Study True
spells.description: As Quick Study, except caster can read a page at a glance (i.e., caster can read as fast as he can turn through the pages).

spells.name: Mass Enthrall
spells.description: As Enthrall I, except affects a number of targets up to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Showman V
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus is +25.

spells.name: Disappear True
spells.description: As Disappear, except may affect any one living creature or inanimate object up to 100 pounds per level of ROLEMASTER the caster. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Master of Ceremonies
spells.description: As Master of Ceremonies I, except bonus is +10. Spell Law

spells.name: Showman VI
spells.description: As Showman I, except bonus is +40.

spells.name: Master of Ceremonies
spells.description: As Master of Ceremonies I, except bonus is +20. 137 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base INSPIRING SONGS

spells.name: Harmonize
spells.description: Target becomes an “Ally” for purposes of this list. The caster is always considered an Ally for purposes of this list. The caster is limited to a number of Allies (other than the caster) equal to his ranks in this list, but may remove any one individual from the status of Ally with a round of concentration at any time.

spells.name: Song of Vigor
spells.description: All Allies make Endurance rolls with a +50 bonus.

spells.name: Song of Coordination
spells.description: When Allies are working together on some shared task, this spell provides a bonus to that task equal to +3 per number of Allies involved (includes the caster, although the caster obviously cannot be providing “hands on” help).

spells.name: Battle Hymn I
spells.description: Allies gain a +10 bonus to all RRs against fear or magic that produces fear or calm. They also gain +4 OB.

spells.name: Song of Sharing I
spells.description: This spell casts another spell known to the caster, but changes the nature of that spell. The spell to be shared must have “1 target” or a larger number of targets as its normal area of effect. The Song of Sharing I will cause the shared spell to affect all Allies within a 5'R as if the shared ROLEMASTER spell had been directly cast on each of them. The PP cost of UNIFIED casting is the cost of this spell (5 PP) plus the cost of the spell  to be shared. For example, if a Bard knew the spell Leaping Spell Law from the Lofty Bridge list, every Ally within 5' could be given the ability to Leap by casting Song of Sharing I and expending 6 PP (5 for the base cost of Song of Sharing I and 1 PP for the Leaping spell effect). If the spell to be shared is of higher level than the Song of Sharing, the shared spell’s level is used 138 for determining the difficulty of spell-casting. Spell effects end when either the duration of the Song of Sharing ends or when the normal duration of the spell shared ends (i.e., the Leaping effect would only last one round).

spells.name: Countersong I
spells.description: Caster creates a defensive song that will protect anyone (not just Allies) from sound-based attacks (including the spells on Controlling Songs). Any such attack must make a successful RR against the caster’s level or fail within the bounds of the Countersong.

spells.name: Song of Remembrance
spells.description: All Allies gain a +20 bonus to all Lore skill maneuvers and any other memory-based tasks.

spells.name: Song of Unity
spells.description: All Allies within area of effect are telepathically linked. They may communicate mentally with each other freely. Essentially this is silent, largely secure communication.

spells.name: Battle Hymn II
spells.description: As Battle Hymn I, except the RR bonus is +20 and the OB bonus is +8.

spells.name: Song of Sharing II
spells.description: As Song of Sharing I, except for radius of effect.

spells.name: Song of Magic
spells.description: Allies may add the caster’s level to their spell-casting maneuver rolls.

spells.name: Countersong II
spells.description: As Countersong I, except radius is 20'.

spells.name: Battle Hymn III
spells.description: As Battle Hymn I, except the RR bonus is +30 and the OB bonus is +12.

spells.name: Song of Clarity
spells.description: Allies reduce all stun rounds taken by 1 and gain a +30 bonus to RRs against spells which cause confusion.

spells.name: Song of Sharing
spells.description: As Song of Sharing I, except for radius of effect.

spells.name: Song of Renewal
spells.description: Allies recover 2 concussion hits per round.

spells.name: Countersong III
spells.description: As Countersong I, except radius is 30'.

spells.name: Battle Hymn IV
spells.description: As Battle Hymn I, except the RR bonus is +40 and the OB bonus is +16.

spells.name: Song of Wrath
spells.description: Allies gain +10 OB and do double hits and an additional Impact critical (one severity level less than the primary critical) in melee combat.

spells.name: Song of Sharing
spells.description: As Song of Sharing I, except for radius of effect.

spells.name: Battle Hymn True
spells.description: As Battle Hymn I, except the RR bonus is twice the caster’s level and the OB bonus is +20.

spells.name: Song of Sharing V
spells.description: As Song of Sharing I, except for radius of effect.

spells.name: Countersong V
spells.description: As Countersong I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Song of Sharing
spells.description: As Song of Sharing I, except that radius is equal to the caster’s level in feet.

spells.name: Countersong X
spells.description: As Countersong I, except radius is 100'. 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base ITEM LORE

spells.name: Instrumental
spells.description: Caster can assess the value of a musical instrument to within 10% of its actual value. This spell allows the caster to calculate different values for the different cultures he is familiar with based on the general value of the instrument, the raw materials used to make it, and the quality of craftsmanship and sound. Additional value (e.g., from being made by a famous maker) is not revealed. The caster also gains a general knowledge of the instrument’s origins (the culture of origin and the instrument’s age within 10% of its actual age). Finally, he understands how the instrument is to be played, although actually playing competently requires the development of skill with the instrument through practice.

spells.name: Assessing Eye
spells.description: The caster has a +50 bonus to any attempt to appraise the market value of the target item. Item may be appraised for any culture/location of which the caster has knowledge.

spells.name: Detect Power
spells.description: Detects magical power in an item, but not the realm or how much. A different item can be examined each round by concentrating.

spells.name: Emblem Recognition
spells.description: The caster can examine any visual symbol of an individual or group, be it a company logo, shield design, tattoo, flag, or other device. The caster learns the name of the individual or group so represented, a rough idea of the nature and (usual) location of that which is represented (e.g., “a knight of Glakony” or “a criminal gang in the southern islands”), and the purpose of the emblem (e.g., “to mark his works”, “to identify church grounds, property, or servants”, or “battlefield identification”).

spells.name: Rune Literacy III
spells.description: Any Runes maneuver made by the caster has a +15 bonus.

spells.name: Item Origins
spells.description: The caster learns the area of origin of the item, the race of the being who made it, and when it was made (within 100 years). If the creator gave the item a name, that is also revealed.

spells.name: Attuning III
spells.description: Any Attunement maneuver made by the caster has a +15 bonus.

spells.name: Power’s Tale
spells.description: The caster learns the primary power of a magical item. This knowledge comes in the form a short narrative illustrating this power or an explanatory bit of verse.

spells.name: Item’s Tale
spells.description: The caster learns a narrative account of the most 7.3 Bard significant event in the item’s recent past. The event cannot have Base Lists occurred more than one hour per level of the caster in the past.

spells.name: The Crafter’s Tale
spells.description: The caster learns who made the item and when. He also learns of any craftsmanship bonus the item possesses. He learns whom the item was made for, if it was crafted for a specific person or group, and he learns for what purpose the item was made.

spells.name: Detect Cursed
spells.description: The caster learns if there is a curse on the item.

spells.name: Rune Literacy VII
spells.description: As Rune Literacy III, but bonus is +35.

spells.name: Find Significance
spells.description: The caster learns the cultural and historical significance of one item. He also learns its personal significance, if any, to its current owner. This knowledge comes in the form of an illustrative narrative.

spells.name: Attuning VII
spells.description: As Attuning III, but bonus is +35.

spells.name: Item Analysis
spells.description: The caster gains complete information on the item’s construction, purpose, magical abilities, and any non-magical bonuses.

spells.name: The Reaper’s Tale
spells.description: The caster receives a narrative account of how someone died. Since this is not a vision, the caster has only a description of the killer (and perhaps the name, if it is revealed in dialog), but vision-centric defenses against retrosurveillance will not stymie this spell. When this spell is cast, the caster must be touching an object that had significance in the death (i.e., the murder weapon, the body, etc.) The narrative will be “from the point of view” of the object in question, so casting on multiple objects may provide a more complete account of events.

spells.name: Item’s Epic
spells.description: As Item’s Tale, except without a time limit.

spells.name: Rune Literacy X
spells.description: As Rune Literacy II, but bonus is +50.

spells.name: Distance Learning
spells.description: The next touch-ranged spell on this list cast by the caster of this spell will have its range improved to 20'.

spells.name: Attuning X
spells.description: As Attuning III, but bonus is +50.

spells.name: Item's Saga
spells.description: As Item’s Tale, except caster learns the whole history of the item. This does not include every detail, but does include all significant events.

spells.name: The Alchemist’s
spells.description: As Item Analysis and Item Origins combined, except that the Bard may study one item each round during the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Rune Literacy XV
spells.description: As Rune Literacy III, but bonus is +75.

spells.name: Looter’s Eye *
spells.description: Caster immediately knows the location of the most valuable (financially) object within the area of effect.

spells.name: Attuning XV
spells.description: As Attuning III, but bonus is +75. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 139 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base SOUND CONTROL

spells.name: Quiet I
spells.description: Creates a 1'R area into and out of which sound cannot travel. As discussed in Section 10.17, this spell can be cast on an individual target, which the spell will then follow; this target gains +25 to Stalking attempts, but likewise automatically fails any Perception attempts based on hearing alone and suffers a -50 to Perception rolls where hearing is a factor (e.g., to detect someone Stalking the target). Note that this does not interfere with spell-casting (the target can still speak, even yell, the sound is simply unable to leave the radius of the Quiet - certain spells like Ultrasonics may have their range limited to the interior of the Quiet radius, however).

spells.name: Sonic Law I
spells.description: Caster may manipulate sound within the area of effect, creating any single sound desired. This sound may be heard outside the area of effect, if the caster wishes. Sound cannot be damaging.

spells.name: Hush
spells.description: For the duration of this spell, all sounds in the area of effect are no louder than a whisper. The caster is immune to the effects of this spell. In addition, the caster can designate up to one extra target per level to be immune to the effects of the spell. By concentrating for one round, the caster may make one target immune to the effect or remove one target’s immunity.

spells.name: Fanfare
spells.description: A fanfare of music plays. The caster may designate ROLEMASTER one instrument (that will make the sounds of the fanfare) for every UNIFIED five levels of experience (or portion thereof). The volume of the  fanfare cannot exceed that which would be normally made by the Spell Law designated instrument(s).

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Quiet I, except radius is 10'.

spells.name: Sonic Law II
spells.description: As Sonic Law I, except radius is 10'.

spells.name: Sudden Sound
spells.description: Causes a very loud, sudden sound next to the target’s ears; target is stunned (-50) for 1 round per 10 failure. 140

spells.name: Deafen
spells.description: Target cannot hear sounds occurring more than 6" from the target’s ears.

spells.name: Cracks
spells.description: Certain sound waves cause any cracks or flaws in solid, inanimate material (up to 1,000 cu') to expand to their limit.

spells.name: Music
spells.description: Caster may designate any music to be played as if the caster were playing it (and the caster must actually have played the music at least once). The music will play continuously for the duration of the spell. If the musical score finishes before the duration is over, the music will repeat as many times as needed. The caster can designate singing instead of an instrument.

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Sphere of Silence I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Sonic Law III
spells.description: As Sonic Law I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Shatter Blast
spells.description: Causes a nonmetal, rigid, inanimate object to shatter (up to 1 cubic foot in size). All within a 5'R take an A Impact critical, anyone holding the object takes a C critical.

spells.name: Waiting Sound
spells.description: A set series of sounds can be concentrated upon and then delayed up to 24 hours or until triggered by a specified sound. The sounds to be delayed may last up to 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Orchestra
spells.description: As Music, except caster may designate one instrument per five levels of experience (or portion thereof) that will play simultaneously. All instruments (including vocals) will play as if the caster were playing them.

spells.name: Sonic Law IV
spells.description: As Sonic Law I, except radius is 10' per level of the caster.

spells.name: Long Sudden
spells.description: As Sudden Sound, except for range.

spells.name: Minor Ultrasonics
spells.description: All beings (except the caster) within range capable of hearing ultrasonic sounds are stunned (-50) 1 rnd/10 failure; an RR must be made once per round while in the radius. Even if they are not stunned, animals capable of hearing ultrasonics will have to make a second, non-magical RR against Fear (level of Fear is half the caster’s level).

spells.name: Sonic Splendor
spells.description: First, this spell will clean and tune an instrument instantly; this effect is “permanent”. This spell cannot repair actually broken or missing parts; if new strings are supplied, it can use them to replace broken ones, for example. Second, the sound quality of the instrument is improved to the equivalent of a +10 quality instrument if it was below that value. Third, if the caster spends a round in concentration, the instrument can be made to sound like any other instrument with which the caster is familiar.

spells.name: Crumbling
spells.description: As Cracks, except material with cracks will crumble to dust.

spells.name: Sphere of Silence
spells.description: As Sphere of Silence I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Minor Ultrasonics True
spells.description: As Minor Ultrasonics, except for radius.

spells.name: Killing Sound
spells.description: Caster launches a concentrated burst of sound at the target, doing a D Impact critical.

spells.name: Mass Sudden
spells.description: As Sudden Sound, except affects up to one target per caster level.

spells.name: Sonic Law True
spells.description: As Sonic Law I, except parameters are as listed and sounds can be programmed, the sounds may be delayed (up to 24 hr), there can be more than one sound at a time, and sounds are instantly changeable. 7.3 7.3 - - Bard Bard Base Base SOUND PROJECTION

spells.name: Long Whisper I
spells.description: Caster can whisper and the whisper can be heard at any point he chooses within the range.

spells.name: Sounding II
spells.description: Both the caster’s voice and the sound of any musical instrument(s) he is playing carry twice as far as normal. This allows for speaking to or performing for larger crowds.

spells.name: Sweet Music III
spells.description: The caster has a +15 bonus to Performance Art maneuver rolls made when casting a spell on the Controlling Songs or Inspiring Songs spell lists. The “Song” must be cast within 1 minute after completing this spell. This bonus applies both to the initial roll and to any continuation rolls.

spells.name: Distant Drums V
spells.description: The center of the radius of a spell on the Controlling Songs or Inspiring Songs spell lists may be placed at a distance of up to 50' from the caster. The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell. Silent performance techniques (e.g. juggling) cannot be used with Distant Drums.

spells.name: Long Whisper III
spells.description: As Long Whisper I, except range is 300'.

spells.name: Sounding V
spells.description: As Sounding II, except increase is five times.

spells.name: Distant Drums X
spells.description: As Distant Drums V, but maximum distance is 100'.

spells.name: Echoes *
spells.description: A spell on the Controlling Songs or Inspiring Songs spell lists will continue to stay in effect after the caster is done performing. The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell. This extended effect is as long as the initial performance (including any extension by making continuation rolls). For example, if the caster plays a Stunning Song for four rounds, then runs away, the victims will suffer a total of eight rounds of stun (-50).

spells.name: Long Whisper V
spells.description: As Long Whisper I, except range is 500'.

spells.name: Song Mastery *
spells.description: A spell on the Controlling Songs spell list can affect only those individuals the caster chooses. He may either select them individually or by choosing one or more categories of being to affect (e.g., “rats”, “children”). The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell. This spell allows the caster to make himself one of the targets of his own Controlling 7.3 Bard Song. Base Lists

spells.name: Sweet Music VI
spells.description: As Sweet Music III, but bonus is +30.

spells.name: Distant Drums XX
spells.description: As Distant Drums V, but maximum distance is 200'.

spells.name: Long Whisper X
spells.description: As Long Whisper I, except range is 1000'.

spells.name: Sounding True
spells.description: As Sounding II, except sound carries out to a chosen distance up to one mile radius without diminution of sound.

spells.name: Distant Drums
spells.description: As Distant Drums V, but maximum distance is 300'.

spells.name: Rebounding Echoes
spells.description: As Echoes, but the extended effect lasts twice as long as the performance.

spells.name: Long Whisper
spells.description: As Long Whisper I, except range is 100' per level of the caster.

spells.name: Sweet Music X *
spells.description: As Sweet Music III, but bonus is +50.

spells.name: Distant Drums L*
spells.description: As Distant Drums V, but maximum distance is 500'.

spells.name: Marching Tune *
spells.description: A spell on the Controlling Songs or Inspiring Songs spell list will not interfere with the caster’s normal movement. The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell. The caster may continue his performance while doing full movement at up to a jogging pace with no pace penalties.

spells.name: Distant Drums
spells.description: As Distant Drums V, but maximum distance is one mile, and the caster must be able to see the place where he wants to center his Controlling Song.

spells.name: Reverberating
spells.description: As Echoes, but the extended effect lasts three times as long as the performance.

spells.name: Universal Language
spells.description: A spell on the Controlling Songs spell list will influence even beings normally immune to mental spells, be they mindless undead, strange demons, or animated stone. The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell.

spells.name: Sweet Music True
spells.description: As Sweet Music III, but bonus is +75.

spells.name: Repeat Performance
spells.description: A spell on the Controlling Songs spell list can be made to repeat itself at a later time in the same place. The “Song” must be cast within one minute after completing this spell. The repetition can be triggered any time in the next 48 hours after completion of the initial performance. The caster can choose one of the following triggers: a) a set time, b) specified movement/action, c) specified sound, d) specified species, or e) specified realm of magic actively cast. For options b through e, they trigger the Repeat Performance if they occur/exist in the area affected by the Controlling Song. For those options, the response to the trigger may occur instantly or there may be a set delay in order, e.g., to let more orcs enter the area of effect before the spell goes off. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 141 7.4 7.4 - - Dabbler Dabbler Base Base CONCEALMENT MASTERY

spells.name: Shadow
spells.description: Caster and objects on the caster’s person appear to be in shadow and thus are almost invisible in dark areas (in many situations this could be handled with a Stalking bonus of between +25 and +75).

spells.name: Unseen III
spells.description: Up to three objects are made invisible (1 garment, 1 naked body, etc.); until 24 hrs pass or the object is struck by a violent blow (being hit by a weapon, falling, etc.) or the object makes a violent move (i.e., an attack) or casts a spell of type E or F.

spells.name: Conceal I
spells.description: Target inanimate object takes on the visual appearance of a similar object. For example, a small red key may appear as a small blue spoon. The object cannot vary in dimensions by more than 100% of actual size in any given dimension. This is strictly a visual illusion (and can be detected as such).

spells.name: Invisibility I
spells.description: As Unseen III, except it covers one target and everything within 1' of the target.

spells.name: Conceal III
spells.description: As Conceal I, except the caster may choose two options — affect one additional object, double the duration, increase the range to 50' for one object, or add a tactile sense to one concealed object. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Invisibility II
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except the caster can UNIFIED vary the radius up to 1'. This makes the invisible target  harder to see by reducing the “fringe effect.” Spell Law

spells.name: Unseen Blow *
spells.description: One melee attack (armed or unarmed) is covered by a moment of invisibility. Unless the target of that attack has the power to see the invisible, the target’s parry is subject to a -100 penalty (down to a minimum of 0 parry DB). 142

spells.name: Displacement I
spells.description: Caster’s apparent location is offset from the actual location; all attacks have no effect 10% of the time. Each time a foe misses due to this effect, the chance of that foe missing again goes down 5%.

spells.name: Conceal V
spells.description: As Conceal III, except choose four options.

spells.name: Unseen X
spells.description: As Unseen III, except up to 10 objects.

spells.name: Displacement II
spells.description: As Displacement I, except chance of missing is 20%.

spells.name: Invisibility Sphere
spells.description: As Invisibility II, except caster can vary the radius up to 10', determined at the time of casting.

spells.name: Hide Thoughts
spells.description: Caster becomes almost impossible to read as to honesty or emotions (-100 to all attempts to use Social Awareness skill on the caster) and spells to read the caster’s mind or emotional state must make an RR roll against this spell or simply fail.

spells.name: See Invisible
spells.description: Caster can see invisible things anywhere the caster can normally see; the caster’s attacks on invisible targets get no penalty (as they are not invisible to him).

spells.name: Displacement III
spells.description: As Displacement I, except chance of missing is 30%.

spells.name: Invisibility Sphere
spells.description: As Invisibility Sphere II, except caster can vary the radius by up to 20'.

spells.name: Unseen Weapon
spells.description: As Unseen Blow, except affects all melee attacks by the target during the spell’s duration.

spells.name: Hide Thoughts
spells.description: As Hide Thoughts, except for duration.

spells.name: See Invisible True
spells.description: As See Invisible, except the duration is 10 minutes per level.

spells.name: Lord Conceal
spells.description: As Conceal III, except choose nineteen options.

spells.name: Mass Unseen
spells.description: As Unseen III, except up to 1 object per level.

spells.name: Mass Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except as many targets as the caster’s level may be the centers of constant 1' radii of invisibility.

spells.name: Displacement V
spells.description: As Displacement I, except chance of missing is 50%.

spells.name: Conceal True
spells.description: As Conceal III, except choose one option per caster level.

spells.name: True Invisibility
spells.description: As Invisibility I, except the caster can vary the radius of invisibility up to 1' and if the caster attacks he is only visible for the 5 seconds immediately following the attack. Likewise, he may cast a type E or F spell and become visible for the following 5 seconds. Violent blows do not affect this spell. 7.4 7.4 - - Dabbler Dabbler Base Base INFLUENCES

spells.name: Deepen Sleep *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -30] Target that is already at least napping falls into a very deep sleep, taking a -50 penalty to Perception rolls to wake up.

spells.name: Charm Animals
spells.description: Target animal(s) will believe the caster is a good friend.

spells.name: Caginess I *
spells.description: Caster gains a +10 bonus to all Social Awareness skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Voice of Sincerity
spells.description: Anyone making a Social Awareness maneuver with respect to the caster becomes a target of this spell. If affected, the target will suffer a -25 penalty to all such Social Awareness maneuvers while the spell lasts.

spells.name: Silver Tongue I
spells.description: Caster gains a +10 bonus to all Influence skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Mind Reading
spells.description: Caster can read the surface thoughts of the target.

spells.name: Caginess II *
spells.description: Caster gains a +20 bonus to all Social Awareness skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Charm Group
spells.description: One humanoid target for every five levels (or fraction thereof) of the caster will believe the caster is a very good friend.

spells.name: Voice of Eloquence
spells.description: Caster becomes highly fluent (equivalent of rank 10) in any spoken or signed language in which he has at least one rank.

spells.name: Caginess III *
spells.description: Caster gains a +30 bonus to all Social Awareness skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Group Suggestion
spells.description: Humanoid targets (up to one for every five levels, or fraction thereof, of the caster) will perform a single suggested act that is not self-destructive or diametrically opposed to a target’s personality (e.g., no suicide suggestions, no self-mutilation suggestions, no suggestions that a priest pray to an enemy god, etc.). Suggestion must be the same for all targets.

spells.name: Silver Tongue
spells.description: Caster gains a +20 bonus to all Influence skill maneuvers. 7.4 Dabbler

spells.name: Hold Group
spells.description: Humanoid targets have their Action Points per Base Lists round reduced by 3 (i.e., normally, the targets will have 1 AP each round). Up to one target for every five levels (or fraction thereof) of the caster may be affected.

spells.name: Voice of Magnificence
spells.description: Caster has a +25 bonus to any Performance Art skill maneuver using his voice.

spells.name: Mind Reading
spells.description: As Mind Reading I, except for range.

spells.name: Caginess IV *
spells.description: Caster gains a +40 bonus to all Social Awareness skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Silver Tongue
spells.description: Caster gains a +30 bonus to all Influence skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Master Group
spells.description: As Group Suggestion, except group will obey throughout duration and different commands can be issued to different members of the group.

spells.name: Calligraphy of Suggestion
spells.description: The caster must record in writing a single suggested act that is not self-destructive or diametrically opposed to the ultimate target’s personality (e.g., no suicide suggestions, no blinding himself suggestions, no suggestions that a priest pray to an enemy god, etc.). This creates a minor magic item, and at this time no RR is made. When the text is read by the intended recipient (caster may specify an individual, a specific type, or simply aim for the first reader), the spell is triggered and if the triggering reader fails his RR, he will act as suggested. Once triggered, the text loses its enchantment.

spells.name: Caginess V *
spells.description: Caster gains a +50 bonus to all Social Awareness skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Mind Reading
spells.description: As Mind Reading I, except for range.

spells.name: Mystic Papers
spells.description: [RR: -25] The caster presents any paper or badgelike item or whatever item is roughly similar in type to the proper identification, credential, pass, or other document granting permission and/or authority that is being claimed by the caster. If the spell succeeds, the targets perceive the object presented as the genuine article. Caster must initially touch the item, but then the item may be taken for inspection and even handed from one individual to another out of sight of the caster without interruption of the effect.

spells.name: Silver Tongue
spells.description: Caster gains a +50 bonus to all Influence skill maneuvers.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -10] Humanoid targets (up to one per level of the caster) will perform a single suggested act that is not self-destructive or diametrically opposed to a target’s personality (e.g., no suicide suggestions, no self-mutilation suggestions, no suggestions that a priest pray to an enemy god, etc.). Suggestion must be the same for all targets.

spells.name: Group Quest
spells.description: Targets are given one task; failure results in a penalty determined by the Gamemaster (task must be within ROLEMASTER capabilities of the targets). If a target ignores the quest, or fails to UNIFIED cooperate with the other targets towards the success of the quest,  this incurs the same effects as for failure.
