spells.description: Caster may use any lower level spell for this list once per round. 7.6 Evil Essence Lists a a a ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 165 7.7 7.7 - - Evil Evil Essence Essence NECROMANCY MASTERY

spells.name: Undead Language
spells.description: Allows the caster to understand and speak the language(s) of any undead beings.

spells.name: Tolerate Undead
spells.description: Caster is not subject to automatic harmful effects caused by the proximity of the undead. This provides no protection against deliberate attack.

spells.name: Sense Undead
spells.description: Caster becomes aware of all undead within the area of effect. He knows their general locations (within 10'), number, and general nature (whether corporeal or incorporeal, mindless or intelligent, controlled or uncontrolled, and what Class of undead).

spells.name: Control Undead I
spells.description: Caster can control one Class I undead. If this spell is resisted, the target will immediately attack the caster, preferring him over any other available ROLEMASTER targets. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Undead Defenses
spells.description: Caster has a +10 bonus to RRs and DB against attacks by the undead. Spell Law 166

spells.name: Create Undead I
spells.description: Using a suitable corpse or spirit, the caster creates a Class I undead. Corpses must be a condition suitable for the type of undead to be created and in any case, the being to be converted into one of the undead may not have been dead any longer than one day per level of the caster. If the caster succeeds in a Hard Spell Mastery maneuver with an additional -10 penalty times the Class number of the undead created, then the caster may select what type of undead is created by this spell. If this maneuver fails, the GM selects an appropriate undead creature. Upon creation, the undead must make an RR against its creator. If it fails, it will be non-hostile to its creator until some circumstance (such as a failed attempt to Control it) should change things. If it succeeds, it is free to attack its maker if uncontrolled.

spells.name: Command Undead
spells.description: Target undead will obey a command by the caster for a period of one day. At the end of that time, the undead returns to its normal behavior. If this spell is resisted, the target will immediately attack the caster, preferring him over any other available targets.

spells.name: Control Undead II
spells.description: As Control Undead I, except caster can control a Class II undead or control a Class I undead with a -10 to its RR.

spells.name: Summon Lesser
spells.description: This spell must be cast within 100' of the place of death of the being whose spirit is to be turned into an incorporeal form of undead. This spell will fail if the body is protected against being turned into one of the undead (e.g., under the protection of a Restful Spirit spell). The spirit summoned by this spell is suitable for creating an undead being of up to Class III. A Create Undead spell must be successful before the end of this spell’s duration, or the spirit will depart once more. Spirit may not have been dead for more than 1 day/level of caster.

spells.name: Create Undead II
spells.description: As Create Undead I, except creates a Class II or lesser undead.

spells.name: Undead Defenses
spells.description: Caster has a +20 bonus to RRs and DB against attacks by the undead.

spells.name: Control Undead III
spells.description: As Control Undead I, except caster can control a Class III undead or control a Class II undead with a -10 to its RR or control a Class I undead with a -20 to its RR.

spells.name: Command Undead
spells.description: As Command Undead I, except duration is 1 month.

spells.name: Create Undead III
spells.description: As Create Undead I, except creates a Class III or lesser undead.

spells.name: Summon Greater
spells.description: As Summon Lesser Spirit, except the spirit summoned is suitable for the creation of undead of up to Class VI and may have been dead up to 1 week/level of caster.

spells.name: Control Undead IV
spells.description: As Control Undead I, except caster can control a Class IV undead or control a Class III undead with a -10 to its RR or control a Class II undead with a -20 to its RR or control a Class I undead with a -30 to its RR.

spells.name: Undead Defenses
spells.description: Caster has a +30 bonus to RRs and DB against attacks by the undead.

spells.name: Command Undead
spells.description: As Command Undead I, except duration is 1 year.

spells.name: Create Undead IV
spells.description: As Create Undead I, except creates a Class IV or lesser undead.

spells.name: Control Undead V
spells.description: As Control Undead I, except caster can control a Class V undead or control a Class IV undead with a -10 to its RR or control a Class III undead with a -20 to its RR or control a Class II undead with a -30 to its RR or control a Class I undead with a -40 to its RR.

spells.name: Control Undead VI
spells.description: As Control Undead I, except caster can control a Class VI undead or control a Class V undead with a -10 to its RR or control a Class IV undead with a -20 to its RR or control a Class III undead with a -30 to its RR or control a Class II undead with a -40 to its RR or control a Class I undead with a -50 to its RR.

spells.name: Create Undead V
spells.description: As Create Undead I, except creates a Class V or lesser undead.

spells.name: Control Undead
spells.description: Caster can control undead up to his level in total of the undeads’ Class numbers. The RR of an undead may be reduced by -10 by assigning extra levels to its control up to a maximum penalty of -50. For example, a 38th level caster really wants to get control of the Class VI Greater Vampire leading the undead marauders, so he assigns an extra five levels on top of the six minimally required in order to create a -50 RR penalty. This leaves the caster with 27 levels left to assign to the control of other undead.

spells.name: Create Undead VI
spells.description: As Create Undead I, except creates a Class VI or lesser undead.

spells.name: Undead Mastery
spells.description: Places target undead under the caster’s lasting control. The caster need but command the mastered undead, and it will obey to the best of its ability. Undead created by the caster get a -25 to their RRs. The caster can never have more levels of undead mastered than he has levels, although the undead mastered by means of the Necromantic Ways list do not count against the limit mastered by this list and vice versa (i.e., a 60th level caster could have 60 levels of mindless undead mastered by means of Master Mindless Undead and another 60 levels of undead mastered by means of Undead Mastery). 7.6 Evil Essence Lists ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 167 7.7 7.7 - - Evil Evil Essence Essence NECROMANTIC WAYS

spells.name: Animate Dead I
spells.description: Caster can cause any dead body (within 50% of his own mass), to rise up and move. The caster must concentrate for the body to perform an action; if he stops concentrating, the body will stand motionless. The body can be maneuvered with a -25 modifier and can melee with a -20 OB. The body cannot have been dead more than 1 day. Use the stats from Creature Law for Class I Standard Created Undead except that the OB is -20 and it cannot move faster than a walk.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: Caster can control one Class I mindless undead. When the caster does not concentrate, the undead will stay in place and attack only if a living target is within 10'.

spells.name: Master Mindless
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -25] Caster may master 1 “Class” worth of mindless undead per level of the caster. This spell must be cast separately on each undead. The target undead must already be controlled by the caster and if the target resists this ROLEMASTER spell, it will attack the caster immediately and may not be subject UNIFIED  to the caster’s control again until the caster gains another level. A Spell Law mastered undead allows the caster to control this specific undead without concentration (it will continue to follow the last order it was given).

spells.name: Animate Dead II
spells.description: As Animate Dead I, except caster can control 2 bodies at once or one body with a -15 modifier to maneuvers and an OB of -10. Additionally, bodies may have been dead for 168 up to 2 days.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: Given a body that has been dead less than 1 week, the caster can turn the body into a Class I undead. The newly-created undead will attempt to attack the closest living being (if uncontrolled), but can take no other activity than moving to that being and attacking. If controlled, the undead will do as commanded by the controller.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class II mindless undead or 2 Class I undead can be controlled.

spells.name: Animate Dead III
spells.description: As Animate Dead I, except caster can control 3 bodies at once or one body with a -5 modifier to maneuvers and an OB of +0. Additionally, bodies may have been dead for up to 3 days.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class II undead or 2 Class I undead can be created.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class III mindless undead or 1 Class II and 1 Class I undead or 3 Class I undead can be controlled.

spells.name: Animate Dead IV
spells.description: As Animate Dead I, except caster can control 4 bodies at once or one body with a +5 modifier to maneuvers and an OB of +10. Additionally, bodies may have been dead for up to 4 days.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class III undead or 1 Class II and 1 Class I or 3 Class I undead can be created.

spells.name: Animate Dead V
spells.description: As Animate Dead I, except caster can control 5 bodies at once or one body with a +10 modifier to maneuvers and an OB of +20. Additionally, bodies may have been dead for up to 5 days.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class IV mindless undead or 1 Class III and 1 Class I undead or 2 Class II undead or 1 Class II and 2 Class I undead or 4 Class I undead can be controlled.

spells.name: Animate Dead VI
spells.description: As Animate Dead I, except caster can control 6 bodies at once or one body with a +15 modifier to maneuvers and an OB of +30. Additionally, bodies may have been dead for up to 6 days.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class IV undead or 1 Class III and 1 Class I or 2 Class II or 1 Class II and 2 Class I or 4 Class I undead can be created.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class V mindless undead or 5 Class I undead or any other combination where the total Class numbers of the undead is five can be controlled.

spells.name: Energize Corpse
spells.description: Caster fills a corpse with extra Essence. If the corpse becomes an undead creature within the duration of the spell, its level is determined using the Level Spread Table (Table 3-2) in Creature Law normally, but with a bonus to the roll equal to the caster’s ranks in this list. A caster may also cast this spell on himself prior to using Cheat Death — normally the conversion into a Lich results in a reduction in level, so every bit helps.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class V mindless undead or 5 Class I undead or any other combination where the total Class numbers of the undead is five can be created.

spells.name: Control Mindless
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class VI mindless undead or 6 Class I undead or any other combination where the total Class numbers of the undead is six can be controlled.

spells.name: Create Mindless
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead I, except 1 Class VI mindless undead or 6 Class I undead or any other combination where the total Class numbers of the undead six can be created.

spells.name: Mass Mindless Undead
spells.description: As Control Mindless Undead I, except caster can control any group of undead whose Class numbers total no more than the caster’s level.

spells.name: Cheat Death
spells.description: This spell is used only once, if ever. Using it, the caster transforms himself into a Lich, one of the most feared of the undead. If the caster fails when attempting this spell, he will simply die. With success, the caster becomes one of the undead without ever actually dying. At this point, the caster is sustained by magic and dwells in a place between life and death.

spells.name: Army of the Dead
spells.description: As Animate Dead VI, except the caster can raise as many bodies as he has levels or improve individual corpses as in the Animate Dead spells by assigning one level per number of the spell above one (e.g. a 37th level caster decides that the first corpse in his army will have +5 to maneuvers and an OB of +10 as in Animate Dead IV; to do this he must assign one level for the corpse, plus three more for the improvement to Animate Dead IV quality, and has 33 levels left to assign to animating further dead). These corpses will remain animated for a full day, during which the caster can control the entire army whenever he concentrates. Additionally, corpses may be as old as one day dead per level of caster.

spells.name: Army of the Dead
spells.description: As Create Mindless Undead VI, except any combination where the total Class numbers of the undead is no more than the caster’s level can be created. At the time the army is raised, the caster can give it an order that it will relentlessly follow for 1 day. At the end of that time, the undead will become uncontrolled and begin attacking the nearest living targets. Additionally, corpses may be as old as one day dead per level of caster.

spells.name: Cheat Death True
spells.description: As Cheat Death, except caster’s organs are transferred into a ready container (jar, box, chest, etc.). The caster then becomes a somewhat more powerful Classic Lich and can only be truly destroyed if the container with his organs is destroyed. is 7.6 Evil Essence Lists ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 169 Chapter Chapter ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law Mentalism Mentalism 170 8: 8: Spell Spell Lists Lists 8. 8. spells.name: Anticipate Attack*
spells.description: Caster becomes aware of his primary foe’s likely attack. If the caster parries, the DB gained from the parry is doubled.

spells.name: Anticipate Defense*
spells.description: Caster becomes aware of his primary foe’s likely defense. If the foe parries, the DB gained from the parry is halved.

spells.name: Guess *
spells.description: When faced with a choice about which the caster has little or no information (e.g., which corridor leads to the wine cellar), the caster may cast this spell and the Gamemaster will determine which choice the caster actually makes, biasing the choice favorably by 25% (e.g., if there are two choices, roll 1-100: correct on 26-100, incorrect on 01-25).

spells.name: Anticipate Spell
spells.description: Once this spell is cast, the next time that the caster needs to cast a spell, he will have already subconsciously readied himself to do so. Treat the caster as having prepared that next spell for two rounds.

spells.name: Intuitions I
spells.description: Caster gains a vision of what will probably happen in the next minute if the caster takes a specified action.

spells.name: Anticipate Hostility
spells.description: Caster is aware of any being within the range of the spell that has hostile intentions towards him. The hostility must be directed specifically at the caster ROLEMASTER or the spell reveals nothing. The being’s hostility must be UNIFIED  active (i.e., driving the being to perform aggressive actions), Spell Law not passive (i.e., hate exists, but no action is planned).

spells.name: Anticipate Move
spells.description: Caster has a second sense for the coming actions of his competitor(s) in any game involving skill (possibly with some significant element of chance, but the game must allow meaningful tactical choices, so 172 games such as chess, go, poker, qualify; simply dicing for the highest number would not), providing a +30 bonus to all maneuvers related to that game. Duration is one game or playing session. Does not apply to essentially solitaire games or gambling, regardless of degree of skill involved.

spells.name: Dream I
spells.description: Caster has a dream relating to a topic decided upon just before retiring; limited to once per night. The caster must sleep for a normal sleep cycle (minimum of four hours) for this spell to work.

spells.name: Room Feel I
spells.description: Caster has a vision of what has occurred in a room or place; limited to up to 1 min/level into the past. The room must fit within a cube with edges equal to twice the caster’s level in feet (i.e., if the caster is 9th level, then the room must fit inside an 18' x 18' x 18' cube).

spells.name: Anticipations *
spells.description: Predicts most probable action of a being in the next round; specifics are not learned (e.g., attack in melee, cast a spell; but no detail on attack target or what spell).

spells.name: Intuitions II
spells.description: As Intuitions I, except caster gets to gaze 2 minutes into the future.

spells.name: Room Feel II
spells.description: As Room Feel I, except limit is 1 hour/ level.

spells.name: Anticipate Hostility True
spells.description: As Anticipate Hostility, except for area of effect, duration, and range.

spells.name: Dream II
spells.description: As Dream I, except limit is 2 dreams/night on different topics.

spells.name: Spell Anticipation
spells.description: As Anticipations, except if action is to cast a spell, the spell to be cast and target(s) are learned.

spells.name: Room Feel III
spells.description: As Room Feel I, except limit is 1 day/ level.

spells.name: Dream III
spells.description: As Dream I, except limit is 3 dreams/night on different topics.

spells.name: Anticipate Weather
spells.description: Caster can predict with 95% accuracy the time, type, and severity of the weather to come over the next seven days assuming no spells or magical phenomena interfere.

spells.name: Room Feel IV
spells.description: As Room Feel I, except limit is 1 week/ level.

spells.name: Intuitions True
spells.description: As Intuitions I, except caster may gaze into the future for a number of minutes equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Anticipations True
spells.description: As Anticipations, except caster can predict actions of all beings within 100' of himself.

spells.name: Dream V
spells.description: As Dream I, except limit is 5 dreams/night on any combination of topics the caster chooses.

spells.name: Dream True
spells.description: As Dream V, except limit is one dream/ night per every five levels of the caster (i.e., a 35th level caster may have seven dreams).

spells.name: Room Feel True
spells.description: As Room Feel I, except there is no time limit.

spells.name: Spell Anticipation True *
spells.description: As Anticipations True, except spell types and targets are learned. 8.1 - Open Mentalism BRILLIANCE

spells.name: Projected Light
spells.description: Beam of light (like a flashlight) springs from the caster’s palm; it has a 50' effective range. If the caster’s hand is closed into a fist, the light will “turn off”. If the caster’s fist is reopened before the end of the duration, the light will turn on again.

spells.name: Glow
spells.description: Causes a small, 1" diameter point of light that will glow softly. This spell provides enough light for Nightvision to work properly, but not enough light to allow much mobility in the dark.

spells.name: Light I
spells.description: Lights a 10'R area about the point touched.

spells.name: Aura
spells.description: Causes a bright aura about the caster, providing a more powerful appearance and subtracting 10 from all attacks on the caster.

spells.name: Light Eruption
spells.description: [RR Mod: -10] Causes a 10'R sphere of intense light, all within are stunned (-50) for 1 round/10 failure.

spells.name: Shock Bolt I
spells.description: A bolt of intense, charged light is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Lightning Bolt attack table, as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Darkness I
spells.description: Reduces illumination to a dark night in a 10'R area about the point touched.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.description: As Aura, except it produces an extremely powerful appearance and subtracts 15 from all attacks.

spells.name: Long Glow
spells.description: As Glow, except for duration. 8.1 Open

spells.name: Light V
spells.description: As Light I, except radius is 50'. Mentalism

spells.name: Darkness V
spells.description: As Darkness I, except radius is 50'. Lists

spells.name: Shock Bolt III
spells.description: As Shock Bolt I, but with a range increment of 75'.

spells.name: Hue
spells.description: Causes any object up to 1,000 cubic feet to glow with any desired color.

spells.name: Mass Glow
spells.description: As Glow, except produces one light per caster level and these can be directed by concentration anywhere within 5' of the caster. Illumination will still be quite soft, but ten of them provide enough light to read by even without Nightvision.

spells.name: Beacon V
spells.description: Ray of light of any color springs from caster’s hand, can be up to 5 miles long.

spells.name: Greater Darkness
spells.description: As Darkness I, except radius is 1000'.

spells.name: Shock Bolt V
spells.description: As Shock Bolt I, but with a range increment of 125'.

spells.name: Utterlight
spells.description: Nullifies all magically created darkness in a 100'R, and lights that area as full daylight.

spells.name: Utterdark
spells.description: Darkens a 100'R area, no light (except Utterlight) can exist within this radius.

spells.name: Sunfires
spells.description: Focuses sunlight as a lens, must be focused initially on a fixed point. The lens can be moved at a rate of 1'/round, after the first round. It will burn through a 1' diameter at a rate of: 1' wood/round, 4" stone/round, or 1" metal/ round. This spell cannot be used effectively in combat (as foes can easily move out of the way). However, if used on an immobile foe, see Hand of Fire for damage resolution.

spells.name: Sunfire True
spells.description: As Sunfires, except does not require sunlight.

spells.name: Hand of Fire
spells.description: As Sunfires, except the initial focus is 6" from open palm of caster (caster’s arm is immune) and it can be moved 10'/round. If used in melee, it strikes on the Fire Bolt table (with concussion hits doubled) using the caster’s Directed Spell: Elemental Bolts skill; concentration is not required when focus is fixed 6" from palm. If the attack is fumbled (01-02 UM), the caster takes an automatic C Heat Critical.

spells.name: Rotating Beacon
spells.description: As Beacon, except that the beam will rotate through a full circle, repeatedly, and it has the listed duration and stays centered at the initial location, rather than requiring the caster to stay and concentrate. ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A bolt of lightning is shot from the UNIFIED caster’s palm; resolve attack on the Lightning Bolt Attack  Table as a Medium-sized attack. Spell Law

spells.name: Hand of Fire
spells.description: As Hand of Fire, except does not require sunlight. 173 8.1 - Open Mentalism CLOAKING

spells.name: Blur *
spells.description: Causes caster to appear blurred to attackers, granting a +10 to the caster’s DB.

spells.name: Shadow
spells.description: Caster and objects on the caster’s person appear to be in shadow and thus are almost invisible in dark areas (in many situations this could be handled with a Stalking bonus of between +25 and +75).

spells.name: Audio Cloak*
spells.description: The next Cloaking spell cast by the caster of this spell, within a minute of completing this spell, will make any noises produced by the caster inaudible to the target(s). This means that the caster can then speak or otherwise make a sound without allowing additional RRs.

spells.name: Cloaking I
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] Target makes an RR. Failure results in the caster being invisible to the target; others see the caster normally. If the caster makes an obvious action (e.g., talking, moving an object, etc.), the target may make another RR (the GM may deem it appropriate to apply modifiers to this RR based upon the action the caster takes). If the caster attacks the target, the target may make another RR with a +50 modifier. If the caster begins to concentrate, he can extend the duration of this spell indefinitely (as long as he can concentrate).

spells.name: Façade I
spells.description: Caster has a limited illusion on himself that allows him ROLEMASTER UNIFIED to look like any humanoid race within 20% of his own size. The illu-  sion moves as the caster moves. Spell Law

spells.name: Cloaking III
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except the caster can affect 3 targets. 174

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except every target in the area of effect must make an RR. New targets entering the sphere while the spell is still in effect will need to make an RR or be affected as well. Once a target makes a successful RR, he need not make another RR against the spell; however, once affected, leaving the sphere does not cancel the effect.

spells.name: Cloaking V
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except the caster can affect 5 targets.

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking Sphere I, except for the area of effect.

spells.name: Shadow Mentalist
spells.description: Creates a duplicate of the caster; if the caster concentrates, it will move as willed; otherwise, it does exactly as the caster does. The duplicate must be created within line of sight of the caster and the caster can only control it within line of sight. If the caster concentrates, he can “merge” the duplicate with himself and then split back apart again (making it difficult to discern which one is the “real” caster).

spells.name: Façade II
spells.description: As Façade I, except illusion may include altering the caster’s voice and any other sounds generated.

spells.name: Cloaking X
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except the caster can affect 10 targets.

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking Sphere I, except for the area of effect.

spells.name: Displacement I
spells.description: Caster’s apparent location is offset from the actual location; all attacks have no effect 10% of the time. Each time a foe misses due to this effect, the chance of that foe missing again goes down 5%.

spells.name: Camouflage
spells.description: Caster and objects on his person take on the visual texture, color, and form of the surrounding area. Caster is nearly invisible when motionless (+200 to Stalking maneuvers) and gives a +50 bonus to Stalking attempts even when moving (requires concentration). This spell is not cumulative with Shadow.

spells.name: Cloaking XX
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except the caster can affect 20 targets.

spells.name: Extended Cloak
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking III, except for duration.

spells.name: Displacement II
spells.description: As Displacement I, except chance of missing is 20%.

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking Sphere I, except for the area of effect.

spells.name: Shadow Mentalist
spells.description: As Shadow Mentalist I, except there are two duplicates.

spells.name: Displacement III
spells.description: As Displacement I, except chance of missing is 30%.

spells.name: Camouflage True
spells.description: As Camouflage, except does not require concentration while moving and the Stalking bonus when moving is +75.

spells.name: Extended Cloak
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Extended Cloak III, except the caster can affect 8 targets.

spells.name: Widespread Cloak
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except for duration and that the caster can make any number of associates (up to a maximum of the caster’s level) invisible to the target. Additional RRs due to actions of one of these “invisible” persons are resolved as for Cloaking spells, but if one of them is revealed to the target, this does not expose the others. (Only one RR is made initially to determine if the target resists having the entire group be invisible to him.)

spells.name: True Cloaking
spells.description: [RR Mod = -50] As Cloaking I, except the caster can affect as many targets as he has levels and the range is only limited to the caster’s field of vision. 8.1 - Open Mentalism DAMAGE RESISTANCE

spells.name: Heat Resistance *
spells.description: Caster is protected from natural heat up to 176°F (80°C) (treat as if caster were in 68°F [20°C] temperature). For temperatures above 176°F, subtract 108°F (60°C) to determine the effective temperature for the target. Caster also receives +20 to all RRs vs. heat spells/attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental fire/ heat attacks.

spells.name: Cold Resistance *
spells.description: Caster is protected from natural cold down to 14°F (-10°C) (treat as if caster were in 68°F [20°C] temperature). For temperatures below 14°F, add 54°F (30°C) to determine the effective temperature for the target. Caster also receives +20 to all RRs vs. cold spells/attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental cold/ice attacks.

spells.name: Light Resistance
spells.description: Caster is protected from natural light and light changes (instantly adjusting vision to changing light intensity to never be blinded by glare, sudden light, or sudden darkness). Caster also receives +20 to all RRs vs. light or electricity spells/ attacks and a +20 to DB vs. elemental light/electricity attacks.

spells.name: Impact Resistance
spells.description: Caster is protected from falls of up to 50'. For falls longer than 50', subtract 50' to determine the effective length of the fall. Caster also receives +20 to all RRs vs. spells that do Impact criticals and +20 DB vs elemental attacks doing Impact criticals.

spells.name: Unpain I *
spells.description: Caster is able to sustain an additional 25% of his total concussion hits (round off fractional hits) before passing out; hits are still taken and remain when the spell lapses.

spells.name: Stun Relief I *
spells.description: Caster is relieved of 1 round’s worth of accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Resist Poison *
spells.description: Delays the effect of a poison on the caster. If the poison is not eliminated before the spell expires, the poison will affect the caster at that time.

spells.name: Heat Endurance
spells.description: As Heat Resistance, except for duration, 8.1 Open spell is not instantaneous, and bonus against magical attacks is Mentalism only +10. Lists

spells.name: Cold Endurance
spells.description: As Cold Resistance, except for duration, spell is not instantaneous, and bonus against magical attacks is only +10.

spells.name: Unpain II *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except 50% additional hits may be sustained.

spells.name: Stun Relief III *
spells.description: Caster is relieved of 3 rounds of accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Neutralize Poison
spells.description: Any poison inside the caster must make an RR with a -20 modifier or be neutralized. In any case, it delays the effects of the poison for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Resist Blows *
spells.description: Caster takes half hits damage from all physical (non-magical) attacks.

spells.name: Awake *
spells.description: This spell will awaken the caster from sleep the round following casting (caster can preset conditions under which the spell will activate).

spells.name: Unpain III *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except 75% additional hits may be sustained.

spells.name: Stun Relief V *
spells.description: Caster is relieved of 5 rounds’ worth of accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Heat Resistance
spells.description: As Heat Resistance, except caster is immune to natural heat and is treated as one Size larger when taking damage from heat spells.

spells.name: Cold Resistance
spells.description: As Cold Resistance, except caster is immune to natural cold and is treated as one Size larger when taking damage from cold spells.

spells.name: Light Resistance
spells.description: As Light Resistance, except caster is immune to natural light/electricity and is treated as one Size larger when taking damage from electrical spells.

spells.name: Unpain IV *
spells.description: As Unpain I, except 100% additional hits may be sustained.

spells.name: Neutralize Poison
spells.description: As Neutralize Poison, except poison has a -70 modifier to its RR.

spells.name: Awake True *
spells.description: As Awake, except there is no delay and it can be triggered by any normally perceivable previously declared condition within 50' (e.g., anyone entering the area, a stranger entering the area, or a drawn weapon in the area).

spells.name: Elemental Resistance
spells.description: As Heat Resistance True, Cold Resistance True, and Light Resistance True.

spells.name: Stun Relief True *
spells.description: Caster is relieved of all accumulated stun effects.

spells.name: Unpain True *
spells.description: Caster ignores all pain; he ignores the penalties for lost hits and will never become unconscious due to hits taken, nor will he die from hit loss while this spell is in effect. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 175 8.1 - Open Mentalism DELVING

spells.name: Item Feel
spells.description: Caster receives basic idea of item’s purpose, if any.

spells.name: Detect Power
spells.description: Detects magical power in an item, but not the realm or how much. A different item can be examined each round by concentrating.

spells.name: Delve Origin
spells.description: Gives a general idea of the place of origin of an item.

spells.name: Determine Realm
spells.description: Once the caster has detected magical power in an object, this spell will reveal what realm of magic is involved.

spells.name: Detect Cursed
spells.description: The caster learns if there is a curse on the item.

spells.name: Power Lore
spells.description: Caster learns the origins of an item’s power.

spells.name: Worked Stone
spells.description: Caster gets details of where, when, and how the examined stone was worked.

spells.name: Item Vision
spells.description: Caster gets a vision of a significant event in the item’s past.

spells.name: Person Vision
spells.description: Caster gets a vision of a significant event in the person’s past.

spells.name: Delving
spells.description: Caster learns the significant details about an item’s construction and purpose (not specific powers). ROLEMASTER

spells.name: Past Vision I
spells.description: Caster gets a vision up to 1 hour/level UNIFIED into the past; desired time can be set within ±30 min. Vision  must be associated with an item or place. Vision can last up Spell Law to 1 min/level, if the caster concentrates and remains inactive. Once the caster breaks concentration, the spell ends. 176

spells.name: Text Lore
spells.description: Gives details of where, when, how, and by whom the examined text was written. This does not provide the ability to read the text, but if the caster can read the text, this spell assists in comprehending it (+50 to any relevant maneuvers).

spells.name: Item Lore
spells.description: Gives major abilities and powers of an item.

spells.name: Spell’s Memory
spells.description: Gives a vision of the caster and circumstances of the casting of an active spell. Caster must touch a physical manifestation of the spell or a person or object under the influence of the spell.

spells.name: Death’s Memory
spells.description: Gives a vision of how someone died and an image of the killer, if any. This spell must be cast within 24 hours of the death and must be cast at the place of death or in the presence of the body. Vision occurs in real time and covers the dying process.

spells.name: Item Inspection
spells.description: Gives a complete rundown on an item’s non-magical construction, powers, and purpose. This spell will not reveal anything relating to magical powers the item may possess.

spells.name: Past Hold
spells.description: When cast just before a Past Vision spell, it allows caster to lock onto a specific event in an item’s past, and then examine that event with the Past Vision.

spells.name: Death’s Remembrance
spells.description: As Death’s Memory, except that it may be cast within one week of the death.

spells.name: Item Analysis
spells.description: The caster gains complete information on the item’s construction, purpose, magical abilities, and any non-magical bonuses.

spells.name: Past Vision II
spells.description: As Past Vision I, except time range is 1 day/level (error: ±1 hour) and vision can last up to 10 min/ level.

spells.name: Past Vision III
spells.description: As Past Vision I, except time range is 1 month/level (error: ±1 day) and vision can last up to 1 hour/level.

spells.name: Past Vision IV
spells.description: As Past Vision I, except time range is 1 year/level (error: ±1 week) and vision can last up to 5 hours/level.

spells.name: Memory Walk
spells.description: Caster may revisit any past experience. The memory is accurately enhanced, allowing the caster to note details that were missed at the time and recall vividly details that had been forgotten or misremembered.

spells.name: Mass Item Analysis
spells.description: As Item Analysis, except allows analysis of 1 item per round.

spells.name: Past Vision True
spells.description: As Past Vision I, except time range is 10 year/level (error: ±1 month) and vision can last up to 10 hour/level (each hour only takes 10 minutes of real time). 8.1 - Open Mentalism DETECTIONS

spells.name: Detect Mentalism
spells.description: Detects any active spell or active magical item from the Mentalism realm; caster can concentrate on a different 5'R area each round.

spells.name: Detect Essence
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except realm is Essence.

spells.name: Detect Channeling
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except realm is Channeling.

spells.name: Determine Emotion
spells.description: Caster can detect any extreme emotion (e.g., hatred, love, sadness, fear, etc.). In addition, the caster learns which emotion(s) the target is feeling. If there are no extremes of emotion (i.e., only normal feelings), nothing is detected. Caster may change the spell’s target each round.

spells.name: Detect Invisible
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except detects invisible things; all attacks against something so detected are at -50.

spells.name: Detect Evil
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except detects any evil being or any item created by evil or long used by a very evil person.

spells.name: Detect Traps
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except it gives a 75% chance of detecting a trap (modified by half the bonus or penalty difficulty of finding the trap through a Perception maneuver). See Section 10.14. If a trap is missed, the spell will not find it no matter how many times the caster scans the same area.

spells.name: Determine Power
spells.description: Caster learns the power (level) of every person or item or spell within the area examined. Caster can focus on a different 5'R area each round.

spells.name: Detect Substance
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except it detects any one substance (e.g., gold, silver, black pepper, goat’s milk, human blood, water) chosen by the caster at the time of casting.

spells.name: Power Typing
spells.description: Detects any active magic on a target person or item. It also analyzes general spell type (in item or cast) and what profession cast or created it; in case of a person, it gives an exact profession.

spells.name: Determine Power
spells.description: As Determine Power I, except range is 100' and area is a circle with a 10' radius.

spells.name: Detect Concealment
spells.description: As Detect Mentalism, except detects anything deliberately concealed by non-magical means, including secret doors and compartments, as well as hiding individuals. To be detected, a thing must have either been hidden within 1 day/ 8.1 Open level of the caster, or there must be someone currently within Mentalism range who is aware of the concealment. Lists

spells.name: See Invisible
spells.description: As Detect Invisible, except caster can see invisible things anywhere the caster can normally see; the caster’s attacks on invisible targets get no penalty (as they are not invisible to him).

spells.name: Detect Intrusion
spells.description: Caster learns if any external influences or probes are in the caster’s own mind. The involved spell or effect is learned, but this spell does not reveal the identity of the “intruder”.

spells.name: Spell Probe
spells.description: Detects any spell that has been cast in the area examined any time as far back as 1 day per caster level. For each spell, the caster learns the spell type and the list it was cast from. A different area may be probed each round.

spells.name: Determine Power
spells.description: As Determine Power I, except range is 500' and area is a circle with a 50' radius.

spells.name: Sense Problems
spells.description: Each round, the caster can detect any poison, venom, disease, curse, parasitic infection, or mental illness afflicting one living target, gaining a general knowledge of the type(s) of each present (e.g., a Channeling curse and two mild nerve poisons).

spells.name: Spell Typing
spells.description: Detects and exactly identifies every spell cast or active in the target area. It will also identify any magic item or spellcaster within the radius as if it were a target of Power Typing.

spells.name: See Invisible True
spells.description: As See Invisible, except caster need not concentrate in order to see invisible things.

spells.name: Determine Power
spells.description: As Determine Power I, except range is 1 mile and area is a circle with a 300' radius.

spells.name: Location V
spells.description: Gives the direction and distance to any specific object or place that the caster is familiar with or has had described in detail. The caster must have the dimensions of the object exact within 10% of actual size and know at least two other attributes that make the item unique (e.g., color, texture, weight, etc.) within range of the spell. Note that sometimes the caster must know more than two other attributes to make the item unique.

spells.name: Detect True
spells.description: Detects as any one of the lower level Detect spells. Thing detected and area of effect can both be changed each round.

spells.name: Far Location

spells.name: Spell Probe True

spells.name: Detection Mastery
spells.description: Caster may use any of the lower level spells on this list up to level 30 each round. Also, the caster may combine “detections”, allowing the detection of multiple things in the same targeted area during a single round (once the appropriate spells are active). ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 177 8.1 - Open Mentalism SEEMINGS

spells.name: Overlay I
spells.description: The caster can alter the visual appearance of an item, being, or place as perceived in the mind of one target for the duration of this spell. The other characteristics of the item, being, or place do not change. The nature of the item, place, or being does not change (e.g., a book will remain a book, a bridge will remain a bridge, etc.). The caster can set up to one conditional action per level of the caster in the Overlay spell (this action requires no concentration from the caster). The action is triggered on a given action by the target. By concentrating, the caster can exercise dynamic control over what is perceived in the target’s mind with regard to the affected item, being, or place (though the target must still be within range of the caster).

spells.name: Seeming I
spells.description: The caster can create a visual (static or dynamic) image (e.g., of an item, being, or place) which is perceived in the mind of one target for the duration of this spell. The caster can set up to one conditional action per level of the caster in the Seeming spell (this action requires no concentration from the caster). This action is triggered on a given action by the target. By concentrating, the caster can exercise dynamic control over what is perceived in the target’s mind with regard to the affected item, being, or place (though the target must still be within range of the caster).

spells.name: Overlay II

spells.name: Protection I
spells.description: Caster gains a bonus of +5 to RRs against spells and a bonus of +5 to DB against elemental attacks.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism
spells.description: When the caster is a target of a spell from the Realm of Mentalism, the “incoming” spell must first make an RR before the caster makes an RR. If the “incoming” spell passes the RR, it may target the caster of this spell normally; otherwise the incoming spell has no effect on this target. Being a “willing target” does not eliminate this effect, but the caster’s own spells do not need to make an RR. Note that the caster is considered to be a target of any spell which includes him in its area of effect or would “detect” him.

Multiple deflections can be done in a single round, but each is a separate instantaneous action (costing 1 AP for every instantaneous action after the first).

spells.name: Waterwall
spells.description: Creates a wall of water up to 10’x10’x1’. This wall requires 2 AP to cross, the pace of anyone moving through it at more than a Walk comes out with his pace reduced by two (e.g, a Sprint going in would be a Jog pace coming out) to a minimum of a Walk, and attacks through the wall suffer a -80 penalty. See Section 10.20 for additional details on Wall spells.

spells.name: Evaporation
spells.description: As Boil Liquid, except all the liquid is evaporated (i.e., boiled away and turned into heated gas) at a rate of one cubic foot of liquid per round of concentration. Liquid and vapor ROLEMASTER are subject to natural cooling once caster ceases concentration. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Liquid Corridor
spells.description: Creates a corridor through liquid up to Spell Law 100’ long, 3’ wide, and 10’ deep (must be open at the top).

spells.name: Bolt of Water I
spells.description: A bolt of water is shot from a water source within 20’ of the caster; results are determined on the Water Bolt Table. Range modifier is based on the distance from the water source to the bolt’s target. 184

spells.name: Curved Waterwall
spells.description: As Waterwall, except wall is 10’x20’x1’ and can be curved up to a semicircle.

spells.name: Calm Water
spells.description: All water within a 100’R is calmed; waves are cut by 20’ in the center and less towards the perimeter. This will negate the effects of currents in the area of effect.

spells.name: Neutralize Acid
spells.description: Transforms up to one cubic foot of acid per level to plain water.

spells.name: Waterwall True
spells.description: As Waterwall, but has a set duration of 1 minute/level and does not require concentration.

spells.name: Dry Swimming
spells.description: Caster can be exposed to liquid, even complete submersion, and come out completely dry, protecting his person and (probably more importantly) his possessions. While this does not prevent drowning, any penalties for heavy clothing should be significantly reduced, as they will not become water-logged and thus retain air and a certain degree of bouyancy.

spells.name: Liquid Corridor
spells.description: As Liquid Corridor I, except limit is 300’x4’x50’ deep.

spells.name: Bolt of Water III
spells.description: As Bolt of Water I, but range increment is 75’.

spells.name: Lesser Whirlpool
spells.description: Creates a whirlpool with a 20 foot radius in any liquid body that will draw in any objects in the liquid up to 200’ away. Objects capable of moving under their own power may make a Very Hard maneuver to resist the pull of the whirlpool.

spells.name: Wave
spells.description: Creates a wave moving away from the caster; wave is 1’ high/level in the center and 10’/level wide.

spells.name: Water Bubble
spells.description: Creates a bubble of air (10’R) around the caster and others, which will carry them in up to 100’ depth of water (air is replenished). Caster can direct the motion of the bubble at a rate of 30’/round (may be adjusted by the presence of (un) favorable water currents). If/when the caster stops concentrating, the bubble will rise to the surface at the same rate (30’/round). If the caster resumes concentrating before the bubble surfaces, the bubble may be controlled again. All objects inside the bubble will rise with it. After reaching the surface, the bubble will burst.

spells.name: Calm Water True
spells.description: As Calm Water, except radius is 100’/ lvl and waves are cut by 50’ in the center and caster need not concentrate.

spells.name: Liquid Corridor
spells.description: As Liquid Corridor, except limit is 100’/lvl x 6’x100’ deep.

spells.name: Superior Water Bubble
spells.description: As Water Bubble, except radius is 20’ and there is no depth limit.

spells.name: Waterspout
spells.description: Caster creates a waterspout over a body of water (minimally 1’ water depth), causing it to arise anywhere within range. The waterspout moves as the caster wills within the range of the spell (only a 10’ radius may be effectively attacked each round, and a Spell Mastery roll may be required to attack an actively evasive target). Anything caught within the waterspout is subjected to a battering vortex of water (use the Water Bolt table with a +50 OB, but treat the attack size as Large). Waterspout takes one round to form.

spells.name: Friendly Current
spells.description: The area of effect for this spell is the water immediately surrounding the boat that the caster is on (where “boat” should be interpreted loosely; a log is a “boat” for purposes of this spell if the caster is riding it on water). For the duration of this spell, the speed of the boat will be modified by 25’ per round (approximately 3 miles per hour) in a given direction (which may be “upstream” or “downstream” if following a river). One round of concentration will allow the caster to change the direction of this magical current.

spells.name: Liquid Mastery
spells.description: Caster can use one of the lower spells on this list each round, but with lesser ranges extended to 100’. 8.2 - Closed Mentalism MIND’S DOOR

spells.name: Door Opening *
spells.description: Opens a door. Any bars/bolts that the caster can see will be displaced to allow opening, while locks (magical or mundane) have but a 10% chance of being unlocked. See Section 10.14 for guidelines on handling locks.

spells.name: Leave Item I
spells.description: Caster “teleports” a single inanimate object to a point up to 100' away from its current location. There can be no intervening barriers in a direct line between the target and the point (for these purposes, a barrier is anything the object could not physically go through). The object has a maximum weight limit of 1 pound per level of the caster.

spells.name: Minor Leaving
spells.description: Caster “teleports” to a point up to 50' away, but there can be no intervening barriers in a direct line between the target and the point (for these purposes a barrier is anything the caster could not physically go through; a closed door is a barrier, a pit is not).

spells.name: Long Door Item I
spells.description: As Leave Item I, except the object can pass through barriers by specifying exact direction and distance. If the arrival point coincides with solid material, the object does not move (though the caster still loses the PP).

spells.name: Leaving I
spells.description: As Minor Leaving , except caster can move 100'.

spells.name: Mind Tongue I *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -50] Caster may mentally speak with any one thinking being. Caster must be able to see the target or the caster must know the exact location of the target. In all cases, the target must also be within range. 8.2 Closed

spells.name: Long Door Item II
spells.description: As Long Door Item I, except object Mentalism can be moved up to 200'. Lists

spells.name: Leaving III
spells.description: As Leaving I, except caster can move 300'.

spells.name: Leave Item V
spells.description: As Leave Item I, except object can be moved up to 500'.

spells.name: Minor Long Door
spells.description: As Minor Leaving, except caster can pass through barriers by specifying exact direction and distance. If the arrival point coincides with solid material, the caster does not move, instead being stunned (-50) 1-10 rounds, and the PP for this spell are still expended.

spells.name: Leaving V
spells.description: As Leaving I, except caster can move 500'.

spells.name: Long Door I
spells.description: As Minor Long Door, except caster can move 100'.

spells.name: Long Door Item V
spells.description: As Long Door Item I, except object can be moved up to 500'.

spells.name: Mind Tongue III *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -50] As Mind Tongue I, except range is 1,000'.

spells.name: Lord Leaving
spells.description: As Leaving I, except caster can move 100'/level up to 2000'.

spells.name: Long Door III
spells.description: As Long Door I, except caster can move 300'.

spells.name: Heavy Long Door
spells.description: As Long Door Item I, except object may weigh up to 10 pounds/level and may be moved up to 300'.

spells.name: Long Door V
spells.description: As Long Door I, except caster can move 500'.

spells.name: Mind Tongue IV *
spells.description: [RR Mod.: -50] As Mind Tongue I, except range is 1 mile.

spells.name: Mind’s Door I
spells.description: If caster has established mental contact with a target (an intelligent being) that will cooperate, the caster can teleport to the target’s location or the target can teleport to the caster’s location. There is no chance of error and the movement limit is 1 mile.

spells.name: Leaving True
spells.description: As Leaving I, except movement is limited only by the barrier restriction (on a flat plain this would be the horizon).

spells.name: Mind’s Door II
spells.description: As Mind’s Door I, except limit is 10 miles/level.

spells.name: Lord Long Door
spells.description: As Long Door I, except caster can move 2000'.

spells.name: Mind’s Courier
spells.description: As Mind’s Door I, except that there is no distance limit and instead of being able to change their own locations, the caster may hand an item up to 1 pound/ level to the target, or the target may hand such an item to the caster. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED

spells.name: Mind’s Door True
spells.description: As Mind’s Door I, except that  there is no distance limit. Spell Law 185 8.2 - Closed Mentalism MIND MASTERY

spells.name: Spell Store
spells.description: Caster may cast this spell with another spell in order to store that second spell. The spell to be stored must be cast within one minute after the Spell Store spell is cast. The stored spell may then be cast later as an instantaneous spell. The Spell Store spell costs the same number of PP as the spell that is stored. No other spell may be cast while a spell is stored.

spells.name: Presence • *
spells.description: Caster is aware of the presence of all sentient/ thinking beings within 20'.

spells.name: Inner Wall I
spells.description: Caster gets +5 bonus to RRs versus mind attacks.

spells.name: Efficient Sleep
spells.description: Caster’s next sleep period will require 25% less time to complete, with the caster awaking as fully refreshed as if the complete normal time had been spent (e.g., if the caster normally required eight hours of sleep in a night, this spell would allow the caster to sleep only six hours instead).

spells.name: Recall
spells.description: Caster’s recall of relevant past experience and ROLEMASTER education are enhanced to assist in the current situation; this UNIFIED  increases the caster’s Memory stat bonus by +25 for the duSpell Law ration of one maneuver involving Memory (e.g., the use of a “lore” skill).

spells.name: Misfeel Kind • *
spells.description: For the purposes of mental or magical detections, caster appears to be of any race with which the caster is familiar. 186

spells.name: Observation
spells.description: Caster gains insight or facts by observing a person or thing with intense concentration (e.g., room, item); increases caster’s Perception skill bonus by +50 for one “observation”.

spells.name: Inner Wall II
spells.description: Caster gets +10 bonus to RRs versus mind attacks.

spells.name: Misfeel Calling •
spells.description: As Misfeel Kind, except caster’s profession may be misrepresented.

spells.name: Correlation
spells.description: Caster is able to correlate known facts to obtain conclusions; increases the caster’s Reasoning stat bonus by +25 for the duration of one maneuver involving Reasoning (e.g., the use of a “lore” skill, picking a lock, one “navigation” attempt, etc.).

spells.name: Misfeel Power •
spells.description: As Misfeel Kind, except caster’s level may be misrepresented (to an upper limit of twice the caster’s actual level).

spells.name: Resolve
spells.description: This spell enables the caster to have unusually intense focus and self-control for one situation or maneuver; increasing the caster’s Self Discipline stat bonus by +25 for the duration of one maneuver involving Self Discipline (e.g., stalking a foe, a Perception maneuver, one “silent kill” attempt, etc.).

spells.name: Inner Wall III
spells.description: Caster gets +15 bonus to RRs versus mind attacks.

spells.name: Pseudoconcentration
spells.description: This spell assigns a compartmentalized portion of the caster’s mind to maintain a spell with a duration of “C”. Effectively, it allows that part of the caster’s mind to concentrate on the spell, freeing the rest of the caster’s mind to do other things (i.e., the caster does not take the normal penalty for Concentration). The caster can have only one Pseudoconcentration active at one time.

spells.name: Unpresence Self
spells.description: Target becomes undetectable by Presence spells or related abilities.

spells.name: Inner Wall V
spells.description: Caster gets +25 bonus to RRs versus mind attacks.

spells.name: Total Recall
spells.description: As Recall, except recall is nearly automatic and in effect gives the caster an eidetic memory; Memory bonus is +50.

spells.name: Misfeel • *
spells.description: Allows caster to use all of the Misfeel spells at once.

spells.name: Inner Wall True
spells.description: Caster gets +50 bonus to RRs versus mind attacks.

spells.name: Observation True
spells.description: As Observation, except virtually every detail in even a large situation is noticed; Perception bonus is +100.

spells.name: Correlation True
spells.description: As Correlation, except obtaining conclusions is nearly automatic; the Reasoning bonus is +50.

spells.name: Resolve True
spells.description: As Resolve, except focus/control is nearly total; the Self Discipline bonus is +50.

spells.name: Outer Wall
spells.description: As Inner Wall True, except protects not only the caster, but anyone with whom the caster is in telepathic contact.

spells.name: Misfeel True
spells.description: As Misfeel, except it has a ten minute/level duration and does not require concentration.

spells.name: Mirrormind • *
spells.description: Caster reflects all mind attacks back on the attacker who must then make an RR against his own spell. 8.2 - Closed Mentalism MOVEMENT

spells.name: Leaping *
spells.description: Allows caster to make one leap up to 50' laterally or 20' vertically (as a separate 1 AP action, with no Pace penalty for the leaping movement) in the round that the spell was cast.

spells.name: Landing *
spells.description: This spell may be cast when the caster begins to fall, taking effect immediately, allowing the caster to land safely in a fall up to 20' per level of the caster and to take that distance off the severity of any longer fall.

spells.name: Levitation I
spells.description: Allows caster to move up and down vertically 10' per round. This spell does not confer any ability to control horizontal movement, which must be accomplished by other means.

spells.name: Wind Drift
spells.description: Caster becomes nearly weightless (lighter than air), but has no magical movement control; weight gradually returns at the end of the duration.

spells.name: Underwater
spells.description: Caster can take action underwater as if on land.

spells.name: Slow Fly
spells.description: Caster can fly at a rate of 8'/round (approximately 1 mph). ). This spell allows free movement in all three dimensions and allows hovering.

spells.name: Levitation V
spells.description: As Levitation I, except rate is 50'/round.

spells.name: Long Dive *
spells.description: Caster can safely dive through the air up to 50' per level so long as there is deep enough water present at the end of the dive (at least 1' of water per 25' of dive).

spells.name: Bouncing
spells.description: As both Leaping and Landing, once each round.

spells.name: Merging
spells.description: Caster can merge into any solid, inanimate material. While merged, caster cannot move, perceive, or cast spells. When the caster emerges from the material, it is possible to emerge from any side or face of the material, although this is limited to moving “through” no more than the caster’s own body size plus two feet worth of material. 8.2 Closed The caster can exit at any time up to the end of spell duraMentalism tion (at which time the caster automatically emerges at the Lists entrance point).

spells.name: Fly I
spells.description: As Slow Fly, except rate is 35'/round (approximately 5 mph).

spells.name: Landing True *
spells.description: As Landing, except caster can land safely from any fall 99% of the time, and still takes the normal 20'/level off any fall for the 1% of the time that safety is not complete.

spells.name: Levitation XX
spells.description: As Levitation I, except rate is 200'/ round.

spells.name: Passing
spells.description: Caster may pass through any inanimate material up to 1 foot/level. It takes 1 round to pass through 2 feet of material.

spells.name: Fly II
spells.description: As Fly I, except rate is 75'/round (approximately 10 mph).

spells.name: Extended Flight I
spells.description: As Fly I, except duration is 10 minutes/level.

spells.name: Great Merge
spells.description: As Merging, except caster can turn within the material and can perceive the outside world if within 6" of the surface.

spells.name: Levitation True
spells.description: As Levitation I, except rate is 100'/ round and caster may remain levitated for an entire day.

spells.name: Manage Baggage
spells.description: When the caster casts another spell from this list (within one minute of completing this spell), the caster will be able to move three times the normal weight with that spell.

spells.name: Merge True
spells.description: As Great Merge, except caster can cast spells on himself while merged.

spells.name: Fly III
spells.description: As Fly I, except rate is 150'/round (approximately 20 mph).

spells.name: Passing True
spells.description: As Passing, except caster can pass through as much material as the duration allows at a rate of 10'/rnd.

spells.name: Fly True
spells.description: As Fly I, except rate is 225'/round (approximately 30 mph).

spells.name: Extended Flight
spells.description: As Fly True, except duration is 10 minutes/level.

spells.name: Master of Movement
spells.description: Caster may cast any of the spells up to 30th level on this list each round. ROLEMASTER UNIFIED  Spell Law 187 8.2 - Closed Mentalism SENSE MASTERY

spells.name: Sly Ears
spells.description: Caster gains an extremely acute sense of hearing. This results in +50 to Perception rolls involving only hearing, +25 to Perception involving hearing and other senses.

spells.name: Nightvision
spells.description: Caster can see up to 100' as if it were daylight, so long as there is some light.

spells.name: Sidevision
spells.description: Caster has a 300° field of vision. The flank bonus for attacks against the caster is lowered to +5 and the rear bonus is lowered to +15.

spells.name: Detect Illusion
spells.description: Caster can check one object or place (up to a 5'R) and tell if it is an illusion or has an illusion on it.

spells.name: Watervision
spells.description: Caster can see 100' in any water (including murky water) as if through air in daylight.

spells.name: Scent
spells.description: Caster gains an extremely acute sense of smell (e.g., +50 to Perception involving only smell, +25 to Perception involving smell and other senses).

spells.name: Fogvision
spells.description: As Nightvision, plus caster sees 100' in any ROLEMASTER precipitation (including thick fog) as if the air were clear. UNIFIED 

spells.name: Touch
spells.description: Caster gains extreme tactile sensitivity. This Spell Law provides a bonus to any action requiring a sense of touch. For example, caster might receive +25 to picking locks, disarming traps, opening secret doors, etc. and +50 to Perception involving only touch, +25 to Perception involving touch and other senses). 188

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: As Nightvision, except any darkness can be seen through. No light at all is needed for this spell to work.

spells.name: Mentalist Ear
spells.description: Caster can pick a point up to 100'/ level away and hear as if at that point (there can be intervening objects such as walls); the caster must have visited the point before or have the location in sight. Note that this means that the caster does not have hearing at his own location.

spells.name: Mentalist Eye
spells.description: As Mentalist Ear, except caster can see instead of listening.

spells.name: Disillusion I
spells.description: While this spell is in effect, one illusion within the caster’s range ceases to exist for the caster only. The caster must specify the illusion to be negated (unless caster knows something is an illusion, this spell would be gambling PP).

spells.name: Detect Illusion
spells.description: As Detect Illusion, except caster can concentrate on one object or place per round.

spells.name: Multivision
spells.description: As all lower level Vision spells functioning at the same time.

spells.name: Nightvision True
spells.description: As Nightvision, except range is the normal daylight vision range.

spells.name: Mentalist Senses
spells.description: As Mentalist Ear, except caster can use all senses at the remote point.

spells.name: Disillusion True
spells.description: As Disillusion, except all illusions within range cease to exist for the caster.

spells.name: Watervision
spells.description: As Watervision, except range is the normal daylight vision range.

spells.name: Fogvision True
spells.description: As Fogvision, except range is the normal daylight vision range.

spells.name: Multivision True
spells.description: As all lower level Vision spells functioning at the same time.

spells.name: Mentalist Ear
spells.description: As Mentalist Ear, except range is 1 mile/level.

spells.name: Mentalist Eye
spells.description: As Mentalist Eye, except range is 1 mile/level.

spells.name: Mentalist Senses True
spells.description: As Mentalist Senses, except range is 1 mile/level.

spells.name: Microvision
spells.description: Caster can view objects within 2' at up to 40x magnification.

spells.name: Sensory Merge
spells.description: Caster can “merge” senses with those of a subject whose location is known by spells or by prior arrangement. Both caster and target will have a full awareness of both locations; the spell provides for this not being terribly confusing. If target is not at the specified location, the PP for this spell are wasted. 8.2 - Closed Mentalism SHIFTING

spells.name: Balance *
spells.description: Adds +50 to any rolls for any moving maneuvers performed at a walking pace or less (e.g., walking a 3” beam).

spells.name: Contraction
spells.description: Allows caster to disjoint limbs, contract muscles, etc.; in order to escape manacles and ropes and slip through small places (+50 to +100 to escape maneuvers).

spells.name: Face Shifting
spells.description: Alters the caster’s face to resemble someone else, but not so closely as to be confused on a close inspection.

spells.name: Change Lore
spells.description: Allows caster to analyze the form of another being for future use with True Change. The caster can only have as many forms analyzed as he has ranks in this list. Caster may choose to forget a form at any time to make room for replacements.

spells.name: Waterlungs
spells.description: Caster can breathe water but not air.

spells.name: Rubberform
spells.description: Alters the caster’s flesh and bones to a more elastic form, reducing by one the severity of all “Krush” and “Impact” criticals taken.

spells.name: Changing To Kind
spells.description: Alters the caster’s entire body to the form of another humanoid race. The form cannot be that of a particular individual form. For example, a human caster could take the form of a Dwarf, but not the Dwarven High Chancellor. Only the physical form is gained (e.g., a target who becomes a Dwarf would not receive the Dwarves’ ability to see in the dark). This spell does not allow the caster to change his Size category, but size may be changed as desired within that limit. This does not change anything the caster carries or wears, only his own body, except that prosthetics added by the Lay Healer Base list Prosthetics will change with the caster.

spells.name: Gaslungs
spells.description: Caster can breathe any gas as normal air.

spells.name: Depth Mastery
spells.description: Caster’s body is able to adapt to extremely high or low pressure or sudden changes in pressure, 8.2 Closed without suffering any harm. This does not apply to crushing Mentalism by solids, only pressures from environmental gasses or liquids. Lists

spells.name: Greater Face Shifting
spells.description: As Face Shifting, except duration is 1 hour/level.

spells.name: Changing Lungs
spells.description: Caster can breathe water, air, and any gas at will.

spells.name: Size Change
spells.description: Alters the caster’s Size by one category. This does not change anything the caster carries or wears, only his own body, except that prosthetics added by the Lay Healer Base list Prosthetics will change with the caster.

spells.name: Change
spells.description: As Changing to Kind, except alteration can be to any organic form within the caster’s own Size category; caster does not obtain any special abilities.

spells.name: Water Breather
spells.description: As Waterlungs, except duration is one hour/level.

spells.name: Solid Form
spells.description: Caster becomes as if made of very dense stone (cannot move or cast spells).

spells.name: No Lungs
spells.description: Caster does not need to breathe at all.

spells.name: True Change
spells.description: As Change, except altered form can be that of a specific being analyzed by Change Lore.

spells.name: Changing
spells.description: As True Change, except caster may assume a different form anytime during the spell; each change of shape takes one round of concentration.

spells.name: Sea Dweller
spells.description: As Waterlungs plus Depth Mastery, except duration is one hour/level.

spells.name: Waterform
spells.description: Caster takes the form of a liquid mass, able to seep through cracks as well as water. In this form, the caster can move through water at 10 mph, but is unable to cast spells.

spells.name: Mistform
spells.description: Caster takes the form of a mist, able to fly 20 mph (modified by ambient winds, of course), seep through cracks, extend self to become virtually invisible, etc. (may not cast spells in this form).

spells.name: Form Master
spells.description: As Waterform and Mistform, except the two forms are interchangeable at will (concentrate for 1 round to change).

spells.name: Waterform True
spells.description: As Waterform, but caster can cast spells with a -10 penalty.

spells.name: Mistform True
spells.description: As Mistform, but caster can cast spells with a -10 penalty.

spells.name: Change Master
spells.description: As Changing and Form Master, exROLEMASTER cept all forms are interchangeable at will (concentrate for 1 UNIFIED  round to change). The caster’s Size may be changed by one Spell Law category. 189 8.2 - Closed Mentalism SOLID MANIPULATION

spells.name: Warm Stone
spells.description: Warms 1 cubic foot of stone per level up to 100°F (38°C) at a rate of 1 cubic foot per round of concentration (without concentration, the material will remain at its current temperature for the remainder of the duration).

spells.name: Warm Metal
spells.description: As Warm Stone, except 6 cubic inches of metal/level can be warmed at a rate of 6 cubic inches per round of concentration.

spells.name: Warm Other
spells.description: As Warm Stone, except can affect any solid, inanimate, non-metal material.

spells.name: Heat Stone
spells.description: As Warm Stone except temperature limit is 500°F (260°C) and it takes 1 round per 100°F (56°C). Caster need only touch the target when the spell is cast. The caster is immune to this heat. The caster must concentrate to increase the temperature (without concentration, the material will retain its current temperature for the duration of the spell).

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.description: As Heat Stone, except 6 cubic inches of metal/level can be heated.

spells.name: Heat Other Solid
spells.description: As Heat Stone, except affects any solid, inanimate, non-metal material.

spells.name: Cool Solid
spells.description: Any solid, inanimate, non-metal material can be cooled to -20°F (-29°C), at a rate of 1 cubic foot per round (cooling spreads evenly from initial point of cooling ROLEMASTER UNIFIED unless caster concentrates to direct spread). 

spells.name: Cool Metal
spells.description: As Cool Solid, except 6 cubic inches of Spell Law metal/level can be cooled. 190

spells.name: Chill Other Solid
spells.description: Any solid, inanimate, non-metal material can be cooled to -200°F (-129°C), at a rate of (1 cu' and -100°F[-56°C])/round. The caster must concentrate to decrease the temperature (without concentration, the material will retain its current temperature for the duration of the spell).

spells.name: Cracks Call
spells.description: Any previous cracks or flaws in material up to a 10'x10'x10' section will extend to their limit.

spells.name: Melt Solid
spells.description: As Heat Other Solid, except the only limit to the temperature is the melting point of the solid (i.e., until the solid melts) or sublimation point if the solid converts directly to a gas when heated. Will affect 6 cu"/level of metal or 1 cu'/level of any other material.

spells.name: Chill Metal
spells.description: As Chill Solid, except affects metal to a limit of six cubic inches per level and a like rate of chilling.

spells.name: Crumble
spells.description: As Cracks Call, except material with cracks will crumble to dust.

spells.name: Bowbreak
spells.description: Will break a piece of wood up to one foot in diameter (6" radius).

spells.name: Stone Door
spells.description: Creates 3'x6'x1' doorway through stone.

spells.name: Metal Door
spells.description: As Stone Door, except doorway can be through metal.

spells.name: Bladebreak
spells.description: As Bowbreak, except a piece of metal can be broken, up to 3" in diameter.

spells.name: Lockbreak

spells.name: Mold Stone
spells.description: Caster’s hands can mold up to one cubic foot of stone as if it were putty or clay. Stone hardens to normal consistency when the caster is finished. Quality of results depends on caster’s skill and time invested.

spells.name: Repair Stone
spells.description: Caster can repair any flaws in a piece of stone, whether cracks, blemishes, or other imperfections, including the flaws that reduce the value of precious stones. The stone affected cannot be larger than one cubic foot per level.

spells.name: Instant Stance *

spells.name: Rush I
spells.description: Caster gains an additional 1 AP to use each round this spell is in effect (i.e., caster gets 5 AP to use during the round), and he may maintain the spell so long as he wishes. However, caster incurs a -2 fatigue penalty at the end of each round (adding to any existing penalty including from previous rounds). It is not possible to rest while this spell remains in effect.

spells.name: Long Stride I
spells.description: Caster has a 10% increase in his base movement rate (BMR), rounding up to the nearest foot/ round. For a BMR of 20'/round, this results in a 2'/round increase.

spells.name: Haste I

spells.name: Lightning Thought

No physical action may be taken in this moment, nor may any spells be cast, but much mental activity may be done. In addition to being able to take time to consider when otherwise faced with a need for an instant decision, the character’s Lore and Science skills (and the knowledge aspects of other skills) may be used to make maneuvers (although no skill may be consulted more than three times). If the caster is in mental contact with someone, he may send a message of any length, though the recipient will need the normal time to process it. Anything mental sensed may be examined as carefully as might be done in a full round.

Multiple Flowstop spells may not be cast upon the same wound.

Any special features or enhanced appearance depends on the appropriate Crafting skill(s) of the caster. Requires that Measurements has been cast to determine necessary form of the prosthetic.
