spells.description: Enchants an item that increases the casting levels of all spells cast by the bearer by 5 levels. Multiple castings of Increase Power per day are cumulative (+5 each). Days required may be reduced by limiting application: a single Spell Type halves them; a single spell list makes them one-eighth normal.

spells.name: Power Multiplier III
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a x1.75 PP Multiplier.

spells.name: Elemental Power IV
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which provides the bearer a +20 bonus to all Ball and Cone OBs.

spells.name: Spell Adder IV
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a +4 Spell Adder.

spells.name: Casting Focus V
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which provides the bearer a +25 bonus to all Spell-Casting Rolls.

spells.name: Power Multiplier IV
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a x2 PP Multiplier.

spells.name: Spell Adder V
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a +5 Spell Adder.

spells.name: Casting Focus VII
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which provides the bearer a +35 bonus to all Spell-Casting Rolls.

spells.name: Spell Adder VII
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a +7 Spell Adder. This spell may also create a +6 Spell Adder, requiring 36 PP and enchantment days rather than 40.

spells.name: Power Multiplier V
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a x2.5 PP Multiplier.

spells.name: Power Stabilization
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it will negate 50% of spell failure effects (the wielder need not roll on the spell failure table, but the spell still fails quietly and PP expended is lost).

spells.name: Power Multiplier VI
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a x3 PP Multiplier.

spells.name: Spell Adder X
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item which is a +10 Spell Adder. This spell may also create a +8 Spell Adder (50 PP and enchantment days) or a +9 Spell Adder (70 PP and enchantment days).

spells.name: Logic Fork
spells.description: Allows caster to create an item with a single embedded ability that allows the user to freely choose among the spells embedded in that ability (e.g., a Daily II ability with two embedded first level spells would allow casting either spell twice in a day or both once, though two separate Embed I spells would still be required).

spells.name: List Embedding
spells.description: Allows caster to use an Embed # spell to embed an Essence spell list up to the level of the Embed spell's #. Each spell to be included must be cast into the item during the enchantment, but only a single Embed spell suitable for the highest level spell is required. Lower level spells from the embedded list are cast at the level of the highest level spell embedded.

spells.name: Embed I
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 1st level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Wand
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a wand containing one or more Essence spells.

spells.name: Embed II
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 2nd level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily I
spells.description: Allows caster to give an item the ability to cast a 1st level Essence spell embedded in the item (using an Embed spell) once per day. Daily spells have considerable flexibility; see Daily/Constant Items in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Embed III
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 3rd level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Rod
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a rod containing one or more Essence spells.

spells.name: Embed IV
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 4th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily III
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 3rd level Essence spell.

spells.name: Embed V
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 5th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Staff
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a staff containing one or more Essence spells.

spells.name: Embed VI
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 6th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily V
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 5th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Embed VII
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 7th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Half-Bole
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a half-bole containing one or more Essence spells.

spells.name: Constant III
spells.description: Allows caster to embed an Essence spell of up to 3rd level (in conjunction with an Embed spell) that functions constantly (or this spell may be cast twice to permit activation of the embedded spell "at will" or when triggered).

spells.name: Daily VII
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 7th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Embed X
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 10th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Bole
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a bole containing one or more Essence spells.

spells.name: Daily X
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 10th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Embed XX
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 20th level or lower level Essence spell in an item.

spells.name: Constant X
spells.description: As Constant III, except an Essence spell of up to 10th level.

spells.name: Daily XX
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 20th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Embed True
spells.description: Allows caster to embed an Essence spell of any level in an item.

spells.name: Daily XXX
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 30th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Daily L
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 50th level Essence spell.

spells.name: Constant True
spells.description: As Constant III, except an Essence spell of any level.

spells.name: Work Mundane Liquid #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical, non-toxic liquids to create an enchanted item (normally a potion); all required tools and material must be present. Alternatively it can work a non-magical liquid without enchanting it in half the normal time. In either case the caster gains +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Fluid Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the nature and origin of a natural liquid or gas, and when and how a worked liquid or gas was obtained and worked.

spells.name: Make Potion III #
spells.description: Allows caster to make one dose of a potion with up to 3 levels of spells embedded in it (no Embed spell required), e.g. one 3rd level spell or three 1st level spells. Spells take effect at the level of the highest level spell embedded; normally they affect the imbiber, but the creator may allow the imbiber to select a target as if casting it.

spells.name: Work Poison I #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with a poison of up to 5th level potency to create an enchanted poison (or to work a poison without enchanting it in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers). Use of this spell eliminates the risk of poisoning oneself while working with the poison.

spells.name: Work Mundane Gas #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical, non-toxic gasses to create an enchanted item (normally a gaseous potion), or to work a non-magical gas without enchanting it in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Distill Herb
spells.description: Allows caster to create a potion into which an herb is dissolved at the beginning of enchanting. The potion provides the herb's effects upon consumption with no delay. If this is the only quality, the only other spell needed is a Work spell for the base liquid (or gas).

spells.name: Distill Essence
spells.description: Allows caster to create a potion which causes the imbiber to instantly recover 20% of their maximum PP (but not more than expended), if the imbiber uses the Realm of Essence only. (Make Potion is not required, since no spell is embedded.)

spells.name: Powdered Potion #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Potion spell, the caster creates a powder that can later be reconstituted as a regular potion by mixing with a small amount of liquid; the amount of powder is quite small.

spells.name: Make Potion VI #
spells.description: As Make Potion III, except 6 levels of spells.

spells.name: Work Poison II #
spells.description: As Work Poison I, except the poison may be of up to 10th level potency.

spells.name: Work Magical Liquid #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-toxic magical liquids to create an enchanted item (normally a potion), or to work a magical liquid without enchanting it in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Lotion Potion #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Potion spell, creates a cream/gel that can be rubbed onto the desired target of the embedded spell (a 4 AP action). It can also provide a temporary enchantment (e.g. an "armor polish" giving Armor II) lasting 24 hours. Requires Work Mundane/Magical Liquid for the base.

spells.name: Gaseous Potion #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Potion spell (and Work Mundane/Magical Gas), creates a gaseous potion with area of effect 1' radius per spell level. Everyone in the area when released is affected; the gas delivers the spell by contact (holding your breath offers no protection). One casting covers an entire batch.

spells.name: Distill Essence True
spells.description: As Distill Essence, except with no restriction on the imbiber's realm.

spells.name: Make Potion X #
spells.description: As Make Potion III, except 10 levels of spells.

spells.name: Work Poison III #
spells.description: As Work Poison I, except the poison may be of up to 15th level potency.

spells.name: Acidic Gas #
spells.description: Cast with a Work Liquid spell, converts a normal acid into an acidic gas (kept in a breakable container for use as a missile). The acid forms a cloud 1' radius per level of the potion when released, doing the equivalent of a splash with the acid to everyone caught within.

spells.name: Work Magical Gas #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-toxic magical gasses to create an enchanted item (normally a gaseous potion), or to work a magical gas without enchanting it in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Poison Gas #
spells.description: Cast with a Work Poison spell, converts a normal poison into a poisonous gas (kept in a breakable container as a missile). The poison then works by inhalation (breath holding protects). Radius of effect from point of release is 2' per potency level of the poison.

spells.name: Make Potion XX #
spells.description: As Make Potion III, except 20 levels of spells.

spells.name: Work Poison True #
spells.description: As Work Poison I, except the poison may be of any potency.

spells.name: Make Potion True #
spells.description: As Make Potion III, except 50 levels of spells or one spell of any level.

spells.name: Poison Gas Cloud #
spells.description: As Poison Gas, except the radius is 5' per level of the poison.

spells.name: Toxic Gas Cloud #
spells.description: As Poison Gas Cloud, except the gas remains effective for one round per level of the enchanted gas (not the level of the poison itself). The cloud can be moved as any other gas.

spells.name: Concentrated Potion #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Potion spell, creates a concentrated potion requiring only a single drop to have effect. The resulting potion has one drop (dose) per every full 5 levels of the caster.

spells.name: Acidic Cloud #
spells.description: As Acidic Gas, except the gas forms a 2' per level radius cloud and remains effective for one round per level. If someone inhales the cloud (breath holding postpones this), every round after the first treat as if that individual had ingested the acid.

spells.name: Elixir of Life
spells.description: Allows caster to create one dose of a potion that will heal all wounds, illness, or poisoning in the imbiber, as long as death has not occurred. Recovery takes a single round.

spells.name: Elixir of Immortality
spells.description: Allows caster to create one dose of a potion that will stop aging in the imbiber.

spells.name: Warning
spells.description: Enchants an item that always provides the attuned bearer with a last-second sense of peril when he would otherwise be caught flatfooted, leaving him merely surprised instead. (Note: a General spell's skill bonus can apply to all specializations of a skill by doubling time, or a whole skill category by quadrupling time; cost may be halved by restricting applicability. By default the RR bonus applies to the item and its bearer; reducing the bonus by 5 extends it to a 5' radius, +5' per further -5.)

spells.name: Detection
spells.description: Enchants an item to detect the presence of one thing (a particular race, metal, stone, etc.); when present within the detection radius the item glows, chimes, or signals. Base radius 5', increasable by 5' per effective level; doubling time and PP allows a broader category (e.g. demons, precious metals, gems).

spells.name: Multiform II
spells.description: Enchants an item that has two different forms. Both forms are created as separate items then combined; the Multiform enchantment is added to the form taking the most days, completed last. Enchantments on each form are done individually, with Work spells for all objects combined. A "form" may be multiple objects.

spells.name: Initiative Bonus
spells.description: Enchants an item providing a +1 bonus to Initiative, increasable by casting multiple times (counting as a single ability, e.g. +3 needs three castings = a 12th level ability). Normally applies only when using the item; doubling time and PP makes it apply to all actions.

spells.name: Item Analysis
spells.description: The caster gains complete information on the item's magical abilities and any non-magical bonuses. Attunement may still be required to use the item.

spells.name: General I
spells.description: Enchants an item providing a +5 bonus to one unspecialized skill or skill specialization, or +5 to one type of RR (one realm, Physical, or Fear), or +2 ranks to a skill for uses that use the number of ranks only. Bonuses to Combat Training skills are not cumulative with bonuses from weapons.

spells.name: Multiform III
spells.description: As Multiform II, except the item can assume three different forms.

spells.name: Isolate Contents
spells.description: Enchants one container so the contents suffer no ill effects from any exterior force so long as the container is intact (e.g. a chest could tumble down a staircase and glassware within would not be broken or even disorganized).

spells.name: Graceful Exit
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it turns 50% of Absolute Failure results by the bearer in a given skill category into ordinary failures.

spells.name: General II
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +10 for skills and RRs, while 4 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: Stat Bonus I
spells.description: Enchants an item that provides a +1 increase to the stat bonus of one stat specified at the time of casting.

spells.name: Multiform IV
spells.description: As Multiform II, except the item can assume four different forms.

spells.name: Enhance Portability
spells.description: Enchants one container so the contents have half their normal weight. May be added more than once (e.g. enchanted twice, 60 lbs of loot weighs as if 15 lbs).

spells.name: Self-Organizing Storage
spells.description: Enchants one container so the attuned user can always take out the item he is looking for immediately (a 1 AP action to retrieve any item from the container).

spells.name: General III
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +15 for skills and RRs, while 6 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: Multiform V
spells.description: As Multiform II, except the item can assume five different forms.

spells.name: Dimensional Relativity
spells.description: Enchants one container so the interior dimensions are twice the exterior dimensions (e.g. a 2'x2'x3' chest holds 4'x4'x6' of contents). May be added more than once, doubling each interior dimension each time. Applicable to "containers" of people (a deceptively spacious hovel, tent, etc.).

spells.name: Reduced Time I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the maximum cost for its use is reduced by one AP. The minimum cost remains the same, but penalties are calculated based on the altered maximum (e.g. a sword with Reduced Time I needs only 3 AP for a full melee attack and attacks at -25 rather than -50 if only 2 AP are used).

spells.name: Stat Bonus II
spells.description: As Stat Bonus I, except an increase of +2.

spells.name: Multiform True
spells.description: As Multiform II, except the item can assume up to as many different forms as the caster's level divided by three (round down).

spells.name: Stat Bonus III
spells.description: As Stat Bonus I, except an increase of +3.

spells.name: General IV
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +20 for skills and RRs, while 8 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: Stat Bonus IV
spells.description: As Stat Bonus I, except an increase of +4.

spells.name: Reduced Time II
spells.description: As Reduced Time I, except that reduction is by two AP.

spells.name: Stat Bonus V
spells.description: As Stat Bonus I, except an increase of +5.

spells.name: General V
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +25 for skills and RRs, while 10 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: General VI
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +30 for skills and RRs, while 12 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: General VII
spells.description: As General I, except bonus is +35 for skills and RRs, while 14 ranks may be added for skill rank purposes.

spells.name: Metal Analysis
spells.description: Gives nature and origin of natural metal, and when and how worked metal was obtained and worked.

spells.name: Stone Analysis
spells.description: Gives nature and origin of natural stone, and when and how worked stone was obtained and worked.

spells.name: Work Mundane Stone #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical, non-precious stone to create an enchanted item; all required tools and material must be present. Alternatively, it can work non-magical, non-precious stone without enchanting it in half the normal time. In either case the caster gains +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Create Alloy #
spells.description: Allows caster a +30 bonus to any maneuvers to produce an alloy. Advised (but not required) when creating an item made from the components of an alloy rather than beginning with alloyed metal, as a Metalcraft maneuver will be required to create the alloy.

spells.name: Work Lesser Metals #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +0 (e.g., iron or inferior bronze).

spells.name: Metallic Wand #
spells.description: Allows caster to create a charged item of inorganic materials (the name is something of a misnomer, as one could create a staff of glass) when used in conjunction with the appropriate Make spell (see Organic Skills list).

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal I #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +5 (e.g., low steel or superior bronze).

spells.name: Work Mundane Gemstone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical precious stone.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal II #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +10 (e.g., high steel).

spells.name: Work Stone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any non-precious stone.

spells.name: Work Metal I #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +5 (including magical materials, e.g., zataak).

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal III #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +15 (e.g., white alloy).

spells.name: Work Inorganic #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical non-metallic inorganic materials (e.g., glass).

spells.name: Work Metal II #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +10.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal IV #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +20 (e.g., black alloy).

spells.name: Size Reduction Inorganic #
spells.description: Allows the caster to create an inorganic magical item reduced from its normal size (e.g., a "rod" could be made wand-sized). Making a "staff" wand-sized requires casting this spell twice each day during creation.

spells.name: Work Gemstone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any precious stone.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any non-magical metals.

spells.name: Work Metal III #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +15 (e.g., starfall).

spells.name: Work Inorganic True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any non-metallic inorganic materials (e.g., laen).

spells.name: Work Metal IV #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +20.

spells.name: Mutual Aura I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it turns the usual protection of items by the bearer's aura into reverse, offering some of the strength of its aura to protect the bearer. This allows the bearer to make all RRs against magic as if he were at least 20th level. If the bearer is actually 20th or higher level, he receives no benefit.

spells.name: Work Metal V #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +25 (e.g., adamant steel).

spells.name: Mutual Aura II
spells.description: As Mutual Aura I, except minimum level is 30th.

spells.name: Work Metal VI #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +30 (e.g., eog).

spells.name: Mutual Aura III
spells.description: As Mutual Aura I, except minimum level is 50th.

spells.name: Work Metal True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Stone, except caster may work with any metals.

spells.name: Unbreakable Work
spells.description: Allows caster to create an item that is nigh-indestructible: it will never fail a breakage check and gains a second RR against any spell that would destroy or break it. If given twice, the item becomes almost impossible to destroy, requiring a special method specified at the time of casting.

spells.name: Machine Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the general purpose of a target machine, its approximate time and place of manufacture, the skills (and spell lists, if any) needed to make it, and its readiness for operation. The caster gains +10 for subsequent maneuvers working with or on this machine.

spells.name: Integrate Device
spells.description: Allows caster to include a mechanical device in the body of a construct, which the construct is then able to use.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence I
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Dim Intelligence.

spells.name: Communication Improvement
spells.description: Enchants an intelligent item so it can communicate by touch telepathy. Doubling time and PP (to 8) instead gives the power of speech; tripling (12) gives ranged telepathy.

spells.name: Sensory Enhancement
spells.description: Enchants a construct, golem, or intelligent item with an additional sense, an extension of one of its senses (e.g., infrared sight), or (with a suitable location) the ability to record what one sense perceives for later playback (a Medium Mechanics: Operation maneuver); only the last 24 hours are available.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence II
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Low Intelligence.

spells.name: Mend Mechanism
spells.description: Allows caster to instantly repair to full working order one single-purpose mechanical device (e.g., a clock or dart thrower). Damage may be extensive, but no more than 10% of material may be missing or this spell will fail.

spells.name: Spellcaster
spells.description: Enchants an item possessed of an artificial intelligence to cast spells. Cast multiple times to increase the effect: one spell grants the Open lists of a single Realm, doubling adds the Closed lists, tripling adds all other lists of that Realm, and additional castings (each +8 days/PP) add another Realm for Hybrid casting. Also provides Power Development and the Adept's choice of spell lists up to the item's learning capacity.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence III
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Medium Intelligence.

spells.name: Improved Speed
spells.description: Enchants a mechanical device to cut the time to operate it in half for one specific operation (e.g., raising a portcullis, resetting a crossbow or siege engine). May be added multiple times (e.g., twice for one-quarter the usual time).

spells.name: Additional Skills
spells.description: Increases the learning potential of an item with artificial intelligence: either the maximum number of skills it can learn is increased by one category, or the maximum ranks in one skill is increased by one category (see Table 5-3i).

spells.name: Selfwinding
spells.description: Enchants a mechanical device so that upon use it resets itself into a ready state (taking the normal time, with parts moving on their own). Lets traps reset, crossbows and siege engines wind themselves (reloading ammunition still manual), and clockwork toys and timepieces keep themselves wound.

spells.name: Animate Construct
spells.description: Allows caster to animate a construct, as described in Section 5.4.

spells.name: Bottomless Reservoir
spells.description: Enchants a container so it never runs empty (an initial supply must be in place). An appropriate Work spell for the contents must be incorporated. By default only mundane items/substances; if the GM allows magical reserves, all spells to enchant the supplied item must also be cast on the reservoir each day.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence IV
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with High Intelligence.

spells.name: Hand-Key
spells.description: Enchants a mechanism so its operation is tied to a hand-shaped depression; an authorized hand makes it operate (or not, for a trap). Shape-changing or a very detailed forgery (down to warmth and fingerprints) can fool it. Any authorized person may authorize another with an Easy attunement maneuver by both.

spells.name: Architectural Wonder
spells.description: Allows caster to create a large piece of architectural/engineering work with twice the normal strength (a bridge supports twice the weight, a fortress wall endures twice the force, etc.).

spells.name: Perpetual Motion
spells.description: Allows caster to create a clockwork device that works forever without winding, maintaining constant function (unlike Selfwinding it does not need to run down and renew itself).

spells.name: Voice-Key
spells.description: As Hand-Key, except operation is tied to the sound of an authorized person's voice speaking the correct words. Defeating it requires both mimicking an authorized voice and discovering the correct phrase.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence V
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Superior Intelligence.

spells.name: Mend Mechanism True
spells.description: As Mend Mechanism, except it may apply to a complex machine with many working parts. For each ton of machinery it requires one hour for repairs to complete.

spells.name: Automated Vehicle
spells.description: Enchants a vehicle so it operates itself (a carriage without a horse, a siege tower that advances on its own, a sailing ship without a crew). Substitutes for up to fifty men or a dozen horses; may be added multiple times. The vehicle cannot direct itself and requires a pilot.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence VI
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Genius Intelligence.

spells.name: Overclocking
spells.description: Enchants a construct so it has an extra 2 AP each round, but makes the mechanisms less stable: any Impact or Unbalancing critical it suffers counts as Slaying I. Cannot be combined with an embedded intelligence of any kind.

spells.name: Emergency Shutdown
spells.description: Target machine immediately ceases operations, freezing in its current position. This can be a single mechanism, a closely-working system, or a complex machine unified through enchantment (a construct or self-mobile vehicle). Loosely independent assemblies (like a sailing ship) cannot be so shut down unless magically enhanced as a machine.

spells.name: Automated Workshop
spells.description: Converts a workshop to one with multiple self-operating tools and devices working to the user's needs, equivalent to a full set of assistants. All work is done in two-thirds the normal time (not reducing item enchantment time) with +30 to all maneuvers, cumulative with the benefits of a Work spell.

spells.name: Artificial Intelligence VII
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant an item with Transcendent Intelligence.

spells.name: Programmable Vehicle
spells.description: As Automated Vehicle, except the vehicle can steer itself. Setting a course requires both a Navigation or Region Lore maneuver (difficulty as conventional travel) and a Mechanics: Operation maneuver (starting at Very Hard, harder for complex routes).

spells.name: Work Mundane Paper #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical paper to create an enchanted item; all required tools and material must be present. Alternatively it can work non-magical paper without enchanting it in half the normal time. In either case the caster gains +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Work Mundane Cloth #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with non-magical fabric.

spells.name: Work Mundane Leather #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with non-magical leather or hide.

spells.name: Work Mundane Wood #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with non-magical wood.

spells.name: Make Rune Paper #
spells.description: Allows caster to make a sheet of paper or parchment (vellum, etc.) which will hold a rune as described in the Open Essence list Rune Mastery (or the Sanctifier list Sacred Runes).

spells.name: Work Organic #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any non-magical organic materials.

spells.name: Make Wand #
spells.description: Allows the caster to make a "wand" which may have spells embedded in it.

spells.name: Recyclable Runes
spells.description: Allows the caster to create a piece of rune paper that allows the rune to be used twice before it vanishes. The first use causes it to fade a bit, so it is easy to tell if one or two uses remain, but not so much as to make it hard to read.

spells.name: Triggered Item
spells.description: Allows the caster to make an item with a non-"constant" embedded spell that does not require attunement but is activated by a given "trigger" (a spoken word, a species coming within range, a part being twisted, touching a bleeding wound, etc.). Because activation is automatic, target selection and other choices must be set in the trigger. Provides the activation method only; the spell must still be embedded normally. (Single-use items may be triggered without this spell.)

spells.name: Make Rod #
spells.description: Allows the caster to make a "rod" which may have spells embedded in it.

spells.name: Augmented Casting #
spells.description: Allows a caster to create an item which casts any embedded spells at a level greater than the level of the embedded spell. The spell is cast at the lower of the item's level or the level of the caster who provided the embedded spell.

spells.name: Organic Rune #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Rune Paper spell, allows any non-living organic material to be made capable of holding a rune (e.g., a wooden chair or hide shield). The object must be at least 3" by 3" in size.

spells.name: Size Reduction #
spells.description: Allows the caster to create an organic magical item reduced from its normal size (e.g., a "rod" made wand-sized). Making a "staff" wand-sized requires casting this spell twice each day during creation.

spells.name: Make Staff #
spells.description: Allows the caster to make a "staff" which may have spells embedded in it.

spells.name: Work Paper #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any paper (e.g., including magical scrolls).

spells.name: Work Cloth #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any fabric (e.g., including magical cloth).

spells.name: Work Leather #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any leather or hide (e.g., including magical leather or hide).

spells.name: Work Wood #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any wood (e.g., dask or springwood).

spells.name: Make Half-Bole #
spells.description: Allows the caster to make a "half-bole" which may have spells embedded in it.

spells.name: Work Organic True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any organic materials (e.g., dragon scale).

spells.name: Make Bole #
spells.description: Allows the caster to make a "bole" which may have spells embedded in it.

spells.name: Lesser Transformation
spells.description: Enchants an item that transforms any living organic being into a "non-dangerous" animal form (e.g., swan, sheep, rabbit) when worn (requires something from such an animal). The creature, and whether the wearer's other possessions merge or fall to the ground, are chosen at enchantment. Can be made "at will" by doubling time and PP.

spells.name: Living Rune #
spells.description: Cast with a Make Rune Paper spell, allows a living organic being to be made capable of holding a rune, appearing as a tattoo, brand, or painted/dyed skin or fur. This spell ends when the creature dies.

spells.name: Transformation
spells.description: As Lesser Transformation, except the wearer transforms into a dangerous animal (e.g., tiger, cobra, hippo).

spells.name: Greater Transformation
spells.description: As Lesser Transformation, except the wearer transforms into a magical living creature (e.g., gryphon, unicorn, wyvern); excludes all races, undead, demons, great drakes, elementals, and artificial creatures. The wearer gains all innate abilities but no skill for magical abilities (flight comes naturally; a breath weapon must be learned for OB).

spells.name: Work Plant #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Paper, except caster may work with any living plant to create an enchanted plant, the +30 bonus applying to maneuvers when working with the plant.

spells.name: Work Beast #
spells.description: As Work Plant, except caster may work with any normal beast to create an enchanted beast.

spells.name: Work Living #
spells.description: As Work Plant, except caster may work with any organic living being to place enchantments upon it.

spells.name: Logic Fork
spells.description: Allows caster to create an item with a single embedded ability that allows the user to freely choose among the spells embedded in that ability (e.g., a Daily II ability with two embedded first level spells allows casting either spell twice in a day or both once, though two separate Embed I spells are still required).

spells.name: Hybrid Embedding
spells.description: Allows the caster to use the spells on this list to embed Hybrid Base list spells.

spells.name: Embed I
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 1st level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: List Embedding
spells.description: Allows caster to use an Embed # spell to embed a Channeling or Mentalism spell list up to the level of the Embed spell's #. Each spell must be cast into the item during enchantment, but only a single Embed spell suitable for the highest level spell is required; lower level spells are cast at the level of the highest level spell embedded.

spells.name: Charge Wand
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a wand containing one or more Channeling, Mentalism, or Hybrid spells.

spells.name: Embed II
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 2nd level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily I
spells.description: Allows caster to give an item the ability to cast a 1st level Channeling or Mentalism spell embedded in the item once per day. Daily spells have considerable flexibility; see Daily/Constant Items in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Embed III
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 3rd level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily II
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 2nd level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Charge Rod
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a rod containing one or more Channeling, Mentalism, or Hybrid spells.

spells.name: Daily III
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 3rd level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Embed IV
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 4th level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily IV
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 4th level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Embed V
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 5th level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Charge Staff
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a staff containing one or more Channeling, Mentalism, or Hybrid spells.

spells.name: Daily V
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 5th level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Embed VII
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 7th level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Constant III
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Channeling or Mentalism spell of up to 3rd level (with an Embed spell) that functions constantly (or cast twice to activate the embedded spell "at will" or when triggered).

spells.name: Charge Half-Bole
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a half-bole containing one or more Channeling, Mentalism, or Hybrid spells.

spells.name: Embed X
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 10th level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Daily X
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 10th level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Charge Bole
spells.description: Allows caster to charge a bole containing one or more Channeling, Mentalism, or Hybrid spells.

spells.name: Embed XX
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a 20th level or lower level Channeling or Mentalism spell in an item.

spells.name: Constant X
spells.description: As Constant III, except a Channeling or Mentalism spell of up to 10th level.

spells.name: Daily XX
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 20th level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Embed True
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Channeling or Mentalism spell of any level in an item.

spells.name: Daily XL
spells.description: As Daily I, except a 40th level Channeling or Mentalism spell.

spells.name: Constant XX
spells.description: As Constant III, except a Channeling or Mentalism spell of up to 20th level.

spells.name: Footwear Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the origin and characteristics of one pair of footwear, including the materials and processes (including spells) used in their creation, a general idea of who made them, and their size. (Note: regardless of spell name, all spells on this list apply to all forms of footwear: boots, shoes, slippers, sandals, etc.)

spells.name: Work Mundane Organic Material #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical organic materials to create an enchanted pair of footwear (or footwear without enchanting it in half the time). In either case the caster gains +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Magic Shoes #
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that fits any humanoid foot of a correctly Sized individual comfortably, prevents foot odor, and provides +50 RR against any fungal or parasitic attack on the feet. If worn during recovery from a foot or ankle injury, recovery time is halved.

spells.name: Bonus I
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear providing a +5 bonus to one appropriate skill: Jumping, Running, Skating (if skates), Stalking, or other foot-related skills the GM deems suitable.

spells.name: Walking Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear providing a permanent effect identical to one Walking spell (e.g., Waterwalking).

spells.name: Work Mundane Inorganic Material #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Organic Material, except caster may work with non-magical, inorganic materials to create an enchanted pair of footwear.

spells.name: Bonus II
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +10.

spells.name: All Sizes #
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that will adapt to fit any humanoid feet, regardless of Size.

spells.name: Running Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear providing a permanent effect identical to one "Running" spell (e.g., Waterrunning).

spells.name: Work Any Material #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Organic Material, except caster may work with any materials to create an enchanted pair of footwear.

spells.name: Lightfoot Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that gives the wearer the abilities of a Leaping and Landing spell (each once per round).

spells.name: Bonus III
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +15.

spells.name: Boots of Kicking
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that provide a +15 OB bonus when used for Unarmed: Strikes.

spells.name: Traveling Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that prevents the wearer from suffering fatigue from ground-based movement.

spells.name: Winged Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that allow the wearer to fly at his normal movement rate, subject to the normal rules regarding flight. Such items usually have little wings, but this is not required.

spells.name: Tough Boots
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that negates 25% of leg criticals.

spells.name: Marvelous Soles
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that allow the wearer to move on any surface without penalty and negate 50% of all criticals suffered due to a failed Movement maneuver. The shoes also slip freely out of any material, so the wearer is not caught in mud, glue, etc., unless he falls in deeper than his footwear.

spells.name: Combat Boots
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that allow the wearer to make melee attacks while moving on foot up to a Jog pace with no OB penalties due to movement. If moving faster, treat as a +50 bonus to Footwork skill.

spells.name: Boots of Speed
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that doubles the base movement rate of the wearer.

spells.name: Bonus IV
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +20.

spells.name: Seven-League Boots
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that allow the wearer to take a single step and travel up to seven leagues (21 miles) in a single round. More than once per day requires an Absurd Fatigue Check. Not a teleport but a magically swift leap; it will not pass through barriers the wearer could not normally pass, but automatically avoids collisions. Requires Attunement.

spells.name: Guardian Boots
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that negates 50% of leg criticals.

spells.name: Bonus V
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +25.

spells.name: Lucky Shoes
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that provide a +7 DB bonus and allow the wearer unusual luck: the ability to reroll any roll made by the character, or force a reroll of any roll affecting only the wearer, up to seven times each day.

spells.name: Bonus VI
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +30.

spells.name: Invincible Boots
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that negates 75% of leg criticals.

spells.name: Bonus VII
spells.description: As Bonus I, except bonus is +35.

spells.name: Dimension Striders
spells.description: Creates an enchanted pair of footwear that allow the wearer to "step through the walls of the world" and travel to other planes of existence (without protection from those planes' conditions). Use requires Attunement; control of one's destination may be based on an appropriate Lore (or Science) skill at the GM's option.

spells.name: Weapon Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the materials of which a target weapon is made, its bonuses to OB and breakage rolls, the approximate time and place of manufacture, and whether the weapon has any additional magical properties. (Note: by default Slaying applies to a single creature Variety, profession, or Evil spellcasters; tripling days extends it to a creature Type or broad spellcaster group, x5 to a whole Category, and halving applies to a select subgroup. Weapon additional-bonus spells apply to a Type by default, halve for a Variety, double for a Category.)

spells.name: Stable Weapon
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a weapon which negates 50% of fumbles made with the weapon.

spells.name: Racial Weapon
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a weapon which gains an additional +5 OB when wielded by a member of a specific race (e.g., human, Elf, or Orc).

spells.name: Weapon I
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a melee weapon, thrown weapon, or ammunition with a +5 OB bonus, or with an additional +5 OB bonus against a specific Type of creature (see note for more or less restrictive bonuses).

spells.name: Returning Weapon
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a weapon (or missile) that, when thrown or launched, returns to the user after the attack via flight (100'/round). It comes to the user's hand if he chooses to catch it; otherwise it settles at his feet.

spells.name: Range Improvement I
spells.description: Enchants a weapon with improved range. A melee weapon that cannot normally be thrown gains a 10' thrown range increment; a thrown weapon +5'; a missile weapon +10'; a siege weapon +50'.

spells.name: Additional Crit I
spells.description: Enchants a weapon so that whenever it delivers a critical it also delivers a second critical two degrees of severity less than the primary (type chosen at enchantment).

spells.name: Weapon II
spells.description: As Weapon I, except the bonus is +10.

spells.name: Returning Weapon True
spells.description: As Returning Weapon, except the weapon returns instantly via a teleport effect (one mile range limit).

spells.name: Doorcleaver
spells.description: Enchants a weapon that can cause most objects other than armor, weapons, and shields to make a breakage check or be smashed/cut through (whatever effect suits the weapon). Any weapon bonuses apply as a penalty to this breakage check. One item may be "cleaved" each round.

spells.name: Range Improvement II
spells.description: Enchants a weapon with improved range. A melee weapon that cannot normally be thrown gains a 15' thrown range increment; a thrown weapon +10'; a missile weapon +25'; a siege weapon +100'.

spells.name: Shield Breaker
spells.description: Enchants a weapon such that every round it is used in combat against an opponent using a shield, that shield must make a breakage check.

spells.name: Weapon III
spells.description: As Weapon I, except the bonus is +15.

spells.name: Additional Crit II
spells.description: Enchants a weapon so that whenever it delivers a critical it also delivers a second critical one degree of severity less than the primary (type chosen at enchantment).

spells.name: Slaying I
spells.description: Enchants a weapon that has a Slaying I effect (adds +5 to all criticals) when used against one kind of target. See note for more or less restrictive options.

spells.name: Vampiric Weapon
spells.description: Enchants a weapon with a Vampiric Effect (multiple castings provide multiple properties): (1) causes Life Drain of -1 Co per critical severity (RR vs Essence unless added twice); (2) heals the wielder 1 hit or removes -1 fatigue per concussion hit inflicted; (3) drains 3 PP per critical severity to the wielder or itself (RR vs Essence unless added twice); (4) feeds on souls of the slain (per level slain: recover a hit, repair -1 breakage, or recover 1 PP; up to five times, acting as Dark Absolution); (5) converts every three hits of damage to 1 PP; (6) enhances bleeding by +1 hit/round (may be added multiple times).

spells.name: Range Improvement III
spells.description: Enchants a weapon with improved range. A melee weapon that cannot normally be thrown gains a 20' thrown range increment; a thrown weapon +15'; a missile weapon +50'; a siege weapon +200'.

spells.name: Armor Breaker
spells.description: Enchants a weapon such that every time it delivers a critical to an armored area, the armor must make a breakage check. If the critical already indicates possible breakage, roll both checks.

spells.name: Additional Crit III
spells.description: Enchants a weapon so that whenever it delivers a critical it also delivers a second critical of the same degree of severity as the primary (type chosen at enchantment).

spells.name: Slaying II
spells.description: Enchants a weapon that has a Slaying II effect (adds +10 to all criticals) when used against one kind of target.

spells.name: Weapon IV
spells.description: As Weapon I, except the bonus is +20.

spells.name: Increased Size
spells.description: Enchants a weapon which attacks as if it were one Size larger than actual (e.g., a human-sized longsword attacks as a Big creature's longsword, doing Large rather than Big attacks).

spells.name: Weapon Breaker
spells.description: Enchants a melee weapon such that when used in combat against an armed foe, the foe's weapon(s) must make a breakage check each round.

spells.name: Slaying III
spells.description: Enchants a weapon that has a Slaying III effect (adds +15 to all criticals) when used against one kind of target.

spells.name: Weapon V
spells.description: As Weapon I, except the bonus is +25.

spells.name: Slaying IV
spells.description: Enchants a weapon that has a Slaying IV effect (adds +20 to all criticals) when used against one kind of target.

spells.name: Weapon VI
spells.description: As Weapon I, except the bonus is +30.

spells.name: Increased Size True
spells.description: Enchants a weapon which attacks as if it were two Sizes larger than actual (e.g., a human-sized longsword attacks as a Large creature's longsword, doing Huge rather than Big attacks).

spells.name: Work Mundane Liquid #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical, non-toxic liquids to create an enchanted item (normally a potion); all required tools and material must be present. Alternatively it can work a non-magical liquid without enchanting it in half the normal time. In either case the caster gains +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers.

spells.name: Work Mundane Cloth #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical fabric.

spells.name: Work Mundane Leather #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical leather or hide.

spells.name: Work Mundane Wood #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical wood.

spells.name: Work Mundane Stone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical, non-precious stone.

spells.name: Work Precious Metals #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical, precious metals with a bonus of no better than +0 (e.g., gold).

spells.name: Work Organic #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any non-magical organic materials (e.g., horn or bone).

spells.name: Work Common Metals #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical, non-precious metals with a bonus of no better than +0 (e.g., iron or inferior bronze).

spells.name: Work Mundane Gemstone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical precious stone.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal I #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +5 (e.g., low steel or superior bronze).

spells.name: Work Stone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any non-precious stone.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal II #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +10 (e.g., high steel).

spells.name: Work Metal I #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +5 to create an enchanted item (e.g., zataak).

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal III #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +15 (e.g., white alloy).

spells.name: Work Inorganic #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical, non-metallic inorganic materials (e.g., glass).

spells.name: Work Metal II #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +10 to create an enchanted item.

spells.name: Work Cloth #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any fabric (including magical fabrics).

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal IV #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with non-magical metals with a bonus of no better than +20 (e.g., black alloy).

spells.name: Work Gemstone #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any precious stone.

spells.name: Work Organic True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any organic materials (e.g., dragon scale).

spells.name: Master of Crafts
spells.description: Allows caster to use his skill bonus for this list as his skill bonus for any one Crafting skill.

spells.name: Work Mundane Metal True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any non-magical metals.

spells.name: Work Inorganic True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any non-metallic inorganic materials (e.g., laen).

spells.name: Work Metal IV #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +20 (e.g., starfall or metal of the sun).

spells.name: Work Metal V #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +25 (e.g., adamant steel).

spells.name: Work Metal VI #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals with a bonus of no better than +30 (e.g., eog).

spells.name: Work Metal True #
spells.description: As Work Mundane Liquid, except allows caster to work with any metals.

spells.name: Unbreakable Work
spells.description: Allows caster to create an item that is nigh-indestructible: it will never fail a breakage check and gains a second RR against any spell that would destroy or break it. If given twice, the item becomes almost impossible to destroy, requiring a special method specified at the time of casting.

spells.name: Creature Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the general origin, age, and level of a target creature. If the creature is of an artificial nature, the caster also learns what spells were used to create it. (See Section 5.5 for details on creating and managing cultivated creatures.)

spells.name: Clone Template
spells.description: Provides caster with the necessary information to later make a clone of the target.

spells.name: Cultivate I #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 1st level.

spells.name: Cultivate II #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 2nd level.

spells.name: Loyalty #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature that will be "loyal" to its creator. At minimum this keeps the most psychotic cultivated creatures from attacking their creator; less aggressive creatures will be actively friendly.

spells.name: Clone I #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature which is a crude clone of the original template. It passes as the original only from a distance or at a glance; features are not fully formed or are slightly malformed.

spells.name: Cultivate IV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 4th level.

spells.name: Cultivate V #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 5th level.

spells.name: Cultivate VI #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 6th level.

spells.name: Cultivate VII #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 7th level.

spells.name: Clone II #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature which is a clone of the original template. It passes as the original based on visual inspection and has the same voice, but lacks the original's mannerisms and cannot pass under observation by someone who knows the original.

spells.name: Obedience #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature that will be "loyal" and "obedient" to its creator, understanding the creator's commands (though not performing tasks beyond its intellect). Duration of obedience varies greatly by creature type.

spells.name: Cultivate X #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 10th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XI #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 11th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XII #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 12th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XIII #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 13th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XIV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 14th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 15th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XVI #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 16th level.

spells.name: Clone III #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature which is a clone of the original template, with the appearance and mannerisms of the original. It lacks the original's knowledge or skills and may be caught out by a lack of appropriate knowledge.

spells.name: Cultivate XX #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 20th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XXV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 25th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XXX #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 30th level.

spells.name: Cultivate XXXV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 35th level.

spells.name: Clone IV #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature which is a clone of the original template, with its appearance, mannerisms, and knowledge (current as of the most recent Clone Template). The clone has access to all of the template's skills and abilities (depending on setting, Channeling spell abilities may be excluded).

spells.name: Cultivate L #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of up to 50th level.

spells.name: True Clone #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature which is a true clone of the original template, with its appearance, mannerisms, knowledge, and personality — essentially a perfect copy (as of the most recent Clone Template). It can be made a younger version of the template body, and injuries in the original can be removed in the clone.

spells.name: Cultivate True #
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a cultivated creature of any level.

spells.name: Enchanting Elixir I
spells.description: Allows caster to create a potion that provides the benefits of included enchantments for a duration of 15 minutes. Such enchantments must be those which would affect the bearer of an item (not those which affect an item and not its bearer). A suitable Work spell is also required (normally Work Mundane Liquid).

spells.name: Fixed Bonus I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it grants a bonus to a stat of +0. If the wielder has a lower (negative) stat bonus, it is raised to +0.

spells.name: Enchanting Elixir II
spells.description: As Enchanting Elixir I, except the effect of the potion will last for an hour.

spells.name: Maintain Spell
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it can keep a spell requiring Concentration going on its own (though it cannot make adjustments unless intelligent). A constant spell can be maintained indefinitely; for individual castings, the item maintains concentration for 1 round per item level. Only applies to spells provided by the item.

spells.name: Spell Storage I
spells.description: Creates an item in which a spell of no more than 5th level may be stored (cast normally but targeted "for storage"). Later the wielder may cast the stored spell as if from an item, at its normal casting level and as an instantaneous spell.

spells.name: Spell Discipline I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it will negate 10% of spell failure effects (the wielder need not roll on the spell failure table, but the spell still fails quietly and PP is lost).

spells.name: Fixed Bonus II
spells.description: Enchants an item that grants a bonus to a stat of up to +5; a wielder with a lower bonus is raised to the granted bonus. Requires a template individual with the bonus; if not the caster, the Template Link spell (Power Impressions) must be cast at the start of enchantment.

spells.name: Deepen Storage I
spells.description: Creates an item with Spell Storage such that the spell(s) stored may be of up to level 10. Both Spell Storage and Deepen Storage must be cast upon the item.

spells.name: Enchanting Elixir III
spells.description: As Enchanting Elixir I, except the effect of the potion will last for a day (24 hours).

spells.name: Spell Storage II
spells.description: As Spell Storage I, except that the item can store up to two spells at once.

spells.name: Deepen Storage II
spells.description: As Deepen Storage I, except the spell(s) stored may be of up to level 15.

spells.name: Spell Discipline II
spells.description: As Spell Discipline I, except 20% of spell failure effects are negated.

spells.name: Fixed Bonus III
spells.description: As Fixed Bonus II, except maximum bonus is +10.

spells.name: Spell Storage III
spells.description: As Spell Storage I, except that the item can store up to three spells at once.

spells.name: Deepen Storage III
spells.description: As Deepen Storage I, except the spell(s) stored may be of up to level 20.

spells.name: Remote Operation
spells.description: Creates an item such that an attuned wielder can use the item for its basic function at a distance of up to 2' per item level, by concentrating, with the wielder's normal skill (or the item's own skill). Allows the item to levitate and move via telekinesis at up to the wielder's walking speed, retaining normal benefits of wielding it.

spells.name: Spell Storage IV
spells.description: As Spell Storage I, except that the item can store up to four spells at once.

spells.name: Spell Discipline III
spells.description: As Spell Discipline I, except 30% of spell failure effects are negated.

spells.name: Spell Storage V
spells.description: As Spell Storage I, except that the item can store up to five spells at once.

spells.name: Fixed Bonus IV
spells.description: As Fixed Bonus II, except maximum bonus is +15.

spells.name: Spell Storage VII
spells.description: As Spell Storage I, except that the item can store up to seven spells at once.

spells.name: Spell Discipline IV
spells.description: As Spell Discipline I, except 40% of spell failure effects are negated.

spells.name: Fixed Bonus True
spells.description: As Fixed Bonus II, except there is no limit on the bonus that may be granted, other than the need to find a template with the desired bonus.

spells.name: Station Keeping
spells.description: Creates an item that can continue to operate without the wielder's assistance, but within reach (typically a weapon that defends its wielder when he is incapable of self-defense, even guarding his corpse, distinguishing attack from aid). Operates with the wielder's normal skill (or the item's own). Can also create a shield that floats near the wielder without a hand to hold it.

spells.name: Deepen Storage True
spells.description: As Deepen Storage I, except the spell(s) stored may be of any level.

spells.name: Remote Mission
spells.description: Creates an item that can operate semi-autonomously like Remote Operation, but without concentration and with a range of up to 10' per item level. Given an order it will follow, then return to the wielder when done or its time is up (no more than one minute per level of the wielder, drawing a charge from the wielder's aura). An intelligent item can be given a more complex mission.

spells.name: Spellcatcher
spells.description: Enchants an item with Spell Storage such that, so long as it has an open slot, the wielder can concentrate to catch an incoming spell and store it within — preventing its present effect and allowing later use. The incoming spell gets an RR against the item's magic; if it succeeds it goes off normally instead.

spells.name: Spell Discipline True
spells.description: As Spell Discipline I, except 90% of spell failure effects are negated.

spells.name: Location Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns of any permanent enchantments or influences (such as resident spirits or other supernatural features) of the location. It does not reveal spells without a lasting magical effect or supernatural features not tied to the location.

spells.name: Cleanse Location
spells.description: Removes contrary influences from a location; required prior to any enchantment of a location using this list. Normal psychic residue clears easily; a conflicting magical effect gets an RR. As a counter-enchantment it becomes Type A, cast once/day for as many days as the level of the existing enchantment. Channeling enchantments on an inherently sacred place may gain up to +50.

spells.name: Work Location II #
spells.description: Area of effect (in feet) is the maximum side of an enclosing cube for a bordered space, or a diameter around a central point otherwise. The place must have a conceptual unity; destroying that unity (burning the building, paving the garden) destroys the enchantment. Allows enchanting a location in conjunction with other spells on this list.

spells.name: Magical Aura I
spells.description: Enchants a location so those within recover 1 power point every 4 hours spent there (in addition to normal recovery), or so it has power to cast an Emplaced or Embedded spell of 1st level.

spells.name: Welcoming Mood
spells.description: Enchants a location so that anyone entering must make an RR or be affected by a mood (from the Mood Impressions list) so long as he remains in the location.

spells.name: Welcoming Spell
spells.description: Enchants a location so anyone entering will have a spell cast upon him (no more than once per day). The spell is included via an Emplace Spell or Embed spell plus a Magical Aura spell of sufficient power.

spells.name: Work Location V #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Lesser Enchanted Locale
spells.description: Enchants a location with up to a 10th level spell from the Skill Impressions list or a Talent Embedding spell of no more than 10th level. All within the location gain the benefit.

spells.name: Magical Aura II
spells.description: As Magical Aura I, except recovery rate is 1 power point every 2 hours or the Emplaced or Embedded spell may be of up to 3rd level.

spells.name: Work Location VIII #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Abiding Mood
spells.description: Enchants a location so that anyone in it must make an RR every hour or be affected by a mood (from the Mood Impressions list) so long as he remains.

spells.name: Confine Spirit
spells.description: Enchants a location so that a spirit within it is constrained to remain there. The spirit must be within the location when the enchantment completes (it gets no RR except to recognize the location is a trap) and need not be free at the time of confinement.

spells.name: Work Location X #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Magical Aura III
spells.description: As Magical Aura I, except recovery rate is 1 power point per hour or the Emplaced or Embedded spell may be of up to 5th level.

spells.name: Enchanted Locale
spells.description: As Lesser Enchanted Locale, except that up to a 20th level spell may be used.

spells.name: Triggered Spell
spells.description: As Welcoming Spell, except the spell affects a target not upon entering but upon performing some triggering action or having some triggering quality (starting a fire, being an Orc, having a bleeding wound). May be triggered only once per day per individual.

spells.name: Work Location XV #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Cloak Location
spells.description: Enchants a location so that anyone who would observe it must make an RR or suffer a mental "blind spot" so he does not notice it is there (going around it unawares). Not invisibility. If someone is attacked from the location, he immediately ceases to be subject to the effect.

spells.name: Magical Aura IV
spells.description: As Magical Aura I, except recovery rate is 2 power points per hour or the Emplaced or Embedded spell may be of up to 7th level.

spells.name: Work Location XX #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Spirit Trap
spells.description: Enchants a location so that any spirit entering must make an RR; if it fails, it is confined to the location so long as the enchantment lasts.

spells.name: Greater Enchanted Locale
spells.description: As Lesser Enchanted Locale, except there is no level limit on the spell included in the enchantment.

spells.name: Work Location XXX #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Magical Aura V
spells.description: As Magical Aura I, except recovery rate is 3 power points per hour or the Emplaced or Embedded spell may be of up to 12th level.

spells.name: Work Location L #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Lord Magical Aura
spells.description: As Magical Aura I, except recovery rate is 4 power points per hour or the Emplaced or Embedded spell may be of up to 20th level.

spells.name: Spirit Home
spells.description: Enchants a location through Spirit Binding, Demon Binding, or Elemental Binding spell lists, creating a location-sized entity-powered enchantment. The entity can make its abilities manifest anywhere within the location.

spells.name: Work Location C #
spells.description: As Work Location II, except for the size of location it can affect.

spells.name: Polymorphic Cloth
spells.description: Enchants a cloth item that will change its appearance (color, pattern, texture) as desired by the attuned wearer. (Note: normal flight piloting a flying carpet is as simple as walking, but in a tactical situation, difficult weather, or non-straight movement the controller must Concentrate to make adjustments.)

spells.name: Work Weave I #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 2' by 3' in size.

spells.name: Flying Carpet I
spells.description: Enchants a carpet (requires Work Weave) that can fly at up to 50' per round. The controller must be on the carpet and attuned to it; piloting may be done up to four hours at a time, then an Endurance roll every five minutes. Supports up to 100 pounds per square foot of carpet.

spells.name: Armoring Cloth I
spells.description: Enchants regular cloth or cloth armor to be more protective (requires Work Weave): regular cloth offers AT 2, cloth armor AT 3.

spells.name: Visionary Tapestry
spells.description: Enchants a tapestry (requires Work Weave) so it portrays the current state of the place depicted, via animated stitching (always tapestry-like, not photorealistic). Range to update is 1 mile per square foot of tapestry; beyond that it freezes until brought back within range.

spells.name: Work Weave II #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 3' by 5' in size.

spells.name: Flying Carpet II
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 100' per round.

spells.name: Armoring Cloth II
spells.description: As Armoring Cloth I, except regular cloth provides AT 3, cloth armor AT 4.

spells.name: Loyal Carpet
spells.description: Enchants a carpet (also enchanted with a Flying Carpet spell) to be summoned: one attuned to it can concentrate and it comes at full speed. If physically barred it circles for an opening but applies no intelligence. Range of summons is 200' per level of the carpet.

spells.name: Weavesdropping
spells.description: Enhances a Visionary Tapestry with sound. Sounds produced beyond the area portrayed are not heard, even if loud from points pictured.

spells.name: Flying Carpet III
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 150' per round.

spells.name: Work Weave III #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 4' by 6' in size.

spells.name: Armoring Cloth III
spells.description: As Armoring Cloth I, except regular cloth provides AT 4, cloth armor AT 5.

spells.name: Memory Thread
spells.description: Enhances a Visionary Tapestry with the ability to show anything from the history it has portrayed, at the command of someone attuned to it. The depiction can be sped up to 20 times actual time to search for vaguely-known events.

spells.name: Flying Carpet IV
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 200' per round.

spells.name: Trapping
spells.description: Enchants a rope, carpet, rug, or curtain such that, at up to 5' per item level, an attuned user may mentally command it (instantaneous) to seize the nearest target. A rope attacks as a Medium Grapple, a carpet as a Big Grapple; OB equals item level treated as ranks. Escape from a successful grapple is a Very Hard maneuver.

spells.name: Work Weave IV #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 5' by 7' in size.

spells.name: Armoring Cloth IV
spells.description: As Armoring Cloth I, except regular cloth provides AT 5, cloth armor AT 7.

spells.name: Unwelcoming Mat
spells.description: Enchants a carpet or rug (requires Work Weave) such that any attempt to cross it is a Nigh Impossible maneuver (usually Running) unless one is attuned to it; footing is extremely slippery and the carpet may seem to move underfoot.

spells.name: Flying Carpet VI
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 300' per round.

spells.name: Work Weave V #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 6' by 8' in size.

spells.name: Flying Carpet VIII
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 400' per round.

spells.name: Complex Weave
spells.description: Enhances a Visionary Tapestry so an attuned user may change the location portrayed, moving it at 50' per round from the current portrayed location (or from the tapestry itself if the previous view is out of range).

spells.name: Work Weave VI #
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a piece of weaving up to 6' by 10' in size.

spells.name: Flying Carpet XII
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 600' per round.

spells.name: Armoring Cloth V
spells.description: As Armoring Cloth I, except regular cloth provides AT 7, cloth armor AT 8.

spells.name: Dimensional Weave
spells.description: Enhances a Visionary Tapestry to look into other worlds, effective only for worlds with "parallel locations" to the plane containing the tapestry (utility depends on the setting's cosmology). The view is in the same relative place regardless of which plane is observed.

spells.name: Lord Flying Carpet
spells.description: As Flying Carpet I, but the carpet's maximum speed is 1000' per round.

spells.name: Gauge Mood
spells.description: Reveals any mood on an item or experienced by a being, including the type of mood and its area of influence (including natural moods where applicable). (Note: possible moods include calm, happiness, harmony, friendliness, optimism, pessimism, discord, hatefulness, fear, anxiety, anger, grief, awe, despair, hope, rationality, doubt, certainty, nostalgia, curiosity, lust, revulsion, weariness, perkiness, excitement, apathy, and others at the GM's discretion.)

spells.name: Internal Mood
spells.description: Allows caster to apply an Infuse Mood spell effect to any entity bound into the item (or the item's own magical intelligence), rather than to the bearer of the item.

spells.name: Lingering Mood
spells.description: Causes the effect from an Infuse Mood spell to linger, continuing to affect a target after he has left the area of effect for 1 minute per point by which he failed his RR.

spells.name: Conditional Mood
spells.description: Modifies an Infuse Mood spell so the mood is not present all the time: a trigger brings it on and a second trigger may cancel it, or it times out (up to 1 hour per level of the Infuse Mood spell from the last trigger).

spells.name: Infuse Mood I
