spells.description: Impresses a specific mood into an item, normally applying to anyone bearing it. Acting contrary to the mood requires an RR modified as for Fear (using SD); failure means the bearer acts in accord with the mood. Actions in tune with the mood gain +5; actions counter to it suffer -5.

spells.name: Shared Mood I
spells.description: Modifies an Infuse Mood spell so it affects not only the bearer but anyone within 10' of the item.

spells.name: Projected Mood I
spells.description: Modifies an Infuse Mood spell so it affects everyone within 5' of the item, except for the bearer.

spells.name: Frightfulness
spells.description: Enchants an item with a fear effect triggered once per day, producing a magically-terrifying noise (Mentalism RR vs the item's level; failure treated as a failed Fear RR). Normally 50' radius; on missiles or thrown weapons, 10' radius along the path of flight. The wielder is immune.

spells.name: Projected Mood II
spells.description: As Projected Mood I, except radius is 10'.

spells.name: Shared Mood II
spells.description: As Shared Mood I, except radius is 20'.

spells.name: Infuse Mood II
spells.description: As Infuse Mood I, except modifier is +10 for acting in tune with the mood and -10 against it.

spells.name: Projected Mood III
spells.description: As Projected Mood I, except radius is 15'.

spells.name: Selective Mood
spells.description: Modifies an Infuse Mood spell so the mood applies only to some specified natural category (a species, a larger biological group, males, females, Essence users, etc.). It cannot be an artificial category like a nationality or secret society.

spells.name: Aura of Dread
spells.description: Enchants an item so the attuned wielder can cause a 20' radius fear effect like Frightfulness, but continuous and without the associated noise. Anyone succeeding on their RR is immune for the next 24 hours.

spells.name: Shared Mood III
spells.description: As Shared Mood I, except radius is 30'.

spells.name: Projected Mood IV
spells.description: As Projected Mood I, except radius is 20'.

spells.name: Infuse Mood III
spells.description: As Infuse Mood I, except modifier is +15 for acting in tune with the mood and -15 against it.

spells.name: Coveted Item
spells.description: Enchants an item so it inspires desire in those under its enchantment to possess and keep it. RR vs Mentalism, starting at 1st level and increasing 1 level per use or week of proximity up to the item's level. Two castings create a compulsion to use the item; three create temptations to take it by stealth or force.

spells.name: Shared Mood IV
spells.description: As Shared Mood I, except radius is 40'.

spells.name: Emotional Manipulation
spells.description: Creates an item that causes someone to feel a lasting emotion (love, hate, fear, disgust, or pity) for the next person seen after failing an RR. Triggered only once per person and not from more than 20' away. Usually put into a potion (requires a suitable Work spell). The emotion lasts 1 week for every 5 by which the RR was failed.

spells.name: Infuse Mood IV
spells.description: As Infuse Mood I, except modifier is +20 for acting in tune with the mood and -20 against it.

spells.name: Emotional Manipulation True
spells.description: As Emotional Manipulation, but the effect is permanent (subject to normal emotional changes, but holding at least for one full year).

spells.name: Infuse Mood V
spells.description: As Infuse Mood I, except modifier is +25 for acting in tune with the mood and -25 against it.

spells.name: Projected Mood X
spells.description: As Projected Mood I, except radius is 50'.

spells.name: Shared Mood X
spells.description: As Shared Mood I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Terrorization
spells.description: As Aura of Dread, except the fear effect covers a 100' radius per level of the attuned wielder and affects that wielder's foes only.

spells.name: Lord Projected Mood
spells.description: As Projected Mood I, except radius is 100'.

spells.name: Infuse Mood VI
spells.description: As Infuse Mood I, except modifier is +30 for acting in tune with the mood and -30 against it.

spells.name: Item Link #
spells.description: Enchants an item so as to link it to the caster, who is then always considered attuned to it (though this does not prevent another from attuning). Required for any of the other enchantments on this list.

spells.name: Item Calling I
spells.description: Creates an item that can be summoned from up to 10' per level away (higher of item or caller level) by the caster or another attuned user. The item flies to its summoner at 100'/round; if two summon at once, it goes to the higher level (or its creator on a tie).

spells.name: Grafting #
spells.description: Creates an item that automatically attunes and attaches itself immovably when placed on a potential user correctly. Grants +20 to SCRs using the item's powers and joins the auras so the wielder may use the item's level for RRs if it is higher.

spells.name: Vulnerability I
spells.description: Enchants an item so the bearer has -10 to RRs against the caster's spells or abilities. This does not take effect until the bearer attunes to or uses the item, and is a hidden ability.

spells.name: Creator Immunity
spells.description: Enchants an item so as to render any of its magical effects non-effective against the caster. This applies only to direct effects of the item's powers, not secondary effects (a Fire Ball from the item could not hurt him, but a gasoline tank it ignited could).

spells.name: Item Calling II
spells.description: As Item Calling I, except the item teleports when called from up to 100'/level away.

spells.name: Remote Sensing
spells.description: Creates an item such that the caster can, by concentrating, sense things as if at the item's location, so long as it is borne by an attuned user (hidden ability; range 10 miles per item level). Alternatively, a pair of items may be enchanted as a set, one spying on the location of the other.

spells.name: Vulnerability II
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -20.

spells.name: Symmetrical Linkage
spells.description: Enchants a pair of identical items such that what is done to one is done to the other (doubling breakage risk), allowing remotely playing an instrument or writing on a chalkboard. Communication over unlimited distances, with no range restriction on this link.

spells.name: Longevity
spells.description: Enchants an item such that, so long as it endures, the caster ages at but one-tenth the normal rate. Another attuned to the item ages at one-fifth the normal rate.

spells.name: Remote Access
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the caster need not wear/wield it to use its spell abilities; their range is 500' per item level.

spells.name: Item Calling III
spells.description: As Item Calling I, except the item teleports when called from up to 1 mile/level away.

spells.name: Vulnerability III
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -30.

spells.name: Remote Influence
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the caster can influence another individual attuned to it. If that individual is in the caster's service, his morale/loyalty gains +50; otherwise he must make an RR against a 5th level mental influence (as Fear) to act contrary to the caster's interests. Hidden ability.

spells.name: Aura Augmentation I
spells.description: Enchants an item so as to place some of the caster's own levels within. The item grants those levels plus an additional level for every two transferred to its wielder. If the item is lost or destroyed, the levels are gone forever.

spells.name: Hit Multiplier
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the wielder's hits are multiplied by x1.5, after applying all other modifiers (100 hits become 150).

spells.name: Targeting Link
spells.description: Creates a set of items such that some or all (which must be ranged attack items) gain a homing ability toward the other items when they are active. The homing ability (no range penalties, cornering, or +25 OB) is chosen at creation. Cast once for the whole set, but each item needs its own Work spell.

spells.name: Vulnerability IV
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -40.

spells.name: Remote Contact
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the caster can always cast a mental spell (subtype 'm') on the bearer regardless of range (no penalty if attuned, -30 if not). Hidden ability; may also be made a pair of items as a set.

spells.name: Aura Augmentation II
spells.description: As Aura Augmentation I, except the levels transferred to the item are doubled (transferring six caster levels provides twelve from the item).

spells.name: Vulnerability V
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -50.

spells.name: Eternity
spells.description: Enchants an item such that, so long as the caster retains possession, he does not age. If another gains possession, the caster ages at one-hundredth the normal rate; anyone else attuned ages at one-twentieth the normal rate.

spells.name: Lesser Shadow Soul
spells.description: Enchants an item with a limited copy of the caster's will and intelligence: psychic stat bonuses based on the caster's but reduced by 1d10 each, plus his ethics, purposes, and much of his personality, and half the ranks of his Lore and Science skills. The item has touch telepathy.

spells.name: Vulnerability VII
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -70.

spells.name: Aura Augmentation True
spells.description: As Aura Augmentation I, except the levels transferred to the item are tripled (transferring six caster levels provides eighteen from the item).

spells.name: Vulnerability True
spells.description: As Vulnerability I, but the penalty is -100.

spells.name: Shadow Soul
spells.description: Enchants an item with a copy of the caster's will and intelligence: the same psychic stat bonuses, his ethics, purposes, and much of his personality, and all of his Lore and Science skills. The item has ranged telepathy.

spells.name: Externalize Lifeforce
spells.description: Enchants an item such that if the caster is killed but the item survives, the caster's spirit will restore itself in a new identical body in 1-100 years, appearing within 1-100 miles of the death site. The soul must not have been destroyed or captured; the tie to the item grants +50 RR against such effects.

spells.name: Template Link
spells.description: Creates a link between the caster and another individual so the other may be used as a template in enchanting items. Cast once at the start; the template must be within 100' during creation, and the link breaks at the end. Any number of the template's abilities may be impressed based on this link, and the caster may link to multiple templates.

spells.name: Emplace Spell I
spells.description: Enchants an item with a 1st level spell emplaced in it. The spell must be known by the template (who may be the caster) and must also be cast into the item, or an additional casting of this spell may be used in its place.

spells.name: Complex Aura
spells.description: Enchants an item so an additional person can be attuned at a given time (if added twice, three individuals could be attuned at once).

spells.name: Implant Power I
spells.description: Enchants an item so it contains 1 PP for every two ranks the template has in Power Development. PP may power emplaced spells or be used by an attuned user (if user and template share a Realm, or the item has Omnipower). PP regenerates when an attuned user within 10' recovers his own.

spells.name: Emplace Spell III
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 3rd level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding I
spells.description: Enchants an item that grants its user a Talent possessed by the template with a value of no more than 5 DP. Excludes any innate casting abilities, which must be handled as other spells.

spells.name: Adaptive Power
spells.description: Enchants an item that can use PP from any realm to power any emplaced spells.

spells.name: Emplace List III
spells.description: Enchants an item with the spells in a single list (to the level known by the template), up to 3rd level, emplaced in the item. Either all included spells must be cast into the item, or the time and PP requirements are tripled.

spells.name: Emplace Spell V
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 5th level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding II
spells.description: As Talent Embedding I, except limit is 10 DP.

spells.name: Implant Power II
spells.description: As Implant Power I, except the item will have 1 PP per template rank in Power Development.

spells.name: Emplace Spell VIII
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 8th level.

spells.name: Emplace List V
spells.description: As Emplace List III, except up to 5th level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding III
spells.description: As Talent Embedding I, except limit is 15 DP.

spells.name: Emplace Spell X
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 10th level.

spells.name: Omnipower
spells.description: Enchants an item such that implanted PP may be used to cast spells from any realm.

spells.name: Implant Power III
spells.description: As Implant Power I, except the item will have 3 PP per every two template ranks in Power Development.

spells.name: Emplace List VII
spells.description: As Emplace List III, except up to 7th level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding IV
spells.description: As Talent Embedding I, except limit is 20 DP.

spells.name: Emplace Spell XV
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 15th level.

spells.name: Emplace List X
spells.description: As Emplace List III, except up to 10th level.

spells.name: Lord Emplace Spell
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell up to 20th level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding VI
spells.description: As Talent Embedding I, except limit is 30 DP.

spells.name: Implant Power IV
spells.description: As Implant Power I, except the item will have 2 PP per template rank in Power Development.

spells.name: Lord Emplace List
spells.description: As Emplace List III, except up to 20th level.

spells.name: Emplace Spell True
spells.description: As Emplace Spell I, except a spell of any level.

spells.name: Talent Embedding True
spells.description: As Talent Embedding I, except limit is DP equal to the caster's level.

spells.name: Emplace List True
spells.description: As Emplace List III, except up to 50th level. (Emplaced spells are cast like embedded spells but emplacement provides no power; PP must come from the user or the item. The spell is cast at the user's level unless the item is intelligent.)

spells.name: Practical Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a skill bonus for a Practical Skill equal to one-fifth that of the template, to a maximum of +20. Practical Skills are from the Animal, Crafting, Environmental, or Vocation categories. (Implanted bonuses replace, not add to, the wielder's own skill-rank bonus.)

spells.name: Subtle Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a skill bonus for a Subtle Skill equal to one-fifth that of the template, to a maximum of +20. Subtle Skills are from the Awareness, Performance Art, Social, Subterfuge, or Technical categories.

spells.name: Internal Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a skill bonus for an Internal Skill equal to one-fifth that of the template, to a maximum of +20. Internal Skills are from the Body Discipline, Composition, Lore, Medical, Mental Discipline, and Science categories.

spells.name: Mystical Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a skill bonus for a Mystical Skill equal to one-fifth that of the template, to a maximum of +20. Mystical Skills are from the Delving, Magical Expertise, and Power Manipulation categories, as well as Magical Ritual.

spells.name: Physical Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a skill bonus for a Physical Skill equal to one-fifth that of the template, to a maximum of +20. Physical Skills are from the Battle Expertise, Brawn, Combat Expertise, Combat Training, Gymnastic, and Movement categories.

spells.name: Professional Bonus
spells.description: Enchants an item which allows the bearer to benefit from a single Professional Bonus. No effect if the bearer already has a Professional Bonus for the skill. The caster must have a template possessing the desired Professional Bonus.

spells.name: Practical Skill II
spells.description: As Practical Skill I, but equal to 40% that of the template, to a maximum of +40.

spells.name: Subtle Skill II
spells.description: As Subtle Skill I, but equal to 40% that of the template, to a maximum of +40.

spells.name: Internal Skill II
spells.description: As Internal Skill I, but equal to 40% that of the template, to a maximum of +40.

spells.name: Mystical Skill II
spells.description: As Mystical Skill I, but equal to 40% that of the template, to a maximum of +40.

spells.name: Physical Skill II
spells.description: As Physical Skill I, but equal to 40% that of the template, to a maximum of +40.

spells.name: Knack
spells.description: Enchants an item which allows the bearer to benefit from a Knack. May replace the bearer's own Knack if the item's is higher (not cumulative). The caster must have a template possessing the desired Knack.

spells.name: Practical Skill III
spells.description: As Practical Skill I, but equal to 60% that of the template, to a maximum of +60.

spells.name: Subtle Skill III
spells.description: As Subtle Skill I, but equal to 60% that of the template, to a maximum of +60.

spells.name: Internal Skill III
spells.description: As Internal Skill I, but equal to 60% that of the template, to a maximum of +60.

spells.name: Mystical Skill III
spells.description: As Mystical Skill I, but equal to 60% that of the template, to a maximum of +60.

spells.name: Physical Skill III
spells.description: As Physical Skill I, but equal to 60% that of the template, to a maximum of +60.

spells.name: Rank Impression
spells.description: Enchants an item implanted with a bonus for number of skill ranks equal to that of the template for a single skill (specialized where applicable). Does not change the bearer's skill bonus, but is useful where skill rank is applied (Shield skill, Ambush skill, Spell List ranks in the SCR).

spells.name: Practical Skill IV
spells.description: As Practical Skill I, but equal to 80% that of the template, to a maximum of +80.

spells.name: Subtle Skill IV
spells.description: As Subtle Skill I, but equal to 80% that of the template, to a maximum of +80.

spells.name: Internal Skill IV
spells.description: As Internal Skill I, but equal to 80% that of the template, to a maximum of +80.

spells.name: Mystical Skill IV
spells.description: As Mystical Skill I, but equal to 80% that of the template, to a maximum of +80.

spells.name: Physical Skill IV
spells.description: As Physical Skill I, but equal to 80% that of the template, to a maximum of +80.

spells.name: Practical Skill V
spells.description: As Practical Skill I, but equal to that of the template, to a maximum of +100.

spells.name: Subtle Skill V
spells.description: As Subtle Skill I, but equal to that of the template, to a maximum of +100.

spells.name: Internal Skill V
spells.description: As Internal Skill I, but equal to that of the template, to a maximum of +100.

spells.name: Mystical Skill V
spells.description: As Mystical Skill I, but equal to that of the template, to a maximum of +100.

spells.name: Physical Skill V
spells.description: As Physical Skill I, but equal to that of the template, to a maximum of +100.

spells.name: Analyze Spirit
spells.description: Each round, the caster may learn one of the following about a single spirit: level, general type (undead, animal, rational, etc.), profession or archetype, one talent, one flaw, one spell list, one skill bonus. (Manifested talents, spell lists, and skills appear randomly from those the embedded entity possesses, though talents fall between the relevant Manifest Talent limits where possible.)

spells.name: Bind Vegetable Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a plant spirit into an object as described in Section 5.3. In many settings this has very limited use; in others, more powerful plant and animal spirits may exist.

spells.name: Improved Communication
spells.description: Cast once per day, gives an intelligent item the power of touch telepathy or of speech. Cast twice per day (double time and PP) it can provide ranged telepathy with a range equal to its level in feet.

spells.name: Manifest Talent I
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded spirit's talents up to a limit of 6 DP value.

spells.name: Bind Animal Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed an animal spirit into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest Open List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded spirit's Open spell lists. These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Internal Skill
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to three of an embedded spirit's skills for purposes of the item's own use or the direct use of the item.

spells.name: Empathy with Kind
spells.description: Makes an item with an embedded spirit allow communication with the spirit's kindred (even non-speaking creatures, as effectively as speech). All interactions with such kindred are at +20, with relevant Lore maneuvers +15 and Science maneuvers +10.

spells.name: Manifest Power
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to an embedded spirit's normal PP total, for use in casting spells from its lists.

spells.name: Bind Rational Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed the spirit of someone belonging to a species classified as a "Race" into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest Closed List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded spirit's Closed spell lists. These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Talent II
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 20 DP.

spells.name: Share Psychic Load
spells.description: Enchants an item with an embedded spirit such that the spirit can be mentally "handed" one of the wielder's spells, allowing it to maintain and adjust a spell requiring concentration for the wielder.

spells.name: Manifest Stat
spells.description: Allows caster to make one of an embedded spirit's stat bonuses available to the wielder, or one of its physical stat bonuses (Ag, Co, Qu, St) available for the item's use.

spells.name: Bind Monstrous Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed the spirit of any living creature that is not classified as a plant, animal, or race into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest External Skill
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to three of an embedded spirit's skills for all purposes.

spells.name: Manifest Greater List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded spirit's spell lists which is neither an Open nor a Closed list (e.g., a Base or Evil list). These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Talent III
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 40 DP.

spells.name: Soul Gem
spells.description: Enchants a gemstone (at least 10 carats) so it can hold a spirit within for later embedding, allowing capture of spirits in the field. The gem need merely be touched to a willing individual to transfer their spirit; it can later be removed by binding it into an item, by Lifegiving to its original body, or by destroying the gem.

spells.name: Bind Restless Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed an undead spirit into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest General
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to general traits of an embedded spirit, such as its level for purposes of the bearer's RRs, a full set of senses (without talents) in item form, etc.

spells.name: Manifest Talent IV
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 75 DP.

spells.name: Bind Other Spirit
spells.description: Allows caster to embed any spirit that does not fall into the previously listed categories into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Spiritform
spells.description: Enchants an item with an embedded spirit such that the wielder may take on the mental or physical appearance (or both) of the spirit. Transformation is at will and takes 1 AP. Physical change gives the form of the spirit's previous existence (but no powers not otherwise granted); mental change makes wielder and item detect as a single mind with the spirit's characteristics.

spells.name: Compelling Spirit
spells.description: Enchants an item with an embedded spirit such that RRs against the wielder's spells that summon, control, influence, or deceive suffer a penalty when the target is of the same kind as the spirit: the spirit's level if the same Category, twice if the same Type, triple if the same Variety.

spells.name: Manifest Talent True
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but there is no limit on the talent's DP cost.

spells.name: Spiritwalk
spells.description: Enchants an item with an embedded spirit such that the wielder may journey incorporeally, as the spell Conveyance (Delving Ways) except with no time limit (the body is still left vulnerable). Requires no spellcasting, just a round of relaxation and the decision to depart. The wielder may also journey to suitable spirit realms or dream lands connected to the embedded spirit.

spells.name: Soul Trapper
spells.description: Creates an item that can draw in and imprison unwilling spirits (used by a wielder or via a trigger such as looking into a mirror). Any creature with a spirit must make an RR or be drawn into the item. An attuned user can communicate with and release trapped spirits. The item has a limited number of spaces (roll 2-20 at creation); new spirits beyond the limit release the oldest first.

spells.name: Charm of Bravery
spells.description: Creates a charm such that whenever the bearer fails an RR against Fear, he may make a second RR and use the better result. The charm loses its power when the bearer fails the second RR (he may still benefit from a reduced result if he fails by less than his first RR). (Charms are made from organic bits and are cheap: 1 sp/day for materials; if the user is the caster, time is halved. Charms need no Consecration, Make, or Work spells.)

spells.name: Lesser Charm of Health
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against a specific disease.

spells.name: Spell Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against a specific spell (different version numbers, "Lord", "Mass", and "True" versions are all affected so long as the name is otherwise the same).

spells.name: Lesser Countertoxic Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against a specific poison or venom.

spells.name: Particular Periapt
spells.description: Creates a charm to protect against a specific individual: when that foe inflicts a critical on the bearer, the bearer may have it rerolled and suffer the preferred result. A token of the individual must be included. The periapt loses its power when the reroll matches the original roll.

spells.name: Warning Talisman
spells.description: Creates a charm such that when the bearer makes a maneuver to perceive danger, he gains a bonus equal to the caster's ranks in this list, reduced by one for each time the talisman has changed a result. When the bonus reaches zero, the enchantment ends.

spells.name: Charm of Focused Protection
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against anything caused by a particular individual. Some token of this individual must be included in the charm.

spells.name: Spell List Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against all spells from a given spell list.

spells.name: Survival Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to maneuvers made involving physical risks (e.g., jumping across a chasm or juggling swords).

spells.name: Greater Charm of Health
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against all diseases.

spells.name: Specific Periapt
spells.description: As Particular Periapt, except protection applies to criticals due to attacks from a given species or Variety of creature, and a token from such a creature must be included.

spells.name: Greater Countertoxic Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against all venoms and poisons.

spells.name: Protective Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to RRs against diseases, or against poison, or against one Realm of magic.

spells.name: Typed Periapt
spells.description: As Particular Periapt, except protection applies to all criticals of a given type (e.g., Cold or Slash) and no special token is required (the bearer's token is still needed if a single-user charm).

spells.name: Realm Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against all spells from a given Realm.

spells.name: Periapt of Battle
spells.description: Creates a charm such that when the bearer fumbles an attack roll, the fumble result may be rerolled and the bearer suffers the preferred result. The periapt loses its power when the reroll matches the original roll.

spells.name: Accessory Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to any breakage checks by equipment on the bearer's person instead of to RRs.

spells.name: Enchanter's Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to Magical Ritual.

spells.name: Generic Periapt
spells.description: As Particular Periapt, except protection applies to criticals from a general creature type (e.g., Dragons or Golems) and a token from a creature of that type must be included.

spells.name: Magic Charm
spells.description: As Charm of Bravery, except that it applies to RRs against all spells.

spells.name: Healing Periapt
spells.description: Creates a charm such that when the bearer suffers an injury, he may reroll the recovery roll and use the better of the two. The periapt loses its power when the reroll matches the original roll.

spells.name: Essential Periapt
spells.description: Creates a charm such that when the bearer suffers spell failure, he may reroll the spell failure result and take the preferred of the two. The periapt loses its power when the reroll matches the original roll.

spells.name: Assassin's Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to attack rolls against a given target. A token of the target must be part of the charm.

spells.name: General Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus may be applied to any maneuver (no attack rolls or SCRs).

spells.name: Universal Periapt
spells.description: As Particular Periapt, except protection applies to all criticals and no special token is required (the bearer's token is still needed if a single-user charm).

spells.name: Killer's Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to attack rolls against a given species or Variety of creature. A token from such a creature must be part of the charm.

spells.name: Guardian Talisman
spells.description: As Warning Talisman, except that the bonus applies to DB (each attack that has its result changed reduces the bonus).

spells.name: Soulkeeper
spells.description: Creates a special charm called a "Soulkeeper". If the bearer dies, his soul is kept within, allowing restoration by Lifegiving even without the body (which is regenerated). If the body is present, resurrection stat penalties are only -5 each. The kept soul might also be embedded via the Spirit Binding list. The soul flees into the Soulkeeper on Absolution (returning after 24 hours, or a week for Absolution Pure), and gets a second RR against Dark Absolution. Functions only once.

spells.name: Analyze Demon
spells.description: Each round, the caster may learn one of the following about a single demon: level, plane of origin, one talent, one flaw, one spell list, one skill bonus. (In addition to demons, spells on this list may be used on other Extra Planar creatures, including to bind them into items.)

spells.name: Express Demonic Nature
spells.description: Brings out the demonic nature of an item into which a demon has been embedded, giving cosmetic effects and granting the attuned bearer a bonus equal to the embedded demon's level to Creature Lore: Demon maneuvers and SCRs casting spells dealing with demons.

spells.name: Improved Communication
spells.description: Cast once per day, gives an intelligent item the power of touch telepathy or of speech. Cast twice per day (double time and PP) it can provide ranged telepathy with a range equal to its level in feet.

spells.name: Manifest Talent I
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded demon's talents up to a limit of 6 DP value.

spells.name: Bind Demon I
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type I demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest Open List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded demon's Open spell lists. These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Internal Skill
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to three of an embedded demon's skills for purposes of the item's own use or the direct use of the item.

spells.name: Slayer of Kind I
spells.description: Turns a weapon containing an embedded demon into one which gains +10 OB when fighting Extra Planar Creatures, is Slaying II against one Variety of demon and Slaying I against all demons of the same Type as that Variety. The embedded demon must be at least Type II.

spells.name: Manifest Power
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to an embedded demon's normal PP total, for use in casting spells from its lists.

spells.name: Bind Demon II
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type II or lesser demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest Closed List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded demon's Closed spell lists. These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Talent II
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 20 DP.

spells.name: Slayer of Kind II
spells.description: Turns a weapon containing an embedded demon into one which gains +15 OB when fighting Extra Planar Creatures, is Slaying III against one Variety of demon, Slaying II against all demons of the same Type, and Slaying I against other Extra Planar Creatures. The embedded demon must be at least Type III.

spells.name: Manifest Stat
spells.description: Allows caster to make one of an embedded demon's stat bonuses available to the wielder, or one of its physical stat bonuses (Ag, Co, Qu, St) available for the item's use.

spells.name: Bind Demon III
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type III or lesser demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest External Skill
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to three of an embedded demon's skills for all purposes.

spells.name: Manifest Greater List
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to one of an embedded demon's spell lists which is neither an Open nor a Closed list (Base or Evil). These spells may be cast using the wielder's PP or the item's PP.

spells.name: Manifest Talent III
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 40 DP.

spells.name: Slayer of Kind III
spells.description: Turns a weapon containing an embedded demon into one which gains +20 OB when fighting Extra Planar Creatures, is Slaying IV against one Variety of demon, Slaying III against all demons of the same Type, and Slaying II against other Extra Planar Creatures. The embedded demon must be at least Type IV.

spells.name: Bind Demon IV
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type IV or lesser demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest General
spells.description: Allows caster to provide access to general traits of an embedded demon, such as its level for purposes of the bearer's RRs, a full set of senses (without talents) in item form, etc.

spells.name: Manifest Talent IV
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but limit is 75 DP.

spells.name: Bind Demon V
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type V or lesser demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Slayer of Kind IV
spells.description: Turns a weapon containing an embedded demon into one which gains +25 OB when fighting Extra Planar Creatures, is Slaying IV against one Type of demon and Slaying III against other Extra Planar Creatures. The embedded demon must be at least Type V.

spells.name: Bind Demon VI
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a Type VI or lesser demon into an object as described in Section 5.3.

spells.name: Manifest Talent True
spells.description: As Manifest Talent I, but there is no limit on the talent's DP cost.

spells.name: Planewalker
spells.description: Empowers an item containing an embedded demon of at least Type V to grant the power to travel between the mortal and demonic spheres, and between demon planes. A Type V demon grants access only to the demonic planes of its own general type; a more powerful demon allows access to all demon planes. The bearer is acclimatized to the destination plane. Usable once per day, requiring a full minute of concentration.

spells.name: Bind Demon True
spells.description: Allows caster to embed any demon into an object as described in Section 5.3. Embedding demons beyond Type VI is generally a task best left to gods or god-like beings, but strange things can happen.

spells.name: Item Negation I
spells.description: All magical abilities of the target item cease to function while the caster concentrates. This does not remove the basic benefits of a magical item (e.g., it still gets an RR if targeted by a spell that allows one). (Items empowered by the caster's own faith are immune to this list; autonomous "items" such as golems and Symbols resist at twice their level; enchanted locations are unaffected.)

spells.name: Capability Negation I
spells.description: One magical ability of the target item ceases to function for the duration. The ability is determined at random unless the caster makes a Very Hard Spell Mastery maneuver to select which is negated.

spells.name: Power Negation I
spells.description: All items on the target lose their magical abilities as in Item Negation I while the caster concentrates.

spells.name: Charge Dispersion I
spells.description: One charge from a charged or empowered item is expended, as if it had been used. A charged item cannot be reduced below zero charges; an empowered item may have its uses for the current time span reduced to none.

spells.name: Area Negation I
spells.description: All items within the area of effect have their magical abilities negated as in Item Negation I.

spells.name: Item Negation II
spells.description: As Item Negation I, except duration is 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Capability Negation II
spells.description: As Capability Negation I, except the duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Charge Dispersion III
spells.description: As Charge Dispersion I, except three charges are dispersed.

spells.name: Power Negation II
spells.description: All items on the target lose their magical abilities as in Item Negation I for 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Deattunement
spells.description: Target loses all of his attunements to items, whether those items are present or not. He may attempt to reattune, but if he fails he cannot try again until he develops another rank of Attunement skill.

spells.name: Item Negation III
spells.description: As Item Negation I, except duration is 1 hour per level.

spells.name: Capability Negation III
spells.description: As Capability Negation I, except the duration is one day per level.

spells.name: Charge Dispersion V
spells.description: As Charge Dispersion I, except five charges are dispersed.

spells.name: Area Negation II
spells.description: All items within the area of effect have their magical abilities negated as in Item Negation I, for 1 minute per level.

spells.name: Power Negation III
spells.description: All items on the target lose their magical abilities as in Item Negation I for 1 hour per level.

spells.name: Item Negation IV
spells.description: As Item Negation I, except duration is 1 day per level.

spells.name: Null Area I
spells.description: Cast on the caster or another target, who is surrounded by a 10' radius within which any magical item must make an RR at -25 or cease to function magically while within the radius (including the target's own items).

spells.name: Charge Dispersion X
spells.description: As Charge Dispersion I, except ten charges are dispersed.

spells.name: Area Negation III
spells.description: All items within the area of effect have their magical abilities negated as in Item Negation I, for 1 hour per level.

spells.name: Power Negation IV
spells.description: All items on the target lose their magical abilities as in Item Negation I for 1 day per level.

spells.name: Null Area II
spells.description: As Null Area I, except for duration and that the radius of effect is 20'.

spells.name: Charge Dispersion True
spells.description: As Charge Dispersion I, except a number of charges up to the caster's level are dispersed.

spells.name: Entity Release
spells.description: An item with an entity bound into it (via Demonic Binding, Elemental Binding, or Spirit Binding) has that entity freed. The item loses all abilities based on the entity. The entity's fate and reactions depend on its type; gratitude is far from guaranteed.

spells.name: Area Negation IV
spells.description: All items within the area of effect have their magical abilities negated as in Item Negation I, for 1 day per level.

spells.name: Limited Disenchantment
spells.description: One power is permanently removed from the target item. The caster may make an Extremely Hard Spell Mastery maneuver to choose a known power to remove; otherwise it is random. Cast on an item with doubled Unbreakable Work, it reveals the method by which it might be destroyed (if the target fails its RR).

spells.name: Null Area III
spells.description: As Null Area I, except for duration and that the radius of effect is 30'.

spells.name: Disenchantment
spells.description: As Limited Disenchantment, except removes all magical properties from the target item. The item is no longer magical, but retains any non-magical bonuses.

spells.name: Disenchantment True
spells.description: As Disenchantment, except affects all items on the target (each item makes a separate RR).

spells.name: Sacred Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns origin, history, and powers of one item insofar as these relate directly to the central concerns of the caster's power source. (These spells require no Work or Make spell, only Consecration; the item must be associated with the caster's religion and meet its requirements. The GM must limit allowed abilities to those with a clear mythological or theological link to the caster's power source.)

spells.name: Sacred Tongue
spells.description: Enchants an item which allows the bearer to speak and understand the spoken "holy language" of his faith as if he had 5 ranks in the language. Grants an intelligent item the power of speech (including its existing language skills).

spells.name: Sacred Weapon I
spells.description: Enchants a weapon closely associated with his faith with a +5 bonus to OB. Ranged weapons which launch missiles instead receive a +10' bonus to their range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill I
spells.description: Enchants an item associated with his faith so it grants a +5 bonus to one skill specialization (or a non-specializable skill) associated with his faith. Alternatively, +2 to the number of ranks for purposes that use ranks rather than the skill bonus.

spells.name: Sacred Spell II
spells.description: Embeds a spell of up to second level, closely associated with his faith, into an item associated with his faith, usable once per day (as if an Embed and Daily spell had been used). The spell must still be cast each day of enchantment.

spells.name: Sacred Script
spells.description: Enchants an item which allows the bearer to read and write the "holy language" of his faith as if he had 5 ranks in the language.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon II
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +10 or a +20' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill II
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +10 bonus or +4 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Sacred Protections II
spells.description: Enchants an item associated with his faith so it provides a +10 bonus to either RRs or DB against some hazard his deity opposes or rules. It may also counter a penalty the deity opposes (e.g., a god of night negating a darkness penalty).

spells.name: Sacred Spell IV
spells.description: As Sacred Spell II, except a spell up to fourth level.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon III
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +15 or a +30' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill III
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +15 bonus or +6 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Divine Language
spells.description: Enchants an item which allows the bearer two-way communication in all forms of the "holy language" of his faith as if he had 10 ranks. Grants an intelligent item the power of speech and its writing capabilities.

spells.name: Sacred Protections IV
spells.description: As Sacred Protections II, except a bonus of +20.

spells.name: Sacred Spell VI
spells.description: As Sacred Spell II, except a spell up to sixth level.

spells.name: Sacred Summons
spells.description: Enchants an item associated with his faith so it allows the bearer to summon a specific kind of creature associated with his faith. They appear the round after the summons and aid for up to eight hours (or an hour of battle). Total levels summoned equal the days spent on this power; replacing any killed creature takes a year.

spells.name: Sacred Protections V
spells.description: As Sacred Protections II, except a bonus of +25.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon IV
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +20 or a +40' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill IV
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +20 bonus or +8 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Sacred Spell X
spells.description: As Sacred Spell II, except a spell up to tenth level.

spells.name: Sacred Skill V
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +25 bonus or +10 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon V
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +25 or a +50' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill VI
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +30 bonus or +12 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon VI
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +30 or a +60' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Skill VII
spells.description: As Sacred Skill I, except a +35 bonus or +14 ranks for purposes using the number of ranks.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon VII
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +35 or a +70' range increment.

spells.name: Sacred Spell True
spells.description: As Sacred Spell II, except a spell of any level.

spells.name: Sacred Weapon VIII
spells.description: As Sacred Weapon I, except the bonus is +40 or a +80' range increment.

spells.name: Analyze Golem
spells.description: Each round, the caster may learn one of the following about a single golem: level, composition material, one talent, one flaw, one spell list, one skill bonus. (See Section 5.4 for details on creating and managing golems.)

spells.name: Golem Glamour
spells.description: Creates an illusion allowing the chosen golem to appear to be a statue of any substance, as detailed as the caster wishes (possibly painted). The illusion must conform to the general size and pose of the golem and lasts until the golem moves.

spells.name: Locate Master
spells.description: Caster learns the approximate direction (but not distance) to the targeted golem's master or command item, if it is close enough to control the golem.

spells.name: Transfer Mastery
spells.description: Allows caster to transfer mastery of a golem from himself to someone else. Both the golem and the new master must be within range.

spells.name: Golem I
spells.description: Allows caster to animate a golem of up to 5th level, made of a non-magical, non-metallic material (e.g., a flesh golem).

spells.name: Metal Golem I
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be of a non-magical metallic material.

spells.name: Magic Golem I
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be of any material.

spells.name: Programmed Function
spells.description: Allows caster to assign an on-going task to a golem under his control, which it performs so long as it is able and receives no contrary instruction. The task may involve a single conditional element (e.g., "Destroy anyone who touches this treasure unless he first speaks the password").

spells.name: Golem II
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be up to 10th level (e.g., a tar golem).

spells.name: Metal Golem II
spells.description: As Golem II, except the golem may be of a non-magical metallic material.

spells.name: Magic Golem II
spells.description: As Golem II, except the golem may be of any material.

spells.name: Create Command Item
spells.description: Enchants an item giving its bearer the ability to command a golem the caster is creating or commands at the time. This is the only spell required for this enchantment (no Work or Consecration), though it may be incorporated into an item with other powers.

spells.name: Grow Nonmetallic Seed
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a golem figure in a mold from a "seed" of nonmetallic material.

spells.name: Embed Skill I
spells.description: Allows caster to embed a single skill which the golem can use, with one rank per level. Unless granted intelligence, the golem uses skills only in a rote, routine manner (it can recite memorized lore but cannot think analytically).

spells.name: Golem III
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be up to 15th level (e.g., a clay golem).

spells.name: Metal Golem III
spells.description: As Golem III, except the golem may be of a non-magical metallic material.

spells.name: Magic Golem III
spells.description: As Golem III, except the golem may be of any material.

spells.name: Grow Metallic Seed
spells.description: Allows caster to grow a golem figure in a mold from a "seed" of metallic material.

spells.name: Golem IV
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be up to 20th level.

spells.name: Metal Golem IV
spells.description: As Golem IV, except the golem may be of a non-magical metallic material (e.g., a brass or stone golem).

spells.name: Magic Golem IV
spells.description: As Golem IV, except the golem may be of any material.

spells.name: Embed Skill II
spells.description: As Embed Skill I, except the golem will have two ranks in the skill per level.

spells.name: Magic Golem XL
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be up to 40th level and may be made of any material (e.g., an iron or eog golem).

spells.name: Assign Loyalty
spells.description: Allows caster to make a golem in his command loyal to some group, protecting and accepting commands from all rulers of a dynasty or nation, all members of a clergy (or one position), the eldest female in a family, or the like.

spells.name: Enduring Vengeance
spells.description: Allows caster to program a golem under his control to relentlessly search out and destroy one target type, against which its attacks become Slaying II. May happen immediately or be kept as a default state in case the golem goes out of control.

spells.name: Golem True
spells.description: As Golem I, except the golem may be of any level.

spells.name: Metal Golem True
spells.description: As Golem True, except the golem may be of a non-magical metallic material.

spells.name: Magic Golem True
spells.description: As Golem True, except the golem may be of any material.

spells.name: Location Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns if a given location is sacred ground and, if so, to which religion it is dedicated; whether it is otherwise enchanted, whether such magic is natural or spellcast, and the general nature and purpose of the enchantment; and whether the area is suitable for dedication to his own religion and any problems barring such use.

spells.name: Aura of Sanctity
spells.description: Provides the natural aspects of a consecrated area with a general feel and cosmetic enhancements suitable to its deity (dewdrops sparkle, flowers bloom large, streams babble musically, etc., or bare and still for a death god). The place evokes whatever feeling is most appropriate.

spells.name: Consecrate I #
spells.description: Enchants a small area so as to make it sacred ground (an outdoor area or natural feature dedicated to a religious purpose, such as a standing stone, spring, tree, or small cave).

spells.name: Living Symbol
spells.description: Enchants an immobile living thing (usually a tree) on sacred ground such that it can contain a Symbol (cast by a member of the faith). Counts as an enchantment of the sacred site. The living thing must be at least twenty years old and weigh at least fifty pounds.

spells.name: Blessed Fertility
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that the growth of desired species is promoted and suitable animals are drawn to the area. Harvests will be 50% greater than normal.

spells.name: Crunching Earth
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground where anyone not of the faith has difficulty being stealthy (leaves crackle, floors creak, twigs snap, birds are disturbed), a -50 penalty to all such Stalking attempts.

spells.name: Channel Nexus
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground so that members of the faith within gain +25 to all Channeling maneuvers, while enemies of the faith suffer -25. (This affects use of the Channeling skill, not Channeling spellcasting.)

spells.name: Consecrate II #
spells.description: Enchants a medium-sized area so as to make it sacred ground (a stone circle, a pond, a grove, a large cave, etc.).

spells.name: Blessed Vitality
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that members of the faith recover from injury or fatigue at three times the normal rate, while others not hostile to the faith recover at twice the normal rate.

spells.name: Desecration
spells.description: Undoes the enchantments which render an area sacred ground, requiring daily castings for as many days as this spell's level (10) plus the level of the area. Must be completed before rededication to another faith. A "naturally" sacred place counts as double level for the time required.

spells.name: Blessed Casting I
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that Channeling spells cast by those dedicated to its deity have +5 to SCRs and -10 to any resulting spell failure roll. Hybrid casters of the same deity may apply this to their base list spells.

spells.name: Lesser Auspicious Location
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground conducive to ritual magic by members of the faith: if all participants are members, the site is an auspicious location worth at least a +5 bonus (any superior site bonus is used when it applies).

spells.name: Blessed Rest
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that the need for sleep is reduced by 25% for all not hostile to the faith (3 hours count as 4). Channelers of the faith residing there permanently need only 50% sleep; those hostile or under penalty need an extra 25%.

spells.name: Blessed Casting II
spells.description: As Blessed Casting I, but the modifiers are +10 to SCRs and -20 to spell failure rolls.

spells.name: Consecrate III #
spells.description: Enchants a large area so as to make it sacred ground (a mountain, a lake, a wood, a cavern complex, etc.).

spells.name: Blessed Longevity
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that any living thing with a multiyear lifespan ages at one-tenth speed while within the area, so long as it has reached maturity.

spells.name: Blessed Casting III
spells.description: As Blessed Casting I, but the modifiers are +15 to SCRs and -30 to spell failure rolls.

spells.name: Minor Auspicious Location
spells.description: As Lesser Auspicious Location, except that the minimum bonus for rituals is +10.

spells.name: Peaceful Garden
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that natural creatures are non-hostile (+50 Animal Handling), sleep is nightmare-free and restful, accidents reduce criticals by three severities and grant +50 to accidental breakage rolls. Dropped bread lands buttered-side up.

spells.name: Blessed Casting IV
spells.description: As Blessed Casting I, but the modifiers are +20 to SCRs and -40 to spell failure rolls.

spells.name: Major Auspicious Location
spells.description: As Lesser Auspicious Location, except that the minimum bonus for rituals is +15.

spells.name: Miraculous Garden
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that it becomes a suitable growing site for magical herbs (not outside their normal biome, but any magical herbs that grow in the location's general conditions).

spells.name: Blessed Casting V
spells.description: As Blessed Casting I, but the modifiers are +25 to SCRs and -50 to spell failure rolls.

spells.name: Greater Auspicious Location
spells.description: As Lesser Auspicious Location, except that the minimum bonus for rituals is +20.

spells.name: Blessed Casting VI
spells.description: As Blessed Casting I, but the modifiers are +30 to SCRs and -60 to spell failure rolls.

spells.name: Rainbow Bridge
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground with a physical connection to its patron's home plane or region. On certain holy days (usually 4 to 13 a year) the connection opens, allowing members of the religion to pass into the divine realm and return; no being from the other side or outside the religion can pass. Can serve as an emergency escape route.

spells.name: Supreme Auspicious Location
spells.description: As Lesser Auspicious Location, except that the minimum bonus for rituals is +25, and only the primary caster need be a member of the faith.

spells.name: Living Presence
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that an immanent sense of the caster's god permeates the area: enhanced effects like Aura of Sanctity, +25 to all divinatory spells using the god's power, and anyone acting in opposition to the god's will must make a Fear RR against the site's level.

spells.name: Determine Religion
spells.description: Caster learns if one target item is associated with a religion and, if so, which one and whether the item actively serves the religion (as an intelligent/willed item) or is simply dedicated to it through enchantment or manufacture.

spells.name: Consecration #
spells.description: Enchants an item so it is suitable for further enchantments from this list, Demonic Binding, Divine Touch, or Golem Making. If only spells from these lists are used, this is the only enchantment needed for the base item (no Work spell required). The item must meet all applicable standards of the caster's religion.

spells.name: Chosen Kind
spells.description: Enchants an item such that a given spell ability (e.g., from Sacred Spell) can only be used by those of a certain Race (or set of Races) or Profession (or set of Professions).

spells.name: Sacred Adder I
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +1 Spell Adder that can only be used to cast a kind of spell appropriate for the caster's deity (e.g., fire spells).

spells.name: Blessed Weapon I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it gains an additional +5 OB when it attacks any creature of darkness (see Spell Law Section 10.8).

spells.name: Shielded Spirit
spells.description: Enchants an item such that the wielder is immune to curses, magical diseases, magical mind diseases, etc. (any magical effect requiring a specialized spell to remove) and to Black Channels. The wielder gains +50 to RRs against all forms of Absolution.

spells.name: Sacred Adder II
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +2 Spell Adder that can only be used to cast a kind of spell appropriate for the caster's deity.

spells.name: Spellcaster
spells.description: Enchants an item possessed of an artificial intelligence to cast spells. Cast multiple times to increase the effect: one casting grants the Open lists of a single Realm, doubling adds the Closed lists, tripling adds all other lists of that Realm, and additional castings add another Realm for Hybrid casting. Also provides Power Development and the Sanctifier's choice of spell lists up to the item's learning capacity.

spells.name: Blessed Thoughts I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it possesses Medium Intelligence.

spells.name: Blessed Weapon II
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it gains an additional +10 OB when it attacks any creature of darkness (see SL Section 10.8).

spells.name: Sacred Adder III
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +3 Spell Adder that can only be used to cast a kind of spell appropriate for the caster's deity.

spells.name: Additional Skills
spells.description: Increases the learning potential of an item with artificial intelligence: either the maximum number of skills it can learn is increased by one category, or the maximum ranks in one skill is increased by one category (see Table 5-3i).

spells.name: Taboo I
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it delivers a B critical to any unauthorized person touching it. At enchantment it may be set to permit contact by Channeling users of the caster's religion, any member of the religion, or those who are not Evil (or are Evil).

spells.name: Blessed Thoughts II
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it possesses High Intelligence.

spells.name: Sacred Adder IV
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +4 Spell Adder that can only be used to cast a kind of spell appropriate for the caster's deity.

spells.name: Blessed Weapon III
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it gains an additional +15 OB when it attacks any creature of darkness (see SL Section 10.8).

spells.name: Taboo II
spells.description: As Taboo I, except that a D critical is delivered.

spells.name: Lesser Holy Weapon
spells.description: Creates a weapon which strikes as if one Size larger against Evil entities (demons, undead, anyone with an Evil spell list, etc.). An Evil creature directly touching it takes an A Holy critical (no Size adjustment). If intelligent, it gains +10 to Will.

spells.name: Sacred Adder V
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +5 Spell Adder that can only be used to cast a kind of spell appropriate for the caster's deity.

spells.name: Blessed Thoughts III
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it possesses Superior Intelligence.

spells.name: Holy Weapon
spells.description: Creates a weapon which strikes as if one Size larger against Evil entities and does an additional Holy critical two severities less than the regular critical. An Evil creature touching it takes a B Holy critical; against larger demons or undead it is Slaying I. If intelligent, +15 to Will.

spells.name: Sacred Adder VII
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +7 Spell Adder for the deity's kind of spell. May also create a +6 Spell Adder, requiring 25 PP and enchantment days rather than 30.

spells.name: Blessed Thoughts IV
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it possesses Genius Intelligence.

spells.name: Purification
spells.description: Creates an item that gradually converts its wielder (and close associates) to the item's religion, ethics, and purposes. Each use or week of proximity requires an RR vs Channeling magic of the item's level; each failure is 1% influence. At 100%, conversion is complete. Anything short can be reversed at 1%/week on opposing sacred ground.

spells.name: Greater Holy Weapon
spells.description: Creates a weapon which strikes as if two Sizes larger against Evil entities and does an additional Holy critical one severity less than the regular critical. An Evil creature touching it takes a C Holy critical; against demons or undead it is Slaying I. If intelligent, +20 to Will.

spells.name: Sacred Adder X
spells.description: Enchants an item which is a +10 Spell Adder for the deity's kind of spell. May also create a +8 Spell Adder (40 PP and enchantment days) or a +9 Spell Adder (50 PP and enchantment days).

spells.name: Blessed Thoughts V
spells.description: Enchants an item such that it possesses Transcendent Intelligence.

spells.name: Eternal Service
spells.description: Enchants an individual such that they become the alternative form of an item resembling them. An attuned user (or the proper trigger) can transform the item into the individual (one round) and order them back. Without an ongoing magical purpose, the individual reverts after one hour. The individual is immortal so long as the item survives; death requires 1 day per level to recover.

spells.name: Sacred Runes
spells.description: By casting this spell within a minute after the creation of a magical rune, the caster attunes it to his own religious faith. Anyone not of the caster's religion suffers -100 to any Runes maneuver attempted on the affected rune.

spells.name: Rune I
spells.description: Inscribes another spell on rune paper as a rune, which can then be used to cast the inscribed spell once (leaving the paper blank but reusable). Rune I inscribes only 1st level spells. The spell to inscribe must be cast within one minute; both casters must touch the Rune Paper.

spells.name: Work Writing Surface #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with non-magical paper, parchment, bound books, or other writing formats appropriate to his religion to create an enchanted item (or work it without enchanting in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers).

spells.name: Rune II
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-2nd level spells.

spells.name: Make Rune Paper #
spells.description: Allows caster to make a sheet of paper or parchment which will hold a rune as described in the Open Essence list Rune Mastery and on this list.

spells.name: Rune III
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-3rd level spells.

spells.name: Secret Script
spells.description: Enchants a text so the writing is visible only when specific circumstances are met (e.g., in the light of a full moon). The writing may be mundane or magical. If this is the only magical feature, no Work spell is needed.

spells.name: Rune IV
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-4th level spells.

spells.name: Complex Rune I
spells.description: Combines two spells into a single rune, cast together as a single spell (each included spell requires its own Rune spell, with no more than one minute between castings). When casting the rune, treat the SCR as if the spell were the highest level plus two levels per additional spell; casting level equals the highest spell level included.

spells.name: Rune V
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-5th level spells.

spells.name: Hermetic Rune
spells.description: When cast before a Rune spell, allows caster to cast a Magical Ritual as the spell to be placed in a rune (timing windows of one minute apply). Allows placing enhanced versions of a spell in a rune; the rune is then treated as if the spell were normal for casting and Runes maneuvers.

spells.name: Rune VI
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-6th level spells.

spells.name: Complex Rune II
spells.description: As Complex Rune I, except up to three spells may be combined into a single rune.

spells.name: Rune VII
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-7th level spells.

spells.name: Scriptures I
spells.description: Enchants a copy of sacred texts such that it may be used in a magical ritual and count as a 1000 gp tool relevant to any ritual where all participants are of the caster's religion. The bonus may be enhanced for appropriateness as usual.

spells.name: Rune VIII
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-8th level spells.

spells.name: Secret Illustration
spells.description: As Secret Script, except the concealed material can include illustrations (drawings, paintings, etc.) and maps, in addition to text.

spells.name: Rune IX
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster may inscribe 1st-9th level spells.

spells.name: Complex Rune III
spells.description: As Complex Rune I, except up to four spells may be combined into a single rune.

spells.name: Rune X
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-10th level spells.

spells.name: Lord Rune
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe 1st-20th level spells.

spells.name: Scriptures II
spells.description: As Scriptures I, but the text is treated as having a 100,000 gp value.

spells.name: Rune True
spells.description: As Rune I, except caster can inscribe a spell of any level.

spells.name: Complex Rune IV
spells.description: As Complex Rune I, except up to five spells may be combined into a single rune.

spells.name: Scriptures III
spells.description: As Scriptures I, but the text is treated as having a 10,000,000 gp value.

spells.name: Complex Rune V
spells.description: As Complex Rune I, except up to six spells may be combined into a single rune.

spells.name: Scriptures True
spells.description: As Scriptures III, but only the primary caster of the ritual need be of the caster's religion.

spells.name: Complex Rune True
spells.description: As Complex Rune I, except multiple spells may be combined into a single rune, up to a maximum of one spell per every ten levels of the caster.

spells.name: Structure Analysis
spells.description: Caster learns the purpose for which a structure was designed and built (not necessarily its current use), who built it in general terms (race/culture), when it was built, and its current condition.

spells.name: Splendor
spells.description: Provides the artificial aspects of a consecrated area with a general feel and cosmetic enhancements suitable to its deity (metals gleam, surfaces stay polished, light streams through stained glass, or cobwebs for a spider-god). The place evokes whatever feeling is most appropriate.

spells.name: Consecrate Structure #
spells.description: Enchants a single structure so as to make it sacred ground. It must be a structure created for, or rededicated to, a religious purpose.

spells.name: Grace
spells.description: Provides an area of sacred ground with protection from a specific natural threat appropriate to its deity (e.g., a temple of a sea god protected from earthquakes). A second Grace spell might protect against tsunamis.

spells.name: Supernatural Alarm
spells.description: Provides an alarm to an area of sacred ground that sounds when any hostile supernatural being enters (ringing bells, sounding horns, lighting candles, changing a flame's color, etc.).

spells.name: Spell Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier at the boundary of sacred ground that prevents a given spell from crossing (variants by roman numeral, "True", or "Lord" count as the same spell). The spell gets an RR against the site's level; an active spell on someone crossing is subject to dispelling.

spells.name: Lesser Entry Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier preventing entry by a specific creature Variety or the followers of a particular god. An RR against the site's level is allowed; on failure, the individual cannot try again to enter until a number of days passes equal to the amount by which the RR failed.

spells.name: Consecrate Grounds #
spells.description: Enchants a walled area so as to make it sacred ground. The area must be completely enclosed in a permanent wall or fence and dedicated to a religious purpose (church grounds, a monastery, a cemetery).

spells.name: Blessed Productivity
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that crafting (but not enchantment) appropriate to the faith has work time cut in half.

spells.name: Desecrate Structure
spells.description: Undoes the enchantments which render a structure or walled area sacred ground, requiring daily castings for as many working days as this spell's level (10) plus the level of the area. A naturally sacred place counts as double level for the time required.

spells.name: List Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier that functions as a Spell Barrier but blocks all spells from a single spell list. Spells that also appear on other lists are not blocked if cast from a different list.

spells.name: Universal Alarm
spells.description: As Supernatural Alarm, except the alarm sounds upon the entry of any hostile intruder.

spells.name: Holy Font
spells.description: Enchants a body of water on sacred ground (pool, pond, font, fountain, bath, spring) such that all its water is holy water so long as it remains on the holy site (becoming normal water if removed).

spells.name: Blessed Altar
spells.description: Enchants an altar of sacred ground such that anyone who prays there receives the site's blessing: an attempt to remove any curse, heal any mental illness, and exorcise any possessing spirit or mental invader. Each instance of a condition may be prayed against only once.

spells.name: Greater Entry Barrier
spells.description: As Lesser Entry Barrier, but will bar either a creature Type or a single profession.

spells.name: Symbol Synergy
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that all Symbols on it cast their spells at the higher of their normal level or the level of the sacred site.

spells.name: Heavenly Sound
spells.description: Creates an area of sacred ground where one instrument or set of instruments may be sounded to frighten hostile creatures: all hostiles within half a mile who can hear it must make an immediate Fear RR. Usable once per day, using the level of the sounder.

spells.name: Type Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier that functions as a Spell Barrier but blocks a given type of spell (e.g., fire magic, teleportation, detections, scrying, influence, or curses).

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.description: Enchants a fire source on sacred ground such that a Channeling user of the site's power who gazes into the flames may look upon a location up to one mile away per PP expended, the image lasting 1-10 minutes.

spells.name: Internal Barrier
spells.description: Cast with Spell Barrier, List Barrier, Type Barrier, Realm Barrier, or Universal Barrier, this causes the effect to cover the entire sacred grounds: any attempt to cast such blocked spells must make an RR against the site's level or fail.

spells.name: Major Entry Barrier
spells.description: As Lesser Entry Barrier, but will bar a broad category from entering (a creature Category such as undead or extra planar creatures, or a category like "men" or "weapon-bearers").

spells.name: Realm Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier that functions as a Spell Barrier but blocks all spells from a given realm (including hybrid spells that include that realm).

spells.name: Unidirectional Barrier
spells.description: Cast with Spell Barrier, List Barrier, Type Barrier, Realm Barrier, or Universal Barrier, this causes the effect to apply only to spell effects attempting to cross into the sacred grounds, not those leaving.

spells.name: Universal Barrier
spells.description: Creates a barrier that functions as a Spell Barrier but blocks all spells.

spells.name: Grand Entry Barrier
spells.description: As Lesser Entry Barrier, but will bar anyone other than followers of the faith to which the site is dedicated.

spells.name: Citadel of Faith
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that OBs, SCRs, and morale are modified: +20 to any Channeling-realm member of the site's faith, +10 to other members, -20 to any Channeling-realm enemy, and -10 to other enemies.

spells.name: Symbolic Power
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that Symbols on it recharge after one hour rather than being limited to daily use.

spells.name: Impossible Architecture
spells.description: Enchants an area of sacred ground such that a building, statue, or structure may defy physics (impossibly slender supports, an interior larger than the exterior, non-Euclidean geometries). Must be done as the impossible structure is being constructed.

spells.name: Work Skin #
spells.description: Allows caster to work with living skin to create an enchanted tattoo (or a normal tattoo without enchanting it in half the time, +30 to relevant Crafting maneuvers). (Each magical tattoo requires a percentage of tattooable body surface, never exceeding 100% total. Tattoos are innate powers, powered by the bearer's own aura, and cause the bearer to always radiate active Channeling magic for detection.)

spells.name: Work Covering #
spells.description: As Work Skin, except allows caster to work with living organic exterior surfaces such as scales or fur, permitting permanent marking of creatures whose surfaces would not normally take it.

spells.name: Make Tattoo I #
spells.description: Allows caster to use Embed Spell to create a tattoo that lets the bearer cast an embedded 1st level spell using his own PP, cast instantaneously. Normal casting penalties (free hands, silence) do not apply, but -10 SCR if the tattoo is partially covered, -30 if completely covered. Usable as often as PP allows.

spells.name: Embed Spell
spells.description: Embeds a single spell into a tattoo (requires 10% of tattooable surface). The spell must be cast every day during enchantment. It is usable a single time then erased, unless a suitable Make Tattoo spell is also used.

spells.name: Animate Tattoo #
spells.description: Creates a tattoo that can move in place (a dancing girl dances) or move around the skin through areas with no other tattoos. Movement can be programmed by the caster or controlled by the bearer through Concentration.

spells.name: Make Tattoo II #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo I, except allows embedding a 2nd level spell or, by using Embed List, a list of spells up to second level.

spells.name: Protective Tattoo I
