spells.description: Creates a tattoo that will, once per day, completely negate one fumble, spell failure, or critical suffered by the bearer. Covers 15% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Tattoo Removal
spells.description: Completely and painlessly removes non-magical tattoos in a one hour process. Magical tattoos require one hour per level; the tattoo gets an RR at the higher of its own or the bearer's level. If the RR is made, the caster must gain another rank in this list before trying again.

spells.name: Make Tattoo III #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 3rd level.

spells.name: Embed List
spells.description: Embeds a series of spells from the same list into a tattoo (requires 20% of tattooable surface). Each usable spell must be cast every day during the enchantment.

spells.name: Mystical Tattoo I
spells.description: Creates a tattoo in which the bearer may store a spell of up to 5th level, to be later released as an instantaneous spell. Requires 10% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Make Tattoo IV #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 4th level.

spells.name: Beast Tattoo
spells.description: Enchants a tattoo depicting an animal, granting +10 to all maneuvers when interacting with that animal type, +10 OB when fighting it, and speech with that animal type by Concentrating. Requires 10% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Efficient Tattoo
spells.description: Modifies a tattoo made with Embed Spell or Embed List so that only half the normal PP (round up) are required to cast the embedded spell(s).

spells.name: Make Tattoo V #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 5th level.

spells.name: Protective Tattoo II
spells.description: As Protective Tattoo I, except the tattoo can function twice a day.

spells.name: Mystical Tattoo II
spells.description: Creates a tattoo in which the bearer may store a spell of up to 10th level, to be later released as an instantaneous spell. Requires 10% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Make Tattoo VI #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 6th level.

spells.name: Prison Tattoo
spells.description: Creates a tattoo into which the bearer can confine any demon, elemental, or similar supernatural creature (the entity must first be controlled and commanded in). The bearer may release it at any time; on release it must make an RR at -50 or serve the bearer for one combat or simple task. Requires 20% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Make Tattoo VIII #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 8th level.

spells.name: Make Tattoo X #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 10th level.

spells.name: Protective Tattoo III
spells.description: As Protective Tattoo I, except the tattoo can function three times a day.

spells.name: Make Tattoo XV #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 15th level.

spells.name: Lord Mystical Tattoo
spells.description: Creates a tattoo in which the bearer may store a spell of up to 20th level, to be later released as an instantaneous spell. Requires 10% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Lord Make Tattoo #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be up to 20th level.

spells.name: Armoring Tattoo
spells.description: Creates a tattoo which provides AT 6 to the bearer (the whole body, not just the part covered). Requires 20% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Make Tattoo True #
spells.description: As Make Tattoo II, except spells may be of any level.

spells.name: Dragon Tattoo
spells.description: Creates the fabled Dragon Tattoo, granting the bearer an extra 100 Power Points, increasing the Size of his elemental attacks by one, allowing Unarmed attacks that count as magical and have Slaying III against one creature Variety, and (with Concentration) allowing the bearer to speak any language with +20 to Influence skills. Takes 25% of tattooable surface.

spells.name: Locate Focus
spells.description: Caster learns the location of the Focus for a given Standing Channel if it is within 10' per level of the caster. The caster must be aware of a specific Standing Channel to cast this. (A Standing Channel is a spell given Permanent duration by being bound to an object called a Focus, located at the spell's focal point.)

spells.name: Create Focus
spells.description: An object is prepared to become the Focus for a Standing Channel. This must be cast on the item as a regular enchantment prior to creating the Standing Channel; no Make or other additional spells are required to make the item a Focus.

spells.name: Offset Focus I
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 10' from the focal point. (If the Focus is moved beyond the allowed distance, or destroyed, the Standing Channel is dispelled.)

spells.name: Augment Channel I
spells.description: Once cast, the caster has one minute to cast a Standing Channel spell which will have a special -10 RR modifier applied to the spell placed into it, cumulative with any RR modifier the spell normally has.

spells.name: Standing Channel I
spells.description: When cast, a 1st level Channeling spell cast by the caster or a cooperating member of the same religion is made permanent as a Standing Channel. The spell to be made permanent must be cast within one minute, by a caster within 50'.

spells.name: Exotic Channel
spells.description: Once cast, the caster has one minute to cast a Standing Channel spell capable of holding a non-Channeling spell (e.g., a Sorcerer Base spell or an Open Mentalism spell).

spells.name: Offset Focus V
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 50' from the focal point.

spells.name: Standing Channel II
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 2nd level.

spells.name: Controlling Focus
spells.description: As Create Focus, except it allows a Focus that can turn the Standing Channel on and off, either by the Focus's condition (a switch, a bucket filled with water) or by touch from an attuned individual (a thought suffices). Attunement difficulty ranges from Easy for the caster to Absurd for those hostile to his faith. Can even toggle a Permanent spell on and off.

spells.name: Standing Channel III
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 3rd level.

spells.name: Offset Focus X
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 100' from the focal point.

spells.name: Standing Channel IV
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 4th level.

spells.name: Hardened Channel I
spells.description: Allows caster to enchant a Focus such that it makes the Standing Channel harder to dispel, allowing it a second RR against any attempt to dispel it.

spells.name: Standing Channel V
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 5th level.

spells.name: Offset Focus XX
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 200' from the focal point.

spells.name: Standing Channel VI
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 6th level.

spells.name: Augment Channel II
spells.description: As Augment Channel I, except that the modifier is -20.

spells.name: Standing Channel VII
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 7th level.

spells.name: Offset Focus XXX
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 300' from the focal point.

spells.name: Standing Channel VIII
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 8th level.

spells.name: Standing Channel X
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 10th level.

spells.name: Hardened Channel II
spells.description: As Hardened Channel I, except two extra RRs are given.

spells.name: Standing Channel XV
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 15th level.

spells.name: Augment Channel III
spells.description: As Augment Channel I, except that the modifier is -30.

spells.name: Lord Standing Channel
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be up to 20th level.

spells.name: Hardened Channel III
spells.description: As Hardened Channel I, except three extra RRs are given.

spells.name: Offset Focus True
spells.description: Cast on the prepared Focus before the casting of a Standing Channel, allows the Focus to be located up to 50' per level from the focal point.

spells.name: Standing Channel True
spells.description: As Standing Channel I, except the spell may be of any level.
